V       01  W-SEC-TABLE.
V           05  W-SCON-TABLE OCCURS 99 INDEXED BY W-SEC-IDX.
V               10  W-SCON-ENTRY.
V                   15  W-SCON-PRFX         PIC  X(004).
V                   15  W-SCON-SEC-LEVEL.
V                       20  W-SCON-CODE     PIC  X(003).
V                       20  FILLER          PIC  X(001).
V                   15  FILLER              PIC  X(003).

V               10  FILLER REDEFINES W-SCON-ENTRY.
V                   15  W-SCON-PGM-NAME     PIC  X(007).
V                   15  FILLER              PIC  X(004).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--    (EIBCALEN = 0)
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--  - CHECK THE CURRENT PROGRAM
V      *--
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBCALEN = 0
V                PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY   THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN RATTID = W-RATT
V                EXEC CICS LINK PROGRAM (W-RATT01)
V                              COMMAREA (W-ASKRATT-PARMS)
V                                LENGTH (LENGTH OF W-ASKRATT-PARMS)
V                END-EXEC
V                PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY   THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM02'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM03'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM04'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM05'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM06'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM07'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM08'
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG = 'ZGTM09'
V                MOVE W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG    TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V                PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL   THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG  = 'ZGTM01'
V      *--       CHECK KEY PRESSED
V                IF W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG = 'ZGTM01'
V
V                   EVALUATE EIBAID
V
V                     WHEN DFHENTER
V
V                       PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP  THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V                       IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                          PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V                       END-IF
V
V                     WHEN OTHER
V                       SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                       MOVE 'G012'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       MOVE 'INVALID PF KEYS' TO  W-MSG-TEXT-X
V                       MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V
V                   END-EVALUATE
V
V                ELSE
V
V                   PERFORM 2500-RETURN-ENTRY        THRU  2500-EXIT
V
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V      *--  BELOW STATEMENT WILL BE EXECUTED WHEN
V      *--   -  EIBCALEN = 0
V      *--   -  CURRENT PROGRAM IS ZGTM01
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'      TO  W-TRANID.
V
V           IF EIBCALEN  >  4
V              MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA
V              MOVE W-ZGTM-ZGTMSECT      TO  W-ZGTM-PGM-SEC-TBL
V              MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM01-COMMAREA
V           END-IF.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-TWA-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-07U-OK
V           OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-08U-OK
V              SET W-ADP-USER-YES  TO  TRUE
V           END-IF
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-DELETE TSQ JUST IN CASE THE PROGRAM HAS ABENDED WITHOUT
V      * DELETING THE TSQ.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM-COMMAREA
V                      W-ZGTM01-COMMAREA .
V
V
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY   TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES  TO  MENUMAPO.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM01'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           PERFORM 2200-GET-TWA  THRU  2200-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 2400-SETUP-SECURITY-TABLE THRU 2400-EXIT
V              MOVE W-ZGTM-PGM-SEC-TBL    TO   W-ZGTM-ZGTMSECT
V           END-IF.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2200-GET-TWA .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY   TO  TRUE.
V           INITIALIZE W-TWA-LENGTH  .
V
V           EXEC CICS ASSIGN TWALENG (W-TWA-LENGTH) END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-TWA-LENGTH = ZERO
V      *--      INVALID TWA LENGTH
V               SET W-TWA-ERROR-YES  TO  TRUE
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO  TRUE
V               MOVE 'S013'          TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF .
V
V           EXEC CICS ADDRESS
V                     TWA    (ADDRESS OF TWA-AREA)
V                     RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN ( W-RESP NOT = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V      *--        TWA ACCESS ERROR
V                 SET W-TWA-ERROR-YES  TO  TRUE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S013'          TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              WHEN ( TWA-CLIENT-NO NOT NUMERIC )
V              WHEN ( TWA-CLIENT-NO = ZERO )
V      *--        INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V                 SET W-TWA-ERROR-YES  TO  TRUE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE 'G017'          TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 MOVE TWA-CLIENT-NO           TO  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       2200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2400-SETUP-SECURITY-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM02U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM03U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM04U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM05U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM06U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM07U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM08U
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM09U
V
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM02I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM03I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM04I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM05I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM06I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM07I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM08I
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-ZGTM09I.
V
V           MOVE SPACE                  TO SECLINK-LIST
V           MOVE TWA-CLIENT-NO          TO SECLINK-CLIENT-ID
V           MOVE '3'                    TO SECLINK-ACTION-CODE
V           MOVE 'SCON'                 TO SECLINK-TYPE
V           MOVE W-TRANID               TO SECLINK-ITEM
V           MOVE 99                     TO SECLINK-TABLE-COUNT
V
V           PERFORM 2440-SECLINK  THRU 2440-EXIT
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V               WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '00'
V               WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '33'
V                   CONTINUE
V               WHEN OTHER
V                   EXEC CICS SEND
V                       FROM   (W-MAP-MSG)
V                       LENGTH (LENGTH OF W-MAP-MSG)
V                       ERASE
V                   END-EXEC
V
V                   EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC
V
V                   GOBACK
V           END-EVALUATE
V
V           MOVE SECLINK-TABLE-ADDRESS  TO W-SECLINK-TBL-ADDR
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V               WHEN W-SECLINK-TBL-ADDR-X = ZEROS
V               WHEN W-SECLINK-TBL-ADDR-X = SPACES
V               WHEN W-SECLINK-TBL-ADDR-X = LOW-VALUES
V                   GO TO 2400-EXIT
V               WHEN OTHER
V                   CONTINUE
V           END-EVALUATE
V
V           SET ADDRESS OF W-SEC-TABLE TO W-SECLINK-TBL-PTR
V
V           PERFORM  2410-LOAD-SEC-TAB  THRU 2410-EXIT
V                    VARYING W-ZGTM-IND FROM 1 BY 1
V                    UNTIL W-ZGTM-PGM-NAME (W-ZGTM-IND) = HIGH-VALUES
V                       OR W-ZGTM-IND > 20
V
V           PERFORM  2420-LOAD-SEC-CNT  THRU 2420-EXIT.
V
V       2400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       2410-LOAD-SEC-TAB.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-SEC-IDX TO 1
V
V           SEARCH W-SCON-TABLE
V               AT END
V                   MOVE 'N'  TO  W-ZGTM-SEC-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND)
V
V               WHEN W-ZGTM-PGM-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND) =
V                                        W-SCON-CODE (W-SEC-IDX)
V                   MOVE 'Y'            TO W-ZGTM-SEC-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND)
V
V               WHEN W-SCON-PRFX (W-SEC-IDX) NOT = W-TRANID
V                   MOVE 'N'            TO W-ZGTM-SEC-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND)
V
V           END-SEARCH.
V
V       2410-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       2420-LOAD-SEC-CNT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-ZGTM-SECURITY-TRAN.
V
V           PERFORM VARYING W-SEC-IDX FROM 1 BY 1
V               UNTIL W-SEC-IDX GREATER 99
V
V               EVALUATE TRUE
V                 WHEN W-SCON-CODE (W-SEC-IDX) = 'BCS'
V                   MOVE W-SCON-SEC-LEVEL (W-SEC-IDX) TO
V                                          W-ZGTM-SECURITY-TRAN
V                 WHEN OTHER
V                     CONTINUE
V               END-EVALUATE
V
V               EVALUATE TRUE
V
V      *--  UPDATE
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMAU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-02U-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMBU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-03U-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMCU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-04U-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMDU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-07U-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMEU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-08U-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMFU'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-09U-OK TO TRUE
V
V      *--  INQUIRY
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMA'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-02I-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMB'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-03I-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMC'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-04I-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMD'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-07I-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTME'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-08I-OK TO TRUE
V
V                   WHEN W-SCON-PGM-NAME (W-SEC-IDX) = 'ZGTMF'
V                      SET W-ZGTM-SECURITY-09I-OK TO TRUE
V
V
V                   WHEN OTHER
V                       CONTINUE
V
V               END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V
V           MOVE SPACE                TO SECLINK-LIST
V           MOVE '1'                  TO SECLINK-ACTION-CODE
V
V           PERFORM 2440-SECLINK    THRU  2440-EXIT
V
V           MOVE SECLINK-USER-ID      TO W-ZGTM-SNON-USER
VC001       MOVE SECLINK-TERMINAL-ID  TO W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID
VC001       MOVE SECLINK-LOCATION-ID  TO W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V               WHEN W-ZGTM-SECURITY-TRAN = 'BCS5'
V                   CONTINUE
V               WHEN OTHER
V                   EVALUATE TRUE
V                       WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '11'
V                       WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '12'
V                       WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '13'
V                       WHEN SECLINK-RETURN-CODE = '14'
V                           MOVE SECLINK-RR TO W-ZGTM-SECURITY-SIGNON-RR
V                       WHEN OTHER
V                           MOVE 'TERMINAL HAS NO RR SIGNED ON'
V                                           TO SECLINK-MESSAGE
V                           EXEC CICS SEND
V                               FROM   (SECLINK-MESSAGE)
V                               LENGTH (LENGTH OF SECLINK-MESSAGE)
V                               ERASE
V                           END-EXEC
V
V                           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC
V
V                           GOBACK
V
V                   END-EVALUATE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2420-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       2440-SECLINK.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM  ('SECLINK')
V               COMMAREA (SECLINK-LIST)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF SECLINK-LIST)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       2440-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       2450-FILL-MENU.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-ZGTM-IND TO 1
V
V           SEARCH W-ZGTM-PGM-SEC-TBL-ENTRY
V               AT END MOVE 'N' TO W-SEC-PAS
V
V               WHEN W-SUBMENU-CODE (W-MNU-SUB) =
V                                         W-ZGTM-PGM-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND)
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM-SEC-CODE (W-ZGTM-IND) TO W-SEC-PAS
V
V           END-SEARCH
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V             WHEN W-SEC-PASSED
V               ADD 1 TO W-MLIT-SUB
V
V               MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO        W-MENU-OPT-CPOA (W-MLIT-SUB)
V               MOVE W-SUBMENU-LIT (W-MNU-SUB) TO
V                                         W-MENU-OPT-LIT (W-MLIT-SUB)
V               SET W-SECURITY-ALLOWED  TO  TRUE
V             WHEN OTHER
V                 CONTINUE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2450-EXIT. EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       2500-RETURN-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CONTROL RETURNS FROM ANOTHER SCREEN
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY   TO  TRUE.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM01'  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM01-COMMAREA .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-OPTION-CD   TO  MOPTNCDI.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-TABLE-NAME  TO  MADPNMEI.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NBR  TO  MCLIENTI.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MSCOPTNI.
V
V       2500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM01M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 MOVE EIBCPOSN  TO  W-CURSOR
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              INITIALIZE MPGMMSGO
V
V              INSPECT MOPTNCDI REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT MADPNMEI REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT MCLIENTI REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT MSCOPTNI REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V
V              IF MOPTNCDI = LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM01-MOPTNCDI  TO  MOPTNCDI
V              END-IF
V
V              IF MADPNMEI = LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM01-MADPNMEI  TO  MADPNMEI
V              END-IF
V
V              IF MCLIENTI = LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM01-MCLIENTI  TO  MCLIENTI
V              END-IF
V
V              IF MSCOPTNI = LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM01-MSCOPTNI  TO  MSCOPTNI
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  CLT NBR AND SCALE OPT DISPLAYED ONLY FOR CLT 096 - START
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  NOT =  W-ADP-CLIENT-NBR
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  TO  MCLIENTI
V                 MOVE SPACES               TO  MSCOPTNI
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  TIRIEVA  -  08/15/02  -  END
V
V      *
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4100-VALIDATE-OPTION  THRU  4100-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4200-CHECK-SECURITY   THRU  4200-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  IF INPUT CLIENT NBR IS SPACES, THE LOGON CLIENT NBR IS USED
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MOPTNCDI = 'A'
V              OR MOPTNCDI = 'B'
V              OR MOPTNCDI = 'C'
V                 IF MCLIENTI = SPACES
V                    MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  TO  MCLIENTI
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4400-CHECK-TABLE-NAME THRU  4400-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4300-CHECK-CLIENT-NBR THRU  4300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4500-CHECK-SCALE-OPTN THRU  4500-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4700-PROCESS-OPTION   THRU  4700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL   THRU  8900-EXIT
V           END-IF .
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4100-VALIDATE-OPTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  VALIDATE OPTION CODES ARE
V      *--      A - ADD ENTRIES TO AN EXISTING TABLE
V      *--      B - MODIFY ENTRIES TO AN EXISTING TABLE
V      *--      C - LIST ALL TABLES
V      *--      D - CREATE A TABLE DEFINITION
V      *--      E - MODIFY A TABLE DEFINITION
V      *--      F - LIST ALL TABLE DEFINITION
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V              WHEN 'A'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM02'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN 'B'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM03'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN 'C'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM04'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN 'D'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM07'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN 'E'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM08'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN 'F'
V                 MOVE 'ZGTM09'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V              WHEN SPACE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V                 MOVE 'B050'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V                 MOVE 'F000'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-EVALUATE .
V      *
V       4100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4200-CHECK-SECURITY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *-- CHECK IF THE OPTION IS NOT ALLOWED FOR USER SCON PROFILE
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V
V              WHEN 'A'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-02U-OK
V      *            OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-02I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN 'B'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-03U-OK
V      *            OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-03I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN 'C'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-04U-OK
V                   OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-04I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN 'D'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-07U-OK
V      *            OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-07I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN 'E'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-08U-OK
V      *            OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-08I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN 'F'
V                   IF W-ZGTM-SECURITY-09U-OK
V                   OR W-ZGTM-SECURITY-09I-OK
V                      CONTINUE
V                   ELSE
V      *--            ACCESS DENIED
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND      TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1                TO  MOPTNCDL
V                     MOVE 'S005'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V                 MOVE 'F000'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V      *
V       4200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4300-CHECK-CLIENT-NBR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CLIENT NUMBER IS REQUIRED FOR OPTIONS 'A','B','C','D','E'
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V
V             WHEN 'A'
V             WHEN 'B'
V             WHEN 'C'
V      *--  CLT NBR AND SCALE OPT DISPLAYED ONLY FOR CLT 096 - START
V               IF MCLIENTI = SPACES
V                  CONTINUE
V               ELSE
V                  IF W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  NOT =  W-ADP-CLIENT-NBR
V      *--  TIRIEVA  -  08/15/02  -  END
V                     IF MCLIENTI NOT = W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3
V                        SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                        MOVE -1            TO  MCLIENTL
V                        MOVE 'G017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                     END-IF
V                  END-IF
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'D'
V             WHEN 'E'
V               IF MCLIENTI = SPACES
V               OR MCLIENTI NOT NUMERIC
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MCLIENTL
V                 MOVE 'G017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V               IF MCLIENTI = SPACES
V                  CONTINUE
V               ELSE
V                 IF MCLIENTI NOT NUMERIC
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  MCLIENTL
V                    MOVE 'G017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V               CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V      *
V       4300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4400-CHECK-TABLE-NAME.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  TABLE NAME IS REQUIRED FOR OPTIONS 'A','B','D',AND 'E'
V      *--  FOR OPTIONS 'C' AND 'F', THE LIST WILL START FROM THE
V      *--  ENTERED TABLE NAME.  IF THE FIELD IS SPACE, THE LIST WILL
V      *--  START FROM THE FIRST RECORD IN THE TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V
V             WHEN 'A'
V             WHEN 'B'
V             WHEN 'D'
V             WHEN 'E'
V               IF MADPNMEI = SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MADPNMEL
V                 MOVE 'R001'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               ELSE
V                 PERFORM 4420-CHECK-TABLE-DEFN  THRU  4420-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'C'
V             WHEN 'F'
V                 IF MCLIENTI  =  SPACES
V                    MOVE SPACES    TO  W-INP-CLIENT-NBR
V                 ELSE
V                    MOVE '0'       TO  W-INP-CLT-NBR-X1
V                    MOVE MCLIENTI  TO  W-INP-CLT-NBR-X3
V                 END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V               MOVE 'F000'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V       4400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4420-CHECK-TABLE-DEFN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  FOR OPTION 'D', THE TABLE SHOULD NOT BE DEFINED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF MCLIENTI  =  SPACES
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V              MOVE '0'               TO  W-INP-CLT-NBR-X1
V              MOVE MCLIENTI          TO  W-INP-CLT-NBR-X3
V              MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V           END-IF
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE MADPNMEI             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V           MOVE 0                    TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                  ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                  ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND (TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                OR  TRMNT_DT      IS  NULL)
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       AND (TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                        OR  TRMNT_DT      IS  NULL)
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO  W-ZGTM01-CLIENT-NBR
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO  W-ZGTM01-TABLE-NAME
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO  W-ZGTM01-PRKEY-NBR
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO  W-ZGTM01-EFFCT-DT
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO  W-ZGTM01-TRMNT-DT
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                MOVE W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME     TO  W-ZGTM01-FIELD-NAME
V                MOVE W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE     TO  W-ZGTM01-DFLT-VALUE
V                MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT     TO  W-ZGTM01-VALUE-FRMT
V                MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN      TO  W-ZGTM01-VALUE-LEN
V                MOVE W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN     TO  W-ZGTM01-SCALE-OPTN
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO  W-ZGTM01-UPDT-LAST-DT
V                IF MOPTNCDI = 'D'
V      *--          TABLE ALREADY EXIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                   MOVE -1            TO  MADPNMEL
V                   MOVE 'R010'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V              WHEN +100
V                IF MOPTNCDI = 'D'
V                   CONTINUE
V                ELSE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                   MOVE -1            TO  MADPNMEL
V                   MOVE 'R002'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 SELECT ERROR
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1               TO  MADPNMEL
V                MOVE SQLCODE          TO  W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'           TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4420-'          TO  W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC  TO  W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT    TO  W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES  TO  TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       4420-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4500-CHECK-SCALE-OPTN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID SCALE OPTIONS ARE '00', '01' AND '02'
V      *--  OPTION '03' ADDED TO VALID VALUES - 01/06/03 - LOG SP-69
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EVALUATE MSCOPTNI
V
V             WHEN '00'
V             WHEN '01'
V             WHEN '02'
V             WHEN '03'
V             WHEN SPACE
V               CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE -1            TO  MSCOPTNL
V               MOVE 'R003'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V      *--  CROSS-EDIT SCALE OPTION WITH OPTION CODE
V      *--  FOR SCALE 02 AND 03, ONLY VIEW OPTNS ARE ALLOWED - 01/06/03
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V             EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V
V               WHEN 'A'
V                 IF W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN = '01'
V                    CONTINUE
V                 ELSE
V                    IF  W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN = '00'
V                    AND W-ADP-USER-YES
V                        CONTINUE
V                    ELSE
V                       SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                       MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V                       MOVE 'R004'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                    END-IF
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN 'B'
V                 IF W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN = '00'
V                 OR W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN = '01'
V                    CONTINUE
V                 ELSE
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  MOPTNCDL
V                    MOVE 'R004'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN 'D'
V               WHEN 'E'
V               WHEN 'F'
V                 CONTINUE
V
V             END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  SCALE OPTION SHOULD BE THE SAME AS THE DEFINED SCALE OPTION
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              IF MOPTNCDI = 'A'
V              OR MOPTNCDI = 'B'
V              OR MOPTNCDI = 'E'
V                 IF MSCOPTNI  =  SPACES
V                    CONTINUE
V                 ELSE
V                    IF MSCOPTNI  NOT =  W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN
V                       SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                       MOVE -1            TO  MSCOPTNL
V                       MOVE 'R022'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                    END-IF
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4700-PROCESS-OPTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE MOPTNCDI  TO  W-ZGTM-OPTION-CD.
V           MOVE MADPNMEI  TO  W-ZGTM-TABLE-NAME.
V           MOVE MCLIENTI  TO  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE MSCOPTNI  TO  W-ZGTM-SCALE-OPTN.
V
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-PGM-SEC-TBL    TO   W-ZGTM-ZGTMSECT .
V
V           EVALUATE MOPTNCDI
V
V             WHEN 'A'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM02'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4705-UPDT-02-COMMAREA  THRU  4705-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM03'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4710-UPDT-03-COMMAREA  THRU  4710-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'C'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM04'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4715-UPDT-04-COMMAREA  THRU  4715-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'D'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM07'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4720-UPDT-07-COMMAREA  THRU  4720-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'E'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM08'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4725-UPDT-08-COMMAREA  THRU  4725-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V               MOVE 'ZGTM09'      TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4730-UPDT-09-COMMAREA  THRU  4730-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V               CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V       4700-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM01'    TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE MOPTNCDI  TO  W-ZGTM01-MOPTNCDI.
V           MOVE MADPNMEI  TO  W-ZGTM01-MADPNMEI.
V           MOVE MCLIENTI  TO  W-ZGTM01-MCLIENTI.
V           MOVE MSCOPTNI  TO  W-ZGTM01-MSCOPTNI.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  MOPTNCDA
V                              MADPNMEA
V                              MCLIENTA
V                              MSCOPTNA.
V
V           IF MOPTNCDI = SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO   MOPTNCDO
V           END-IF.
V           IF MADPNMEI = SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO   MADPNMEO
V           END-IF.
V           IF MCLIENTI = SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO   MCLIENTO
V           END-IF.
V           IF MSCOPTNI = SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO   MSCOPTNO
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  CLT NBR AND SCALE OPT DISPLAYED ONLY FOR CLT 096 - START
V
V           IF W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  =  W-ADP-CLIENT-NBR
V              MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-LIT  TO  MCLTLITO
V              MOVE W-SCALE-OPTN-LIT  TO  MSOPLITO
V           ELSE
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  MCLTLITA
V                                 MCLIENTA
V                                 MSOPLITA
V                                 MSCOPTNA
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  MCLTLITO
V                                 MCLIENTO
V                                 MSOPLITO
V                                 MSCOPTNO
V           END-IF
V
V      *--  TIRIEVA  -  08/15/02  -  END
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-TWA-ERROR-YES
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V              MOVE 'S005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              PERFORM 9000-ACCESS-ERROR  THRU  9000-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       4705-UPDT-02-COMMAREA .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-ZGTM02-COMMAREA.
V
V           MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR     TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TABLE-NAME  TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME   TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-FIELD-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE   TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-PRKEY-NBR   TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-PRKEY-NBR
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-EFFCT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-EFFCT-DT
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TRMNT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TRMNT-DT
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-UPDT-LAST-DT TO W-ZGTM02-DEFN-UPDT-LAST-DT.
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT   TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN    TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN   TO  W-ZGTM02-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-COMMAREA    TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V
V       4705-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       4710-UPDT-03-COMMAREA .

V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------

V
V           MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR     TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TABLE-NAME  TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-TABLE-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME   TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-FIELD-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE   TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-PRKEY-NBR   TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-PRKEY-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-EFFCT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-EFFCT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TRMNT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-UPDT-LAST-DT TO W-ZGTM03-DEFN-UPDT-LAST-DT.
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT   TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN    TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN   TO  W-ZGTM03-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-COMMAREA    TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V
V       4710-EXIT .
V           EXIT.

V           MOVE MSCOPTNI          TO  W-ZGTM07-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN.

V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TABLE-NAME  TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-FIELD-NAME.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-PRKEY-NBR   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-PRKEY-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-EFFCT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-EFFCT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-TRMNT-DT    TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-UPDT-LAST-DT TO W-ZGTM08-DEFN-UPDT-LAST-DT.
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT.
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN    TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN.

V
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL PROGRAM (W-RATT01)
V                         COMMAREA (W-ENDRATT-PARMS)
V                           LENGTH (LENGTH OF W-ENDRATT-PARMS)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-SECURITY-DENIED  TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM  2450-FILL-MENU   THRU 2450-EXIT
V                    VARYING W-MNU-SUB FROM 1 BY 1
V                    UNTIL W-MNU-SUB GREATER 06 .
V
V           IF W-SECURITY-DENIED
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V              MOVE 'S005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              PERFORM 9000-ACCESS-ERROR  THRU  9000-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  MOPTNCDL.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM01M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  = SPACE
V              EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM01M')
V                             FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                             CURSOR (W-CURSOR)
V                             DATAONLY
V                             FREEKB
V                             FRSET
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V              END-EXEC
V           ELSE
V              EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM01M')
V                             FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                             CURSOR
V                             DATAONLY
V                             FREEKB
V                             FRSET
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V              END-EXEC
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      * THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9000-ACCESS-ERROR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * USER DOES NOT HAVE ACCESS.  PROTECT ALL FIELDS IN THE MAP AND *
V      * RETURN.                                                       *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *    MOVE -1        TO  MOPTNCDL.
V
V      *    MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  MCLNNOA
V      *                       MTRANSA
V      *                       MDATEA
V      *                       MTIMEA
V      *                       MPGMMSGA
V      *                       MOPTNCDA
V      *                       MADPNMEA
V      *                       MCLIENTA
V      *                       MSCOPTNA.
V
V           MOVE 'USER DOES NOT HAVE ACCESS TO TRANSACTION ZGTM'
V                                           TO SECLINK-MESSAGE
V           EXEC CICS SEND
V                FROM   (SECLINK-MESSAGE)
V                LENGTH (LENGTH OF SECLINK-MESSAGE)
V                ERASE
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V
V       9000-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R022'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@ '
V                   BY W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V              MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V              PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V           END-IF.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM01-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-VAL-FPDB2LOG-PGMID)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
