V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM02-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  MOVE  1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V                  IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE 'G061'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  END-IF
V
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V                    UNTIL W-LCTR  >  W-LMAX
V                       OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V                       OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V               END-IF
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               AND W-FIELD-CHANGED
V                  IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  'R005'
V                     MOVE -1       TO  W-MVDESL (W-DCTR)
V                  ELSE
V                     MOVE 'G055'   TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                     MOVE -1       TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                  END-IF
V               END-IF
V
V               IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               AND W-FIELD-UNCHANGED
V                  MOVE 1  TO W-LCTR
V                  PERFORM 7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS  THRU  7800-EXIT
V                    UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                       OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                       OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     MOVE 'G025'   TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  END-IF
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF1
V               MOVE W-PROG-LIST-ENTR      TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 6000-LIST-ENTRIES  THRU  6000-EXIT
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL     THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM02-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE  0               TO  W-DCTR.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE TABLE NAME, FIELD NAME, DEFAULT NAME / DESCRIPTION
V      *--  GET DEFAULT DESCRIPTION FROM CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO     TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM02-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-ZGTM02-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR .
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                               W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                                              MTBLNMEO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                              MDFTVALO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESO .
V
V           IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT = SPACE
V              PERFORM 2500-CHECK-DEFAULT  THRU  2500-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2500-CHECK-DEFAULT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V
V              WHEN +100
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '2500-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM02M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES  THRU  3300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM02-VALUE    (W-LCTR)  TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM02-DESCR    (W-LCTR)  TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-FIELD-UNCHANGED  TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR W-FIELD-CHANGED
V
V              IF W-ZGTM02-VALUE    (W-LCTR)  NOT =  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM02-DESCR    (W-LCTR)  NOT =  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       3300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE VALID VALUE SHOULD HAVE THE FORMAT AND LENGTH AS
V      *--  DEFINED IN THE TABLE DEFINITION
V      *--  THE DESCRIPTION SHOULD NOT BE THE SAME DESCRIPTION USED
V      *--  BY ANOTHER VALID VALUE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--  FIRST ROW IN THE TABLE SHOULD NOT BE SPACES
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF W-MVALUI (1) = SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                 MOVE 'G007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  VALID VALUE EDIT
V
V           PERFORM 4200-EDIT-VALID-VALUE  THRU  4200-EXIT
V
V      *--  DESCRIPTION FIELD MUST NOT BE SPACES
V      *--  ALLOW DESCRIPTION TO BE SPACES  - 01/08/03 - TIRIEVA
V      *    IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V      *       IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V      *          SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *          MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V      *          MOVE 'G007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V      *       END-IF
V      *    END-IF.
V
V      *--  VALID VALUE MUST NOT EXIST IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  MUST NOT BE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4500-CHECK-DUPLICATE  THRU  4500-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4300-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS THRU 4300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4200-EDIT-VALID-VALUE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUE SHOULD CONFORM WITH THE FORMAT AND LENGTH
V      *--  DEFINED
V      *--  FOR NUMERIC VALUES, LENGTH SHOULD BE EQUAL TO DEFN LENGTH
V      *--  FOR ALPHA VALUES, LEN SHOULD BE LESS OR EQ TO DEFINED LENGTH
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-LEN   TO  W-VALUE-LENGTH-X.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT  =  'N'
V                 MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-TEMP-VALUE
V                 IF W-TEMP-VALUE (1:W-VALUE-LENGTH-N) NOT NUMERIC
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'G008'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE +0 TO W-SPACE-COUNT
V                         W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                  TALLYING W-SPACE-COUNT  FOR ALL ' '
V              COMPUTE W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V                  = LENGTH OF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) - W-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT  =  'N'
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT NOT =  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT  >  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R027'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       4200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4300-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ENTRY AGAINST RELATED REFERENCE TABLES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME = 'ROLE'
V              PERFORM 4320-CHECK-ROLE         THRU 4320-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME = 'FEEROLE'
V              PERFORM 4340-CHECK-FEEROLE      THRU 4340-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME = 'DPCDXRF'
V              PERFORM 4360-CHECK-DPCDXRF      THRU 4360-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME = 'IAUCXRF'
V              PERFORM 4380-CHECK-IAUCXRF      THRU 4380-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       4300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4320-CHECK-ROLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ROLE AGAINST FEEROLE ENTRIES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE 'FEEROLE'                 TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V      *
V      *--  CHECK ENTRY IN CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *
V           PERFORM 4400-SELECT-CCMPRSC        THRU 4400-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V              WHEN 0
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-CNT > 0
V      *--          INVALID ENTRY, MUST NOT EXIST IN FEEROLE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE -1              TO    W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE 'R030'          TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4320-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4320-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4340-CHECK-FEEROLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE FEEROLE AGAINST ROLE ENTRIES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE 'ROLE'                    TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V      *
V      *--  CHECK ENTRY IN CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *
V           PERFORM 4400-SELECT-CCMPRSC        THRU 4400-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V              WHEN 0
V               IF W-CCMPRSC-CNT > 0
V      *--       INVALID ENTRY, MUST NOT EXIST IN ROLE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE -1                 TO    W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R031'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V              WHEN +100
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4340-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4340-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4360-CHECK-DPCDXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-DPCDXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4365-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC    THRU 4365-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-DPCDXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4360-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4365-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4365-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4380-CHECK-IAUCXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-IAUCXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4385-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC    THRU 4385-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-IAUCXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4380-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4385-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4385-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4400-SELECT-CCMPRSC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SELECT CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE                         W-CCMPRSC-CNT.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT  COUNT (*)
V               INTO :W-CCMPRSC-CNT
V               FROM  CCMPRSC
V              WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V                AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4500-CHECK-DUPLICATE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE VALID VALUE FIELD SHOULD NOT EXIST IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  SHOULD NOT HAVE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)      TO  W-ACNO-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_CHCK CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4500-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_CHCK
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 4520-COMPARE-ROW  THRU  4520-EXIT
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   CONTINUE
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - CHCK
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '4600-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4520-COMPARE-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  COMPARE VALUE AND DESCRIPTION TO FETCHED ROW AND PREVIOUS
V      *--  ROWS ENTERED
V      *--  CHANGED 'R005' TO A WARNING MESSAGE - 08/27/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ACCEPT DUPL PRCSS-KEY-NM FOR ACNO, ETC - 11/14/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ALLOW ALPHANUMERIC BRNCH/ACCT NUMBERS 2005-04-04 - TIDRLUG
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--           VERIFY THAT ACNO-FROM AND ACNO-TO CONTAIN
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS:
V
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE TO W-ACNO-FROM-INSP.
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   TO W-ACNO-TO-INSP.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V
V      *--  RESULT:  IF ACNO-FROM-VALUE/ACNO-TO-VALUE CONTAIN ONLY
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS, THEN AREAS ACNO-FROM-INSP/
V      *--           ACNO-TO-INSP ARE BLANK.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-INSP NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-INSP   NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >  W-ACNO-TO-VALUE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'F013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V                IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'DPCDXRF'
V                OR CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'IAUCXRF'
V                   CONTINUE
V                ELSE
V      *--          SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO  TRUE
V      *--          MOVE -1              TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE  W-LCTR         TO  W-DCTR
V                   MOVE 'R005'          TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                MOVE 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                PERFORM UNTIL W-MCTR >= W-LCTR
V                           OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  IF  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                  AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  ELSE
V                   IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   ELSE
V                    IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V                       PERFORM 4560-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP THRU 4560-EXIT
V                    ELSE
V                      IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V      *--                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *--                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                         MOVE  W-LCTR       TO  W-DCTR
V                         MOVE 'R005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                         MOVE W-MVALUI(W-MCTR)  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                      END-IF
V                    END-IF
V                   END-IF
V                  END-IF
V                  ADD 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                END-PERFORM
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4520-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4560-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK OVERLAP IN THE ACCOUNT RANGE AGAINST THE PREVIOUS ROWS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)  TO  W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V
V       4560-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM02'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO PREVIOUS SCREEN
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-ZGTM02-VALUE    (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-ZGTM02-DESCR    (W-LCTR)
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V      *--  AFTER UPDATE MOVE SPACES TO SCREEN
V      *--  AFTER UPD MOVE SPACES TO PREV MAP FIELDS - 11/04/02 - TIRIEVA
V
V           IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V           AND W-FIELD-UNCHANGED
V              MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR
V              PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                 MOVE SPACES  TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                  W-ZGTM02-VALUE (W-LCTR)
V                                  W-ZGTM02-DESCR (W-LCTR)
V                 ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V              END-PERFORM
V              SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  PREPARE SCREEN OUTPUT
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACES
V                 INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL SPACES BY '_'
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACES
V                 INSPECT W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL SPACES BY '_'
V              END-IF
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       6000-LIST-ENTRIES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  POPULATE LIST ENTRIES COMMAREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG .
V
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM05-DEFN-ROW .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-TABLE-NAME .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-DFLT-VALUE .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-FIELD-NAME
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-FIELD-NAME .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-FRMT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-VALUE-LEN
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN
V             TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-SCALE-OPTN .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA .
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       6000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V
V
V       7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       PERFORM 7850-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7850-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7800-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
V
V           INITIALIZE DCLCCMPRSC.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-VALUE (W-LCTR)   TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT.
V           MOVE W-DATE-MAX-END            TO CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-DESCR (W-LCTR)   TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER          TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID       TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP             TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE SPACES                    TO CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                      TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
V
V           PERFORM 7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  THRU  7820-EXIT.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             INSERT INTO CCMPRSC
V                  ( CLIENT_NBR
V                  , PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                  , PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                  , PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                  , EFFCT_DT
V                  , TRMNT_DT
V                  , PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                  , UPDT_LAST_DT
VC001              , USER_ID
VC001              , TRMNL_ID
VC001              , LST_CHNG_TMSTMP
VC001              , FNCTN_CD
VC001              , UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD)
V             VALUES
V                  ( :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                  , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-USER-ID
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD
VC001              , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                   ADD 1                    TO W-LCTR
VC001               PERFORM 7830-LOG-INSERT  THRU 7830-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND        TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE -1                  TO    MTBLDESI
V                   MOVE SQLCODE             TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'              TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7800-'             TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-INSERT       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES     TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GENERATE THE NEXT PROCESS KEY NUMBER
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_MAX  CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V      *        AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER  BY PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ONLY THE FIRST ROW TO GET THE MAX
V      *
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_MAX
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   ADD  1  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 0  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 SELECT ERROR
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       7820-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
VC001   7830-LOG-INSERT.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR         TO W-ZGTM-LOG-CLT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP              TO W-ZGTM-LOG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER           TO W-ZGTM-LOG-USERID.
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-ADD             TO TRUE.
VC001
VC001  *--  CCMPRSC IS ACTUALLY A TABLE NOT A DDNAME
VC001       MOVE 'CCMPRSC'                  TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DDNAME.
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DATA.
VC001
VC001       EXEC CICS WRITE
VC001            DATASET (W-ZGTM-LOG-FILE)
VC001            FROM    (W-ZGTM-LOG-RECORD)
VC001            RIDFLD  (W-ZGTM-LOG-KEY)
VC001            RESP    (W-RESP)
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE W-RESP
VC001           WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001          WHEN OTHER
VC001                MOVE 'S002'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7830-'           TO  W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE 'CCMPRSC'         TO  W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE 'WRITE'           TO  W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO  TRUE
VC001                SET  W-ERROR-FOUND     TO  TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7830-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  *****************************************************************
VC001
VC001
VC001   7850-GET-CURR-DT-TIME.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SET :W-CURR-DATE   = CURRENT DATE
VC001              , :W-CURR-TMSTMP = CURRENT TIMESTAMP
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE         TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'          TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7850-'         TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7850-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  ******************************************************************
VC001
VC001
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MVALUL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM02M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM02M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      *--  THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM       TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-PROG-ADD-ENTR  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       IF W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001          MOVE W-RESP            TO  W-ERR-CDE-DISP
VC001       ELSE
VC001          MOVE W-SQLCODE         TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'G055'
V           OR W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V                INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@       '
V                                                BY 'ADDITION'
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V      *--     INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@         '
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '##########'
V                   BY W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R017'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R027'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       EVALUATE TRUE
VC001           WHEN W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-ERR-CDE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , '  '           DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-FUNCTION     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , 'IN PARA '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-PARAGRAPH    DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN W-DB2-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                       , ' : '        DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                       , W-SE-ERR-MSG DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM02-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.

V               10  W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT   PIC  X(01).
V               10  W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN    PIC  X(02).
V               10  W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN   PIC  X(02).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(34).
V
V           05  W-ACNO-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V               10  W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE    PIC  X(08).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01).
V               10  W-ACNO-TO-VALUE      PIC  X(08).
V
V           05  W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V               10  W-PREV-FROM-VALUE    PIC  X(08).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01).
V               10  W-PREV-TO-VALUE      PIC  X(08).
V
V           05  W-TBL-NDX                PIC S9(03) COMP-3 VALUE ZEROS.
V           05  W-DPCDXRF-MAX            PIC S9(03) COMP-3 VALUE 8.
V           05  W-IAUCXRF-MAX            PIC S9(03) COMP-3 VALUE 8.

V           05  W-DPCDXRF-VAL-TXT        PIC  X(50).

V                                        PIC  X(01).

V               10  W-DATE-HDR-DD        PIC  9(02).

V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C      PIC  9(02).

V       01  FILLER                       PIC  X(08) VALUE 'COMMAREA'.

VC001       05  W-CICS-ERROR-FLAG         PIC  X(01).
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-YES         VALUE 'Y'.
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-NO          VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-ERROR-FLAG             PIC X(01).
V               88  W-ERROR-FOUND            VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND         VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-DB2-ERROR-FLAG         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-NO            VALUE 'N'.

V               88  W-MAP-ONLY               VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-MAP-DATA               VALUE 'N'.

V               88  W-FIELD-CHANGED          VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-FIELD-UNCHANGED        VALUE 'N'.

V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'ZGTMMAP='.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           COPY ZGTM03M.
V
V       01  W-ZGTM03-SCREEN  REDEFINES  MENUMAPO.
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(89).
V           05  W-ZGTM03-SCR-LINE      OCCURS     12.
V               10  W-MACTNL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MACTNF                 PIC  X.

V               10  W-MVALUF                 PIC  X.
