V               10  W-MVALUI                 PIC  X(10).
V               10  W-MVDESL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVDESF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVDESF.
V                   15  W-MVDESA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVDESI                 PIC  X(50).
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(143).
V
V       01  W-MAP-MSG.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* ACCESS TO ZGTM APPLICATION NOT GRANTED-CONTACT ADP *'.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  PROCESS SELECTION CRITERIA TABLE                           *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMPRSC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON MESSAGE TABLE                                       *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMMSGT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON SQL AREA
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  CICS VARIABLES
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHAID  '.
V           COPY DFHAID.
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHBMSCA'.
V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM03'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM03-ACT-LIST      TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V               IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               AND W-FIELD-UNCHANGED
V                  PERFORM 4700-UPDATE-TABLE  THRU  4700-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM03-ACT-FRWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM03-ACT-BKWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM03-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE TABLE NAME, FIELD NAME, DEFAULT NAME / DESCRIPTION
V      *--  GET DEFAULT DESCRIPTION FROM CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO     TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM03-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                                              MTBLNMEO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                              MDFTVALO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESO .
V
V           IF W-ZGTM03-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT = SPACE
V              PERFORM 2500-CHECK-DEFAULT  THRU  2500-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2500-CHECK-DEFAULT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF DEFAULT VALUE EXIST IN CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  GET DESCRIPTION OF DEFAULT VALUE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V
V              WHEN +100
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (1)
V                MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '2500-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM03M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES  THRU  3300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              INSPECT W-MACTNI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V
V              IF W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM03-ACT-CODE (W-LCTR)  TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM03-VALUE    (W-LCTR)  TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM03-DESCR    (W-LCTR)  TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-FIELD-UNCHANGED  TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR W-FIELD-CHANGED
V
V              IF W-ZGTM03-ACT-CODE (W-LCTR)  NOT =  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM03-VALUE    (W-LCTR)  NOT =  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM03-DESCR    (W-LCTR)  NOT =  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       3300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATES THE ACTION CODE
V      *--  AFTER VALIDATING THE ACTION CODE, THE FIELDS IN THE
V      *--  SPECIFIC LINE TO BE MODIFIED IS VALIDATED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF  TO  MTRANSF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4100-VALIDATE-ACTION  THRU  4100-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              EVALUATE W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE
V
V                WHEN 'D'
V                  PERFORM 4300-VALIDATE-DELETION  THRU  4300-EXIT
V
V                WHEN 'M'
V
V      *--         DESCRIPTION FIELD MUST NOT BE SPACES
V      *--         ALLOW DESCRIPTION TO BE SPACES  - 01/08/03 - TIRIEVA
V      *           IF W-MVDESI (W-LINE) = SPACES
V      *              SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *              MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V      *              MOVE 'G006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V      *           END-IF
V                  CONTINUE
V
V      *--         MUST NOT BE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 4500-VALIDATE-DESCRIPTION  THRU 4500-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 4400-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS THRU 4400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V                WHEN OTHER
V      *--          INVALID ACTION CODE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                   MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                   MOVE 'G015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V              IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                 SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-YES  TO  TRUE
V                 IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  NOT =  'R005'
V                    MOVE 'G055'   TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                    MOVE -1       TO  W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4100-VALIDATE-ACTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  CHECK ACTION CODE
V      *--    - VALID ACTION CODES ARE 'M' AND 'D'
V      *--    - ONLY ONE ACTION CODE IS ALLOWED AT ONE TIME
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR
V                            W-LINE.
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE
V                            W-SAVE-ACTION.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR  W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EVALUATE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V
V                WHEN 'M'
V                WHEN 'D'
V                   IF W-SAVE-ACTION = SPACES
V                      MOVE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-SAVE-ACTION
V                      MOVE W-LCTR             TO  W-LINE
V                      ADD  1                  TO  W-LCTR
V                   ELSE
V      *--             ONLY 1 ACTION CODE ALLOWED
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1                 TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'G014'             TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V                WHEN SPACE
V                WHEN '_'
V                   IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) NOT = SPACES
V                      MOVE '_'        TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                   END-IF
V                   ADD  1             TO  W-LCTR
V
V                WHEN OTHER
V      *--          INVALID ACTION CODE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                   MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE 'R007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V             IF  W-SAVE-ACTION  =  SPACE
V      *--        ENTER ACTION CD
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                 TO    W-MACTNL (1)
V                 MOVE 'R008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V             ELSE
V                 MOVE W-SAVE-ACTION      TO    W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE
V             END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4300-VALIDATE-DELETION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CLIENT NOT ALLOWED TO DELETE WHEN SCALE OPTION IS '00'
V???   *--  CHECK SECURITY LEVEL FOR DELETION
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM03-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN = '00'
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V              MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V              MOVE 'R009'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4400-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ENTRY AGAINST RELATED REFERENCE TABLES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE)  =  'DPCDXRF'
V              PERFORM 4460-CHECK-DPCDXRF      THRU 4460-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE)  =  'IAUCXRF'
V              PERFORM 4480-CHECK-IAUCXRF      THRU 4480-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       4400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4460-CHECK-DPCDXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LINE)         TO  W-DPCDXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4465-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC    THRU 4465-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-DPCDXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4460-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4465-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4465-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4480-CHECK-IAUCXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LINE)         TO  W-IAUCXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4485-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC    THRU 4485-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-IAUCXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4480-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4485-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4485-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4500-VALIDATE-DESCRIPTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SHOULD NOT BE SPACES
V      *--  SHOULD NOT HAVE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR (W-LINE)     TO
V                  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE)  TO
V                CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LINE)  TO  W-ACNO-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_CHCK CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4500-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_CHCK
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 4520-CHECK-DESCRIPTION  THRU  4520-EXIT
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   CONTINUE
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - CHCK
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '4500-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4520-CHECK-DESCRIPTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  DESCRIPTION SHOULD NOT BE THE SAME AS AN EXISTING ROW
V      *--  CHANGED 'R005' TO A WARNING MESSAGE - 08/27/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  FOR SELECTED PROCESS TYPE ('ACNO','PRPRTF','PRSVTF') A DIFF.
V      *--  VALIDATION APPLIES  -  11/15/02  -  TIRIEVA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE) = 'ACNO'
V           OR W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE) = 'PRPRTF'
V           OR W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE) = 'PRSVTF'
V              PERFORM 4540-SPL-DESCRIPTION-EDIT  THRU  4540-EXIT
V           ELSE
V           IF W-MVDESI (W-LINE) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LINE) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE 'G013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE) = 'DPCDXRF'
V                 OR W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LINE) = 'IAUCXRF'
V                    CONTINUE
V                 ELSE
V      *--           SET W-ERROR-FOUND TO TRUE
V                    MOVE -1           TO W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                    MOVE 'R005'       TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                    MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM TO W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4520-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4540-SPL-DESCRIPTION-EDIT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SPECIAL DESCRIPTION VALIDATION FOR SPECIFIC PROCESS TYPE
V      *--  ALLOW ALPHANUMERIC BRNCH/ACCT NUMBERS 2005-04-04 - TIDRLUG
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--           VERIFY THAT ACNO-FROM AND ACNO-TO CONTAIN
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS:
V
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE TO W-ACNO-FROM-INSP.
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   TO W-ACNO-TO-INSP.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V
V      *--- RESULT:  IF ACNO-FROM-VALUE/ACNO-TO-VALUE CONTAIN ONLY
V      *---          ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS, THEN AREAS ACNO-FROM-INSP/
V      *---          ACNO-TO-INSP ARE BLANK.
V
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LINE) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND W-MVDESI (W-LINE) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V               IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR(W-LINE) =
V                                      CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                  MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                  MOVE 'G013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               ELSE
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                  MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LINE)
V                  MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-INSP NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-INSP   NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >  W-ACNO-TO-VALUE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                MOVE 'F013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR(W-LINE) =
V                                      CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4540-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4700-UPDATE-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (W-LINE)   TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT (W-LINE)   TO  CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  .
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'D'
V               PERFORM 7600-PROCESS-DELETION  THRU  7600-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'M'
V               MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LINE)  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V               PERFORM 7800-PROCESS-UPDATE    THRU  7800-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--      INVALID ACTION CODE
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V               MOVE 'R007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM03'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  PERFORM 5100-POPULATE-SCREEN  THRU  5100-EXIT
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODIFY
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-ACT-DELETE
V                  CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM03-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO PREVIOUS SCREEN
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              MOVE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-ZGTM03-ACT-CODE (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-ZGTM03-VALUE    (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-ZGTM03-DESCR    (W-LCTR)
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5100-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  WHEN ERROR FOUND, MOVE SCREEN ATTRIBUTES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM03'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             MOVE DFHBMFSE   TO  W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V      *      MOVE DFHBMASK   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             IF W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACES
V                MOVE '_'     TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V             END-IF
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *--  CLT 096 CAN MODIFY ANY OTHER CLIENT NBR BASED ON THE ENTERED
V      *--  CLIENT NBR.  ANY OTHER CLT NBR IS RESTRICTED TO MODIFY ROWS
V      *--  BASED ON THE SIGNED ON CLT -  08/22/02 - TIRIEVA
V
V           IF W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X3  NOT =  W-ADP-CLIENT-NBR
V              MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X        TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V                IF W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO
V      *--          THIS IS FIRST PAGE
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                ELSE
V      *--          AFTER UPDATE THE ACTION CODE IS SET TO 'L'
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'       TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO  TO  TRUE
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (1)  =  SPACES
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'ZGTM03'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE -1               TO  W-MACTNL (1).
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE '_'        TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMFSE   TO  W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V      *      MOVE DFHBMASK   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        > :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM03-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V      *--          DISPLAY WHEN NOT IN UPDATE MODE - 11/04/02 - TIRIEVA
V                   IF W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO
V                      MOVE 'G019'          TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT         < :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM03-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0 OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001   7500-SELECT-CCMPRSC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SELECT *
VC001              INTO :DCLCCMPRSC
VC001              FROM CCMPRSC
VC001             WHERE CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
VC001               AND PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
VC001               AND PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
VC001               AND PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001               AND EFFCT_DT         = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
VC001               AND UPDT_LAST_DT     = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE -1               TO W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE          TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'           TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7500-'          TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC  TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN      TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES  TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
V       7500-EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V
V       7600-PROCESS-DELETION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *--  GET ORIGINAL ROW INFORMATION BEFORE DELETING
VC001       PERFORM 7500-SELECT-CCMPRSC THRU 7500-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7600-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001
VC001       PERFORM 7900-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7900-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7600-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
V
V           EXEC SQL
V                DELETE FROM CCMPRSC
V                WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  AND  EFFCT_DT         = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  AND  UPDT_LAST_DT     = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 MOVE 'G037'                  TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 SET W-ZGTM03-ACT-LIST        TO TRUE
V
VC001             SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-DELETE       TO TRUE
VC001             MOVE W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC       TO DCLCCMPRSC
VC001             PERFORM 7820-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7820-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND            TO TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                      TO W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE SQLCODE                 TO W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'                  TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7600-'                 TO W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC         TO W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN             TO W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES         TO TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7800-PROCESS-UPDATE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *--  SAVE DATA TO BE UPDATED
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT TO W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001
VC001  *--  GET ORIGINAL ROW INFORMATION BEFORE UPDATING
VC001       PERFORM 7500-SELECT-CCMPRSC THRU 7500-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7800-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001
VC001       PERFORM 7900-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7900-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7800-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
V
V           EXEC SQL
V                UPDATE CCMPRSC
V                SET
VC001                PRCSS_VAL_TXT     = :W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_DT      = :W-CURR-DATE
VC001               ,USER_ID           = :W-ZGTM-SNON-USER
VC001               ,TRMNL_ID          = :W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID
VC001               ,LST_CHNG_TMSTMP   = :W-CURR-TMSTMP
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD = :W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
V                WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  AND  EFFCT_DT       = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  AND  UPDT_LAST_DT   = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 MOVE 'G024'                  TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 SET W-ZGTM03-ACT-LIST        TO TRUE
VC001             PERFORM 7810-LOG-CHANGES-RTN THRU 7810-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND TO TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                      TO W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE SQLCODE                 TO W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'                  TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7800-'                 TO W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC         TO W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-UPDATE           TO W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES         TO TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V
VC001   7810-LOG-CHANGES-RTN.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *--  LOG ORIG CCMPRSC ROW
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-CHNG-OLD     TO TRUE.
VC001       MOVE W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC       TO DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001       PERFORM 7820-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7820-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7810-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
VC001  *--  CHANGE COLUMNS THAT WAS UPDATED AND WRITE TO LOG
VC001       MOVE W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001                                    TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE             TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER        TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID     TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP           TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                    TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
VC001
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-CHNG-NEW     TO TRUE.
VC001       PERFORM 7820-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7820-EXIT.
VC001
VC001   7810-EXIT. EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V
VC001   7820-WRITE-ZGTMLOG.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR         TO W-ZGTM-LOG-CLT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP              TO W-ZGTM-LOG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER           TO W-ZGTM-LOG-USERID.
VC001
VC001  *--  CCMPRSC IS ACTUALLY A TABLE NOT A DDNAME
VC001       MOVE 'CCMPRSC'                  TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DDNAME.
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DATA.
VC001
VC001       EXEC CICS WRITE
VC001            DATASET (W-ZGTM-LOG-FILE)
VC001            FROM    (W-ZGTM-LOG-RECORD)
VC001            RIDFLD  (W-ZGTM-LOG-KEY)
VC001            RESP    (W-RESP)
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE W-RESP
VC001           WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                MOVE 'S002'            TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7820-'           TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE 'CCMPRSC'         TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE 'WRITE'           TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO TRUE
VC001                SET  W-ERROR-FOUND     TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7820-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001
VC001   7900-GET-CURR-DT-TIME.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SET :W-CURR-DATE   = CURRENT DATE
VC001              , :W-CURR-TMSTMP = CURRENT TIMESTAMP
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE         TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'          TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7850-'         TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7900-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  ******************************************************************
VC001
VC001
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MACTNL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM03M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM03M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      *--  THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM       TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-PROG-MOD-ENTR  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       IF W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001          MOVE W-RESP            TO  W-ERR-CDE-DISP
VC001       ELSE
VC001          MOVE W-SQLCODE         TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'G055'
V           OR W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V              IF W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE = 'D'
V                INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@     '
V                                                BY 'DELETE'
V              ELSE
V                IF W-ZGTM03-ACT-MODE = 'M'
V                  INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@     '
V                                                  BY 'MODIFY'
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '##########'
V                   BY W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       EVALUATE TRUE
VC001           WHEN W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-ERR-CDE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , '  '           DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-FUNCTION     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , 'IN PARA '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-PARAGRAPH    DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN W-DB2-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO   MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                INTO   MPGMMSGO
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM03-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.

V       01  W-MAP-MSG.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* ACCESS TO ZGTM APPLICATION NOT GRANTED-CONTACT ADP *'.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
