V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      * CICS VARIABLES
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHAID  '.
V           COPY DFHAID.
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHBMSCA'.
V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM04'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM04-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM04-ACT-LIST      TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM04-ACT-FRWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM04-ACT-BKWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES              TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF                TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET  W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET  W-ZGTM04-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM04M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-LCTR
V                       W-REMAINDER .
V
V           DIVIDE EIBCPOSN  BY  80
V              GIVING W-LCTR
V              REMAINDER W-REMAINDER
V           END-DIVIDE .
V
V           IF W-REMAINDER  >  0
V               ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-IF .
V
V           SUBTRACT 5 FROM  W-LCTR.
V
V           IF  W-LCTR > +0
V           AND W-LCTR < +17
V               MOVE W-LCTR  TO  W-ZGTM04-LIST-ROW-NO
V           ELSE
V      *--      CURSOR NOT IN CORRECT POSITION
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE -1            TO  W-MSLCTL (1)
V               MOVE 'R018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V             MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG
V
V             EVALUATE TRUE
V
V      *--      NEW SCALE 03 IS RETRIEVED FROM CCMPRSC - 01/06/03
V               WHEN W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '00'
V               WHEN W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '01'
V               WHEN W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '03'
V                 INITIALIZE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM05-DEFN-ROW
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-CLIENT-NBR
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-TABLE-NAME
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-DFLT-VALUE     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-DFLT-VALUE
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-FIELD-NAME
V
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-FRMT
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-LEN
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-SCALE-OPTN
V
V                 MOVE W-PROG-LIST-ENTRIES  TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA    TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-COMMAREA           TO  DFHCOMMAREA
V
V               WHEN W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '02'
V                 INITIALIZE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM06-DEFN-ROW
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-CLIENT-NBR
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-DFLT-VALUE     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-DFLT-VALUE
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-FIELD-NAME
V
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-FRMT
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-LEN
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-SCALE-OPTN
V
V                 MOVE W-PROG-LIST-BATCH  TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA
V
V               WHEN OTHER
V                 CONTINUE
V
V             END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM04'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM04-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM04-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM04-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM04-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V
V      *--      DISPLAYS THE ROW FROM THE KEY ENTERED IN THE MAIN MENU
V
V               MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               MOVE 0                         TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               MOVE '0001-01-01'              TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V
V               PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST    THRU  7000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V
V      *--      DISPLAYS FROM THE KEY OF THE LAST ROW OF PREVIOUS SCREEN
V
V                IF W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LMAX)   =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-EFFCT-DT       (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V
V      *--      BACKWARD SCROLL FROM THE FIRST KEY OF THE PREVIOUS MAP
V
V                MOVE W-ZGTM04-CLIENT-NBR     (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-ZGTM04-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-EFFCT-DT    (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM (1)   =  SPACES
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO
V                        CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM04-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO
V                        CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE 0             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'ZGTM04'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE -1               TO  W-MSLCTL (1).
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)   =  SPACE
V             MOVE SPACES     TO  W-MSLCTI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM04-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTDESI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTNMEI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTFMTI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM04-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTLENI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM04-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTSCOI (W-LCTR)
V
V             MOVE DFHBMDAR   TO  W-MSLCTA (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MTDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V             MOVE SPACES     TO  W-MSLCTI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MSLCTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM04-ACT-LIST
V              IF W-MTNMEI (1)  =  SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MSLCTL (1)
V                 MOVE 'R023'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              ELSE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MSLCTL (1)
V                 MOVE 'R018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     >= :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       >= :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY CLIENT_NBR
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM04     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES  TO  TRUE
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM04-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 7600-PROCESS-FETCH  THRU  7600-EXIT
V                   IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V                   AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V                       ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM04     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      <= :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <  :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY CLIENT_NBR    DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM04     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX              TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES  TO  TRUE
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM04-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0
V                      OR SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 7600-PROCESS-FETCH  THRU  7600-EXIT
V                   IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V                   AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V                       SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM04     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7600-PROCESS-FETCH.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-- IF NO PARTICULAR CLIENT WAS SELECTED, DISPLAY ALL ROWS
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM04-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  = SPACE
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V              IF W-ZGTM04-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  NOT =  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                 SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V
V              SET W-SELECT-SCALE-YES  TO  TRUE
V
V              IF W-ZGTM04-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  = SPACE
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-ZGTM04-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  NOT =
V                    CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (44:02)
V                    SET W-SELECT-SCALE-NO  TO  TRUE
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V           AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR      TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD   TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM    TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR   TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT        TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-EFFCT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT        TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-TRMNT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT   TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT    TO
V                   W-ZGTM04-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LCTR)
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       7600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MSLCTL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM04M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM04M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      * THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM       TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-PROG-LIST-TBL  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP.
V
V           IF W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V              PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V           END-IF.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.

V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ': '.

V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ', '.
V               10 W-SE-EIBRCODE         PIC  X(06) VALUE SPACES.
V               10 W-SE-ERR-MSG          PIC  X(62) VALUE SPACES.
V       01  W-DB2-ERR-MSG.

V           05  W-DB2-ERR-CODE           PIC  Z(08)9-.
V
V       01  W-ERR-DATA.
V           05  W-REQUEST-TYPE            PIC X(01).
V               88  W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG  VALUE 'W'.
V           05  W-CALLING-TRAN-ID         PIC X(04).
V           05  W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID      PIC X(08).
V           05  W-SQLCA-AREA              PIC X(136).

V       01  W-SWITCH-AREA.
V           05  W-ERROR-FLAG             PIC X(01).

V           05  W-DB2-ERROR-FLAG         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-NO            VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-MAP-FLAG               PIC X(01).
V               88  W-MAP-ONLY               VALUE 'Y'.

V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'ZGTMMAP='.

V           COPY ZGTM05M.
V
V       01  W-ZGTM05-SCREEN  REDEFINES  MENUMAPO.
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(89).
V           05  W-ZGTM05-SCR-LINE      OCCURS     12.
V               10  W-MVALUL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVALUF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVALUF.
V                   15  W-MVALUA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVALUI                 PIC  X(10).
V               10  W-MVDESL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVDESF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVDESF.
V                   15  W-MVDESA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVDESI                 PIC  X(50).
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(143).
V
V       01  W-MAP-MSG.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* ACCESS TO ZGTM APPLICATION NOT GRANTED-CONTACT ADP *'.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *    PROCESS SELECTION CRITERIA TABLE                           *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMPRSC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *    COMMON MESSAGE TABLE                                       *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMMSGT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      * COMMON SQL AREA
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      * CICS VARIABLES
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHAID  '.
V           COPY DFHAID.
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHBMSCA'.
V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM05'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM05-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM05-ACT-LIST      TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM05-ACT-FRWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM05-ACT-BKWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF3
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG  TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4000-CALLING-PGM  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL    THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE TABLE NAME, FIELD NAME, DEFAULT NAME / DESCRIPTION
V      *--  GET DEFAULT DESCRIPTION FROM CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM05-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                                              MTBLNMEO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-DFLT-VALUE  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                              MDFTVALO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESO .
V
V           IF W-ZGTM05-LIST-DFLT-VALUE  NOT =  SPACES
V              PERFORM 2200-CHECK-DEFAULT  THRU  2200-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2200-CHECK-DEFAULT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V                SET W-ZGTM05-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE
V
V              WHEN +100
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '2200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM05M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4000-CALLING-PGM.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG  =  W-PROG-LST-DEFN
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA
V              MOVE W-ZGTM05-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM09-DEFN-ROW
V              MOVE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V           ELSE
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA
V              MOVE W-ZGTM05-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM04-DEFN-ROW
V              MOVE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA  TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM05'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  PERFORM 5100-POPULATE-SCREEN  THRU  5100-EXIT
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM05-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM05-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM05-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5100-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  WHEN ERROR FOUND, MOVE SCREEN ATTRIBUTES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM05'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V      *--  ADDED TESTING OF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD - 10/31/02 - RE
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                 ( W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE  AND
V                   W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE  )
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *--  ADDED TESTING OF PRCSS-TYPE-CD AS PRCSS-KEY-NM CAN BE SPACES
V      *--  IN THE CCMPRSC TABLE (I.E. CSNO)  - TIRIEVA  -  10/31/02
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-LIST-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM05-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V      *--       THIS IS FIRST PAGE
V                INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                       CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V      *--       ADDED TESTING OF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD - 10/31/02 - RE
V                IF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES  AND
V                   W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM05-EFFCT-DT       (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V      *--        ADDED TESTING OF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD - 10/31/02 - RE
V                   IF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES  AND
V                      W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                      MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V                MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-ZGTM05-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM05-EFFCT-DT    (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V      *--       ADDED TESTING OF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD - 10/31/02 - RE
V                IF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)  =  SPACES  AND
V                   W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (1)  =  SPACES
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'ZGTM05'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V      *--  ADDED TESTING OF W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD - 10/31/02 - RE
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                 ( W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE  AND
V                   W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE )
V             MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       >= :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM05-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-EFFCT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-TRMNT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LCTR)
V                   ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   CONTINUE
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT         < :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM05-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0 OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-EFFCT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-TRMNT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-ZGTM05-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LCTR)
V                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM05M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM05M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      * THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM         TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP.
V
V           IF W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V              PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V           END-IF.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *

V      *   E N D   O F   P R O G R A M
V      *=================================================================
