V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM06-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM06-ACT-LIST      TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM06-ACT-FRWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM06-ACT-BKWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF3
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG  TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 4000-CALLING-PGM  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL    THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE TABLE NAME, FIELD NAME, AND OTHER DEFINITION VALUES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM06-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-FRMT  TO  MKEYFMTO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-LEN   TO  MKEYLENO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-CLIENT-NBR (2:3)  TO  MTBLCLTO.
V
V      *--  TO GET THE KEY NAME AND ENTRY NAME FROM THE 'TABLFLE'
V
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-TABL-KEY .
V           MOVE 'H'     TO  W-TABL-REC-TYPE .
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-TABL-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME  TO  W-TABL-NAME .
V
V           PERFORM 2200-READ-TABLFLE  THRU  2200-EXIT .
V
V      *--  DEFAULT VALUE AND VALUE DESCRIPTION NOT REQUIRED
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2200-READ-TABLFLE .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  READ THE TABLE FILE TO GET THE KEY NAME AND ENTRY NAME
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-CICS-ERROR-NO  TO  TRUE.
V
V           EXEC CICS READ DATASET('TABLFLE')
V                          INTO   (W-TABL-REC)
V                          EQUAL
V                          RIDFLD (W-TABL-KEY)
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                    MOVE W-TABL-KEY-NAME      TO  MKEYNMEO
V                    MOVE W-TABL-ENTRY-LENGTH  TO  MNTRLENO
V                    MOVE W-TABL-ENTRY-NAME    TO  MNTRYNMO
V               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE 'R019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               WHEN OTHER
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO  TRUE
V                    SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO   TRUE
V                    MOVE 'S002'           TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4000-CALLING-PGM.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG  =  W-PROG-LST-DEFN
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA
V              MOVE W-ZGTM06-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM09-DEFN-ROW
V              MOVE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V           ELSE
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA
V              MOVE W-ZGTM06-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM04-DEFN-ROW
V              MOVE W-ZGTM04-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA  TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM06'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  PERFORM 5100-POPULATE-SCREEN  THRU  5100-EXIT
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM06-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM06-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM06-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-TABLFLE    THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5100-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  WHEN ERROR FOUND, MOVE SCREEN ATTRIBUTES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM06'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE     (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MKYNMA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MNTNMA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MKYNMI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MNTNMI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MKYNMA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MNTNMA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5200-ACCESS-TABLFLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS TABLFLE TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-TABL-REC .
V           MOVE 'D'     TO  W-TABL-REC-TYPE .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME  TO  W-TABL-NAME.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-CLIENT-NBR (2:3)  TO  W-TABL-CLIENT-NBR.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM06-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V      *--       THIS IS FIRST PAGE
V                MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V                IF W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   W-TABL-KEY-VALUE
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   IF W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                      MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V                MOVE W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE (1)  TO  W-TABL-KEY-VALUE
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE (1)   =  SPACES
V                   INITIALIZE  W-TABL-KEY-VALUE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM06-LIST-CLIENT-NBR (2:3)
V                     TO W-TABL-CLIENT-NBR
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'ZGTM06'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE    (W-LCTR)   =  SPACE
V             MOVE W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE     (W-LCTR)
V                            TO  W-MKYNMI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM06-ENTRY-NAME    (W-LCTR)
V                            TO  W-MNTNMI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MKYNMA (W-LCTR)
V                                W-MNTNMA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1         TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MKYNMI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MNTNMI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MKYNMA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MNTNMA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-CICS-ERROR-NO  TO  TRUE.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 7020-START-BROWSE-TABLFLE  THRU  7020-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR
V              SET W-EOF-TABL-NO  TO  TRUE
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM06-TABLE-VALUES
V
V              PERFORM 7040-READ-NEXT      THRU  7040-EXIT
V                UNTIL W-EOF-TABL-YES                                    0664000
V                   OR W-ERROR-FOUND                                     0664000
V                   OR W-LCTR > W-LMAX                                   0664000
V
V              IF W-CICS-ERROR-NO
V                 PERFORM 7060-END-BROWSE  THRU  7060-EXIT
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.                                                      0664000
V
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7020-START-BROWSE-TABLFLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS STARTBR
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RIDFLD  (W-TABL-KEY)
V                RESP    (W-RESP)                                        1484000
V                GTEQ
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V              WHEN DFHRESP(DUPKEY)
V                   CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'G011'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-EOF-TABL-YES      TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'G011'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'S002'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                0481000
V
V       7020-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7040-READ-NEXT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS READNEXT
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RIDFLD  (W-TABL-KEY)
V                INTO    (W-TABL-REC)
V                RESP    (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V                                                                        0488000
V             WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V             WHEN DFHRESP(DUPKEY)
V                  IF W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME  =  W-TABL-NAME
V                     MOVE W-TABL-KEY-VALUE
V                       TO W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE   (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE W-TABL-DATA
V                       TO W-ZGTM06-ENTRY-NAME  (W-LCTR)
V                     ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V                  ELSE
V                     SET W-EOF-TABL-YES    TO   TRUE
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
V                  SET W-EOF-TABL-YES    TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO   TRUE
V                  SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO   TRUE
V                  MOVE 'S002'           TO   W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                1087000
V      *
V       7040-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7060-END-BROWSE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  END BROWSE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ENDBR
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RESP    (W-RESP)                                        1484000
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'S002'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                0481000
V      *
V       7060-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           SET W-CICS-ERROR-NO  TO  TRUE.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 7220-START-BROWSE-TABLFLE  THRU  7220-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE W-LMAX        TO  W-LCTR
V              SET W-EOF-TABL-NO  TO  TRUE
V              INITIALIZE W-ZGTM06-TABLE-VALUES
V
V              PERFORM 7240-READ-NEXT      THRU  7240-EXIT
V                UNTIL W-EOF-TABL-YES                                    0664000
V                   OR W-ERROR-FOUND                                     0664000
V                   OR W-LCTR <= 0                                       0664000
V
V              IF W-CICS-ERROR-NO
V                 PERFORM 7260-END-BROWSE  THRU  7260-EXIT
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.                                                      0664000
V
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7220-START-BROWSE-TABLFLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS STARTBR
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RIDFLD  (W-TABL-KEY)
V                RESP    (W-RESP)                                        1484000
V                GTEQ
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V              WHEN DFHRESP(DUPKEY)
V                   CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'G011'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-EOF-TABL-YES      TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'G011'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'S002'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                0481000
V
V       7220-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7240-READ-NEXT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS READPREV
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RIDFLD  (W-TABL-KEY)
V                INTO    (W-TABL-REC)
V                RESP    (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V                                                                        0488000
V             WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V             WHEN DFHRESP(DUPKEY)
V                  IF W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME  =  W-TABL-NAME
V                     MOVE W-TABL-KEY-VALUE
V                       TO W-ZGTM06-KEY-VALUE   (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE W-TABL-DATA
V                       TO W-ZGTM06-ENTRY-NAME  (W-LCTR)
V                     SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V                  ELSE
V                     SET W-EOF-TABL-YES    TO   TRUE
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
V                  SET W-EOF-TABL-YES    TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO   TRUE
V                  SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO   TRUE
V                  MOVE 'S002'           TO   W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                1087000
V      *
V       7240-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7260-END-BROWSE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  END BROWSE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ENDBR
V                DATASET ('TABLFLE')
V                RESP    (W-RESP)                                        1484000
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE W-RESP
V
V              WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   SET W-CICS-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE 'S002'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.                                                0481000
V      *
V       7260-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM06M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM06M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      * THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM         TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP.
V
V           IF W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V              PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V           END-IF.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      *=================================================================
V      *   E N D   O F   P R O G R A M
V      *=================================================================

V
V      *        ACCOUNT NUMBERS CAN BE ALPHANUMERIC AND MUST NOT
V      *        CONTAIN SPACES OR SPECIAL CHARACTERS. THESE TWO
V      *        AREAS ARE USED TO VERIFY CONTENTS OF ACCOUNT NUMBERS:
V           05  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP         PIC  X(08).
V           05  W-ACNO-TO-INSP           PIC  X(08).
V

V               10  W-PREV-TO-VALUE      PIC  X(08).

VC001   01  W-CURR-DATE-TIME.

V                   15  W-ED-MMDDYY-MM      PIC  X(02).
V                   15  FILLER              PIC  X(01) VALUE '/'.
V                   15  W-ED-MMDDYY-DD      PIC  X(02).
V                   15  FILLER              PIC  X(01) VALUE '/'.
V                   15  W-ED-MMDDYY-YY      PIC  X(02).
V               10  FILLER                  PIC  X(04) VALUE ZEROES.

V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD.

V               10  W-MM                 PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-DASH-2             PIC  X(01)  VALUE '-'.
V               10  W-DD                 PIC  9(02).

V           05  W-DATE-MAX-END           PIC  X(10) VALUE '9999-12-31'.
V           05  W-DATE-LOW-VALUE         PIC  X(10) VALUE '0001-01-01'.
V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD-E           PIC  X(10).
V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD-T           PIC  X(10).
V      *--  DATE FORMAT : MM/DD/YY
V           05  W-DATE-HDR.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-MM        PIC  9(02).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01)  VALUE '/'.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-DD        PIC  9(02).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01)  VALUE '/'.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-YY        PIC  9(02).
V      *--  DATE FORMAT : MMDDYYYY
V           05  W-DATE-MAX-MMDDCCYY      PIC  X(08) VALUE '12319999'.
V           05  W-MMDDYYYY.
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-MM        PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-DD        PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-CCYY.
V                   15  W-MMDDYYYY-CC    PIC  9(02).
V                   15  W-MMDDYYYY-YY    PIC  9(02).
V           05  W-MMDDYYYY-C.
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C      PIC  9(02).
V
V       01  W-MISC-AREA.

V           05  W-SQLCODE-DISP           PIC -(03)9.

V
V
V       01  FILLER                       PIC  X(08) VALUE 'COMMAREA'.
VC001   01  W-COMMAREA                   PIC X(6500).
V       01  W-ZGTM-COMMAREA  REDEFINES  W-COMMAREA.

V       01  W-MSG-AREA.
V           05  W-MSG-CD                 PIC  X(04).
V           05  W-MSG-TEXT               PIC  X(75).
V           05  W-MSG-TEXT-X             PIC  X(75).
V           05  W-PARAGRAPH-NAME         PIC  X(08) VALUE SPACE.
V           05  W-SYSTEM-ERR.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(06) VALUE 'ZGTM07'.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ': '.
V               10 W-SE-EIBFN            PIC  X(02) VALUE SPACES.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ', '.
V               10 W-SE-EIBRCODE         PIC  X(06) VALUE SPACES.
V               10 W-SE-ERR-MSG          PIC  X(62) VALUE SPACES.
V       01  W-DB2-ERR-MSG.
V           05  W-DB2-ERR-MSG-TEXT       PIC  X(55).
V           05  W-DB2-ERR-CODE           PIC  Z(08)9-.
V
V       01  W-ERR-DATA.
V           05  W-REQUEST-TYPE            PIC X(01).
V               88  W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG  VALUE 'W'.
V           05  W-CALLING-TRAN-ID         PIC X(04).
V           05  W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID      PIC X(08).
V           05  W-SQLCA-AREA              PIC X(136).

V
V       01  W-SWITCH-AREA.
V           05  W-ERROR-FLAG             PIC X(01).
V               88  W-ERROR-FOUND            VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND         VALUE 'N'.
VC001       05  W-CICS-ERROR-FLAG        PIC  X(01).
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-YES         VALUE 'Y'.
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-NO          VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-DB2-ERROR-FLAG         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-NO            VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-MAP-FLAG               PIC X(01).
V               88  W-MAP-ONLY               VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-MAP-DATA               VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-FIELD-CHANGE-IND       PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-FIELD-CHANGED          VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-FIELD-UNCHANGED        VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-DFLT-FOUND-IND         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DFLT-FOUND-YES         VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DFLT-FOUND-NO          VALUE 'N'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'ZGTMMAP='.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           COPY ZGTM07M.
V
V       01  W-ZGTM07-SCREEN  REDEFINES  MENUMAPO.
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(175).
V           05  W-ZGTM07-SCR-LINE      OCCURS     11.
V               10  W-MVALUL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVALUF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVALUF.
V                   15  W-MVALUA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVALUI                 PIC  X(10).
V               10  W-MVDESL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVDESF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVDESF.
V                   15  W-MVDESA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVDESI                 PIC  X(50).
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(78).
V
V       01  W-MAP-MSG.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* ACCESS TO ZGTM APPLICATION NOT GRANTED-CONTACT ADP *'.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  PROCESS SELECTION CRITERIA TABLE                           *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMPRSC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON MESSAGE TABLE                                       *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMMSGT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON SQL AREA
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  CICS VARIABLES
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHAID  '.
V           COPY DFHAID.
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHBMSCA'.
V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM07'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION      THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM07-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY   THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V               IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               AND W-FIELD-UNCHANGED
V
V                  PERFORM 4700-UPDATE-TABLE THRU  4700-EXIT
V
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO   W-XCTL-PGM
V                     PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU 8900-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM07-ACT-FRWD   TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM07-ACT-BKWD   TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO   W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU 8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM07-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE  0               TO  W-DCTR.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE THE ADP NAME AND THE CLIENT NUMBERED ENTERED IN
V      *--  THE MAIN MENU
V      *--  DISPLAY A BLANKS FOR ALL THE OTHER FIELDS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO     TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM07-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE -1  TO  MTBLDESL.
V
V      *--  ADDED 08/21/02 - TIRIEVA
V           SET W-ZGTM07-ACT-CREATE     TO  TRUE.
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-ZGTM07-PRSC-TABLE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR(2:3)  TO  MTBLCLTO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOO.
V           INSPECT MTBLSCOO REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '_'.
V           INSPECT MTBLDESO REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '_'.
V           INSPECT MTBLFMTO REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '_'.
V           INSPECT MTBLLENO REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '_'.
V
V           MOVE  1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM07M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES  THRU  3300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  IF FIELD IS LOW-VALUE, MOVE THE PREVIOUS VALUE TO THE MAP
V      *--  COMPARE IF FIELDS HAVE CHANGED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INSPECT MTBLCLTI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLNMEI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLDESI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MDFTVALI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLFMTI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLLENI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES .
V           INSPECT MTBLSCOI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V
V           IF MTBLCLTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  MTBLCLTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLNMEI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLDESI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MDFTVALI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  MDFTVALI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLFMTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  MTBLFMTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLLENI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO  MTBLLENI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR) TO W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR) TO W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-FIELD-UNCHANGED  TO  TRUE.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM07-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  NOT =  MTBLCLTI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  NOT =  MTBLNMEI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  NOT =  MTBLDESI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT =  MDFTVALI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  NOT =  MTBLFMTI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   NOT =  MTBLLENI
V           OR W-ZGTM07-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  NOT =  MTBLSCOI
V              SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V           END-IF
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR W-FIELD-CHANGED
V
V              IF W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR) NOT = W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR) NOT = W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       3300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF TABLE HAS NOT BEEN DEFINED IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  VALIDATE THE DEFINITION VARIABLE
V      *--  VALIDATES THE DEFAULT FIELDS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF  TO  MTRANSF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4100-CHECK-TBL-EXIST  THRU  4100-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4200-CHECK-DEFN-VARIABLES  THRU  4200-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MDFTVALI NOT = SPACES
V                 IF MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V                 OR MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V                 OR MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                    PERFORM 4300-VALIDATE-DEFAULTS  THRU  4300-EXIT
V                 ELSE
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  MDFTVALL
V                    MOVE 'R020'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4400-CHECK-FIRST-ROW  THRU  4400-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR  >  W-LMAX
V                OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V                OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              PERFORM 4500-EDIT-VALID-VALUE  THRU  4500-EXIT
V
V              IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                 PERFORM 4600-CHECK-DUPLICATE   THRU  4600-EXIT
V              END-IF
V
V              IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                 PERFORM 4800-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS THRU 4800-EXIT
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  'R005'
V                MOVE -1       TO  W-MVDESL (W-DCTR)
V              ELSE
V                MOVE 'G055'   TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE -1       TO  MTBLDESL
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4100-CHECK-TBL-EXIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  THE TABLE SHOULD NOT BE DEFINED IN THE REFERENCE TABLE
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF      TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  MTBLDESL
V                MOVE 'R010'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN +100
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4100-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4200-CHECK-DEFN-VARIABLES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF FIELD DESCRIPTION IS SPACE
V      *--  CHECK FORMAT, LENGTH, SCALE OPTION AND CLIENT NUMBER
V      *--  VALID FORMAT ARE C(HARACTER) AND N(UMERIC)
V      *--  MAXIMUM LENGTH IS 10 CHARACTERS
V      *--  VALID OPTION CODE ARE '00', '01' AND '02'
V      *--  '03' ADDED TO VALID SCALE (FROM CCMPRSC) - 01/06/03 - TIRIEVA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLDESI  =  SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLDESL
V                 MOVE 'R016'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'C'
V              OR MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLFMTL
V                 MOVE 'R012'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V             EVALUATE TRUE
V
V               WHEN MTBLLENI NOT NUMERIC
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                 MOVE 'G008'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                 IF  MTBLLENI >  '00'
V                 AND MTBLLENI <  '11'
V                     MOVE MTBLLENI  TO  W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V                 ELSE
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                     MOVE 'R013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V                 IF  MTBLLENI >  '00'
V                 AND MTBLLENI <  '21'
V                     MOVE MTBLLENI  TO  W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V                 ELSE
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                     MOVE 'R021'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN OTHER
V                 CONTINUE
V
V             END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  MTBLSCOL
V                MOVE 'R014'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4300-VALIDATE-DEFAULTS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE DEFAULT VALUE SHOULD BE ONE OF THE EXISTING VALUE OR
V      *--  A NEW VALUE TO BE ADDED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--  THE DEFAULT VALUE SHOULD BE AN EXISTING ROW IN THE TABLE
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE MDFTVALI                  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V
V              WHEN +100
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4300-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V      *--  IF DEFAULT VALUE IS NOT AN EXISTING ROW IN THE TABLE,
V      *--  CHECK IF IT MATCHES THE VALUE ENTERED IN THE SCREEN
V
V           IF SQLCODE = +100
V
V              MOVE 1               TO  W-LCTR
V              SET W-DFLT-FOUND-NO  TO  TRUE
V
V              PERFORM UNTIL W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                         OR W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                         OR W-DFLT-FOUND-YES
V
V              IF MDFTVALI = W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-DFLT-FOUND-YES    TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  TO  MDFTDSCI
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V              END-PERFORM
V
V              IF W-DFLT-FOUND-NO
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MDFTVALL
V                 MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       4300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4400-CHECK-FIRST-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  IF SCALE OPTION IS '02', NO ROWS SHOULD BE ENTERED
V      *--  RECORDS TO BE CREATED USING THE 'TABL' SYSTEM
V      *--  FOR SCALE 03, ROWS ARE NOT ALLOWED TO BE CREATED - 01/06/03
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V              IF W-MVALUI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V              OR W-MVDESI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                 MOVE 'R011'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V              IF W-MVALUI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V              OR W-MVDESI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                 MOVE 'R028'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4500-EDIT-VALID-VALUE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUE SHOULD CONFORM WITH THE FORMAT AND LENGTH
V      *--  DEFINED
V      *--  FOR NUMERIC VALUES, LENGTH SHOULD BE EQUAL TO DEFN LENGTH
V      *--  FOR ALPHA VALUES, LEN SHOULD BE LESS OR EQ TO DEFINED LENGTH
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-TEMP-VALUE
V                 IF W-TEMP-VALUE (1:W-VALUE-LENGTH-N) NOT NUMERIC
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'G008'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE +0 TO W-SPACE-COUNT
V                         W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                  TALLYING W-SPACE-COUNT  FOR ALL ' '
V              COMPUTE W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V                  = LENGTH OF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) - W-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT NOT =  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT  >  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R027'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  ALLOW DESCRIPTION TO BE SPACES  - 01/08/03 - TIRIEVA
V      *    IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V      *       IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V      *          SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *          MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V      *          MOVE 'G007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V      *       END-IF
V      *    END-IF.
V
V       4500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4600-CHECK-DUPLICATE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE VALID VALUE FIELD SHOULD NOT EXIST IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  SHOULD NOT HAVE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)      TO  W-ACNO-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_CHCK CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4600-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_CHCK
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   PERFORM 4620-COMPARE-ROW  THRU  4620-EXIT
V
V                 WHEN +100
V      *--          TO CHECK PREVIOUS ROWS - 08/28/02 - TIRIEVA
V                   MOVE SPACES   TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                      CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                   PERFORM 4620-COMPARE-ROW  THRU  4620-EXIT
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - CHCK
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '4600-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4620-COMPARE-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  COMPARE VALUE AND DESCRIPTION TO FETCHED ROW AND PREVIOUS
V      *--  ROWS ENTERED
V      *--  CHANGED 'R005' TO A WARNING MESSAGE - 08/27/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ACCEPT DUPL PRCSS-KEY-NM FOR ACNO, ETC - 11/14/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ALLOW ALPHANUMERIC BRNCH/ACCT NUMBERS 2005-04-04 - TIDRLUG
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--           VERIFY THAT ACNO-FROM AND ACNO-TO CONTAIN
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS:
V
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE TO W-ACNO-FROM-INSP.
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   TO W-ACNO-TO-INSP.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V
V      *--  RESULT:  IF ACNO-FROM-VALUE/ACNO-TO-VALUE CONTAIN ONLY
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS, THEN AREAS ACNO-FROM-INSP/
V      *--           ACNO-TO-INSP ARE BLANK.
V
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-INSP NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-INSP   NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >  W-ACNO-TO-VALUE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'F013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
VRE            AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50) NOT = SPACES
V                IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'DPCDXRF'
V                OR CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'IAUCXRF'
V                   CONTINUE
V                ELSE
V      *--          SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *--          MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE  W-LCTR       TO  W-DCTR
V                   MOVE 'R005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                MOVE 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                PERFORM UNTIL W-MCTR >= W-LCTR
V                           OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  IF  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                  AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  ELSE
V                   IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   ELSE
V                    IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V                       PERFORM 4660-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP THRU 4660-EXIT
V                    ELSE
V                      IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V      *--                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *--                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                         MOVE  W-LCTR       TO  W-DCTR
V                         MOVE 'R005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                         MOVE W-MVALUI(W-MCTR)  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                      END-IF
V                    END-IF
V                   END-IF
V                  END-IF
V                  ADD 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                END-PERFORM
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4620-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4660-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK FOR OVERLAP IN THE ACCOUNT RANGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)  TO  W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V
V       4660-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4700-UPDATE-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INSERT THE TABLE DEFINITION ROW
V      *--  INSERT THE VALID VALUE ROWS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           PERFORM 7600-INSERT-ZGTMDEF  THRU  7600-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              MOVE 1  TO W-LCTR
V              PERFORM 7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS  THRU  7800-EXIT
V                UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                   OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                   OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V           END-IF.
V
V       4700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4800-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ENTRY AGAINST RELATED REFERENCE TABLES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  =  'ROLE'
V              PERFORM 4820-CHECK-ROLE         THRU 4820-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  =  'FEEROLE'
V              PERFORM 4840-CHECK-FEEROLE      THRU 4840-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  =  'DPCDXRF'
V              PERFORM 4860-CHECK-DPCDXRF      THRU 4860-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  =  'IAUCXRF'
V              PERFORM 4880-CHECK-IAUCXRF      THRU 4880-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       4800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4820-CHECK-ROLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ROLE AGAINST FEEROLE ENTRIES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE 'FEEROLE'                 TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V      *
V      *--  CHECK ENTRY IN CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *
V           PERFORM 4900-SELECT-CCMPRSC        THRU 4900-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V              WHEN 0
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-CNT > 0
V      *--          INVALID ENTRY, MUST NOT EXIST IN FEEROLE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE -1              TO    W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE 'R030'          TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
