V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4820-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4840-CHECK-FEEROLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE FEEROLE AGAINST ROLE ENTRIES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE 'ROLE'                    TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V      *
V      *--  CHECK ENTRY IN CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *
V           PERFORM 4900-SELECT-CCMPRSC        THRU 4900-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V              WHEN 0
V               IF W-CCMPRSC-CNT > 0
V      *--       INVALID ENTRY, MUST NOT EXIST IN ROLE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE -1                 TO    W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R031'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V              WHEN +100
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4840-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4840-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4860-CHECK-DPCDXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-DPCDXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4865-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC    THRU 4865-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-DPCDXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4860-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4865-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4865-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4880-CHECK-IAUCXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-IAUCXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4885-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC    THRU 4885-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-IAUCXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4880-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4885-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4885-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4900-SELECT-CCMPRSC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SELECT CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE                         W-CCMPRSC-CNT.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT  COUNT (*)
V               INTO :W-CCMPRSC-CNT
V               FROM  CCMPRSC
V              WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :WK-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :WK-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V                AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM07'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM07-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V                  SET W-ZGTM07-ACT-CREATE      TO  TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM07-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM07-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM07-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5800-MOVE-PREV-SCREEN  THRU  5800-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 5600-SET-SCREEN-ATTR  THRU  5600-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X        TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM07-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V                IF W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO
V      *--          THIS IS FIRST PAGE
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                ELSE
V      *--          AFTER UPDATE THE ACTION CODE IS SET TO 'L'
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'       TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO  TO  TRUE
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (1)  =  SPACES
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE -1  TO  W-MVALUL (1).
V
V           MOVE 1   TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE ALL '_'   TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5600-SET-SCREEN-ATTR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SET SCREEN ATTRIBUTES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM07'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MTBLNMEA
V                                MTBLCLTA
V                                MDFTDSCA.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMFSE    TO  MTBLDESA
V                                MTBLFMTA
V                                MTBLLENA
V                                MTBLSCOA
V                                MDFTVALA.
V
V           IF MTBLDESI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLDESI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLFMTI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLFMTI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLLENI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLLENI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MDFTVALI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MDFTVALI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MDFTDSCI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MDFTDSCI
V           END-IF .
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             IF W-ZGTM07-ACT-CREATE
V                MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             ELSE
V                MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             END-IF
V             MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1         TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE ALL '_'   TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5800-MOVE-PREV-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE VALUE IN THE CURRENT SCREEN TO PREVIOUS SCREEN
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE  MTBLCLTI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE  MTBLNMEI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-TABLE-NAME .
V           MOVE  MTBLDESI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-FIELD-NAME .
V           MOVE  MDFTVALI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE .
V           MOVE  MTBLFMTI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT .
V           MOVE  MTBLLENI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE  MTBLSCOI  TO  W-ZGTM07-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN .
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) TO W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) TO W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR)
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        > :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM07-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT         < :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM07-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0 OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7600-INSERT-ZGTMDEF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CREATE THE DEFINITION ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       PERFORM 7850-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7850-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7600-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           INITIALIZE DCLCCMPRSC
V                      W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  TO W-INP-CLT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR          TO CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF      TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM .
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT.
V           MOVE W-DATE-MAX-END            TO CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V
VC001  *--  -- BUILD W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT           TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT .
V
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER          TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID       TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP             TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE SPACES                    TO CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                      TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             INSERT INTO CCMPRSC
V                ( CLIENT_NBR
V                , PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                , EFFCT_DT
V                , TRMNT_DT
V                , PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                , UPDT_LAST_DT
VC001            , USER_ID
VC001            , TRMNL_ID
VC001            , LST_CHNG_TMSTMP
VC001            , FNCTN_CD
VC001            , UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD)
V             VALUES
V                (:CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-USER-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
VC001             PERFORM 7830-LOG-INSERT  THRU 7830-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND        TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                  TO    MTBLDESI
V                 MOVE SQLCODE             TO    W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'              TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7600-'             TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-INSERT       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES     TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       PERFORM 7850-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7850-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7800-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           INITIALIZE DCLCCMPRSC.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  TO W-INP-CLT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR          TO CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR)
V                                          TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM .
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT.
V           MOVE W-DATE-MAX-END            TO CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR)
V                                          TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT .
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE               TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER          TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID       TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP             TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE SPACES                    TO CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                      TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
V
V           PERFORM 7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  THRU  7820-EXIT.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             INSERT INTO CCMPRSC
V                ( CLIENT_NBR
V                , PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                , EFFCT_DT
V                , TRMNT_DT
V                , PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                , UPDT_LAST_DT
VC001            , USER_ID
VC001            , TRMNL_ID
VC001            , LST_CHNG_TMSTMP
VC001            , FNCTN_CD
VC001            , UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD)
V             VALUES
V                (:CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-USER-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 ADD 1  TO W-LCTR
VC001             PERFORM 7830-LOG-INSERT  THRU 7830-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND        TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                  TO    MTBLDESI
V                 MOVE SQLCODE             TO    W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'              TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7800-'             TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-INSERT       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES     TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GENERATE THE NEXT PROCESS KEY NUMBER
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_MAX  CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V      *        AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER  BY PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ONLY THE FIRST ROW TO GET THE MAX
V      *
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_MAX
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   ADD  1  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 0  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 SELECT ERROR
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       7820-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001   7830-LOG-INSERT.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR         TO W-ZGTM-LOG-CLT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP              TO W-ZGTM-LOG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER           TO W-ZGTM-LOG-USERID.
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-ADD             TO TRUE.
VC001
VC001  *--  CCMPRSC IS ACTUALLY A TABLE NOT A DDNAME
VC001       MOVE 'CCMPRSC'                  TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DDNAME.
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DATA.
VC001
VC001       EXEC CICS WRITE
VC001            DATASET (W-ZGTM-LOG-FILE)
VC001            FROM    (W-ZGTM-LOG-RECORD)
VC001            RIDFLD  (W-ZGTM-LOG-KEY)
VC001            RESP    (W-RESP)
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE W-RESP
VC001           WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                MOVE 'S002'            TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7830-'           TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE 'CCMPRSC'         TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE 'WRITE'           TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO TRUE
VC001                SET  W-ERROR-FOUND     TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7830-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  *****************************************************************
VC001
VC001
VC001   7850-GET-CURR-DT-TIME.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SET :W-CURR-DATE   = CURRENT DATE
VC001              , :W-CURR-TMSTMP = CURRENT TIMESTAMP
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE         TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'          TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7850-'         TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7850-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  ******************************************************************
VC001
VC001
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MVALUL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM07M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM07M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      *--  THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM         TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       IF W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001          MOVE W-RESP            TO  W-ERR-CDE-DISP
VC001       ELSE
VC001          MOVE W-SQLCODE         TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'G055'
V           OR W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V                INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@       '
V                                                BY 'CREATION'
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '##########'
V                   BY W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R017'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R027'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       EVALUATE TRUE
VC001           WHEN W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-ERR-CDE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , '  '           DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-FUNCTION     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , 'IN PARA '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-PARAGRAPH    DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN W-DB2-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM07-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.

V                   15  FILLER              PIC  X(01) VALUE '/'.
V                   15  W-ED-MMDDYY-YY      PIC  X(02).
V               10  FILLER                  PIC  X(04) VALUE ZEROES.
V               10  W-EDITMOD-DATE-RETURN-CODE    PIC X(01) VALUE SPACES.
V               10  FILLER                  PIC  X(01) VALUE HIGH-VALUES.
V
V       01  W-WRK-DATES .
V      *--  DATE FORMAT : CCYY-MM-DD
V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD.
V               10  W-CCYY               PIC  9(04).
V               10  W-DASH-1             PIC  X(01)  VALUE '-'.
V               10  W-MM                 PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-DASH-2             PIC  X(01)  VALUE '-'.
V               10  W-DD                 PIC  9(02).
V           05  W-DATE-MAX-START         PIC  X(10) VALUE '9999-12-01'.
V           05  W-DATE-MAX-END           PIC  X(10) VALUE '9999-12-31'.
V           05  W-DATE-LOW-VALUE         PIC  X(10) VALUE '0001-01-01'.
V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD-E           PIC  X(10).
V           05  W-CCYY-MM-DD-T           PIC  X(10).
V      *--  DATE FORMAT : MM/DD/YY
V           05  W-DATE-HDR.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-MM        PIC  9(02).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01)  VALUE '/'.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-DD        PIC  9(02).
V               10  FILLER               PIC  X(01)  VALUE '/'.
V               10  W-DATE-HDR-YY        PIC  9(02).
V      *--  DATE FORMAT : MMDDYYYY
V           05  W-DATE-MAX-MMDDCCYY      PIC  X(08) VALUE '12319999'.
V           05  W-MMDDYYYY.
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-MM        PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-DD        PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-CCYY.
V                   15  W-MMDDYYYY-CC    PIC  9(02).
V                   15  W-MMDDYYYY-YY    PIC  9(02).
V           05  W-MMDDYYYY-C.
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C      PIC  9(02).
V               10  W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C      PIC  9(02).
V
V       01  W-MISC-AREA.
V           05  W-SQLCODE                PIC S9(04).
V           05  W-SQLCODE-DISP           PIC -(03)9.
VC001       05  W-ERR-CDE-DISP           PIC -(03)9.
V
V
V       01  FILLER                       PIC  X(08) VALUE 'COMMAREA'.
VC001   01  W-COMMAREA                   PIC X(6500).
V       01  W-ZGTM-COMMAREA  REDEFINES  W-COMMAREA.
V           COPY ZGTMCOMM.
V           COPY ZGTM01C .
V           COPY ZGTM08C .
V
V       01  W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA.
V           COPY ZCCM910C.
V
V       01  W-MSG-AREA.
V           05  W-MSG-CD                 PIC  X(04).
V           05  W-MSG-TEXT               PIC  X(75).
V           05  W-MSG-TEXT-X             PIC  X(75).
V           05  W-PARAGRAPH-NAME         PIC  X(08) VALUE SPACE.
V           05  W-SYSTEM-ERR.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(06) VALUE 'ZGTM08'.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ': '.
V               10 W-SE-EIBFN            PIC  X(02) VALUE SPACES.
V               10 FILLER                PIC  X(02) VALUE ', '.
V               10 W-SE-EIBRCODE         PIC  X(06) VALUE SPACES.
V               10 W-SE-ERR-MSG          PIC  X(62) VALUE SPACES.
V       01  W-DB2-ERR-MSG.
V           05  W-DB2-ERR-MSG-TEXT       PIC  X(55).
V           05  W-DB2-ERR-CODE           PIC  Z(08)9-.
V
V       01  W-ERR-DATA.
V           05  W-REQUEST-TYPE            PIC X(01).
V               88  W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG  VALUE 'W'.
V           05  W-CALLING-TRAN-ID         PIC X(04).
V           05  W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID      PIC X(08).
V           05  W-SQLCA-AREA              PIC X(136).
V
V
V       01  W-SWITCH-AREA.
V           05  W-ERROR-FLAG             PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-ERROR-FOUND            VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND         VALUE 'N'.
VC001       05  W-CICS-ERROR-FLAG        PIC  X(01).
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-YES         VALUE 'Y'.
VC001           88  W-CICS-ERROR-NO          VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-DB2-ERROR-FLAG         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DB2-ERROR-NO            VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-MAP-FLAG               PIC X(01).
V               88  W-MAP-ONLY               VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-MAP-DATA               VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-FIELD-CHANGE-IND       PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-FIELD-CHANGED          VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-FIELD-UNCHANGED        VALUE 'N'.
V           05  W-DFLT-FOUND-IND         PIC  X(01).
V               88  W-DFLT-FOUND-YES         VALUE 'Y'.
V               88  W-DFLT-FOUND-NO          VALUE 'N'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'ZGTMMAP='.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           COPY ZGTM08M.
V
V       01  W-ZGTM08-SCREEN  REDEFINES  MENUMAPO.
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(175).
V           05  W-ZGTM08-SCR-LINE      OCCURS     11.
V               10  W-MACTNL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MACTNF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MACTNF.
V                   15  W-MACTNA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MACTNI                 PIC  X(1).
V               10  W-MVALUL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVALUF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVALUF.
V                   15  W-MVALUA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVALUI                 PIC  X(10).
V               10  W-MVDESL           COMP  PIC  S9(4).
V               10  W-MVDESF                 PIC  X.
V               10  FILLER   REDEFINES   W-MVDESF.
V                   15  W-MVDESA             PIC  X.
V               10  W-MVDESI                 PIC  X(50).
V           05  FILLER                       PIC  X(78).
V
V       01  W-MAP-MSG.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* ACCESS TO ZGTM APPLICATION NOT GRANTED-CONTACT ADP *'.
V           03 FILLER                       PIC  X(080) VALUE
V             '* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * '.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  PROCESS SELECTION CRITERIA TABLE                           *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMPRSC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON MESSAGE TABLE                                       *
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE CCMMSGT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  COMMON SQL AREA
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V           EXEC SQL
V              INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--  CICS VARIABLES
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHAID  '.
V           COPY DFHAID.
V
V       01  FILLER                  PIC  X(008) VALUE 'DFHBMSCA'.
V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM08'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION      THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM08-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-LIST       TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V               IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V               AND W-FIELD-UNCHANGED
V                  PERFORM 4700-PERFORM-UPDATE THRU  4700-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF1
V               INITIALIZE W-ZGTM08-PRSC-TABLE
V               SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE 'G027'           TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-FRWD   TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-BKWD   TO   TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO   W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU 8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM08-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE 0                TO  W-DCTR.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *--  POPULATE THE ADP NAME AND THE CLIENT NUMBERED ENTERED IN
V      *--  THE MAIN MENU
V      *--  POPULATE TABLE NAME, FIELD NAME, DEFAULT NAME / DESCRIPTION
V      *--  GET DEFAULT DESCRIPTION FROM CCMPRSC TABLE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES             TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF               TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO     TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-ZGTM08-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V           MOVE -1  TO  MTBLDESL.
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-ZGTM08-PRSC-TABLE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR(2:3)  TO  MTBLCLTO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  MTBLFMTO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-LEN   TO  MTBLLENO.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOO.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                                              MTBLNMEO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                              MDFTVALO .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESO .
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT = SPACE
V              PERFORM 2500-CHECK-DEFAULT  THRU  2500-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2500-CHECK-DEFAULT.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF DEFAULT VALUE EXIST IN CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  GET DESCRIPTION OF DEFAULT VALUE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V
V              WHEN +100
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (1)
V                MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '2000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       2500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM08M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES  THRU  3300-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3300-CHK-FIELD-CHANGES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  IF FIELD IS LOW-VALUE, MOVE THE PREVIOUS VALUE TO THE MAP
V      *--  COMPARE IF FIELDS HAVE CHANGED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INSPECT MTBLCLTI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLNMEI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLDESI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MDFTVALI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLFMTI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V           INSPECT MTBLLENI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES .
V           INSPECT MTBLSCOI  REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES  .
V
V           IF MTBLCLTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  MTBLCLTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLNMEI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLDESI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MDFTVALI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  MDFTVALI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLFMTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  MTBLFMTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLLENI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO  MTBLLENI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              INSPECT W-MACTNI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              INSPECT W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V
V              IF W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-OPTION (W-LCTR) TO W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR) TO W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V              IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  =  LOW-VALUES
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR) TO W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-FIELD-UNCHANGED  TO  TRUE.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  NOT =  MTBLCLTI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  NOT =  MTBLNMEI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  NOT =  MTBLDESI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT =  MDFTVALI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  NOT =  MTBLFMTI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   NOT =  MTBLLENI
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  NOT =  MTBLSCOI
V              SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V           END-IF
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR W-FIELD-CHANGED
V
V              IF W-ZGTM08-SCRN-OPTION (W-LCTR) NOT = W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR) NOT = W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V              IF W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR) NOT = W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-FIELD-CHANGED  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       3300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF TABLE HAS NOT BEEN DEFINED IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  VALIDATE THE DEFINITION VARIABLE
V      *--  VALIDATES THE DEFAULT FIELDS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF  TO  MTRANSF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4200-CHECK-DEFN-VARIABLES  THRU  4200-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MDFTVALI NOT = SPACES
V                 IF MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V                 OR MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V                 OR MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                    PERFORM 4300-VALIDATE-DEFAULTS  THRU  4300-EXIT
V                 ELSE
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  MDFTVALL
V                    MOVE 'R020'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              PERFORM 4400-CHECK-FIRST-ROW  THRU  4400-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 PERFORM 4450-VALIDATE-ACTION  THRU  4450-EXIT
V                 MOVE W-LINE  TO  W-LCTR
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V           AND W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V
V               MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V               IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                  MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                  MOVE 'G061'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V               PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR  >  W-LMAX
V                    OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V                    OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V                  IF W-MACTNI (W-LCTR) NOT = 'A'
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE 'G015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  END-IF
V
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 4500-EDIT-VALID-VALUE  THRU  4500-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 4600-CHECK-DUPLICATE   THRU  4600-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 4800-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS THRU 4800-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V                  ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V               END-PERFORM
V
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V           AND W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODIFY
V                PERFORM 4600-CHECK-DUPLICATE   THRU  4600-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-YES  TO  TRUE
V              IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  'R005'
V                MOVE -1       TO  W-MVDESL (W-DCTR)
V              ELSE
V                 MOVE 'G055'   TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE -1       TO  MTBLDESL
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4100-CHECK-TBL-EXIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  THE TABLE SHOULD BE DEFINED IN THE REFERENCE TABLE
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF      TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN +100
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  MTBLDESL
V                MOVE 'R002'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4100-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4100-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4200-CHECK-DEFN-VARIABLES.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK IF FIELD DESCRIPTION IS SPACE
V      *--  CHECK FORMAT, LENGTH, SCALE OPTION AND CLIENT NUMBER
V      *--  VALID FORMAT ARE C(HARACTER) AND N(UMERIC)
V      *--  MAXIMUM LENGTH IS 10 CHARACTERS
V      *--  VALID OPTION CODE ARE '00', '01' AND '02'
V      *--  '03' ADDED TO VALID SCALE OPTION - 01/06/03
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLDESI  =  SPACES
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLDESL
V                 MOVE 'R016'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'C'
V              OR MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLFMTL
V                 MOVE 'R012'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V             EVALUATE TRUE
V
V               WHEN MTBLLENI NOT NUMERIC
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                 MOVE 'G008'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                 IF  MTBLLENI >  '00'
V                 AND MTBLLENI <  '11'
V                     MOVE MTBLLENI  TO  W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V                 ELSE
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                     MOVE 'R013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V                 IF  MTBLLENI >  '00'
V                 AND MTBLLENI <  '21'
V                     MOVE MTBLLENI  TO  W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V                 ELSE
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  MTBLLENL
V                     MOVE 'R021'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V
V               WHEN OTHER
V                 CONTINUE
V
V             END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLSCOI  =  '00'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '01'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V              OR MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  MTBLSCOL
V                MOVE 'R014'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4300-VALIDATE-DEFAULTS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE DEFAULT VALUE SHOULD BE ONE OF THE EXISTING VALUE OR
V      *--  A NEW VALUE TO BE ADDED
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--  THE DEFAULT VALUE SHOULD BE AN EXISTING ROW IN THE TABLE
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE MDFTVALI                  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             SELECT PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V             INTO  :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  EFFCT_DT =
V                    (SELECT MAX(EFFCT_DT)
V                     FROM   CCMPRSC
V                     WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       AND  TRMNT_DT       >  CURRENT_DATE
V                    )
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO  MDFTDSCO
V
V              WHEN +100
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4300-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-SELECT      TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V      *--  IF DEFAULT VALUE IS NOT AN EXISTING ROW IN THE TABLE,
V      *--  CHECK IF IT MATCHES THE VALUE ENTERED IN THE SCREEN
V
V           IF SQLCODE = +100
V
V              MOVE 1               TO  W-LCTR
V              SET W-DFLT-FOUND-NO  TO  TRUE
V
V              PERFORM UNTIL W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                         OR W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                         OR W-DFLT-FOUND-YES
V
V              IF MDFTVALI = W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                 SET W-DFLT-FOUND-YES    TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)  TO  MDFTDSCI
V              END-IF
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V              END-PERFORM
V
V              IF W-DFLT-FOUND-NO
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
