V                 MOVE -1            TO  MDFTVALL
V                 MOVE 'R006'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       4300-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4400-CHECK-FIRST-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  IF SCALE OPTION IS '02', NO ROWS SHOULD BE ENTERED
V      *--  RECORDS TO BE CREATED USING THE 'TABL' SYSTEM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V              IF MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V                 IF W-MVALUI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                 OR W-MVDESI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                    MOVE 'R011'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V              IF MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V                 IF W-MVALUI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                 OR W-MVDESI (1)  NOT =  SPACES
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (1)
V                    MOVE 'R028'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V
V
V       4400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4450-VALIDATE-ACTION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  CHECK ACTION CODE
V      *--    - VALID ACTION CODES ARE 'M' AND 'D'
V      *--    - ONLY ONE ACTION CODE IS ALLOWED AT ONE TIME
V      *--    - CHANGE NOT ALLOWED FOR SCALE OPTION '03'
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR
V                            W-LINE.
V           MOVE SPACES  TO  W-SAVE-ACTION.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR  W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EVALUATE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V
V                WHEN 'M'
V                WHEN 'D'
V                   IF MTBLSCOI  =  '03'
V      *--             NOT ALLOWED FOR OPTION 03 - 01/08/03 - TIRIEVA
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1                 TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'R029'             TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   ELSE
V                   IF W-SAVE-ACTION = SPACES
V                      MOVE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-SAVE-ACTION
V                      MOVE W-LCTR             TO  W-LINE
V                      ADD  1                  TO  W-LCTR
V                   ELSE
V      *--             ONLY 1 ACTION CODE ALLOWED
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1                 TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'G014'             TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V                   END-IF
V
V                WHEN SPACE
V                WHEN '_'
V                   IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) NOT = SPACES
V                      MOVE '_'        TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                   END-IF
V                   ADD  1             TO  W-LCTR
V
V                WHEN OTHER
V      *--          INVALID ACTION CODE
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                   MOVE -1            TO  W-MACTNL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE 'R007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF  W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V             IF  W-SAVE-ACTION  =  SPACE
V                 CONTINUE
V             ELSE
V                 MOVE W-SAVE-ACTION      TO    W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODE
V             END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4450-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4500-EDIT-VALID-VALUE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUE SHOULD CONFORM WITH THE FORMAT AND LENGTH
V      *--  DEFINED
V      *--  FOR NUMERIC VALUES, LENGTH SHOULD BE EQUAL TO DEFN LENGTH
V      *--  FOR ALPHA VALUES, LEN SHOULD BE LESS OR EQ TO DEFINED LENGTH
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  TO  W-TEMP-VALUE
V                 IF W-TEMP-VALUE (1:W-VALUE-LENGTH-N) NOT NUMERIC
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'G008'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE +0 TO W-SPACE-COUNT
V                         W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              INSPECT W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                  TALLYING W-SPACE-COUNT  FOR ALL ' '
V              COMPUTE W-NON-SPACE-COUNT
V                  = LENGTH OF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) - W-SPACE-COUNT
V
V              IF MTBLFMTI  =  'N'
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT NOT =  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R017'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-NON-SPACE-COUNT  >  W-VALUE-LENGTH-N
V                    SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                    MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                    MOVE 'R027'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  ALLOW DESCRIPTION TO BE SPACES  - 01/09/03 - TIRIEVA
V      *    IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V      *       IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V      *          SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *          MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V      *          MOVE 'G007'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V      *       END-IF
V      *    END-IF.
V
V       4500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4600-CHECK-DUPLICATE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  THE VALID VALUE FIELD SHOULD NOT EXIST IN THE CONTROL TABLE
V      *--  SHOULD NOT HAVE THE SAME DESCRIPTION IN AN EXISTING ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)         TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V
V           IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)      TO  W-ACNO-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_CHCK CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '4600-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_CHCK
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                   , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V      *--          MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   PERFORM 4620-COMPARE-ROW  THRU  4620-EXIT
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   CONTINUE
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - CHCK
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '4600-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_CHCK
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       4600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       4620-COMPARE-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  COMPARE VALUE AND DESCRIPTION TO FETCHED ROW AND PREVIOUS
V      *--  ROWS ENTERED
V      *--  CHANGED 'R005' TO A WARNING MESSAGE    - 08/27/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ACCEPT DUPL PRCSS-KEY-NM FOR ACNO, ETC - 11/14/02 - TIRIEVA
V      *--  ALLOW ALPHANUMERIC BRNCH/ACCT NUMBERS 2005-04-04 - TIDRLUG
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *--           VERIFY THAT ACNO-FROM AND ACNO-TO CONTAIN
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS:
V
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE TO W-ACNO-FROM-INSP.
V           MOVE     W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   TO W-ACNO-TO-INSP.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    REPLACING ALL SPACE BY '*'.
V
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-FROM-INSP  CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V           INSPECT  W-ACNO-TO-INSP    CONVERTING
V                   'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789' TO SPACE.
V
V      *--  RESULT:  IF ACNO-FROM-VALUE/ACNO-TO-VALUE CONTAIN ONLY
V      *--           ALPHANUMERIC CHARACTERS, THEN AREAS ACNO-FROM-INSP/
V      *--           ACNO-TO-INSP ARE BLANK.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V              AND W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V              AND W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODIFY
V               IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR(W-LCTR) =
V                                      CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                  MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                  MOVE 'G013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               ELSE
V                  SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                  MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                  MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-INSP NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-INSP   NOT   =   SPACE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'G143'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >  W-ACNO-TO-VALUE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'F013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR(W-LCTR) =
V                                      CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V              AND (W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR) = 'ACNO'
V               OR  W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR) = 'PRPRTF'
V               OR  W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR) = 'PRSVTF')
V                CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V              AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V              AND W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:50)
V                IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  = 'DPCDXRF'
V                OR CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  = 'IAUCXRF'
V                   CONTINUE
V                ELSE
V      *--          SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *--          MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE  W-LCTR       TO  W-DCTR
V                   MOVE 'R005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                MOVE 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                PERFORM UNTIL W-MCTR >= W-LCTR
V                           OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  IF  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                  AND W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V                     SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                     MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                     MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                  ELSE
V                   IF W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = W-MVALUI (W-MCTR)
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'ACNO'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRPRTF'
V                   AND CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD NOT =  'PRSVTF'
V                      SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                      MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                      MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   ELSE
V                    IF CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  =  'ACNO'
V                       PERFORM 4660-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP THRU 4660-EXIT
V                    ELSE
V                      IF W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) = W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)
V      *--             AND NOT W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODIFY
V      *--                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V      *--                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V                         MOVE  W-LCTR       TO  W-DCTR
V                         MOVE 'R005'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                         MOVE W-MVALUI(W-MCTR)  TO  W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                      END-IF
V                    END-IF
V                   END-IF
V                  END-IF
V                  ADD 1  TO  W-MCTR
V                END-PERFORM
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4620-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4660-CHECK-ACCT-RANGE-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CHECK OVERLAP IN THE ACCOUNT RANGE AGAINST THE PREVIOUS ROWS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-MCTR)  TO  W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (01:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN W-ACNO-FROM-VALUE <= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V              AND W-ACNO-TO-VALUE   >= W-PREV-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (10:08)
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                MOVE -1            TO  W-MVALUL (W-LCTR)
V                MOVE 'R015'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V
V       4660-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4700-PERFORM-UPDATE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  UPDATE THE TABLE DEFINITION ROW IF ANY FIELD IS CHANGED
V      *--  INSERT THE VALID VALUE ROWS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR(2:3)
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-FIELD-NAME
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-LEN
V           OR W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  NOT =
V              W-ZGTM08-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN
V              PERFORM 7400-UPDATE-ZGTMDEF  THRU  7400-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODIFY
V              OR W-ZGTM08-ACT-DELETE
V              OR W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V                 MOVE -1            TO  W-MVDESL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE 'G013'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                 CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODIFY
V                 PERFORM 7600-UPDATE-ENTRY  THRU  7600-EXIT
V
V              WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-DELETE
V                 PERFORM 7700-DELETE-ROW    THRU  7700-EXIT
V
V              WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                 MOVE 1  TO W-LCTR
V                 PERFORM 7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS  THRU  7800-EXIT
V                   UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) = SPACES
V                      OR W-ERROR-FOUND
V                 IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                    MOVE 'G025'            TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                    SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-LIST  TO  TRUE
V                 END-IF
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       4700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4800-REFERENCE-CROSS-EDITS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE ENTRY AGAINST RELATED REFERENCE TABLES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME =  'DPCDXRF'
V              PERFORM 4860-CHECK-DPCDXRF      THRU 4860-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME =  'IAUCXRF'
V              PERFORM 4880-CHECK-IAUCXRF      THRU 4880-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V       4800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4860-CHECK-DPCDXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-DPCDXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4865-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC    THRU 4865-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-DPCDXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4860-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4865-CHECK-DPCDXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-DPCDXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4865-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4880-CHECK-IAUCXRF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALIDATE VALUES FOR APPROVAL LEVEL
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)         TO  W-IAUCXRF-VAL-TXT.
V
V           PERFORM 4885-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC    THRU 4885-EXIT
V                   VARYING W-TBL-NDX    FROM  1    BY  1
V                     UNTIL W-TBL-NDX       >  W-IAUCXRF-MAX
V                        OR W-ERROR-FOUND.
V
V       4880-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V       4885-CHECK-IAUCXRF-DESC.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  VALID VALUES ARE:  0, 1 AND 2
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '0'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '1'
V           OR W-IAUCXRF-ENTRY (W-TBL-NDX) = '2'
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V      *--     INVALID VALUE, APPROVAL LEVELS ARE 0, 1 AND 2
V              SET W-ERROR-FOUND         TO    TRUE
V              MOVE -1                   TO    W-MVDESL (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE 'R032'               TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V       4885-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM08'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  IF LOW VALUE, MOVE THE TABLE VALUE - 01/13/03 - TIRIEVA
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM08-ACT-BKWD
V      *--      SCALE OPTION '02' IS IN THE S2 TABLE
V                  IF MTBLSCOI  =  '02'
V                     INITIALIZE W-ZGTM08-PRSC-TABLE
V                  ELSE
V                     PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5800-MOVE-PREV-SCREEN  THRU  5800-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 5600-SET-SCREEN-ATTR  THRU  5600-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V                IF W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO
V      *--          THIS IS FIRST PAGE
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                ELSE
V      *--          AFTER UPDATE THE ACTION CODE IS SET TO 'L'
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'       TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   SET W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO  TO  TRUE
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LMAX)  =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (1)  =  SPACES
V                   INITIALIZE             CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                                          CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF MTBLCLTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  MTBLCLTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLNMEI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME  TO  MTBLNMEI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLDESI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO  MTBLDESI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MDFTVALI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  MDFTVALI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLFMTI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  MTBLFMTI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLLENI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO  MTBLLENI
V           END-IF .
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  LOW-VALUES
V              MOVE  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           MOVE -1  TO  W-MACTNL (1).
V
V           MOVE 1   TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE '_'        TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V              MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V              ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5600-SET-SCREEN-ATTR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SET SCREEN ATTRIBUTES
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM08'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MTBLNMEA
V                                MTBLCLTA
V                                MDFTDSCA.
V
V           MOVE DFHBMFSE    TO  MTBLDESA
V                                MTBLFMTA
V                                MTBLLENA
V                                MTBLSCOA
V                                MDFTVALA.
V
V           IF MTBLDESI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLDESI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLFMTI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLFMTI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLLENI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLLENI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MTBLSCOI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MTBLSCOI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MDFTVALI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MDFTVALI
V           END-IF .
V
V           IF MDFTDSCI  =  SPACES
V              MOVE ALL '_'  TO  MDFTDSCI
V           END-IF .
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACE
V             IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V                MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             ELSE
V                MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V             END-IF
V             MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V             IF W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)  =  SPACES
V                MOVE ALL '_'  TO  W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V             END-IF
V             ADD  1         TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-ADD
V
V              PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                 MOVE ALL '_'   TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                 MOVE DFHBMFSE  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                 ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V              END-PERFORM
V
V           ELSE
V
V              PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                 MOVE SPACES    TO  W-MVALUI (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MVDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MACTNI (W-LCTR)
V                 MOVE DFHBMPRO  TO  W-MVALUA (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MVDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                    W-MACTNA (W-LCTR)
V                 ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V              END-PERFORM
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       5600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5800-MOVE-PREV-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE VALUE IN THE CURRENT SCREEN TO PREVIOUS SCREEN
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE  MTBLCLTI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE  MTBLNMEI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME .
V           MOVE  MTBLDESI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME .
V           MOVE  MDFTVALI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE .
V           MOVE  MTBLFMTI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT .
V           MOVE  MTBLLENI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE  MTBLSCOI  TO  W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN .
V
V           MOVE 1       TO  W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V
V              INSPECT W-MACTNI (W-LCTR) REPLACING ALL '_' BY SPACES
V              MOVE W-MACTNI (W-LCTR) TO W-ZGTM08-SCRN-OPTION(W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVALUI (W-LCTR) TO W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE W-MVDESI (W-LCTR) TO W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR)
V
V              ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V       5800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        > :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM08-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX  OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V      *--          DISPLAY WHEN NOT IN UPDATE MODE - 11/04/02 - TIRIEVA
V                   IF W-UPDATE-CCMPRSC-NO
V                      MOVE 'G019'          TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT         < :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX  TO  W-LCTR.
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM08-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0 OR
V                         SQLCODE NOT = 0
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR    (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT       TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT      (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (W-LCTR)
V                   MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   TO
V                                W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  (W-LCTR)
V                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001   7300-SELECT-CCMPRSC.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SELECT *
VC001              INTO :DCLCCMPRSC
VC001              FROM CCMPRSC
VC001             WHERE CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
VC001               AND PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
VC001               AND PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
VC001               AND PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001               AND EFFCT_DT         = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
VC001               AND UPDT_LAST_DT     = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND     TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE -1               TO W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE          TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'           TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7300-'          TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC  TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN      TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES  TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7300-EXIT. EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001   7350-GET-CURR-DT-TIME.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       EXEC SQL
VC001            SET :W-CURR-DATE   = CURRENT DATE
VC001              , :W-CURR-TMSTMP = CURRENT TIMESTAMP
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE SQLCODE
VC001           WHEN 0
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                SET W-ERROR-FOUND    TO TRUE
VC001                MOVE SQLCODE         TO W-SQLCODE
VC001                MOVE 'S008'          TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7850-'         TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE SPACES          TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7350-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  ******************************************************************
V      *
V       7400-UPDATE-ZGTMDEF.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  UPDATE THE DEFINITION ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  UPDATE THE FETCHED ROW
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-FIELD-NAME.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-DFLT-VALUE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-FRMT.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  W-ZGTM08-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN.
V
VC001  *--  PREP DB2 UPDATE
V           INITIALIZE DCLCCMPRSC
V                      W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF      TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-PRKEY-NBR   TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-EFFCT-DT    TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-TRMNT-DT    TO  CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V
VC001  *--  BUILD W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT AND PASS TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-FIELD-NAME  TO  W-PRCSS-FIELD-NAME .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DFLT-VALUE  TO  W-PRCSS-DFLT-VALUE .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-FRMT  TO  W-PRCSS-VALUE-FRMT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE-LEN   TO  W-PRCSS-VALUE-LEN .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-SCALE-OPTN  TO  W-PRCSS-SCALE-OPTN .
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-VAL-TXT           TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-DEFN-UPDT-LAST-DT TO  CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
V
VC001  *--  SAVE DATA TO BE UPDATED BEFORE GETTING ORIGINAL
VC001  *--  INFORMATION
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001         TO W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
VC001
VC001  *--  GET ORIGINAL ROW INFORMATION BEFORE UPDATING
VC001       PERFORM 7300-SELECT-CCMPRSC   THRU 7300-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7400-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
VC001  *--  SAVE ORIGINAL INFORMATION FOR ZGTM LOGGING LATER
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001
VC001       PERFORM 7350-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7350-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7400-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V                UPDATE CCMPRSC
V                SET
VC001                PRCSS_VAL_TXT     = :W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_DT      = :W-CURR-DATE
VC001               ,USER_ID           = :W-ZGTM-SNON-USER
VC001               ,TRMNL_ID          = :W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID
VC001               ,LST_CHNG_TMSTMP   = :W-CURR-TMSTMP
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD = :W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
V                WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  AND  EFFCT_DT       = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  AND  UPDT_LAST_DT   = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 MOVE 'G024'                    TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001             PERFORM 7830-LOG-CHANGES-RTN THRU 7830-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND              TO TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                        TO MTBLDESL
V                 MOVE SQLCODE                   TO W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'                    TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7400-'                   TO W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC           TO W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-UPDATE             TO W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           TO TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V
V       7600-UPDATE-ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  UPDATE VALID VALUE ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM  .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (W-LINE)   TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT (W-LINE)   TO  CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT  .
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DESCR (W-LINE)
V                                     TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT .
V
VC001  *--  SAVE DATA TO BE UPDATED BEFORE GETTING ORIGINAL
VC001  *--  INFORMATION
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001         TO W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
VC001
VC001  *--  GET ORIGINAL ROW INFORMATION BEFORE UPDATING
VC001       PERFORM 7300-SELECT-CCMPRSC THRU 7300-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7600-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
VC001  *--  SAVE ORIGINAL INFORMATION FOR ZGTM LOGGING LATER
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001
VC001       PERFORM 7350-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7350-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7600-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
V           EXEC SQL
V                UPDATE CCMPRSC
V                SET
VC001                PRCSS_VAL_TXT     = :W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_DT      = :W-CURR-DATE
VC001               ,USER_ID           = :W-ZGTM-SNON-USER
VC001               ,TRMNL_ID          = :W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID
VC001               ,LST_CHNG_TMSTMP   = :W-CURR-TMSTMP
VC001               ,UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD = :W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
V                WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR  = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  AND  EFFCT_DT       = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  AND  UPDT_LAST_DT   = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 MOVE 'G024'                    TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-LIST          TO TRUE
VC001             PERFORM 7830-LOG-CHANGES-RTN THRU 7830-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND              TO TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                        TO W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE SQLCODE                   TO W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'                    TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7600-'                   TO W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC           TO W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-UPDATE             TO W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES           TO TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7700-DELETE-ROW.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  DELETE VALID VALUE ROW
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LINE)
V                                             TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  (W-LINE)
V                                             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LINE)
V                                             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LINE)
V                                             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT (W-LINE)  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT (W-LINE)  TO  CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT.
V           MOVE W-CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LINE)
V                                             TO  CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
V
VC001  *--  GET ORIGINAL ROW INFORMATION BEFORE DELETING
VC001       PERFORM 7300-SELECT-CCMPRSC   THRU 7300-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7700-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001
VC001       PERFORM 7350-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7350-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7700-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
V           EXEC SQL
V                DELETE FROM CCMPRSC
V                WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                  AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                  AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                  AND  EFFCT_DT         = :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                  AND  UPDT_LAST_DT     = :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 MOVE 'G037'                  TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 SET W-ZGTM08-ACT-LIST        TO TRUE
VC001
VC001             SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-DELETE       TO TRUE
VC001             MOVE W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC       TO DCLCCMPRSC
VC001             PERFORM 7840-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7840-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 DELETE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND        TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                  TO    W-MACTNL (W-LINE)
V                 MOVE SQLCODE             TO    W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'              TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7700-'             TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN         TO    W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES     TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7800-INSERT-VALUE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       PERFORM 7350-GET-CURR-DT-TIME THRU 7350-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7800-EXIT
VC001       END-IF
V
V           INITIALIZE DCLCCMPRSC.
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-CLIENT-NBR     TO W-INP-CLT-NBR.
V           MOVE W-INP-CLIENT-NBR             TO CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-TABLE-NAME     TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-VALUE (W-LCTR) TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM .
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE                  TO CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT.
V           MOVE W-DATE-MAX-END               TO CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT .
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-SCRN-DESCR (W-LCTR) TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT .
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE                  TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER             TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID          TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP                TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE SPACES                       TO CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                       TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
V
V           PERFORM 7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  THRU  7820-EXIT.
V
V           EXEC SQL
V             INSERT INTO CCMPRSC
V                ( CLIENT_NBR
V                , PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                , PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                , EFFCT_DT
V                , TRMNT_DT
V                , PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                , UPDT_LAST_DT
VC001            , USER_ID
VC001            , TRMNL_ID
VC001            , LST_CHNG_TMSTMP
VC001            , FNCTN_CD
VC001            , UPDT_LAST_LCTN_CD)
V             VALUES
V                (:CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                ,:CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-USER-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-FNCTN-CD
VC001            ,:CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                 ADD 1                        TO W-LCTR
VC001             SET W-ZGTM-LOG-ADD           TO TRUE
V                 PERFORM 7840-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7840-EXIT
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--        DB2 UPDATE ERROR
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND        TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE -1                  TO    MTBLDESI
V                 MOVE SQLCODE             TO    W-SQLCODE
V                 MOVE 'S008'              TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 MOVE '7800-'             TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                 MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                 MOVE W-FUNC-INSERT       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                 SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES     TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V       7800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7820-GENERATE-PRCSS-KEY-NBR.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GENERATE THE NEXT PROCESS KEY NUMBER
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE CCMPRSC_MAX  CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR       = :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V      *        AND  TRMNT_DT         >  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER  BY PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - CHCK
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ONLY THE FIRST ROW TO GET THE MAX
V      *
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                FETCH CCMPRSC_MAX
V                INTO
V                     :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   ADD  1  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 0  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 SELECT ERROR
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7820-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-CCMPRSC    TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-IF.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE CCMPRSC_MAX
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       7820-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
VC001   7830-LOG-CHANGES-RTN.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *--  LOG ORIG CCMPRSC ROW
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-CHNG-OLD     TO TRUE.
VC001       MOVE W-ORIG-DCLCCMPRSC       TO DCLCCMPRSC.
VC001       PERFORM 7840-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7840-EXIT.
VC001
VC001       IF W-ERROR-FOUND
VC001           GO TO 7830-EXIT
VC001       END-IF.
VC001
VC001  *--  CHANGE COLUMNS THAT WAS UPDATED AND WRITE TO LOG
VC001       MOVE W-UPDT-CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
VC001                                    TO CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-DATE             TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER        TO CCMPRSC-USER-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-TRML-ID     TO CCMPRSC-TRMNL-ID.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP           TO CCMPRSC-LST-CHNG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SECL-UPDT-LST-LOC-CD
VC001                                    TO CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-LCTN-CD.
VV002
VC001       SET  W-ZGTM-LOG-CHNG-NEW     TO TRUE.
VC001       PERFORM 7840-WRITE-ZGTMLOG THRU 7840-EXIT.
VC001
VC001   7830-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  *****************************************************************
VC001  *
VC001   7840-WRITE-ZGTMLOG.
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001  *
VC001  *----------------------------------------------------------------
VC001       MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR         TO W-ZGTM-LOG-CLT.
VC001       MOVE W-CURR-TMSTMP              TO W-ZGTM-LOG-TMSTMP.
VC001       MOVE W-ZGTM-SNON-USER           TO W-ZGTM-LOG-USERID.
VC001
VC001  *--  CCMPRSC IS ACTUALLY A TABLE NOT A DDNAME
VC001       MOVE 'CCMPRSC'                  TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DDNAME.
VC001
VC001       MOVE DCLCCMPRSC                 TO W-ZGTM-LOG-DATA.
VC001
VC001       EXEC CICS WRITE
VC001            DATASET (W-ZGTM-LOG-FILE)
VC001            FROM    (W-ZGTM-LOG-RECORD)
VC001            RIDFLD  (W-ZGTM-LOG-KEY)
VC001            RESP    (W-RESP)
VC001       END-EXEC.
VC001
VC001       EVALUATE W-RESP
VC001           WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
VC001                CONTINUE
VC001
VC001           WHEN OTHER
VC001                MOVE 'S002'            TO W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
VC001                MOVE '7820-'           TO W-PARAGRAPH
VC001                MOVE 'CCMPRSC'         TO W-TABLE-ID
VC001                MOVE 'WRITE'           TO W-FUNCTION
VC001                SET  W-CICS-ERROR-YES  TO TRUE
VC001                SET  W-ERROR-FOUND     TO TRUE
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
VC001
VC001   7840-EXIT. EXIT.
VC001  *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MVALUL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM08M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM08M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      *--  THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM         TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
VC001       IF W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001          MOVE W-RESP            TO  W-ERR-CDE-DISP
VC001       ELSE
VC001          MOVE W-SQLCODE         TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP
VC001       END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'G055'
V           OR W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V              IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODE = 'D'
V                INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@     '
V                                                BY 'DELETE'
V              ELSE
V                IF W-ZGTM08-ACT-MODE = 'A'
V                   INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@     '
V                                                   BY 'INSERT'
V                ELSE
V                   INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@     '
V                                                   BY 'MODIFY'
V                END-IF
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R005'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '##########'
V                   BY W-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R017'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD = 'R027'
V              INSPECT W-SE-ERR-MSG REPLACING ALL '@@'
V                   BY W-VALUE-LENGTH-X
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP.
V
VC001       EVALUATE TRUE
VC001           WHEN W-CICS-ERROR-YES
VC001                STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
VC001                     , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-ERR-CDE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , '  '           DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-FUNCTION     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , 'IN PARA '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                     , W-PARAGRAPH    DELIMITED BY SIZE
VC001                  INTO MPGMMSGO
VC001                PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001
VC001           WHEN W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V                    STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                         , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                      INTO MPGMMSGO
V                    PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
VC001           WHEN OTHER
V                    STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                         , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                    INTO   MPGMMSGO
VC001       END-EVALUATE.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM08-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
