V           COPY DFHBMSCA.
V
V       01  FILLER PIC X(033) VALUE 'END OF WORKING STORAGE FOR ZGTM09'.
V
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
VC001   01  DFHCOMMAREA                  PIC  X(6500).
V
V      *--
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V      *--
V      *-- PERFORMS THE FOLLOWING :
V      *--  - INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  - CHECK IF PROGRAM IS EXECUTED FOR THE FIRST TIME
V      *--  - CHECK THE PF KEYS PRESSED
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V       0000-MAINLINE .
V
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION   THRU  1000-EXIT.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM09-FIRST-ENTRY-YES
V               SET W-ZGTM09-ACT-LIST      TO    TRUE
V               PERFORM 2000-INITIAL-ENTRY  THRU  2000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHENTER
V
V               PERFORM 3000-RECEIVE-MAP     THRU  3000-EXIT
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 4000-PROCESS-MAP  THRU  4000-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V               IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                  PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V               END-IF
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF8
V               SET W-ZGTM09-ACT-FRWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF7
V               SET W-ZGTM09-ACT-BKWD      TO    TRUE
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF12
V               MOVE W-PROG-MENU        TO    W-XCTL-PGM
V               PERFORM 8900-XCTL-CNTL  THRU  8900-EXIT
V
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHPF11
V             WHEN EIBAID = DFHCLEAR
V                PERFORM 8000-CLEAR-SCREEN   THRU  8000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID KEY PRESSED
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G012'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           PERFORM 5000-POPULATE-SCREEN        THRU  5000-EXIT.
V
V           IF W-MAP-ONLY
V              PERFORM 8100-SEND-MAP            THRU  8100-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY  THRU  8800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V           GOBACK.
V
V       0000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  INITIALIZES WORK AREA
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE FIELDS
V      *--
V      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM'               TO  W-TRANID.
V           MOVE DFHCOMMAREA          TO  W-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA.
V
V           INITIALIZE  MPGMMSGO
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                       W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA
V                       W-SQLCODE
V                       W-TABLE-ID
V                       W-FUNCTION.
V
V           SET W-ERROR-NOTFOUND  TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-MAP-DATA        TO  TRUE.
V           SET W-DB2-ERROR-NO    TO  TRUE.
V
V           PERFORM 1500-GET-DATE-TIME  THRU  1500-EXIT.
V
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       1500-GET-DATE-TIME .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  GET SYSTEM DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE MAP DATE AND TIME
V      *--  POPULATE CURRENT DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           EXEC CICS ASKTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V           END-EXEC
V
V           EXEC CICS FORMATTIME
V               ABSTIME(W-ABSTIME)
V               YYYYMMDD (W-YYYYMMDD)
V               DATESEP('-')
V               TIME   (W-TIME)
V               TIMESEP(':')
V               YEAR   (W-ASKTIME-YEAR)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           MOVE W-ASKTIME-YEAR    TO  W-CURR-YEAR.
V
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-CC  TO  W-MMDDYYYY-CC-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-YY  TO  W-DATE-HDR-YY
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-YY-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-MM  TO  W-DATE-HDR-MM
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-MM-C.
V           MOVE W-YYYYMMDD-DD  TO  W-DATE-HDR-DD
V                                   W-MMDDYYYY-DD-C.
V
V       1500-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       2000-INITIAL-ENTRY .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  INITIALIZE FIELDS
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE LOW-VALUES              TO  MENUMAPO.
V           MOVE DFHBMPRF                TO  MTRANSF.
V           SET  W-MAP-ONLY              TO  TRUE.
V           SET  W-ZGTM09-FIRST-ENTRY-NO TO  TRUE.
V
V       2000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       3000-RECEIVE-MAP  .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *--  RECEIVE MAP
V      *--  MOVE SCREEN TO COMMAREA
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE  W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                             MAPSET ('ZGTM09M') NOHANDLE
V                             INTO   (MENUMAPI)
V                             RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL) )
V              WHEN ( W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL))
V                 CONTINUE
V
V      *--  ERROR RECEIVING MAP
V              WHEN OTHER
V                 SET W-ERROR-FOUND           TO    TRUE
V                 MOVE 'S006'                 TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                 PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG      THRU  9700-EXIT
V                 PERFORM 9800-ABEND          THRU  9800-EXIT
V
V           END-EVALUATE .
V
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       4000-PROCESS-MAP.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE  W-LCTR
V                       W-REMAINDER .
V
V           DIVIDE EIBCPOSN  BY  80
V              GIVING W-LCTR
V              REMAINDER W-REMAINDER
V           END-DIVIDE .
V
V           IF W-REMAINDER  >  0
V               ADD 1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-IF .
V
V           SUBTRACT 5 FROM  W-LCTR.
V
V           IF  W-LCTR > +0
V           AND W-LCTR < +17
V               MOVE W-LCTR  TO  W-ZGTM09-LIST-ROW-NO
V           ELSE
V      *--      CURSOR NOT IN CORRECT POSITION
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND  TO  TRUE
V               MOVE -1            TO  W-MSLCTL (1)
V               MOVE 'R018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V
V              MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZGTM-CALLING-PROG
V
V              IF W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '00'
V              OR W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '01'
V              OR W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN (W-LCTR)  =  '03'
V                 INITIALIZE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM05-DEFN-ROW
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-CLIENT-NBR
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-TABLE-NAME
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-DFLT-VALUE     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-DFLT-VALUE
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-FIELD-NAME
V
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-FRMT
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-VALUE-LEN
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM05-LIST-SCALE-OPTN
V
V                 MOVE W-PROG-LIST-ENTRIES  TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM05-COMMAREA    TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-COMMAREA           TO  DFHCOMMAREA
V              ELSE
V                 INITIALIZE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-ROW  TO  W-ZGTM06-DEFN-ROW
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-CLIENT-NBR
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-TABLE-NAME
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-DFLT-VALUE     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-DFLT-VALUE
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-FIELD-NAME
V
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-FRMT
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-VALUE-LEN
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                   TO W-ZGTM06-LIST-SCALE-OPTN
V
V                 MOVE W-PROG-LIST-BATCH  TO  W-XCTL-PGM
V                 MOVE W-ZGTM06-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA
V                 MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V       4000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5000-POPULATE-SCREEN.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-TRANID    TO  MTRANSO.
V           MOVE W-DATE-HDR  TO  MDATEO.
V           MOVE W-TIME      TO  MTIMEO .
V           MOVE DFHBMPRO    TO  MCLNNOA
V                                MTRANSA
V                                MDATEA
V                                MTIMEA
V                                MPGMMSGA.
V
V           MOVE 'ZGTM09'    TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG
V                                W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG .
V
V           IF  W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X NUMERIC
V           AND W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO  > ZERO
V               MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO-X TO  MCLNNOO
V           ELSE
V      *--      INVALID CLIENT NUMBER
V               SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V               MOVE 'G017'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V
V             WHEN W-ERROR-FOUND
V                  CONTINUE
V
V             WHEN W-ZGTM09-ACT-LIST
V             WHEN W-ZGTM09-ACT-FRWD
V             WHEN W-ZGTM09-ACT-BKWD
V                  PERFORM 5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE  THRU  5200-EXIT
V                  IF W-ERROR-NOTFOUND
V                     PERFORM 5400-POPULATE-ROWS  THRU  5400-EXIT
V                  END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V                  CONTINUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  =  SPACES
V              MOVE SPACES  TO  MPGMMSGO
V           ELSE
V              PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V
V      *--  MOVE TO DFHCOMMAREA
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA.
V           MOVE W-COMMAREA         TO  DFHCOMMAREA.
V
V       5000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       5200-ACCESS-DB2-TABLE.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  ACCESS DB2 TO POPULATE MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-PRCSS-TYPE-ZGTMDEF  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD.
V
V           EVALUATE W-ZGTM09-ACT-MODE
V
V             WHEN 'L'
V
V      *--      DISPLAYS THE ROW FROM THE KEY ENTERED IN THE MAIN MENU
V
V               MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               MOVE 0                         TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               MOVE '0001-01-01'              TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V
V               PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST    THRU  7000-EXIT
V
V             WHEN 'F'
V
V      *--      DISPLAYS FROM THE KEY OF THE LAST ROW OF PREVIOUS SCREEN
V
V                IF W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LMAX)   =  SPACES
V                   MOVE 'G019'  TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-EFFCT-DT       (W-LMAX)
V                                           TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST  THRU  7000-EXIT
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN 'B'
V
V      *--      BACKWARD SCROLL FROM THE FIRST KEY OF THE PREVIOUS MAP
V
V                MOVE W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR     (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                IF W-ZGTM09-EFFCT-DT (1) = SPACES
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                ELSE
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-EFFCT-DT    (1)
V                                        TO   CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                END-IF
V                PERFORM 7200-BACKWARD-LIST  THRU  7200-EXIT
V
V      *--       AFTER A BACKWARD SCROLL AND THE TOP ROW OF THE SCREEN
V      *--       IS NOT POPULATED, PERFORM A FORWARD LIST
V                IF W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM (1)   =  SPACES
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  TO
V                        CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                   MOVE W-ZGTM09-DEFN-TABLE-NAME  TO
V                        CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                   MOVE 0             TO  CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                   MOVE '0001-01-01'  TO  CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                   PERFORM 7000-FORWARD-LIST   THRU  7000-EXIT
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                END-IF
V
V             WHEN OTHER
V      *--       INVALID ACTION CODE
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE 'G015'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       5200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       5400-POPULATE-ROWS.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  MOVE THE FETCHED ROW IN WORKING STORAGE TO THE SCREEN AREA
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'ZGTM09'         TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG
V                                     W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE -1               TO  W-MSLCTL (1).
V
V           MOVE 1 TO W-LCTR.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX     OR
V                   W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM (W-LCTR)   =  SPACE
V             MOVE SPACES     TO  W-MSLCTI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR-X3  (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MCLTNI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-FIELD-NAME     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTDESI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTNMEI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-FRMT     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTFMTI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-VALUE-LEN      (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTLENI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE W-ZGTM09-SCALE-OPTN     (W-LCTR)
V                             TO  W-MTSCOI (W-LCTR)
V
V             MOVE DFHBMFSE   TO  W-MSLCTA (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MCLTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1          TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V             MOVE SPACES     TO  W-MSLCTI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MCLTNI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTDESI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENI (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOI (W-LCTR)
V             MOVE DFHBMPRO   TO  W-MSLCTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MCLTNA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTDESA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTNMEA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTFMTA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTLENA (W-LCTR)
V                                 W-MTSCOA (W-LCTR)
V             ADD  1  TO  W-LCTR
V           END-PERFORM.
V
V           IF W-ZGTM09-ACT-LIST
V              MOVE -1            TO  W-MSLCTL (1)
V              MOVE 'R018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       5400-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7000-FORWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL FORWARD FROM START OF TABLE OR FROM GIVEN KEY
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_FRWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR     >= :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM    > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   > :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR   = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        > :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT       <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT       >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY CLIENT_NBR
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                     ,EFFCT_DT
V                     ,TRMNT_DT
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - LIST
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM09     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE 1  TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES  TO  TRUE
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM09-PRSC-TABLE.
V      *
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR > W-LMAX
V                      OR SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_FRWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 7600-PROCESS-FETCH  THRU  7600-EXIT
V                   IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V                   AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V                       ADD 1 TO W-LCTR
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G018'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - LIST
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7000-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM09     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM.
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_FRWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       7200-BACKWARD-LIST.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SCROLL BACKWARD
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V      *
V      *--  DECLARE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL DECLARE PRSC_BKWD CURSOR FOR
V             SELECT CLIENT_NBR
V                   ,PRCSS_TYPE_CD
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NM
V                   ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR
V                   ,EFFCT_DT
V                   ,TRMNT_DT
V                   ,PRCSS_VAL_TXT
V                   ,UPDT_LAST_DT
V             FROM   CCMPRSC
V             WHERE  CLIENT_NBR      <= :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V               AND  PRCSS_TYPE_CD    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V               AND (PRCSS_KEY_NM     < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    < :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR)
V               OR  (PRCSS_KEY_NM     = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V               AND  PRCSS_KEY_NBR    = :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V               AND  EFFCT_DT         < :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT))
V               AND  EFFCT_DT        <=  CURRENT_DATE
V               AND  TRMNT_DT        >=  CURRENT_DATE
V             ORDER BY CLIENT_NBR    DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NM  DESC
V                     ,PRCSS_KEY_NBR DESC
V                     ,EFFCT_DT      DESC
V                     ,TRMNT_DT      DESC
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V      *--  OPEN CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             OPEN PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V              WHEN 0
V                CONTINUE
V
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--       DB2 OPEN ERROR - BKWD
V                SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM09     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                MOVE W-FUNC-OPEN        TO    W-FUNCTION
V                SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V      *--  FETCH AND PROCESS ROWS
V      *
V           MOVE W-LMAX              TO  W-LCTR.
V           SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES  TO  TRUE
V           INITIALIZE W-ZGTM09-PRSC-TABLE.
V
V           PERFORM UNTIL W-LCTR <= 0
V                      OR SQLCODE NOT = 0
V                      OR W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO
V
V              EXEC SQL
V                   FETCH PRSC_BKWD
V                   INTO
V                         :CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR
V                       , :CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT
V                       , :CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT
V              END-EXEC
V
V              EVALUATE SQLCODE
V
V                 WHEN 0
V                   PERFORM 7600-PROCESS-FETCH  THRU  7600-EXIT
V                   IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V                   AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V                       SUBTRACT 1 FROM W-LCTR
V                   END-IF
V
V                 WHEN +100
V                   MOVE 'G019'        TO  W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V
V                 WHEN OTHER
V      *--          DB2 FETCH ERROR - BKWD
V                   SET W-ERROR-FOUND       TO    TRUE
V                   MOVE SQLCODE            TO    W-SQLCODE
V                   MOVE 'S008'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   MOVE '7200-'            TO    W-PARAGRAPH
V                   MOVE W-TABLE-ZGTM09     TO    W-TABLE-ID
V                   MOVE W-FUNC-FETCH       TO    W-FUNCTION
V                   SET  W-DB2-ERROR-YES    TO    TRUE
V
V              END-EVALUATE
V
V           END-PERFORM
V      *
V      *--  CLOSE CURSOR
V      *
V           EXEC SQL
V             CLOSE PRSC_BKWD
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       7200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       7600-PROCESS-FETCH.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-- IF NO PARTICULAR CLIENT WAS SELECTED, DISPLAY ALL ROWS
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           IF W-ZGTM09-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  = SPACE
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V              IF W-ZGTM09-DEFN-CLIENT-NBR  NOT =  CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR
V                 SET W-SELECT-CLIENT-NO  TO  TRUE
V              END-IF
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V
V              SET W-SELECT-SCALE-YES  TO  TRUE
V
V              IF W-ZGTM09-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  = SPACE
V                 CONTINUE
V              ELSE
V                 IF W-ZGTM09-DEFN-SCALE-OPTN  NOT =
V                    CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT (44:02)
V                    SET W-SELECT-SCALE-NO  TO  TRUE
V                 END-IF
V              END-IF
V
V           END-IF.
V
V           IF  W-SELECT-CLIENT-YES
V           AND W-SELECT-SCALE-YES
V
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-CLIENT-NBR      TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-CLIENT-NBR     (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-TYPE-CD   TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-TYPE-CD  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NM    TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NM   (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-KEY-NBR   TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-KEY-NBR  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-EFFCT-DT        TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-EFFCT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-TRMNT-DT        TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-TRMNT-DT       (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-PRCSS-VAL-TXT   TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-PRCSS-VAL-TXT  (W-LCTR)
V              MOVE CCMPRSC-UPDT-LAST-DT    TO
V                   W-ZGTM09-UPDT-LAST-DT   (W-LCTR)
V
V           END-IF.
V
V       7600-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V
V       8000-CLEAR-SCREEN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       8000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8100-SEND-MAP   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *--  SEND INITIAL MAP
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V           MOVE -1    TO  W-MSLCTL (1).
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP   ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET('ZGTM09M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          ERASE
V                          FREEKB
V                          CURSOR
V                          RESP  (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EVALUATE TRUE
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V                   PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V              WHEN W-RESP = DFHRESP(MAPFAIL)
V                   PERFORM 9400-MAPFAIL  THRU  9400-EXIT
V              WHEN OTHER
V      *--          FIRST TIME SEND MAP ERROR
V                   MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V                   PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V                   PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-EVALUATE.
V      *
V       8100-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8800-SEND-MAP-DATA-ONLY   .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE     W-RESP.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND MAP    ('MENUMAP')
V                          MAPSET ('ZGTM09M')
V                          FROM   (MENUMAPO)
V                          CURSOR
V                          DATAONLY
V                          FREEKB
V                          FRSET
V                          RESP   (W-RESP)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
V               PERFORM 9200-RETURN  THRU  9200-EXIT
V           ELSE
V      *--  SEND MAP ERROR
V               MOVE 'S007'             TO    W-ZCCM-MSG-CD
V               PERFORM 9700-ERROR-MSG  THRU  9700-EXIT
V               PERFORM 9800-ABEND      THRU  9800-EXIT
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       8800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       8900-XCTL-CNTL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-INITIALIZE THE COMMAREA OF THE CORRESPONDING PROGRAM SO THAT
V      * THE CALLED PROGRAM WILL KNOW IT IS THE FIRST ENTRY.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-XCTL-PGM       TO  W-ZGTM-CURR-PROG.
V           MOVE W-PROG-LIST-TBL  TO  W-ZGTM-PREV-PROG.
V
V           EXEC CICS XCTL NOHANDLE
V               PROGRAM  (W-XCTL-PGM)
V               COMMAREA (W-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       8900-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V       9400-MAPFAIL .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * MAPFAIL CONDITION.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND CONTROL
V                          TERMINAL
V                          FREEKB
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9400-EXIT.
V            EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9700-ERROR-MSG.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-CALL ROUTINE TO GET ERROR MESSAGE
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V           MOVE SPACES             TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG.
V
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM  TO  W-ZCCM-CALLING-PGM.
V           MOVE 'I'                TO  W-ZCCM-FUNC-CODE.
V           MOVE W-ZGTM-CLIENT-NO   TO  W-CLIENT-NBR-N.
V           MOVE W-CLIENT-NBR-A     TO  W-ZCCM-CLIENT-NBR-I.
V           MOVE 'E'                TO  W-ZCCM-LANG-CD.
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V               PROGRAM    ('ZCCM910')
V               COMMAREA   (W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V               LENGTH     (LENGTH OF W-ZCCM-MSG-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           IF W-ZCCM-SQL-SUCCESSFUL
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-MSG-TEXT   TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           ELSE
V              MOVE W-ZCCM-ERROR-MSG  TO  W-SE-ERR-MSG
V           END-IF.
V
V           MOVE W-SQLCODE  TO  W-SQLCODE-DISP.
V
V           IF W-DB2-ERROR-YES
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SQLCODE-DISP DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY '  '
V                   , ' '            DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-MESSAGES     DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V              PERFORM 9999-DB2-ERROR  THRU  9999-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              STRING W-ZCCM-MSG-CD  DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , ' : '          DELIMITED BY SIZE
V                   , W-SE-ERR-MSG   DELIMITED BY SIZE
V              INTO   MPGMMSGO
V           END-IF.
V
V       9700-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9800-ABEND .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * ABNORMAL ABEND.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE EIBFN    TO  W-SE-EIBFN.
V           MOVE EIBRESP  TO  W-SE-EIBRCODE.
V
V           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
V                          FROM (W-SYSTEM-ERR)
V                          ERASE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS  RETURN END-EXEC.
V
V       9800-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V       9200-RETURN .
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * RETURN PROGRAM
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V           MOVE W-ZGTM09-COMMAREA  TO  W-ZGTM-SUB-COMMAREA  .
V           EXEC CICS RETURN TRANSID(W-TRANID)
V                           COMMAREA(W-COMMAREA)
V                             LENGTH(LENGTH OF W-COMMAREA)
V           END-EXEC .
V
V       9200-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V
V      *****************************************************************
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       9999-DB2-ERROR.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-ERR-DATA.
V           SET W-WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG        TO TRUE.
V           MOVE SPACES                     TO W-CALLING-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE W-CURRENT-PROGRAM          TO W-CALLING-PROGRAM-ID.
V           MOVE SQLCA                      TO W-SQLCA-AREA.
V
V           EXEC CICS
V                SYNCPOINT
V                ROLLBACK
V           END-EXEC .
V
V
V           EXEC CICS LINK
V                     PROGRAM  (W-PROG-FPDB2LOG)
V                     COMMAREA (W-ERR-DATA)
V                     LENGTH   (LENGTH OF W-ERR-DATA)
V                     NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V      *
V       9999-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      *=================================================================
V      *   E N D   O F   P R O G R A M
V      *=================================================================

VMEMBER NAME  FPDB2LOG
V000001* PDX    - FPDB2LOG C0207279 07/09/04 11:09:21 HIILKUR            0000100
V000001* PDX    - FPDB2LOG C0196404 10/01/03 14:49:59 HIILKUR            0000100
V000001* PDX    - FPDB2LOG C0039467 10/22/93 15:46:43 HISIFOR            0000100
V       IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
V       PROGRAM-ID. FPDB2LOG.
V
V      *================================================================*
V      * THIS PROGRAM WILL BE STARTED  FROM DB2-CICS PROGRAMS WHEN      *
V      * AN SQL ERROR OCCURS. THE PROGRAM WILL DISPLAY A MEANINGFUL TEXT*
V      * MESSAGE ON THE CICS LOG.                                       *
V      *================================================================*
V
V       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
V
V       EJECT
V       DATA DIVISION.
V       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
V            COPY PDXIDCOB.
V           EXEC SQL
V                INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V       01 WS-TS-HIGH PIC X(26) VALUE '2000-01-01-00.00.00.000000'.
V       01  WS-ERRL-DATA.
V           05  REQUEST-TYPE                  PIC X(01).
V               88 WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG            VALUE 'W'.
V           05  CALLING-TRAN-ID               PIC X(04).
V           05  CALLING-PROGRAM-ID            PIC X(08).
V           05  SQLCA-AREA                    PIC X(136).
V       01  CICSRESP               COMP  PIC S9(8).
V       01  WS-BAD-REQUEST-MSG                PIC X(55) VALUE
V           'THIS IS DB2-CICS  ERROR PGM. DONT INVOKE FROM TERMINAL '.
V      *
V       01  DSNTIAR       PIC X(8)  VALUE 'DSNTIAR'.
V       01 WK-ABSTIME               COMP PIC S9(15).
V       01  WS-LOG-MESSAGE.
V           05  MS-LINE1.
V               07  MS-EYE-CATCHER1    PIC X(30)
V                         VALUE '***** DB2 ERROR MSG ******* '.
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(06) VALUE ' DATE:'.
V               07  MS-DATE            PIC X(08).
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(07) VALUE '  TIME:'.
V               07  MS-TIME            PIC X(08).
V               07 FILLER         PIC X(16) VALUE '****************'.
V           05  MS-LINE2.
V               07 FILLER         PIC X(16) VALUE '***** PROG NAME-'.
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(01) VALUE SPACE.
V               07  MS-PROG-NAME       PIC X(08).
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(15) VALUE ' *** TRANS-ID -'.
V               07  MS-TRAN-ID         PIC X(04).
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(14) VALUE '  *** TASK NO-'.
V               07  WS-STATUS-TASKNO   PIC 9(7).
V               07  FILLER             PIC X(14) VALUE '  *** SQLCODE-'.
V               07  MS-SQL-CODE        PIC 9(04).
V           05  MS-MESSAGE.
V               07 MS-MESSAGE1         PIC X(120).
V               07 MS-MESSAGE2         PIC X(120).
V               07 MS-MESSAGE3         PIC X(120).
V           05  MS-LINE3     PIC X(50)
V                        VALUE '***** DB2 END ERROR MSG****************'.
V
V       01  WS-MESSAGE.
V           05  WS-ERR-LEN                PIC S9(04) COMP VALUE +1200.
V           05  WS-ERR-TXT                PIC  X(120) OCCURS 10 TIMES.
V
V       01  WS-ERROR-MSG.
V           05  FILLER                        PIC X(70) VALUE
V           '**DB2** MESSAGE COULD NOT BE TRANSLATED. ERROR IN DSNTIAR'.
V           05  WS-DSNTIAR-RC                 PIC X(08).
V      *
V       77  WS-LENGTH                         PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE +240.
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V       01  DFHCOMMAREA     PIC X(1000).
V       EJECT
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *================================================================*
V      * MAIN PROCESS                                                   *
V      *================================================================*
V             EXEC CICS IGNORE CONDITION ENDDATA
V             END-EXEC.
V
V       0000-MAIN-PROCESS.
V           PERFORM 0100-PROCESS  THRU 0100-EXIT.
V           EXEC CICS
V                RETURN
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       0100-PROCESS.
V           IF EIBCALEN >= LENGTH OF WS-ERRL-DATA
V           THEN
V               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1 : EIBCALEN)  TO WS-ERRL-DATA
V           ELSE
V               EXEC CICS RETRIEVE
V                 INTO (WS-ERRL-DATA)
V                 RESP(CICSRESP)
V                END-EXEC
V               IF CICSRESP = DFHRESP(ENDDATA)
V                   EXEC CICS SEND
V                        FROM(WS-BAD-REQUEST-MSG)
V                        LENGTH(55)
V                        ERASE
V                        NOHANDLE
V                   END-EXEC
V               END-IF
V           END-IF .
V           IF REQUEST-TYPE = 'W'
V             PERFORM 0110-WRITE-MESSAGE
V                   THRU 0110-EXIT
V           ELSE
V              EXEC SQL
V                 SELECT  CURRENT TIMESTAMP
V                 INTO :WS-TS-HIGH
V                    FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
V              END-EXEC
V               EVALUATE  SQLCODE
V                 WHEN 0
V                    CONTINUE
V                 WHEN OTHER
V                    CONTINUE
V               END-EVALUATE
V           END-IF.
V       0100-EXIT. EXIT.
V
V       0110-WRITE-MESSAGE.
V           MOVE SQLCA-AREA              TO SQLCA.
V           MOVE EIBDATE                 TO MS-DATE.
V           MOVE EIBTIME                 TO MS-TIME.
V           MOVE EIBTRNID                TO MS-TRAN-ID.
V           MOVE CALLING-PROGRAM-ID      TO MS-PROG-NAME.
V           MOVE SQLCODE                 TO MS-SQL-CODE.
V             MOVE EIBTASKN TO
V                   WS-STATUS-TASKNO.
V             EXEC CICS
V                  ASKTIME ABSTIME (WK-ABSTIME)
V             END-EXEC.
V             EXEC CICS
V                  FORMATTIME ABSTIME (WK-ABSTIME)
V                           MMDDYY(MS-DATE)
V                           DATESEP
V                           TIME    (MS-TIME)
V                           TIMESEP
V             END-EXEC.
V
V           EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                FROM (MS-LINE1)
V                LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-LINE1)
V                NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V           EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                FROM (MS-LINE2)
V                LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-LINE2)
V                NOHANDLE
V           END-EXEC.
V
V           CALL  DSNTIAR  USING SQLCA
V                                WS-MESSAGE
V                                WS-LENGTH.
V             MOVE WS-ERR-TXT(1) TO MS-MESSAGE1
V
V             EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                  FROM (MS-MESSAGE1)
V                  LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-MESSAGE1)
V                  NOHANDLE
V             END-EXEC
V             MOVE WS-ERR-TXT(2) TO MS-MESSAGE2
V
V             EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                  FROM (MS-MESSAGE2)
V                  LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-MESSAGE2)
V                  NOHANDLE
V             END-EXEC
V
V             MOVE WS-ERR-TXT(3) TO MS-MESSAGE3
V
V             EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                  FROM (MS-MESSAGE3)
V                  LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-MESSAGE3)
V                  NOHANDLE
V             END-EXEC
V
V            EXEC CICS WRITEQ TD QUEUE ('CSMT')
V                 FROM (MS-LINE3)
V                 LENGTH (LENGTH OF MS-LINE3)
V                 NOHANDLE
V            END-EXEC.
V       0110-EXIT. EXIT.
V
VMEMBER NAME  FPDB2TST
V000001* PDX    - FPDB2TST C0039467 10/22/93 15:59:43 HISIFOR            0000100
V       IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
V       PROGRAM-ID. FPDB2TST.
V
V
V       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
V
V       EJECT
V       DATA DIVISION.
V       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
V           EXEC SQL
V                INCLUDE SQLCA
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       01  WS-TEST                           PIC X(100).
V       01  WS-USERID                         PIC X(08) .
V       01  WS-ERRL-DATA.
V           05  REQUEST-TYPE                  PIC X(01).
V               88 WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG            VALUE 'W'.
V           05  CALLING-TRAN-ID               PIC X(04).
V           05  CALLING-PROGRAM-ID            PIC X(08).
V           05  SQLCA-AREA                    PIC X(136).
V      *
V       EJECT
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
V      *================================================================*
V      * MAIN PROCESS                                                   *
V      *================================================================*
V
V       0000-MAIN-PROCESS.
V           PERFORM 0100-PROCESS.
V           EXEC CICS
V                RETURN
V           END-EXEC.
V
V       0100-PROCESS.
V           EXEC SQL
V                SELECT COUNT(*)
V                INTO :WS-TEST
V                FROM DBA.VCLIENT
V                WHERE CLIENT_NBR = '0  0'
V           END-EXEC.
V           IF SQLCODE NOT = 0
V               MOVE SPACE TO WS-ERRL-DATA
V               SET WRITE-ERROR-TO-LOG TO TRUE
V               MOVE EIBTRNID TO CALLING-TRAN-ID
V               MOVE 'FPDB2TST' TO CALLING-PROGRAM-ID
V  ******* COULD POSSIBLY BE USED IF PROGRAM TURNED OVER THROUGH PDX
V  *******      MOVE PDX-PGM-ID TO CALLING-PROGRAM-ID
V               MOVE SQLCA TO  SQLCA-AREA
V
V
V               EXEC CICS ASSIGN USERID(WS-USERID) END-EXEC
V               IF WS-USERID = 'LINK'
V               THEN
V                   EXEC CICS LINK PROGRAM('FPDB2LOG')
V                          COMMAREA(WS-ERRL-DATA)
V                          LENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-ERRL-DATA)
V                          NOHANDLE END-EXEC
V                ELSE
V                    EXEC CICS START
V                           TRANSID('DB2L')
V                           FROM(WS-ERRL-DATA)
V                           LENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-ERRL-DATA)
V                           NOHANDLE  END-EXEC
V                END-IF
V           END-IF.

V209500*-- *      ROUTINE TO VALIDATE THE DATE.                     *    2095009
V209600*-- *                                                        *    2096009
V209700*-- **********************************************************    2097009
V209800                                                                  2098009
V209900 4400-CHECK-DATE.                                                 2099009
V210000D    DISPLAY '4400-CHECK-DATE'.                                   2100009
V210100     SET W-VALID-DATE-YES TO TRUE.                                2101009
V210200                                                                  2102009
V210300     IF W-CHECK-DATE = ZEROES                                     2103009
V210400        SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                               2104009
V210500        GO TO 4400-EXIT                                           2105009
V210600     END-IF.                                                      2106009
V210700                                                                  2107009
V210800     IF (W-CHECK-CCYY(1:2) NOT = 19 AND                           2108009
V210900         W-CHECK-CCYY(1:2) NOT = 20)                              2109009
V211000         SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                              2110009
V211100         GO TO 4400-EXIT                                          2111009
V211200     END-IF.                                                      2112009
V211300                                                                  2113009
V211400     IF (W-CHECK-MM < 1) OR (W-CHECK-MM > 12)                     2114009
V211500        SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                               2115009
V211600        GO TO 4400-EXIT                                           2116009
V211700     END-IF.                                                      2117009
V211800                                                                  2118009
V211900     IF (W-CHECK-DD < 1) OR (W-CHECK-DD > 31)                     2119009
V212000        SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                               2120009
V212100        GO TO 4400-EXIT                                           2121009
V212200     END-IF.                                                      2122009
V212300                                                                  2123009
V212400     IF (W-CHECK-DD > 30 ) AND                                    2124009
V212500        (W-CHECK-MM = 2 OR 4 OR 6 OR 9 OR 11)                     2125009
V212600        SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                               2126009
V212700        GO TO 4400-EXIT                                           2127009
V212800     END-IF.                                                      2128009
V212900                                                                  2129009
V213000     IF (W-CHECK-DD > 29 ) AND                                    2130009
V213100        (W-CHECK-MM = 2)                                          2131009
V213200        SET W-VALID-DATE-NO TO TRUE                               2132009
V213300        GO TO 4400-EXIT                                           2133009
V213400     END-IF.                                                      2134009
V213500                                                                  2135009
V213600     IF (W-CHECK-DD = 29 ) AND (W-CHECK-MM = 02)                  2136009
V213700        PERFORM 4500-CHECK-LEAP-YEAR THRU 4500-EXIT               2137009
V213800     END-IF.                                                      2138009
V213900                                                                  2139009

V214400*-- *      ROUTINE TO CHECK FOR LEAP YEAR.                   *    2144009
V214500*-- *                                                        *    2145009
V214600*-- **********************************************************    2146009
V214700                                                                  2147009
V214800 4500-CHECK-LEAP-YEAR.                                            2148009
V214900D    DISPLAY '4500-CHECK-LEAP-YEAR'.                              2149009
V215000     DIVIDE W-CHECK-CCYY BY 400 GIVING W-QUOTIENT                 2150009
V215100            REMAINDER W-REMAINDER                                 2151009
V215200     IF W-REMAINDER = 0                                           2152009
V215300        SET W-VALID-DATE-YES TO TRUE                              2153009

V278400     MOVE SPACES TO W-NSTRING                                     2784009
V278500*-- STRIP DOUBLE SPACES                                           2785009
V278600      PERFORM VARYING W-IDX1 FROM 1 BY 1                          2786009
V278700              UNTIL W-IDX1 > W-STRING-LENGTH                      2787009
V278800                                                                  2788009

V279000          W-STRING-PREV-CHAR = SPACES                             2790009

V279200       ELSE                                                       2792009

V279500       END-IF                                                     2795009
V279600                                                                  2796009
V279700       IF W-IDX2 >= W-L1-STA AND W-IDX2 <= W-L1-END               2797009
V279800         IF W-NSTRING(W-IDX2:01) = SPACES                         2798009
V279900            MOVE 'Y' TO W-SPACE-FOUND-FL                          2799009
V280000            MOVE W-IDX2 TO W-IDX3                                 2800009
V280100         END-IF                                                   2801009
V280200       END-IF                                                     2802009
V280300                                                                  2803009

V280500                                                                  2805009
V280600      END-PERFORM.                                                2806009

V325900     END-IF.                                                      3259009
V326000     IF W-MULTI-BANK-ACCT     = 'Y'                               3260009
V326100        MOVE 'Y'           TO RPT-PARTIAL-IND-4                   3261009
V326200        MOVE 'MULT BNK ACCT' TO RPT-ERROR-DESC                    3262009
V326300     END-IF.                                                      3263009
V326400     IF W-CREATE-BANK-FILE-YES                                    3264009
V326500        MOVE 'Y'           TO RPT-PARTIAL-IND-5                   3265009
V326600        MOVE 'NEW BANK REC' TO RPT-ERROR-DESC                     3266009
V326700     END-IF.                                                      3267009
V326800     MOVE 'CVPDCON ' TO RPT-CODE.                                 3268009
V326900     PERFORM 4900-WRITE-RPT THRU 4900-EXIT.                       3269009
V327000                                                                  3270009
V327100 9030-EXIT.   EXIT.                                               3271009
V327200/                                                                 3272009
V327300 9999-TERMINATION.                                                3273009
V327400D    DISPLAY '9999-TERMINATION'.                                  3274009
V327500     MOVE SPACES        TO           RPTFILE-REC.                 3275009
V327600*--                                                               3276009
V327700     COMPUTE W-RT-EXCP-CTR = W-RT-REMI-CTR -                      3277009
V327800                             W-RT-CONV-CTR -                      3278009
V327900                             W-RT-BYPA-CTR.                       3279009
V328000     MOVE 'TOTLREC'              TO  W-RPT-TOT-KEY.               3280009
V328100     MOVE W-RPT-TOT-REC          TO  RPTFILE-REC.                 3281009
V328200     ADD 1 TO W-RPT-TRL-TOT-RECS.                                 3282009
V328300     WRITE RPTFILE-REC.                                           3283009
V328400     IF NOT W-RPT-OK                                              3284009
V328500        DISPLAY 'C67PD01: U3400 - ERROR WRITING RPT-FILE'         3285009
V328600        DISPLAY '        FILE STATUS CODE: ' W-RPT-FILE-STATUS    3286009
V328700        MOVE +3400 TO ABEND-CODE                                  3287009
V328800        PERFORM 9999-ABEND                                        3288009
V328900     END-IF.                                                      3289009
V329000                                                                  3290009
V329100     MOVE SPACES        TO           RPTFILE-REC.                 3291009
V329200     MOVE  '99999999999999999'        TO W-RPT-TRL-KEY.           3292009
V329300     ADD 1 TO W-RPT-TRL-TOT-RECS.                                 3293009
V329400     MOVE   W-RPT-TRL-REC             TO RPTFILE-REC.             3294009
V329500     WRITE RPTFILE-REC.                                           3295009
V329600     IF NOT W-RPT-OK                                              3296009
V329700        DISPLAY 'C67PD01: U3400 - ERROR WRITING RPT-FILE'         3297009
V329800        DISPLAY '        FILE STATUS CODE: ' W-RPT-FILE-STATUS    3298009
V329900        MOVE +3400 TO ABEND-CODE                                  3299009
V330000        PERFORM 9999-ABEND                                        3300009
V330100     END-IF.                                                      3301009

V330400     DISPLAY '##########################################'         3304009

V330900     DISPLAY '##########################################'         3309009

V       01  DETAIL-LINE-4  .                                             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(16) VALUE                     CMD39
V                                             'CLNT-CNTCT-NUM:'.
V           05  D4-CLNT-CNTCT-NUM   PIC  X(08).
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(105) VALUE SPACES .           CMD39
V      *
V       01  DETAIL-LINE-5  .                                             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(06) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(13) VALUE                     CMD39
V                                             'BENE-NUM   :'.
V           05  D5-BENE-NUM         PIC  9(09).
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(02) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(19) VALUE                     CMD39
V                                             'BENE-STMT-CPY-QTY:'.
V           05  D5-BENE-STMT-CPY-QTY     PIC  9(03).
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(02) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(14) VALUE                     CMD39
V                                             'BENE-MAIL-CD:'.
V           05  D5-BENE-MAIL-CD     PIC  X(01).
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(63) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V
V      *
V       01  ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-1.                                          CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(132) VALUE                    CMD39
V               'ERROR CONDITIONS & TOTALS'.
V      *
V       01  ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-2.                                          CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(01) VALUE '('.                CMD39
V           05  ET2-ERROR-CODE      PIC  X(02).                          CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(02) VALUE ')'.                CMD39
V           05  ET2-ERROR-DESC      PIC  X(50).                          CMD39
V           05  ET2-ERROR-COUNT     PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(68) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-3.                                          CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(05) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(50) VALUE 'TOTAL COUNT: '.    CMD39
V           05  ET3-ERROR-TOT-CNT   PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(68) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *--
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-1.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(132) VALUE                    CMD39
V               'CONVERSION AND EXCEPTION TOTALS'.
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-2.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL ACCOUNT TRIGGERS CONVERTED INDIVIDUALS:' .        CMD39
V           05  TL2-ACCT-CONV-COUNT PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-3.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL ACCOUNT TRIGGERS REJECTED INDIVIDUALS :' .        CMD39
V           05  TL3-ACCT-REJ-COUNT  PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-4.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL ACCOUNT TRIGGERS INDIVIDUALS          :'  .       CMD39
V           05  TL4-ACCT-ALL-COUNT  PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-5.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL BENEFICIARY STMT CONVERTED INDIVIDUALS:' .        CMD39
V           05  TL5-BENE-CONV-COUNT PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-6.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL BENEFICIARY STMT REJECTED INDIVIDUALS :' .        CMD39
V           05  TL6-BENE-REJ-COUNT  PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *
V       01  CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-7.                                         CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(03) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(46) VALUE                     CMD39
V               'TOTAL BENEFICIARY STMT INDIVIDUALS          :' .        CMD39
V           05  TL7-BENE-ALL-COUNT  PIC  Z,ZZZ,ZZ9.                      CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(74) VALUE SPACES .            CMD39
V      *--
V       01  END-OF-REPORT-LINE.                                          CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(52) VALUE SPACES.             CMD39
V           05  FILLER              PIC  X(80) VALUE                     CMD39
V                                        '***--- END OF REPORT ---***'.  CMD39
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      * COPYBOOK AREA
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V       01  FILLER                        PIC  X(08) VALUE 'SDEXCPT'.
V           COPY SDEXCPT  REPLACING ==:SDEXCPT:== BY  ==W-EXCPT==.
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       01  FILLER                        PIC  X(08) VALUE 'BPDATESC'.
V           COPY BPDATESC.
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       01  FILLER                        PIC  X(08) VALUE 'STUBCPY'.
V           COPY STUBCPY.
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V       01  FILLER                        PIC  X(08) VALUE 'GENPMRC'.
V           COPY GENPMRC  REPLACING ==:GENPMR:== BY ==W-GENPMR==.
V

V      *--  LINKAGE SECTION
V      ******************************************************************
V
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V       01  L-PGM-PARM.
V           03  L-LEN                     PIC S9(04) COMP SYNC.
V           03  L-BYPASS-DT-CHK-ATADP-SW  PIC  X(01).
V               88  L-BYPASS-DT-CHK-ATADP-YES  VALUE 'Y'.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION  USING  L-PGM-PARM.
V
V           COPY MSGCOBO.
V           SKIP2
