V      ******************************************************************
V       0000-MAINLINE.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 1000-INITIALIZATION
V              THRU 1000-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 2000-PROCESS-INPUT
V              THRU 2000-EXIT
V             UNTIL W-EXCEPT-EOF-YES.
V
V           PERFORM 4000-ERROR-TOTAL
V              THRU 4000-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 4100-CONVERSION-TOTAL
V              THRU 4100-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 9000-END-OF-JOB
V              THRU 9000-EXIT .
V
V           GOBACK.
V      *
V       0000-EXIT .
V           EXIT .
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       1000-INITIALIZATION.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-OPEN FILES, VERIFY DATES.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           DISPLAY ' '.
V           DISPLAY '*-----------------------------------------------*'.
V           DISPLAY '* C67SD05 - STATEMENT DIARIES - CIP CONVERSION. *'.
V           DISPLAY '*         EXCEPTION AND TOTALS REPORT           *'.
V           DISPLAY '*-----------------------------------------------*'.
V           DISPLAY ' '.
V           CALL SPIEEXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 1040-OPEN-FILES
V              THRU 1040-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 1020-BPDATES
V              THRU 1020-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 1010-INIT-WORK-FIELDS
V              THRU 1010-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 1080-PRINT-RPT-1ST-TITLE
V              THRU 1080-EXIT.
V
V           PERFORM 7000-READ-EXCEPTION
V              THRU 7000-EXIT.
V      *
V       1000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       1010-INIT-WORK-FIELDS.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           SET W-EXCEPT-EOF-NO       TO  TRUE .
V      *
V           INITIALIZE W-RPT-TAG.
V           MOVE 267                  TO  W-RPT-CLT
V           MOVE 1                    TO  W-RPT-NO    .
V      *
V           INITIALIZE W-ERR-COUNT-TABLE   .
V      *
V           MOVE W-BPD-PROC-DATE-X10  TO  H1-DATE   .
V      *
V       1010-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       1020-BPDATES .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 'C'            TO  BPDATES-REQ-TYPE.
V           MOVE 'C67SD05'      TO  BPDATES-CALLING-PGM.
V
V           CALL BPDATES USING  BPDATES-PARAMETERS.
V
V           MOVE BPD-PROC-DATE  TO  W-BPD-PROC-DATE.
V      *
V      *-- SET UP BP DATE IN CCYY-MM-DD FORMAT
V           MOVE W-BPD-PROC-CC  TO  W-BPD-PROC-X10-CC
V           MOVE W-BPD-PROC-YY  TO  W-BPD-PROC-X10-YY
V           MOVE W-BPD-PROC-MM  TO  W-BPD-PROC-X10-MM
V           MOVE W-BPD-PROC-DD  TO  W-BPD-PROC-X10-DD
V           MOVE '-'            TO  W-BPD-PROC-X10-F1
V                                   W-BPD-PROC-X10-F2 .
V      *
V           DISPLAY '* C67SD05: BPD-PROC-DATE       = '
V                               W-BPD-PROC-DATE .
V           DISPLAY '           W-BPD-PROC-DATE-X10 = '
V                               W-BPD-PROC-DATE-X10 .
V      *
V       1020-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       1040-OPEN-FILES   .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           OPEN INPUT  EXCEPTION-FILE
V                OUTPUT REPORT-FILE.
V
V           DISPLAY 'W-EXCEPT-STATUS       : ' W-EXCEPT-STATUS
V           DISPLAY 'W-REPORT-STATUS       : ' W-REPORT-STATUS
V
V           IF W-EXCEPT-STAT-OK  AND
V              W-REPORT-STAT-OK
V              CONTINUE
V           ELSE
V              DISPLAY '*** C67SD05: FILE OPEN ERROR'
V              DISPLAY '*** SEE FILE STATUS ABOVE'
V              MOVE +1040  TO  W-ABEND-CODE
V              PERFORM 9999-ABEND
V                 THRU 9999-EXIT
V           END-IF .
V      *
V       1040-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       1080-PRINT-RPT-1ST-TITLE  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           INITIALIZE      W-PAGE-COUNT
V                           W-LINE-COUNT    .
V
V           PERFORM 3200-PRINT-RPT-NEW-PAGE
V              THRU 3200-EXIT .
V      *
V       1080-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       2000-PROCESS-INPUT .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           ADD +1  TO  W-EXCPT-RPT-COUNT.
V      *
V           PERFORM 3000-PRINT-RPT
V              THRU 3000-EXIT.
V      *
V           PERFORM 7000-READ-EXCEPTION
V              THRU 7000-EXIT.
V      *
V       2000-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3000-PRINT-RPT .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           IF ( W-LINE-COUNT  >=  W-PAGE-LINE-MAX )
V              PERFORM 3200-PRINT-RPT-NEW-PAGE
V                 THRU 3200-EXIT
V           END-IF .
V
V           PERFORM 3100-PRINT-RPT-DETAIL
V              THRU 3100-EXIT .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-ERROR-CODE  TO  W-ERR-CODE
V           ADD +1  TO  W-ERR-CODE-COUNT (W-ERR-CODE-N) .
V      *
V       3000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3100-PRINT-RPT-DETAIL   .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 3110-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L1
V              THRU 3110-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 3120-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L2
V              THRU 3120-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 3130-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L3
V              THRU 3130-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 3140-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L4
V              THRU 3140-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 3150-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L5
V              THRU 3150-EXIT
V              VARYING W-IDX01 FROM 1 BY 1
V                UNTIL ( W-IDX01 > W-EXCPT-BENE-DATA-COUNT ) .
V      *
V       3100-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3110-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L1 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-DIVIDER-LINE         TO  W-RPT-DATA .
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-OFFC-NUM  TO  D1-TRIG-OFFC-NUM             CMD39
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-ACCT-NUM       TO  D1-ACCT-NUM                  CMD39
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-ERROR-CODE     TO  D1-ERROR-CODE                CMD39
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-ERROR-DESC     TO  D1-ERROR-DESC                CMD39
V
V           MOVE DETAIL-LINE-1          TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  1  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +3                     TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3110-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3120-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L2 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-DT           TO  D2-TRIG-DT
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-CUST-GRP-NUM      TO  D2-CUST-GRP-NUM
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-CD           TO  D2-TRIG-CD
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-TYPE-CD      TO  D2-TRIG-TYPE-CD
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-SUB-TYPE-CD  TO  D2-TRIG-SUB-TYPE-CD
V      *
V           MOVE DETAIL-LINE-2   TO  W-RPT-DATA                          CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING   1   LINES .
V
V           ADD  +1              TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3120-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3130-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L3 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-FREQ-CD      TO  D3-TRIG-FREQ-CD
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-CRCY-CD      TO  D3-TRIG-CRCY-CD
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-PER-FROM-DT       TO  D3-PER-FROM-DT
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-PER-TO-DT         TO  D3-PER-TO-DT
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRIG-CPY-QTY      TO  D3-TRIG-CPY-QTY
V      *
V           MOVE DETAIL-LINE-3   TO  W-RPT-DATA                          CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING   1   LINES .
V
V           ADD  +1              TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3130-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3140-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L4 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-CLNT-CNTCT-NUM  TO  D4-CLNT-CNTCT-NUM
V      *
V           MOVE DETAIL-LINE-4   TO  W-RPT-DATA                          CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING   1   LINES .
V
V           ADD  +1              TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3140-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3150-PRINT-RPT-DTL-L5 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-BENE-NUM (W-IDX01)
V             TO D5-BENE-NUM
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-BENE-STMT-CPY-QTY (W-IDX01)
V             TO D5-BENE-STMT-CPY-QTY
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-BENE-MAIL-CD (W-IDX01)
V             TO D5-BENE-MAIL-CD
V      *
V           MOVE DETAIL-LINE-5   TO  W-RPT-DATA                          CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING   1   LINES .
V
V           ADD  +1              TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3150-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3200-PRINT-RPT-NEW-PAGE  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *-NEW PAGE ON CHANGE OF
V      * -> CLIENT NUMBER OR
V      * -> CURRENCY CODE
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 3210-PRINT-RPT-HEADING-1
V              THRU 3210-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM 3220-PRINT-RPT-HEADING-2
V              THRU 3220-EXIT .
V      *
V       3200-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3210-PRINT-RPT-HEADING-1 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE 267                     TO  H1-CLIENT
V           ADD  +1                      TO  W-PAGE-COUNT  .
V           MOVE W-PAGE-COUNT            TO  H1-PAGE
V
V           MOVE HEADING-LINE-1          TO  W-RPT-DATA .
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING TOP-OF-PAGE .
V
V           MOVE +1                      TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3210-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       3220-PRINT-RPT-HEADING-2 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE HEADING-LINE-2          TO  W-RPT-DATA .
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  1  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +1                      TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       3220-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4000-ERROR-TOTAL    .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 4020-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-1
V              THRU 4020-EXIT .
V
V           PERFORM VARYING W-IDX01 FROM 1 BY 1
V             UNTIL (W-IDX01 > W-ERR-CODE-COUNT-MAX )
V              IF ( W-ERR-CODE-COUNT (W-IDX01) > 0 )
V                 PERFORM 4040-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-2
V                    THRU 4040-EXIT
V              END-IF
V           END-PERFORM .
V
V           PERFORM 4060-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-3
V              THRU 4060-EXIT .
V      *
V       4000-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4020-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-1  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 3200-PRINT-RPT-NEW-PAGE
V              THRU 3200-EXIT .
V
V           MOVE ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-1     TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V
V           MOVE W-DIVIDER-LINE         TO  W-RPT-DATA .
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  1  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +3                     TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       4020-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4040-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-2  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-IDX01                     TO  W-ERR-CODE-N
V           MOVE W-ERR-CODE                  TO  ET2-ERROR-CODE
V           MOVE W-ERR-DESC-LIST (W-IDX01)   TO  ET2-ERROR-DESC
V           MOVE W-ERR-CODE-COUNT (W-IDX01)  TO  ET2-ERROR-COUNT
V
V           MOVE ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-2          TO  W-RPT-DATA              CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +2                          TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V           ADD  W-ERR-CODE-COUNT (W-IDX01)  TO  W-ERR-COUNT-TOTAL .
V      *
V       4040-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4060-PRINT-ERR-TOT-LINE-3  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE W-ERR-COUNT-TOTAL           TO  ET3-ERROR-TOT-CNT
V
V           MOVE ERROR-TOTAL-LINE-3          TO  W-RPT-DATA              CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +2                          TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       4060-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4100-CONVERSION-TOTAL .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 4110-PRINT-RPT-TOT-LINE-1
V              THRU 4110-EXIT .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRL-ACCT-CONV-CNT
V             TO TL2-ACCT-CONV-COUNT
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-2    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRL-ACCT-REJ-CNT
V             TO TL3-ACCT-REJ-COUNT
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-3    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           COMPUTE W-ACCT-ALL-COUNT
V                 = W-EXCPT-TRL-ACCT-CONV-CNT
V                 + W-EXCPT-TRL-ACCT-REJ-CNT .
V           MOVE W-ACCT-ALL-COUNT                                        CMD39
V             TO TL4-ACCT-ALL-COUNT                                      CMD39
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-4    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRL-BENE-CONV-CNT
V             TO TL5-BENE-CONV-COUNT
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-5    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           MOVE W-EXCPT-TRL-BENE-REJ-CNT
V             TO TL6-BENE-REJ-COUNT
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-6    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V           COMPUTE W-BENE-ALL-COUNT
V                 = W-EXCPT-TRL-BENE-CONV-CNT
V                 + W-EXCPT-TRL-BENE-REJ-CNT .
V           MOVE W-BENE-ALL-COUNT                                        CMD39
V             TO TL7-BENE-ALL-COUNT                                      CMD39
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-7    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V      *
V       4100-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4110-PRINT-RPT-TOT-LINE-1 .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           PERFORM 3200-PRINT-RPT-NEW-PAGE
V              THRU 3200-EXIT .
V
V           MOVE CONV-RPT-TOT-LINE-1    TO  W-RPT-DATA                   CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  2  LINES .
V
V           MOVE W-DIVIDER-LINE         TO  W-RPT-DATA .
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  1  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +3                     TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       4110-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       4200-END-OF-RPT-LINE  .
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------
V      *
V           MOVE END-OF-REPORT-LINE          TO  W-RPT-DATA              CMD39
V           WRITE REPORT-RECORD  FROM  W-REPORT-RECORD
V              AFTER ADVANCING  3  LINES .
V
V           ADD  +3                          TO  W-LINE-COUNT .
V      *
V       4200-EXIT .
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       7000-READ-EXCEPTION .

V           IF W-EXCPT-TRL-CNT-LIT
V              SET W-EXCEPT-EOF-YES  TO  TRUE
V           END-IF.
V      *
V       7000-EXIT.
V           EXIT.
V      *
V      ******************************************************************
V       9000-END-OF-JOB.
V      *-----------------------------------------------------------------

V              THRU 4200-EXIT .

V              THRU 9050-EXIT .

V           CLOSE  EXCEPTION-FILE
V                  REPORT-FILE .

V268260
V268400 1000-EXIT. EXIT.
V313812
V313920 2000-PROCESS.
V314000
V314001        SET WS-TAB-NOT-FOUND  TO  TRUE.
V314002
V314003        PERFORM 3000-LOC-TAB  THRU 3000-EXIT.
V314004
V314005        COMPUTE WS-END = WS-TAB-LOC.
V314006        COMPUTE WS-LEN = WS-END - WS-START.
V314007
V314008        EVALUATE WS-FIELD-COUNT
V314009          WHEN 01
V314010             IF WS-LEN > 0
V314011                MOVE IRRXREF-REC(WS-START:WS-LEN) TO
V314012                     ORRXREF-FIELD01
V314013             ELSE
V314020                MOVE SPACES     TO  ORRXREF-FIELD01
V314031             END-IF
V314032          WHEN 02
V314033             IF WS-LEN > 0
V314034                MOVE IRRXREF-REC(WS-START:WS-LEN) TO
V314035                     ORRXREF-FIELD02
V314036             ELSE
V314037                MOVE SPACES     TO  ORRXREF-FIELD02
V314038             END-IF
V314039          WHEN 03
V314040             IF WS-LEN > 0
V314041                MOVE IRRXREF-REC(WS-START:WS-LEN) TO
V314042                     ORRXREF-FIELD03
V314043             ELSE
V314044                MOVE SPACES     TO  ORRXREF-FIELD03
V314045             END-IF
V314046          WHEN 04
V314047             IF WS-LEN > 0
V314048                MOVE IRRXREF-REC(WS-START:WS-LEN) TO
V314049                     ORRXREF-FIELD04
V314050             ELSE
V314051                MOVE SPACES     TO  ORRXREF-FIELD04
V314052             END-IF
V314186          WHEN OTHER
V314187             DISPLAY 'C67XL08: UNKNOWN FIELD-COUNT. '
V314188                     'IRRXREF REC CNT: ' IRRXREF-CTR
V314189                     ' FIELD COUNT: '    WS-FIELD-COUNT
V314190        END-EVALUATE.
V314191
V314192        IF WS-TAB-LOC >= 200
V314193           PERFORM 8000-WRITE-ORRXREF THRU 8000-EXIT
V314194           PERFORM 9000-READ-IRRXREF THRU 9000-EXIT
V314195           MOVE SPACES TO ORRXREF-REC
V314196           COMPUTE WS-FIELD-COUNT =  1
V314197           COMPUTE WS-START =  1
V314198        ELSE
V314199           COMPUTE WS-FIELD-COUNT = WS-FIELD-COUNT + 1
V314200           COMPUTE WS-START = WS-TAB-LOC + 1
V314201        END-IF.
V314210
V314300 2000-EXIT. EXIT.
V687369/
V687370 3000-LOC-TAB.
V687372
V687373     PERFORM VARYING WS-TAB-LOC FROM WS-START BY 1
V687374               UNTIL WS-TAB-LOC >= WS-REC-LEN
V687375                  OR WS-TAB-FOUND
V687376        IF IRRXREF-REC(WS-TAB-LOC:1) = WS-TAB
V687377           SET WS-TAB-FOUND TO TRUE
V687378        END-IF
V687379     END-PERFORM.
V687380
V687381     IF WS-TAB-LOC = WS-REC-LEN
V687382        COMPUTE WS-TAB-LOC = WS-REC-LEN + 1
V687383     ELSE
V687384        COMPUTE WS-TAB-LOC = WS-TAB-LOC - 1
V687385     END-IF.
V687462
V687463 3000-EXIT. EXIT.

V688610         DISPLAY 'RECORD ATTEMPT: ' ORRXREF-REC

V689100
V689200 8000-EXIT. EXIT.

V689392           DISPLAY 'FILE: IRRXREF-FILE, ACTION: READ'
V689393           DISPLAY 'FILE STATUS: ' IRRXREF-FILE-STATUS
V689394           PERFORM 9999-ABEND
V689395        END-IF
V689396     END-IF.

V689403     END-IF.

V00045  LINKAGE SECTION.                                                 DATECL
V00046  01  PASS-DATES.                                                  DATECL
V00047   03 PASS-99.                                                     DATECL
V00048    05 PASS-DATE1                  PIC  9(8).                      DATECL
V00049    05 PASS-DATE2                  PIC  9(8).                      DATECL
V00050    05 PASS-DAYS                   PIC  9(6).                      DATECL
V00051    05 PASS-ERROR                  PIC  9(2).                      DATECL
V00052                                                                   DATECL
V00053  PROCEDURE DIVISION       USING PASS-DATES.                       DATECL
V           COPY MSGCOBO.                                                DATECL
V00055  A00-START.                                                       DATECL
V00056           IF PASS-99  NOT NUMERIC  THEN                           DATECL
V00057                   MOVE  01     TO  PASS-ERROR                     DATECL
V00058                   GO TO RETURN-PART.                              DATECL
V00059           MOVE PASS-ERROR     TO   OPT.                           DATECL
V00060           MOVE 0              TO   PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00061           IF   OPT > 3   THEN                                     DATECL
V00062                   MOVE  99     TO  PASS-ERROR                     DATECL
V00063                   GO TO RETURN-PART.                              DATECL
V00064           MOVE PASS-DATE1     TO   VALID-DATES.                   DATECL
V00065           PERFORM DATE-VALIDATION THRU DATE-VALIDATION-EXIT.      DATECL
V00066           IF   OPT = 0   THEN GO TO RETURN-PART.                  DATECL
V00067           IF   OPT = 1   THEN                                     DATECL
V00068              MOVE PASS-DATE2     TO   VALID-DATES                 DATECL
V00069              PERFORM DATE-VALIDATION THRU DATE-VALIDATION-EXIT    DATECL
V00070                   GO TO RETURN-PART.                              DATECL
V00071           MOVE  PASS-DATE1    TO   DATE-1.                        DATECL
V00072           IF   OPT = 3   THEN   GO TO OPTION-3.                   DATECL
V00073  OPTION-2.                                                        DATECL
V00074              MOVE PASS-DATE2     TO   VALID-DATES                 DATECL
V00075              PERFORM DATE-VALIDATION THRU DATE-VALIDATION-EXIT.   DATECL
V00076           IF   PASS-ERROR > 0    THEN                             DATECL
V00077                   GO TO RETURN-PART.                              DATECL
V00078           MOVE  PASS-DATE2    TO   DATE-2.                        DATECL
V00079           MOVE  0             TO   PASS-DAYS.                     DATECL
V00080              IF  DATE-1  =  DATE-2  THEN GO TO RETURN-PART.       DATECL
V00081              IF  ( DATE-C1 < 19 ) AND ( DATE-C2 < 19 ) THEN       DATECL
V00082                  GO TO OPTION-21.                                 DATECL
V00083              IF  DATE-1  >  DATE-2  THEN                          DATECL
V00084                  MOVE  11   TO   PASS-ERROR                       DATECL
V00085                  GO TO RETURN-PART.                               DATECL
V00086              GO TO OPTION-25.                                     DATECL
V00087  OPTION-21.                                                       DATECL
V00088              IF  DATE-1  >  DATE-2   THEN                         DATECL
V00089                  MOVE  19   TO DATE-C1                            DATECL
V00090                  MOVE  20   TO DATE-C2                            DATECL
V00091                  GO TO OPTION-25.                                 DATECL
V00092              IF  DATE-Y1 >  59       THEN                         DATECL
V00093                      MOVE  19   TO DATE-C1 DATE-C2                DATECL
V00094              ELSE    MOVE  20   TO DATE-C1 DATE-C2.               DATECL
V00095                  GO TO OPTION-25.                                 DATECL
V00096  OPTION-25.                                                       DATECL
V00097              MOVE      0    TO   SUB1.                            DATECL
V00098              MOVE  DATE-C1  TO   COMP-YEAR-C.                     DATECL
V00099              MOVE  DATE-Y1  TO   COMP-YEAR-Y.                     DATECL
V00100              MOVE COMP-YEAR TO   SUB3 SUB5.                       DATECL
V00101              MOVE  DATE-C2  TO   COMP-YEAR-C.                     DATECL
V00102              MOVE  DATE-Y2  TO   COMP-YEAR-Y.                     DATECL
V00103              MOVE COMP-YEAR TO   SUB4.                            DATECL
V00104  OPTION-251.                                                      DATECL
V00105              ADD  1         TO  SUB3.                             DATECL
V00106              IF   SUB3 NOT < SUB4   THEN GO TO OPTION-26.         DATECL
V00107              MOVE SUB3         TO   COMP-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00108              MOVE COMP-YEAR-Y  TO   LONG-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00109              IF  LONG-VALUES   THEN                               DATECL
V00110                   ADD  366     TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00111              ELSE ADD  365     TO   SUB1.                         DATECL
V00112              GO TO OPTION-251.                                    DATECL
V00113  OPTION-26.                                                       DATECL
V00114              MOVE SUB5         TO   COMP-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00115              MOVE COMP-YEAR-Y  TO   LONG-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00116              MOVE DATE-M1      TO   SUB2.                         DATECL
V00117              IF   SUB5 =  SUB4   THEN                             DATECL
V00118                   MOVE DATE-M2   TO   SUB6                        DATECL
V00119                   SUBTRACT   1   FROM SUB6                        DATECL
V00120              ELSE MOVE 12        TO   SUB6.                       DATECL
V00121  OPTION-261.                                                      DATECL
V00122              IF  SUB6 NOT > SUB2    THEN GO TO OPTION-263.        DATECL
V00123              MOVE SUB6    TO   MONTH-30.                          DATECL
V00124              IF  MONTH-VALUES  THEN                               DATECL
V00125                  ADD   30      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00126                  GO TO OPTION-262.                                DATECL
V00127              IF  MONTH-SECOND AND LONG-VALUES   THEN              DATECL
V00128                  ADD   29      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00129                  GO TO OPTION-262.                                DATECL
V00130              IF  MONTH-SECOND AND NOT LONG-VALUES   THEN          DATECL
V00131                  ADD   28      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00132                  GO TO OPTION-262.                                DATECL
V00133                  ADD   31      TO   SUB1.                         DATECL
V00134  OPTION-262.                                                      DATECL
V00135              SUBTRACT   1   FROM  SUB6.                           DATECL
V00136              GO TO OPTION-261.                                    DATECL
V00137  OPTION-263.                                                      DATECL
V00138              IF  SUB5  =   SUB4   THEN GO TO OPTION-27.           DATECL
V00139              MOVE SUB4         TO   COMP-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00140              MOVE COMP-YEAR-Y  TO   LONG-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00141              MOVE DATE-M2      TO   SUB2.                         DATECL
V00142              MOVE 1            TO   SUB6.                         DATECL
V00143  OPTION-264.                                                      DATECL
V00144              IF  SUB6 NOT < SUB2    THEN GO TO OPTION-27.         DATECL
V00145              MOVE SUB6    TO   MONTH-30.                          DATECL
V00146              IF  MONTH-VALUES  THEN                               DATECL
V00147                  ADD   30      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00148                  GO TO OPTION-265.                                DATECL
V00149              IF ( MONTH-SECOND ) AND ( LONG-VALUES ) THEN         DATECL
V00150                  ADD   29      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00151                  GO TO OPTION-265.                                DATECL
V00152              IF ( MONTH-SECOND ) AND ( NOT LONG-VALUES ) THEN     DATECL
V00153                  ADD   28      TO   SUB1                          DATECL
V00154                  GO TO OPTION-265.                                DATECL
V00155                  ADD   31      TO   SUB1.                         DATECL
V00156  OPTION-265.                                                      DATECL
V00157              ADD        1   TO    SUB6.                           DATECL
V00158              GO TO OPTION-264.                                    DATECL
V00159  OPTION-27.                                                       DATECL
V00160              MOVE SUB5         TO   COMP-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00161              MOVE COMP-YEAR-Y  TO   LONG-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00162              MOVE DATE-M1      TO   MONTH-30.                     DATECL
V00163              MOVE DATE-D1      TO   SUB2.                         DATECL
V00164                 IF  DATE-CYM1 = DATE-CYM2  THEN                   DATECL
V00165                     MOVE DATE-D2  TO SUB6                         DATECL
V00166                     GO TO OPTION-271.                             DATECL
V00167              IF  MONTH-VALUES                   THEN              DATECL
V00168                  MOVE  30      TO   SUB6                          DATECL
V00169                  GO TO OPTION-271.                                DATECL
V00170              IF ( MONTH-SECOND ) AND ( LONG-VALUES ) THEN         DATECL
V00171                  MOVE  29      TO   SUB6                          DATECL
V00172                  GO TO OPTION-271.                                DATECL
V00173              IF  ( MONTH-SECOND ) AND ( NOT LONG-VALUES ) THEN    DATECL
V00174                  MOVE  28      TO   SUB6                          DATECL
V00175                  GO TO OPTION-271.                                DATECL
V00176                  MOVE  31      TO   SUB6.                         DATECL
V00177  OPTION-271.                                                      DATECL
V00178              SUBTRACT  SUB2    FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00179              ADD       SUB6    TO   SUB1.                         DATECL
V00180                 IF  DATE-CYM1 NOT = DATE-CYM2  THEN               DATECL
V00181              ADD  DATE-D2      TO   SUB1.                         DATECL
V00182  OPTION-28.                                                       DATECL
V00183              MOVE     SUB1  TO   PASS-DAYS.                       DATECL
V00184              GO TO RETURN-PART.                                   DATECL
V00185                                                                   DATECL
V00186  OPTION-3.                                                        DATECL
V00187              IF PASS-DAYS > 40000     THEN                        DATECL
V00188                 MOVE   12   TO   PASS-ERROR                       DATECL
V00189                 GO TO  RETURN-PART.                               DATECL
V00190              MOVE     PASS-DAYS  TO  SUB1.                        DATECL
V00191              IF ( DATE-C1 < 19 ) AND ( DATE-Y1 > 59 ) THEN        DATECL
V00192                   MOVE  19     TO DATE-C1.                        DATECL
V00193              IF ( DATE-C1 < 19 ) AND ( DATE-Y1 < 60 ) THEN        DATECL
V00194                   MOVE  20     TO DATE-C1.                        DATECL
V00195              MOVE DATE-1       TO   DATE-2.                       DATECL
V00196              MOVE DATE-C2      TO   COMP-YEAR-C.                  DATECL
V00197              MOVE DATE-Y2      TO   COMP-YEAR-Y.                  DATECL
V00198              MOVE COMP-YEAR    TO   SUB3.                         DATECL
V00199              MOVE COMP-YEAR-Y  TO   LONG-YEAR.                    DATECL
V00200              MOVE DATE-M2      TO   MONTH-30.                     DATECL
V00201              MOVE  31          TO   SUB6.                         DATECL
V00202              IF ( LONG-VALUES ) AND ( MONTH-SECOND )    THEN      DATECL
V00203                  SUBTRACT  2   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00204              IF ( NOT LONG-VALUES ) AND ( MONTH-SECOND ) THEN     DATECL
V00205                  SUBTRACT  3   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00206              IF   MONTH-VALUES                    THEN            DATECL
V00207                  SUBTRACT  1   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00208  OPTION-31.                                                       DATECL
V00209              SUBTRACT    DATE-D2    FROM SUB6.                    DATECL
V00210              IF  SUB6 NOT < SUB1    THEN                          DATECL
V00211                  ADD    SUB1    TO   DATE-D2                      DATECL
V00212                  GO TO  OPTION-38.                                DATECL
V00213              ADD  1    TO      SUB6.                              DATECL
V00214              SUBTRACT  SUB6    FROM SUB1.                         DATECL
V00215              MOVE  01          TO   DATE-D2.                      DATECL
V00216              ADD   01          TO   DATE-M2.                      DATECL
V00217              MOVE  DATE-M2     TO   SUB2.                         DATECL
V00218  OPTION-32.                                                       DATECL
V00219              IF   SUB2 > 12    THEN                               DATECL
V00220                   ADD  1           TO   SUB3                      DATECL
V00221                   MOVE SUB3        TO   COMP-YEAR                 DATECL
V00222                   MOVE COMP-YEAR-C TO   DATE-C2                   DATECL

V00224                   MOVE 01          TO   DATE-M2 SUB2.             DATECL
V00225              MOVE SUB2         TO   MONTH-30.                     DATECL
V00226              MOVE 31           TO   SUB6.                         DATECL
V00227              IF   LONG-VALUES AND MONTH-SECOND      THEN          DATECL
V00228                  SUBTRACT  2   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00229              IF   NOT LONG-VALUES AND MONTH-SECOND  THEN          DATECL
V00230                  SUBTRACT  3   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00231              IF   MONTH-VALUES                    THEN            DATECL
V00232                  SUBTRACT  1   FROM SUB6.                         DATECL
V00233              IF  SUB6      >   SUB1 THEN GO TO OPTION-31.         DATECL
V00234              SUBTRACT  SUB6    FROM SUB1.                         DATECL
V00235              ADD 1     TO      DATE-M2 SUB2.                      DATECL
V00236              GO TO OPTION-32.                                     DATECL
V00237  OPTION-38.                                                       DATECL
V00238              IF   PASS-DATE1 < 19000000   THEN                    DATECL
V00239                   MOVE  0      TO  DATE-C2.                       DATECL
V00240              MOVE DATE-2       TO  PASS-DATE2.                    DATECL
V00241              GO TO RETURN-PART.                                   DATECL
V00242                                                                   DATECL
V00243  DATE-VALIDATION.                                                 DATECL
V00244           MOVE  YEAR    TO     LONG-YEAR.                         DATECL
V00245           MOVE  MONTH   TO     MONTH-30.                          DATECL
V00246           IF ( ( CENTURY NOT = 0 ) AND                            DATECL
V00247              ( CENTURY < 19 ) OR ( CENTURY > 20 ) ) THEN          DATECL
V00248                   MOVE  02     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00249           IF ( MONTH   < 01 ) OR ( MONTH   > 12 )   THEN          DATECL
V00250                   MOVE  03     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00251           IF ( DDAY     < 01 ) OR ( DDAY     > 31 )   THEN        DATECL
V00252                   MOVE  04     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00253           IF ( MONTH-VALUES ) AND ( DDAY > 30 ) THEN              DATECL
V00254                   MOVE  04     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00255           IF ( NOT LONG-VALUES ) AND ( MONTH-SECOND )  AND        DATECL
V00256                  ( DDAY > 28 )    THEN                            DATECL
V00257                   MOVE  04     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00258           IF   ( LONG-VALUES ) AND ( MONTH-SECOND ) AND           DATECL
V00259                  ( DDAY > 29 )    THEN                            DATECL
V00260                   MOVE  04     TO  PASS-ERROR.                    DATECL
V00261  DATE-VALIDATION-EXIT. EXIT.                                      DATECL
V00262                                                                   DATECL
V00263  RETURN-PART.                                                     DATECL
V00264      GOBACK.                                                      DATECL

VMEMBER NAME  $COPYGET
V//TIRAJONS JOB (IT00,0000),'RAMA  JON-46569',CLASS=W,MSGCLASS=X,
V//             REGION=8M,NOTIFY=TIRAJON
V/*ROUTE PRINT RMT163
V/*JOBPARM S=ANY
V//COPYGET  EXEC PGM=IKJEFT01
V//COPYLIBS DD *
VBISG.COPYLIB
V/*
V//INFILE0  DD DSN=BISG.ONLINE.SRCLIB(ZRSPDC),DISP=SHR
V//OUTFILE  DD SYSOUT=*
V//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
V//SYSTSPRT DD SYSOUT=*
V//SYSIN    DD DUMMY
V//SYSTSIN  DD *
VPROFILE NOPREFIX
VEXEC 'TIRAJON.CLIST(COPYGET)'  'SUPPRESS=YES'
V/*
V//*
VMEMBER NAME  $DATE
V/*                                 REXX                             */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------*/
V/*                                                                  */
V/*      This REXX exec will do date conversion:                     */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*      Call Format:  DATE = $DATE(CODE,INPUT)                      */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*          CODE = 'J2G' - Julian to Gregorian date                 */
V/*          CODE = 'G2J' - Gregorian date to Julian                 */
V/*          CODE = 'J2R' - Julian to Relative date                  */
V/*          CODE = 'R2J' - Relative to Julian date                  */
V/*          CODE = 'R2D' - Relative to day, i.e Sun, Mon, etc..     */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*          INPUT = either 'MM/DD/YYYY' or 'YYYYDDD' or 'nnnn'      */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*      Errors during processing will return 0 as result and        */
V/*      an error message will be displayed as well.                 */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------*/
V
V$DATE:
V
VParse Upper Arg FUNC,DATE
V
VIf DATE = '' Then RET_DATE = 0
VElse Select
V      When FUNC = 'J2G' Then RET_DATE = J2G_PROC(DATE)
V      When FUNC = 'G2J' Then RET_DATE = G2J_PROC(DATE)
V      When FUNC = 'J2R' Then RET_DATE = J2R_PROC(DATE)
V      When FUNC = 'R2J' Then RET_DATE = R2J_PROC(DATE)
V      When FUNC = 'R2D' Then RET_DATE = R2D_PROC(DATE)
V      Otherwise Do
V         Say 'DT999E - Invalid function code as' FUNC
V         RET_DATE = 0
V         End
V   End
V
V         SAY 'CONVERTED DATE IS' RET_DATE
VReturn RET_DATE
V
V
V
VJ2G_PROC: Procedure
V
VParse Arg JUL_DATE
V
VCall VALIDATE_JULIAN
VIf RESULT = 0 Then G_DATE = 0
VElse Do
V   JULIAN_YYYY = Substr(JUL_DATE,1,4)
V   JULIAN_DDD  = Substr(JUL_DATE,5,3)
V   MO.1  = 31
V   MO.2  = 28
V   MO.3  = 31
V   MO.4  = 30
V   MO.5  = 31
V   MO.6  = 30
V   MO.7  = 31
V   MO.8  = 31
V   MO.9  = 30
V   MO.10 = 31
V   MO.11 = 30
V   MO.12 = 31
V   If LEAP_YEAR(JULIAN_YYYY) Then MO.2 = 29
V   Do I=1 to 12 While JULIAN_DDD > MO.I
V      JULIAN_DDD = JULIAN_DDD - MO.I
V      End
V   MM   = Right(I,2,'0')
V   DD   = Right(JULIAN_DDD,2,'0')
V   G_DATE = MM||'/'||DD||'/'||JULIAN_YYYY
V   End
V
VReturn G_DATE
V
V
VG2J_PROC: Procedure
V
VParse Arg GEO_DATE
VParse Var GEO_DATE MM '/' DD '/' YYYY
VJ_DATE = 0
V
VIf Datatype(MM)   ｬ= 'NUM' | ,
V   Datatype(DD)   ｬ= 'NUM' | ,
V   Datatype(YYYY) ｬ= 'NUM' | ,
V   DD > 31                 | ,
V   MM < 1                  | ,
V   MM > 12                 | ,
V   YYYY > 9999          Then ,
V      Say 'DT001E - Invalid Gregorian date as' GEO_DATE
VElse Do
V   MO.1  = 31
V   MO.2  = 28
V   MO.3  = 31
V   MO.4  = 30
V   MO.5  = 31
V   MO.6  = 30
V   MO.7  = 31
V   MO.8  = 31
V   MO.9  = 30
V   MO.10 = 31
V   MO.11 = 30
V   MO.12 = 31
V   If LEAP_YEAR(YYYY) Then MO.2 = 29
V   MM = Strip(MM,'L','0')
V   If (DD > Value(MO.MM)) Then ,
V       Say 'DT002E - Out-of-range date as' GEO_DATE
V   Else Do
V      J_ACCUM_DAY = 0
V      If MM > 1 Then Do I=1 to (MM-1)
V         J_ACCUM_DAY = J_ACCUM_DAY + MO.I
V         End
V      J_ACCUM_DAY = J_ACCUM_DAY + DD
V      J_DATE      = YYYY||Right(J_ACCUM_DAY,3,'0')
V      End
V   End
V
VReturn J_DATE
V
V
V
V
VJ2R_PROC: Procedure
V
VParse Arg JUL_DATE
V
VCall VALIDATE_JULIAN
VIf RESULT = 1 Then R_DATE = ((JULIAN_YYYY-1) * 365) + ,
V                            ((JULIAN_YYYY-1) % 4) - ,
V                            ((JULIAN_YYYY-1) % 100) + ,
V                            ((JULIAN_YYYY-1) % 400) + (JULIAN_DDD)
V   Else R_DATE = 0
VReturn R_DATE
V
V
V
VR2J_PROC: Procedure
VParse Arg REL_DATE
VRETURNED_J = 0
V
VIf Datatype(REL_DATE) ｬ= 'NUM' Then ,
V   Say 'DT006E - Relative date non-numeric as' REL_DATE
VElse Do
V   If REL_DATE > 3652424 Then ,
V      Say 'DT007E - Relative date out-of-range as' REL_DATE
V   Else Do
V      TEMP_YYYY = (REL_DATE % 366) + 1
V      TEMP_REL = J2R_PROC(Right(TEMP_YYYY,4,'0')||'000')
V      Do While (REL_DATE - TEMP_REL) > 0
V         If LEAP_YEAR(TEMP_YYYY) Then LEFT_OVER = 366
V         Else LEFT_OVER = 365
V         If LEFT_OVER < (REL_DATE - TEMP_REL) Then Do
V            TEMP_REL  = TEMP_REL  + LEFT_OVER
V            TEMP_YYYY = TEMP_YYYY + 1
V            End
V         Else Do
V            TEMP_DDD = (REL_DATE - TEMP_REL)
V            Leave
V            End
V         End
V      RETURNED_J =  Right(TEMP_YYYY,4,'0')||Right(TEMP_DDD,3,'0')
V   End
VEnd
V
VReturn RETURNED_J
V
V
VR2D_PROC: Procedure
VParse Arg REL_DATE
VRETURNED_DAY = 0
VIf Datatype(REL_DATE) ｬ= 'NUM' Then ,
V   Say 'DT006E - Relative date non-numeric as' REL_DATE
VElse Do
V   If REL_DATE > 3652424 Then ,
V      Say 'DT007E - Relative date out-of-range as' REL_DATE
V   Else Do
V      DAY_INDEX = (REL_DATE // 7)+1
V      RETURNED_DAY  = Word('Sun Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat',DAY_INDEX)
V   End
VEnd
V
VReturn RETURNED_DAY
V
V
V
V
V
VVALIDATE_JULIAN:
V
VVALID_DATE = 0
V
VIf Length(JUL_DATE) ｬ=7 | Datatype(JUL_DATE) ｬ= 'NUM' Then
V   Say 'DT003E - Date too short/long or non-numeric as' JUL_DATE
VElse Do
V   JULIAN_YYYY = Substr(JUL_DATE,1,4)
V   JULIAN_DDD  = Substr(JUL_DATE,5,3)
V   If (JULIAN_DDD > 366) Then ,
V      Say 'DT004E - Number of day > 366 as' JULIAN_DDD
V   Else If (LEAP_YEAR(JULIAN_YYYY) = 0) & (JULIAN_DDD = 366) Then ,
V          Say 'DT005E - Invalid days for a non-leap year as' JULIAN_YYYY
V        Else If (JULIAN_YYYY < 1) Then ,
V           Say 'DT008E - Invalid year as' JULIAN_YYYY
V           Else VALID_DATE = 1
V   End
VReturn VALID_DATE
V
V
V
VLEAP_YEAR: Procedure
VParse Arg YEAR_CHECKED
V
VIf (YEAR_CHECKED // 100) = 0 Then ,
V   If (YEAR_CHECKED // 400) = 0 Then LEAP_YEAR_FLAG = 1
V   Else LEAP_YEAR_FLAG = 0
VElse If (YEAR_CHECKED // 4) = 0 Then LEAP_YEAR_FLAG = 1
V   Else LEAP_YEAR_FLAG = 0
V
VReturn LEAP_YEAR_FLAG
VMEMBER NAME  $JOB
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
V/* DOC:  THIS IS AN ISPF V2.2 ISREDIT MACRO                          */
V/* REQ:  USER MUST BE IN ISPF EDIT MODE                              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FUNCTION: ENTERS JOBCARD                                          */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
VPROC 0 X()
VCONTROL MAIN NOCAPS
VISREDIT MACRO (HOLD)
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VSET &RC=0
VISREDIT (DSN) =  DATASET
VISREDIT (MEM) =  MEMBER
V/* FIND OUT THE NUMBER OF LINES IN THE DATASET  */
VISREDIT (TOP,BOT) = DISPLAY_LINES
VSET &PNT=0
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VIF &DSN=&STR(SYS1.PROCLIB) OR &DSN=&STR(SYS1.PRODPROC) OR +
V   &DSN=&STR(SYS1.TESTPROC) OR +
V   &DSN=&STR(SYS1.PROC) OR &DSN=&STR(SYS1.TEST.PROC) THEN GOTO PROC
VIF &ID=HEDGESM OR &ID=HEDGESX THEN SET &BIN=&STR(BN31)
VIF &ID=KASIERS THEN SET &BIN=&STR(BN20)
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = "//&MEM   JOB (000000,&BIN),'&ID',"
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//            CLASS=Z,MSGCLASS=X,'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VSET &X=
VIF &HOLD=HOLD THEN SET &X=&STR(,TYPRUN=HOLD)
VIF &HOLD=SCAN THEN SET &X=&STR(,TYPRUN=SCAN)
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//            NOTIFY=&ID.&X'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VGOTO COMMENTS
VPROC:  +
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//&MEM     PROC'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VCOMMENTS: +
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*-----------------------------------------------------------------*'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*   LIB: &DSN.(&MEM)'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V"//*   DOC:                                                          *"
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VSET &DT=&STR(&SYSDATE...&SYSTIME)
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V"//*  NOTE: &DT "
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*                                                                 *'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*-----------------------------------------------------------------*'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LABEL .ZLAST = .PNT
VISREDIT INSERT .PNT
VISREDIT (LLINE) = LINENUM  .PNT
VISREDIT LOCATE &LLINE
VISREDIT UP MAX
VISREDIT LEFT  MAX
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  $PEND
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
V/* DOC:  THIS IS AN ISPF V2.2 ISREDIT MACRO                          */
V/* REQ:  USER MUST BE IN ISPF EDIT MODE                              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FUNCTION: ADDS A JOB CARD AND A PEND AND AN EXEC TO               */
V/*           CREATE AN IN STREAM FROM A PROC                         */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
VISREDIT MACRO (SCAN)
VSET &RC=0
VISREDIT (DSN) =  DATASET
VISREDIT (MEM) =  MEMBER
VSET &PNT=1
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VISREDIT LINE_BEFORE &PNT = "//&MEM JOB (000000,TECH),'&ID',"
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VIF &SCANｬ=  THEN +
VISREDIT LINE_BEFORE &PNT = +
V'//       CLASS=Z,MSGCLASS=X,NOTIFY=&ID,TYPRUN=SCAN'
VELSE +
VISREDIT LINE_BEFORE &PNT = '//       CLASS=Z,MSGCLASS=X,NOTIFY=&ID'
VISREDIT LABEL .ZLAST = .PNT
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER .PNT  = '//   PEND '
VISREDIT LABEL .ZLAST = .PNT
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER .PNT = '//   EXEC  &MEM'
VISREDIT LABEL .ZLAST = .PNT
VISREDIT UP MAX
VISREDIT LEFT  MAX
VISREDIT CURSOR = 1 0
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  $PRINT
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
V/* DOC:  THIS IS AN ISPF V2.2 ISREDIT MACRO                          */
V/* REQ:  USER MUST BE IN ISPF EDIT MODE                              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FUNCTION: PRINTS CURRENT MEMBER                                   */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
VPROC 0 X() HEADING( )
VCONTROL MAIN
V/*CONTROL LIST SYM CON MSG NOFLUSH*/
VISREDIT MACRO (COPIES,NO)
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VSET &RC=0
VISREDIT (DSN) =  DATASET
VISREDIT (MEM) =  MEMBER
VIF &MEMｬ=   THEN SET &DSN=&STR(&DSN.(&MEM))
VIF &SYSDSN('&DSN')ｬ=OK THEN DO
V   WRITE
V   WRITE PLEASE 'SAVE' THIS FILE THEN RETRY COMMAND
V   WRITE
V   EXIT
V  END
VIF &LASTCC=0 AND &MEMｬ=  THEN SET &MEM=&STR((&MEM))
VIF &NO=NO OR &NO=NOHEADING OR &NO=NOHEADINGS THEN +
V   SET &HEADING=NOHEADING
VSET &DEST=&STR(DEST(MISPRT1))
VIF &DATATYPE(&COPIES)=NUM THEN SET &COPIES=&STR(COPIES(&COPIES))
VIF &COPIESｬ=  AND &DATATYPE(&COPIES)=CHAR THEN DO
V   SET &DEST=
V   IF &COPIES=F THEN SET &DEST=&STR(DEST(FINANCE))
V   IF &COPIES=A THEN SET &DEST=
V   IF &COPIES=M THEN SET &DEST=&STR(DEST(MISPRT1))
V   IF (&COPIESｬ=F AND &COPIESｬ=M) AND &COPIESｬ=  THEN  +
V      SET &DEST=&STR(CLASS(&COPIES))
V   SET &COPIES=
V  END
V
VCONTROL LIST MSG NOFLUSH
VPRINTOFF '&DSN' &DEST  &COPIES &HEADING
VCONTROL NOLIST MSG NOFLUSH
V
VIF &DESTｬ=  THEN SET &DEST=&SUBSTR(6:&LENGTH(&DEST)-1,&DEST)
V
VSET &ZEDSMSG = &STR(PRINTED &DEST)
VSET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(&DSN ON PRINTER &DEST)
V
VISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  $PROCLIB
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
V/* DOC:  THIS IS AN ISPF V2.2 ISREDIT MACRO                          */
V/* REQ:  USER MUST BE IN ISPF EDIT MODE                              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FUNCTION: EDIT 'SYS1.PROCLIB' FILE WITH OPTIONAL MEMBER           */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
VPROC 0
VCONTROL MAIN
VISREDIT MACRO (MEMBER)
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VSET &RC=0
VIF &MEMBERｬ=  AND &LENGTH(&MEMBER) < 9 THEN +
VISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.PROCLIB(&MEMBER)')
V              ELSE +
VISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.PROCLIB')
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  $RECEIVE
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
V/* DOC:  THIS IS AN ISPF V2.2 ISREDIT MACRO                          */
V/* REQ:  USER MUST BE IN ISPF EDIT MODE                              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FUNCTION: ENTERS COMMENTS PER DSN AND MEMBER NAME                 */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-*/
VPROC 0 X()
VCONTROL MAIN
VISREDIT MACRO (HOLD)
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VSET &RC=0
VISREDIT (DSN) =  DATASET
VISREDIT (MEM) =  MEMBER
V/* FIND OUT THE NUMBER OF LINES IN THE DATASET  */
VISREDIT (TOP,BOT) = DISPLAY_LINES
VSET &PNT=0
VSET &ID=&SYSUID
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = "//&MEM   JOB (000000),'&ID',"
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//            CLASS=Z,MSGCLASS=X,'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VSET &X=
VIF &HOLD=HOLD THEN SET &X=&STR(,TYPRUN=HOLD)
VIF &HOLD=SCAN THEN SET &X=&STR(,TYPRUN=SCAN)
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//            NOTIFY=&ID.&X'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VGOTO COMMENTS
VPROC:  +
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT = '//&MEM     PROC'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VCOMMENTS: +
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*-----------------------------------------------------------------*'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT='//*   LIB: &DSN.(&MEM)'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VWRITE ENTER PRODUCT TO RECEIVE FOR  &MEM
VWRITENR >&STR( )
VREAD
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT="//*   DOC: RECEIVE &SYSDVAL"
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VSET &DT=&STR(&SYSDATE...&SYSTIME)
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT="//*  NOTE: &DT  "
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*                                                                 *'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//*-----------------------------------------------------------------*'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//RECEIVE  EXEC  SMPE'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//SMPPTFIN  DD   DSN=SMPMCS,DISP=OLD,UNIT=TAPE,     '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VWRITE ENTER VOLSER
VWRITENR >&STR( )
VREAD &VS
V
VIF &HOLD=SERVICE OR &HOLD=MAINT THEN DO
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          LABEL=(1,NL,EXPDT=98000),VOL=SER=&VS,'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=7200,REXFM=FB)'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          DD   DSN=F3,DISP=OLD,UNIT=TAPE,       '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          LABEL=(3,NL,EXPDT=98000),VOL=SER=&VS,'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=7200,REXFM=FB)'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VEND
V                     ELSE DO
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          LABEL=(1,SL,EXPDT=98000),VOL=SER=&VS,'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//          DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=7200,REXFM=FB)'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VEND
V
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//SMPCNTL   DD  *'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'  SET BDY(GLOBAL).     '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'      RECEIVE          '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'              SYSMODS          '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'              LIST             '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VWRITE ENTER SOURCEID PARM FOR SMP/E
VWRITENR >&STR( )
VREAD &SRCID
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'              SOURCEID(&SRCID) '
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'              .'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'/*'
VSET &PNT=&PNT+1
VISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PNT= +
V'//'
VISREDIT UP MAX
VISREDIT LEFT  MAX
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  $SPACE
VPROC 0 TAPE CART VB RC(0)
VISREDIT MACRO (LRECL,TAPE,VB)
VIF &LRECL=  THEN DO
V   WRITENE ENTER LRECL:&STR( )
V   READ &LRECL
V   IF &LRECL=  THEN EXIT
V END
VIF &TAPE=VB THEN SET &VB=VB
VIF &VB=TAPE THEN SET &TAPE=TAPE
VIF &VB=VB THEN SET &LRECL=&LRECL+4     /* RECORD DESCRIPTOR WORD */
VIF &TAPE=TAPE OR &CART=CART THEN GOTO TAPEPROC
VSET &BLK=47476/&LRECL
VSET &BLK=&BLK/2
V/* BLKSIZE=23476 HIGH-WATER-MARK */
VSET &BLK=&BLK*&LRECL
VIF &BLK>23476 THEN DO
V   DO WHILE &BLK>23476
V      SET &BLK=&BLK-&LRECL
V     END
V  END
V/* VARIABLE LENGTH ADD 4 */
VIF &VB=VB THEN SET &BLK=&BLK+4
VIF &BLK>23476 THEN SET &BLK=&BLK-&LRECL
V
VSET &ZEDSMSG = &STR(&LRECL / &BLK )
V
VISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
V
V/* TAPE OR CART PROCESSING.  NOTE: MAX BLKSIZE=32756/32760 */
VTAPEPROC: +
VSET &BLK=32760/&LRECL
V/* VARIABLE LENGTH SUB 4 */
VIF &VB=VB THEN SET &BLK=&BLK-4
VSET &BLK=&BLK*&LRECL
VIF &BLK>32760 THEN SET &BLK=&BLK-&LRECL
V
VSET &ZEDSMSG = &STR(&LRECL / &BLK - TAPE)
V
VISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
VEXIT CODE(&RC)
VMEMBER NAME  ADDAFTR
VISREDIT MACRO (ARG) NOPROCESS
V /********************* ADDAFTR  ISPF EDIT MACRO *********************/
V /*                                                                  */
V /* ADDAFTR IS A SPECIAL PURPOSE EDIT MACRO THAT WILL INSERT A LINE  */
V /* OF DATA AFTER EACH LINE WITHIN AND IDENTIFIED RANGE OF LINES.    */
V /* A RANGE IS DEFINED BY USING A RANGE COMMAND IDENTIFIED BY A 'Z'. */
V /* 'Z', 'ZZ', AND 'ZNNN' CAN BE USED AS RANGE IDENTIFIERS.          */
V /*                                                                  */
V /* DATA CAN BE PASSED ON THE COMMAND LINE. IF DATA IS NOT PASSED ON */
V /* THE COMMAND LINE, THE CURSOR MUST BE PLACE ON THE DATA LINE TO   */
V /* BE USED AS DATA.                                                 */
V /*                                                                  */
V /* SYNTAX: ADDAFTR {OPTIONAL DATA TO BE USED AS INSERT}             */
V /*                                                                  */
V /********************************************************************/
V
V IF &ARG = THEN DO
V ISREDIT (ROW,COL) = CURSOR
V ISREDIT (ARG1) = LINE &ROW
V SET &ARG = &NRSTR(&ARG1)
V END
V ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
VISREDIT PROCESS RANGE Z
VSET RC = &LASTCC
VIF &RC = 4 THEN +
V  DO
V     SET ZEDSMSG = &STR(RANGE NOT SPECIFIED)
V     SET ZEDLMSG = &STR(SPECIFY RANGE FOR THE CUT AND RE-EXECUTE +
V                        THE MACRO)
V     ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V     EXIT CODE(4)
V   END
VELSE +
V    IF &RC > 0 THEN +
V      DO
V     SET ZEDSMSG = &STR(SEVERE ERROR)
V     SET ZEDLMSG = &STR(SEVERE ERROR OCCURED, RETURN CODE WAS +
V                        &RC)
V     ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V     EXIT CODE(&RC)
V   END
V ISREDIT (CMD) = RANGE_CMD
V ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE
V ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE
V DOIT: +
V ISREDIT LINE_AFTER &FIRST =  '&NRSTR(&ARG)'
V  SET &FIRST = &FIRST + 2
V  SET &LAST  = &LAST  + 1
V  IF &FIRST > &LAST THEN GOTO MD
V  GOTO DOIT
VMD: +
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  ALIGN
V/* REXX                                                             */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)                 */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  PREREQUISITE: MACRO ALIGNP MUST BE INSTALLED                    */
V/*                (UNLESS YOU COMMENT OUT REFERENCE TO ALIGNP)      */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  THIS MACRO ALIGNS THE "TO" IN "MOVE" STATEMENTS IN COBOL PGMS.  */
V/*  THIS ALSO HANDLES ALIGNING THE "TO" IN "ADD" AND "GO TO" STMTS  */
V/*  ALSO THE "THRU" IN PERFORM STATEMENTS ARE ALIGNED BY EXECUTING  */
V/*  MACRO ALIGNP.                                                   */
V/*  YOU CAN COMMENT OUT THE CALL TO ALIGNP IF DESIRED               */
V/*  YOU SHOULD BLOCK OUT THE LINES TO BE AFFECTED WITH "CC"         */
V/*  IN YOUR COBOL PROGRAM, THEN TYPE "ALIGN" ON THE COMMAND LINE    */
V/*  ALL OTHER STATEMENTS ARE UNAFFECTED                             */
V/*                                                                  */
V/********************************************************************/
V     NEST=SYSVAR('SYSNEST')
V     IF NEST = 'NO' THEN
V       DO
V        "ISREDIT MACRO NOPROCESS"
V        "ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE C"
V        END
V
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@ALIGN) PROFILE"
V      IF (@ALIGN != 'Y') THEN
V        DO
V         @MSG = ,
V         'THIS MACRO NOW ALIGNS:"ADD","GO TO" AND "PERFORM" STMTS ALSO'
V         ZEDLMSG = @MSG
V        "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V        @ALIGN = 'Y'
V        "ISPEXEC VPUT (@ALIGN) PROFILE"
V        END
V
V     "ISREDIT (CMD) = RANGE_CMD"
V  /*                            */
V     "ISREDIT NUMBER ON STD COBOL"
V     "ISREDIT (FIRST)=LINENUM .ZFRANGE"
V     "ISREDIT (LAST) =LINENUM .ZLRANGE"
V      CNT=LAST-FIRST+1
V      MAXPOS=0
V      FIL = '                                                  '
V      BLANK = ' '
V/*                                                    */
V
V/* IDENTIFY LINES WITH WORDS "MOVE/ADD/GO" AND "TO" IN THEM.         */
V/* STRIP THE WORDS OUT AND PUT LINE BACK TOGETHER WITH JUST ONE      */
V/* BLANK BETWEEN WORDS                                               */
V/*                                                                   */
V      ANYP = 0
V      CUR=FIRST
V      DO WHILE CUR <= LAST
V        "ISREDIT (LV) = LINE" CUR
V        WPOS = WORDPOS('TO',LV)
V        MPOS = WORDPOS('MOVE',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('ADD',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('GO',LV)
V        PPOS = WORDPOS('PERFORM',LV)
V        ANYP = ANYP + PPOS
V        IF WPOS > 0 & MPOS > 0 THEN
V        DO
V          TWORD = 0
V          RRC = 0
V          FSTWPOS = WORDINDEX(LV,1)
V          BLK=SUBSTR(FIL,1,FSTWPOS-1)
V          DO WHILE RRC = 0
V             TWORD = TWORD + 1
V             XWORD.TWORD = SUBWORD(LV,TWORD,1)
V             IF XWORD.TWORD <= ' ' THEN RRC = 1
V          END
V          LDATA=BLK
V          SAVETWORD = TWORD
V          TWORD = 1
V          DO WHILE TWORD < SAVETWORD
V             LDATA=LDATA||XWORD.TWORD||BLANK
V             TWORD=TWORD+1
V          END
V/*        SAY 'LDATA=' LDATA */
V          'ISREDIT LINE 'CUR' = (LDATA)' /* ALIGN2 */
V        END
V        CUR = CUR + 1
V     END
V
V/*                                                                   */
V/* FIND THE RIGHTMOST POSITION OF THE WORD "TO" IN ALL THE LINES     */
V/*                                                                   */
V      CUR=FIRST
V      DO WHILE CUR <= LAST
V        "ISREDIT (LV) = LINE" CUR
V        WPOS = WORDPOS('TO',LV)
V        MPOS = WORDPOS('MOVE',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('ADD',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('GO',LV)
V        IF WPOS > 0 & MPOS > 0 THEN
V        DO
V          CPOS = WORDINDEX(LV,WPOS)
V          IF CPOS > MAXPOS THEN
V             MAXPOS = CPOS
V        END
V        CUR = CUR + 1
V     END
V/*                                                                   */
V/* SPLIT LINES INTO 2 SECTIONS:                                      */
V/* 1) FROM THE "MOVE/ADD/GO" UP TO THE WORD "TO"                     */
V/* 2) FROM THE "TO"   UP TO THE END OF THE LINE                      */
V/* 3) PUT LINE BACK TOGETHER WITH THE "TO" AT THE RIGHTMOST          */
V/*    POSITION FOUND ABOVE                                           */
V/* 4) IF THE LINE IS TOO LONG TEXT SPLIT IT INTO TWO LINES           */
V/*                                                                   */
V      CUR=FIRST
V /*   TRACE ALL */
V      DO WHILE CUR <= LAST
V        "ISREDIT (LV) = LINE" CUR
V        WPOS = WORDPOS('TO',LV)
V        MPOS = WORDPOS('MOVE',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('ADD',LV)
V        IF MPOS = 0 THEN
V           MPOS = WORDPOS('GO',LV)
V        IF TSPLIT = 'Y' THEN
V            DO
V              TSPLIT = 'N'
V              LV = '  '||LV
V              LDATA=LV
V/*           "ISPEXEC VPUT (CUR LDATA) SHARED"*/
V             'ISREDIT LINE 'CUR' = (LDATA)' /* ALIGN2 */
V            END
V        IF WPOS > 0 & MPOS > 0 THEN
V        DO
V          CPOS = WORDINDEX(LV,WPOS)
V          XFROM=LEFT(LV,CPOS-2)
V          XTO=SUBSTR(LV,CPOS+3,65-CPOS)
V          XP = MAXPOS - CPOS
V          BLK=SUBSTR(FIL,1,XP)
V          LDATA =  XFROM||BLK "TO" XTO
V/*       "ISPEXEC VPUT (CUR LDATA) SHARED" */
V         IF LENGTH(LDATA) > 66 THEN
V            LEND = LENGTH(LDATA) - 66
V         IF LENGTH(LDATA) > 66 & SUBSTR(LDATA,67,LEND) <= ' ' THEN
V            'ISREDIT LINE 'CUR' = (LDATA)' /* ALIGN2 */
V         IF LENGTH(LDATA) < 67 THEN
V            'ISREDIT LINE 'CUR' = (LDATA)' /* ALIGN2 */
V         IF LENGTH(LDATA) > 66 & SUBSTR(LDATA,67,LEND) > ' ' THEN
V            DO
V               WPOS = WORDPOS('TO',LV)
V               CPOS = WORDINDEX(LV,WPOS)
V               "ISREDIT TSPLIT " CUR CPOS-1
V               TSPLIT = 'Y'
V               LAST=LAST+1
V            END
V        END
V        CUR = CUR + 1
V     END
V     IF ANYP > 0 THEN
V        ALIGNP
V/*   LOGIT ALIGN  */
V
V    "ISREDIT RESET"
V    "ISREDIT RENUM STD COBOL"
V     EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  ALL
VISREDIT MACRO (STRING)                                                  0001000
V/* ALL SSS - SHOWS ALL OCCURENCES OF THE STRING SSS */                  0002000
V    IF &STR(&STRING) = &STR() THEN DO                                   0003000
V      ISREDIT RESET EXCLUDED FIND                                       0004000
V      ISREDIT LOCATE .ZCSR                                              0005000
V     END                                                                0006000
V    ELSE DO                                                             0007000
V      ISREDIT X ALL                                                     0008000
V      ISREDIT FIND &STRING ALL                                          0009000
V     END                                                                0010000
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0011000
VMEMBER NAME  ALLMEMS
V/*REXX*/                                                                0000100
V/*===================================================================*/ 0001000
V/*REXX*      APPLY A MACRO TO ALL MEMBERS OF A PDS:                  */ 0002000
V/*REXX*        E.G. %ALLMEMS CHGMAC 'YOUR.DATASET'                   */ 0003000
V/*===================================================================*/ 0004000
V MEMBER =                                                               0005000
V DATAID =                                                               0006000
V PARSE UPPER ARG EDITMACRO DSNAME                                       0007000
V ADDRESS ISPEXEC                                                        0008000
V "LMINIT DATAID(DATAID) DATASET("DSNAME") ENQ(SHR)"                     0009000
V IF RC = 0 THEN DO                                                      0010000
V   "LMOPEN DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(INPUT)"                              0011000
V   "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(LIST) MEMBER(MEMBER) STATS(NO)"     0012000
V   LISTRC = RC                                                          0013000
V   DO WHILE LISTRC = 0                                                  0014000
V     SAY " MEMBER NAME IS" MEMBER                                       0015000
V     "EDIT DATAID("DATAID") MEMBER("MEMBER")" ,                         0016000
V          "MACRO("EDITMACRO")"                                          0017000
V     "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(LIST) MEMBER(MEMBER) STATS(NO)"   0018000
V     LISTRC = RC                                                        0019000
V   END                                                                  0020000
V   "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(FREE)"                              0021000
V   "LMCLOSE DATAID("DATAID")"                                           0022000
V END                                                                    0023000
VMEMBER NAME  BATCHPDF
V/* REXX - Generate JCL to run ISPF in batch using the current        */
V/*        TSO session allocations.                                   */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*        This is an ISPF edit macro.                                */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*     Usage:  Place this in your REXX or CLIST library as           */
V/*             Member BATCHPDF.                                      */
V/*             Edit any edit session and enter BATCHPDF.             */
V/*             The edit session should then contain working JCL for  */
V/*             using ISPF in batch.  Change the job card as          */
V/*             needed and add or remove ddnames and data sets as     */
V/*             needed.                                               */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*     Author: Doug Nadel  http://somebody.home.mindspring.com/      */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*             I'd like to thank Gilbert Saint-Flour for the SWAREQ  */
V/*             subroutine. http://members.home.net/gsf/              */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*     Notes:  The JCL generated creates a cataloged data set for    */
V/*             Use as an ISPF profile and tables data set.  This     */
V/*             data set is used for ISPPROF, ISPTABL and ISPTABL.    */
V/*             You can add an iebcopy step before the ikjeft01       */
V/*             step if you need to copy an existing profile onto     */
V/*             that data set.  That data set is automatically        */
V/*             deleted in the end change the 'tempdsn' name if       */
V/*             needed.                                               */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*             If you have a member called jobcard in the pds you    */
V/*             are editing when you run this, it will be copied in   */
V/*             to the JCL automatically.  Otherwise a default        */
V/*             job card will be inserted.                            */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*             The JCL generated also uses a temporary CLIST.        */
V/*             Place invocation of your program there.               */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*     Version History: 1.00 Feb 10, 2000  - initial release         */
V/*     Version History: 1.01 Feb 11, 2000  - profile init step       */
V/*                                         - minor reformatting      */
V/*     Version History: 1.02 Jul 08, 2002  - added ZACCTNUM          */
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VAddress isredit
V'MACRO'
VIf sysvar(syspref) <> '' Then
V  If sysvar(syspref) <> userid() Then
V    prefix=sysvar(syspref)'.'userid()
V  Else
V    prefix=sysvar(syspref)
VElse
V  prefix=userid()
VDo Until sysdsn("'"tempdsn"'") <> 'OK' /* set up temp ds name        */
V  tempdsn=prefix'.T'substr(reverse(time('L')),1,6)'.ISPPROF'
VEnd
V'X ALL .ZL .ZF'                        /* exclude all                */
V'DEL ALL X'                            /* and now delete everything  */
V'CAPS OFF'                             /* insure lower case is
V                                          allowed                    */
Vlineno=0
Vddnames='ISPLLIB ISPPLIB ISPSLIB ISPMLIB ISPILIB'
VCall listdsi 'SYSPROC FILE'
VAddress ispexec 'CONTROL ERRORS RETURN'
V'COPY JOBCARD AFTER 0'
Vcopyrc=rc
VAddress ispexec 'CONTROL ERRORS CANCEL'
V'CAPS OFF'                             /* in case copy changed caps  */
VAddress ISPEXEC 'VGET (ZACCTNUM)'
VAC = ZACCTNUM
VIf copyrc>0 Then
V  Call add '//'userid()'I JOB ('AC'),NOTIFY='userid()',MSGLEVEL=(1,1)'
V'(LINENO) = linenum .zl'               /* Start adding at top        */
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VCall comment 'Create Startup CLIST'
VCall add '//GENER0   EXEC PGM=IEBGENER                              '
VCall add '//SYSUT1   DD *                                          '
VCall add '                          '
VCall add ' ISPEXEC VGET (ZTIMEL)       /* ISPF services can run here */'
VCall add ' WRITE &ZTIMEL            '
VCall add ' '
VCall scomment 'Add any setup here'
VCall scomment 'And start your program here.  Use ISPEXEC SELECT.'
VCall scomment ' '
VCall scomment 'To invoke the editor, code a line like:'
VCall scomment "  ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('FRED.CNTL(BUBBA)') MACRO(BINKY)"
VCall scomment 'and remember that the macro must do an END or CANCEL.'
VCall add ' '
VCall add ' '
VCall scomment 'You can set the step return code if you want.'
VCall add ' SET ZISPFRC = 0          '
VCall add ' ISPEXEC VPUT (ZISPFRC) SHARED     /* set step return code */'
VCall add ' '
VCall add '//SYSUT2   DD DISP=(NEW,PASS),DSN=&&CLIST0(TEMPNAME),'
VCall add '//            SPACE=(TRK,(1,1,2),RLSE),UNIT=SYSALLDA,    '
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL='syslrecl',BLKSIZE=0,'||,
V  'DSORG=PO,RECFM='sysrecfm')   '
VCall add '//PROFILE  DD DISP=(NEW,CATLG),DSN='tempdsn','
VCall add '//            SPACE=(TRK,(10,10,5)),UNIT=SYSALLDA,'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=0,DSORG=PO,RECFM=FB) '
VCall add '//SYSPRINT DD DUMMY                                      '
VCall add '//SYSIN    DD DUMMY                                      '
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VCall comment 'Initialize profile data set (optional)'
VCall add '//* COPY     EXEC PGM=IEBCOPY                               '
VCall add '//* SYSPRINT DD  DUMMY                                      '
VCall add '//* SYSIN    DD  DUMMY                                      '
VCall get_allocations 'ISPPROF '
VCall add '//* SYSUT1   DD  DISP=SHR,DSN='dsname.1
VCall add '//* SYSUT2   DD  DISP=(OLD,PASS),DSN=*.GENER0.PROFILE'
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VCall comment 'Invoke ISPF'
VCall add '//BATCHPDF EXEC PGM=IKJEFT01,DYNAMNBR=128                 '
VCall insert 'STEPLIB ','STEPLIB '
VDo dds=1 to words(ddnames)
V  ddname=subword(ddnames,dds,1)
V  Call insert ddname,ddname
VEnd
VCall add '//ISPPROF  DD DISP=(OLD,PASS),DSN='tempdsn
VCall add '//ISPTABL  DD DISP=(OLD,PASS),DSN='tempdsn
VCall add '//ISPTLIB  DD DISP=(OLD,PASS),DSN='tempdsn
VCall insert 'ISPTLIB ',' '
VCall add '//ISPCTL0  DD DISP=(NEW,DELETE),SPACE=(TRK,(10,10)),UNIT=VIO,'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=0,DSORG=PS,RECFM=FB)  '
VCall add '//ISPCTL1  DD DISP=(NEW,DELETE),SPACE=(TRK,(10,10)),UNIT=VIO,'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=0,DSORG=PS,RECFM=FB)  '
VCall add '//ISPWRK1  DD DISP=(NEW,DELETE),SPACE=(TRK,(10,10)),UNIT=VIO,'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=0,DSORG=PS,RECFM=FB)  '
VCall add '//ISPLST1  DD DISP=(NEW,DELETE),SPACE=(TRK,(10,10)),'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=133,BLKSIZE=0,DSORG=PS,RECFM=VB)'
VCall add '//ISPLOG   DD SYSOUT=*,'
VCall add '//            DCB=(LRECL=120,BLKSIZE=2400,DSORG=PS,RECFM=FB)'
VCall add '//ISPLIST  DD SYSOUT=*,DCB=(LRECL=121,BLKSIZE=1210,RECFM=FBA)'
VCall add '//* 'copies('- ',32)
VCall add '//SYSTSPRT DD SYSOUT=*'
VCall add '//SYSTSIN  DD *'
VIf sysvar(syspref) <> '' Then
V  Call add ' PROFILE PREFIX('sysvar(syspref)')'
VElse
V  Call add ' PROFILE NOPREFIX'
VCall add ' ISPSTART CMD(%TEMPNAME) NEWAPPL(ISR)'
VCall insert 'SYSEXEC ','SYSEXEC'
VCall add '//SYSPROC  DD DSN=&&CLIST0,DISP=(OLD,DELETE)'
VCall insert 'SYSPROC ',''
VCall add '//*'copies('-',67)'*'
VCall add '//*'center(' Delete temporary profile data set ',67)'*'
VCall add '//*'copies('-',67)'*'
VCall add '//DELPROF  EXEC PGM=IEFBR14         '
VCall add '//DELETEDD DD DSN='tempdsn',DISP=(OLD,DELETE)'
V'LOCATE .ZF'
VExit 1
V/*------------------ Subroutines follow -----------------------------*/
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vget_allocations:  Procedure Expose ddname. dsname. volume.
VNumeric digits 10                      /* Allow up to 7fffffff       */
VDrop ddname. dsname. volume.
Vtiotptr=24+ptr(12+ptr(ptr(ptr(16))))   /* Get ddname array           */
Vtioelngh=c2d(stg(tiotptr,1))           /* Nength of 1st entry        */
Va=0
Vddname=' '
VDo Until tioelngh=0                    /* Scan until dd found        */
V  tioeddnm=strip(stg(tiotptr+4,8))     /* Get ddname from tiot       */
