V  If substr(tioeddnm,1,1) <>'00'x Then
V    Do
V      If substr(tioeddnm,1,1) <>" " Then
V        ddname=tioeddnm
V      If ddname=Arg(1) Then
V        Do
V          a=a+1
V          ddname.a=ddname
V          tioelngh=c2d(stg(tiotptr,1)) /* Length of next entry       */
V          tioejfcb=stg(tiotptr+12,3)
V          jfcb=swareq(tioejfcb)        /* Convert sva to 31-Bit addr */
V          dsname.a=strip(stg(jfcb,44)) /* Dsname jfcbdsnm            */
V          volume.a=storage(d2x(jfcb+118),6)/* Volser jfcbvols (Not
V                                          used)                      */
V        End
V    End
V  tiotptr=tiotptr+tioelngh             /* Get next entry             */
V  tioelngh=c2d(stg(tiotptr,1))         /* Get entry length           */
VEnd
Vddname.0=a
VReturn
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vptr:  Return c2d(storage(d2x(Arg(1)),4)) /* Return a pointer         */
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vstg:  Return storage(d2x(Arg(1)),Arg(2)) /* Return storage           */
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vswareq:  Procedure
VIf right(c2x(Arg(1)),1) \= 'F' Then    /* SWA=BELOW ?                */
V  Return c2d(Arg(1))+16                /* YES, RETURN SVA+16         */
Vsva = c2d(Arg(1))                      /* CONVERT TO DECIMAL         */
Vtcb = ptr(540)                         /* TCB PSATOLD                */
Vjscb = ptr(tcb+180)                    /* JSCB TCBJSCB               */
Vqmpl = ptr(jscb+244)                   /* QMPL JSCBQMPI              */
Vqmat = ptr(qmpl+24)                    /* QMAT QMADD                 */
VDo While sva>65536
V  qmat = ptr(qmat+12)                  /* NEXT QMAT QMAT+12          */
V  sva=sva-65536                        /* 010006F -> 000006F         */
VEnd
VReturn ptr(qmat+sva+1)+16
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vscomment:                              /* Add comments in sample     */
VCall add ' /* 'left(Arg(1),56)' */'
VReturn
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vcomment:                               /* Add block comments         */
V/* Add comments in sample                                            */
VCall add '//*'copies('-',67)'*'
VCall add '//*'center(' 'Arg(1)' ',67)'*'
VCall add '//*'copies('-',67)'*'
VReturn
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vadd:                                   /* Add lines to the JCL       */
VParse Arg line
V'LINE_AFTER 'lineno' = (LINE)'
Vlineno=lineno+1
VReturn
V/*-------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Vinsert:  Procedure Expose ddname. dsname. lineno
Vddname=Arg(2)
VCall get_allocations Arg(1)
VIf ddname.0>0 Then
V  Do a = 1 to ddname.0
V    line= '//'left(ddname,9)'DD DISP=SHR,DSN='dsname.a
V    If length(line)<63 Then
V      line=substr(line,1,63)||volume.a;else
V    If length(line)<65 Then
V      line=line volume.a
V    Call add line
V    ddname=''
V  End
VReturn
V
VMEMBER NAME  BCARD
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.CARDLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  BCHISPF
V/*REXX*/                                                                0001000
V/*===================================================================*/ 0002000
V/*REXX*      RUN AN ISPF MACRO AGAINST A GIVEN SEQUENTIAL FILE       */ 0003000
V/*REXX*        E.G. %BCHISPF 'YOUR.DATASET' CHNGMAC                  */ 0004000
V/*===================================================================*/ 0005000
V PARSE UPPER ARG DSNAME EDITMACRO                                       0006000
V ADDRESS ISPEXEC                                                        0007000
V     "EDIT DATASET("DSNAME") CONFIRM(NO) MACRO("EDITMACRO")"            0008000
V EXIT                                                                   0009000
VMEMBER NAME  BCPY
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.COPYLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  BJCL
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.JCLLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  BPROC
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.PROCLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  BSRC
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.SRCLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  CC
V/**  REXX -- INTERACTIVE CALCULATIONS USING REXX INTERPRET COMMAND  **/
V    NUMERIC DIGITS 30
V    SAY "**  ENTER CALCUATIONS, ? FOR HELP, NULL ENTER TO QUIT...  **"
V    DO FOREVER
V        PARSE PULL X
V        IF X = "" THEN LEAVE
V        IF X = "?" THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V                   ELSE INTERPRET "SAY" X
V    END
V    EXIT(0)
V
VDISPDOC:
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V   SAY "CC -- SIMPLE TSO CALCULATOR                            "
V   SAY
V   SAY "  CC                                                   "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    ALL STANDARD REXX ARITHMETIC STATEMENTS MAY BE     "
V   SAY "    ENTERED AND THE RESPONSE IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWS.      "
V   SAY "    FOR EXAMPLE, 27998//80 RETURNS 78. PARENTHESES     "
V   SAY "    ARE ALLOWED, E.G. (212-32)*5/9.                    "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    A PRESS OF <ENTER> WITHOUT ANY INPUT TERMINATES    "
V   SAY "    THE MACRO.                                         "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    IN ADDITION TO + FOR ADDITION, - FOR SUBTRACTION,  "
V   SAY "    * FOR MULTIPLICATION AND / FOR DIVISION, // GIVES  "
V   SAY "    THE REMAINDER, % DOES PURE INTEGER DIVISION AND    "
V   SAY "    ** PERFORMS EXPONENTIATION.                        "
V   SAY
V   EXIT(1)
VMEMBER NAME  CHANGE
V/* rexx change */
V
V            /*target old  new                  result       */
Vcall change '--??--' '??' '*'     ;say result /* --*--      */
Vcall change '--??--' '??' '**'    ;say result /* --**--     */
Vcall change '--??--' '??' '***'   ;say result /* --***--    */
Vcall change '--??--' '?'  '*'     ;say result /* --*?--     */
Vcall change '--??--' '?'  '**'    ;say result /* --**?--    */
Vcall change '--??--' '?'  '***'   ;say result /* --***?--   */
Vcall change '--??--' '???'  '***' ;say result /* error      */
Vcall change '--?? -' '??' '*'     ;say result /* unexpected */
V                                              /* space interleaved */
Vexit
V
Vchange :
Varg target oldstr newstr
Vif pos(oldstr,target) = 0 then return 'ERROR'
V
Vif length(oldstr) >= length(newstr) then
Vtarget = space(overlay(newstr,target,pos(oldstr,target),length(oldstr)),0)
V
Vif length(oldstr) < length(newstr) then
Vtarget = substr(target,1,pos(oldstr,target)-1) || newstr || ,
V         substr(target,pos(oldstr,target)+length(oldstr))
V
Vreturn target
V
VMEMBER NAME  CHKDUP
VPROC 0
V    CONTROL END(ENDX)
V
V    /*!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! WARNING !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!*/
V    /*!                                                         !*/
V    /*! THIS CLIST PROGRAM DOES NOT HANDLE LARGE VOLUME OF DATA !*/
V    /*!                                                         !*/
V    /*!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! WARNING !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!*/
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    /* IMPORTANT: SET WORK FILES HERE                            */
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    SET &INFILE  = 'USZ999.SORTED.LLID'
V /* SET &INFILE  = 'URP999.NEER93Q2.FD05215.G0002V00'
V    SET &OUTFILE = 'USZ005.DUP.RECORDS'
V
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    /* IMPORTANT: SET KEY START AND END POSITION HERE            */
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    SET &COLBGN = 14
V    SET &COLEND = 21
V
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    /* ALLOCATE INPUT / OUTPUT FILE                              */
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    ALLOC F(INDD)  DA(&INFILE)                                   +
V        REUSE SHR
V
V    DELETE &OUTFILE
V    ALLOC F(OUTDD) DA(&OUTFILE)                                  +
V        NEW                                                      +
V        RECFM(F B) LRECL(80) BLOCK(800)                          +
V        SPACE(50,5) TRACKS UNIT(TEST) CATALOG
V
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    /* THIS ROUTINE CAPTURES ERRORS THAT OCCURR DURING EXECUTION */
V    /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/
V    ERROR DO
V        IF &LASTCC = 400 THEN DO
V            IF &DUPFND = 1 THEN +
V                WRITE DUPLICATE KEYS FOUND, CHECK OUTPUT &OUTFILE
V            ELSE +
V                WRITE NO DUPLICATE KEYS FOUND
V            CLOSFILE INDD
V            CLOSFILE OUTDD
V            FREE F(INDD OUTDD)
V            END
V        ENDX
V    ENDX
V
V    /*------------*/
V    /* OPEN FILES */
V    /*------------*/
V    OPENFILE INDD  INPUT
V    OPENFILE OUTDD OUTPUT
V
V    SET &BYPASS  = 0
V    SET &DUPFND  = 0
V    SET &RECCTR  = 0
V    SET &PREVKEY =
V    DO WHILE 1   = 1
V        GETFILE INDD
V
V        SET &RECCTR = &RECCTR + 1
V
V        SET &CURKEY = &SUBSTR(&COLBGN:&COLEND,&INDD)
V
V        IF &CURKEY < &PREVKEY THEN  +
V            DO
V                SET &OUTDD = ERROR: RECORD NUMBER &RECCTR &STR(-) +
V                             KEY '&CURKEY' IS OUT OF SEQUENCE
V                PUTFILE OUTDD
V                WRITE &OUTDD
V
V                SET &OUTDD = &STR(      ) PROGRAM IS ABORTED !!!
V                PUTFILE OUTDD
V                WRITE &OUTDD
V
V                CLOSFILE INDD
V                CLOSFILE OUTDD
V                FREE F(INDD OUTDD)
V                END
V            ENDX
V
V        IF &CURKEY ｬ= &PREVKEY THEN +
V            DO
V                SET &BYPASS  = 0
V                SET &PREVKEY = &CURKEY
V            ENDX
V        ELSE +
V            IF &BYPASS = 0 THEN +
V                DO
V                    SET &DUPFND = 1
V                    SET &BYPASS = 1
V                    SET &OUTDD = &CURKEY
V                    PUTFILE OUTDD
V                ENDX
V    ENDX
VEND
VMEMBER NAME  CLIB
V/* REXX */
VNODE1:
V    ARG MEMBER .
V    ADDRESS ISPEXEC
V    LEN = LENGTH(MEMBER)
V    USER = USERID()
V    'CONTROL ERRORS RETURN'
V    IF MEMBER = . ,
V    |  LEN    = 0 THEN
V        DO
V            "VIEW DATASET('BISG.CARDLIB')"
V            IF RC \= 0 THEN
V                SAY 'ERROR: ' ZERRLM
V        END
V    ELSE
V        IF LEN < 8 THEN
V            DO
V                "VIEW DATASET('BISG.CARDLIB(&MEMBER*)')"
V                IF RC \= 0 THEN
V                    SAY 'ERROR: ' ZERRLM
V            END
V        ELSE
V            DO
V                "VIEW DATASET('BISG.CARDLIB(&MEMBER)')"
V                IF RC \= 0 THEN
V                    SAY 'ERROR: ' ZERRLM
V            END
VMEMBER NAME  CMPUTE
V /*REXX */
V PARSE ARG FORMULA
V INTERPRET 'RESULT = ' FORMULA
V IF SYSVAR('SYSISPF') = 'ACTIVE'
V    THEN DO
V         ZEDSMSG = RESULT
V         ZEDLMSG = FORMULA '==>' RESULT
V         'ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)'
V         END
V    ELSE SAY FORMULA '==>' RESULT
VMEMBER NAME  COLADD
V/* REXX */
V/*                                       */
V/* AUTHOR: Mark Zelden                   */
V/*                                       */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/*                                                                   */
V/* This EDIT macro totals numbers in a specified column range.       */
V/* An optional parameter of "HEX", "ZONE", "PACK", or "BIN" is       */
V/* needed to add hexadecimal, zoned decimal, packed decimal, or      */
V/* binary data. "DEC" is the default addition type.                  */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* Hexadecimal numbers to be added may be represented with or        */
V/* without an "X". In other words, x'1E' and 1E can both be          */
V/* processed and are treated the same.                               */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* The result is displayed as an ISPF short message in the top       */
V/* right hand corner in the same format as the addition type         */
V/* (decimal or hexadecimal). If extended help is chosen after        */
V/* the result is displayed (normally PF1), then the result is        */
V/* displayed in both decimal and hexadecimal and the average         */
V/* is also displayed.                                                */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* Line range labels can be used, and excluded lines are always      */
V/* omitted.                                                          */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/* COMMAND SYNTAX:                                                   */
V/*                                                                   */
V/* COLADD begcol endcol <DEC | HEX | ZONE | PACK | BIN> (.L1) (.L2)  */
V/*                    ** DEC is the default                          */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*  ** NOTE 1: If using line range labels then DEC, HEX, ZONE,       */
V/*             PACK, or BIN must be specified as the 3rd positional  */
V/*             parameter.                                            */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*  ** NOTE 2: Excluded lines are ALWAYS omitted.                    */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*  ** NOTE 3: DEC, HEX, ZONE, PACK, and BIN may be abbreviated by   */
V/*             using one or more of their characters. HEX may also   */
V/*             be abbreviated as "X".                                */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/*  EXAMPLES:                                                        */
V/*         COLADD 10 25                                              */
V/*         COLADD 33 40 HEX                                          */
V/*         COLADD 25 30 DEC .A .B                                    */
V/*         COLADD 10 29 ZONE                                         */
V/*         COLADD 10 16 PACK                                         */
V/*         COLADD 40 44 BIN                                          */
V/*         COLADD 44 57 X .FROM .TO                                  */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/* LASTUPD = '04/19/2002'    */   /* date of last update             */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/* TRACE ?R */
VAddress ISREDIT
V"MACRO (begcol endcol type label1 label2)"
V /* Address ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"  */
V/***********************************************/
V/*   VERIFY INPUT PARAMETERS                   */
V/***********************************************/
Vbegcol = Translate(begcol) /* chage to upper case if alpha */
V"(width) = DATA_WIDTH "   /* length of line       */
Vwidth = Format(width)     /* remove leading zeros */
VIf begcol = '' then do
V  zedsmsg = 'MISSING PARAMETER'
V  zedlmsg = 'A BEGINNING COLUMN NUMBER',
V            'MUST BE SPECIFIED.'
V  Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"  /* msg - with alarm */
V  Exit 12
VEnd
VSelect
V  When Datatype(begcol,Number) = 1 & endcol = '' then do
V    zedsmsg = 'NO ENDING COLUMN'
V    zedlmsg = 'AN ENDING COLUMN NUMBER',
V              'MUST BE SPECIFIED.'
V    Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"        /* msg - with alarm */
V    Exit 12
V  End /* when */
V  When Datatype(begcol,Number) <> 1 | ,
V       Datatype(endcol,Number) <> 1 then do
V    zedsmsg = 'COL NUMBER NOT NUMERIC'
V    zedlmsg = 'THE BEGINNING AND ENDING COLUMN NUMBERS',
V              'MUST BE NUMERIC.'
V    Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"        /* msg - with alarm */
V    Exit 12
V  End /* when */
V  When Datatype(begcol,Number) =1 & Datatype(endcol,Number) =1 then do
V    If endcol < begcol then do
V      zedsmsg = 'END COL < START COL'
V      zedlmsg = 'THE ENDING COLUMN MUST BE GREATER THAN OR',
V                'EQUAL TO THE STARTING COLUMN.'
V      Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"      /* msg - with alarm */
V      Exit 12
V    End
V    If type = '' then type = 'DEC'        /* default add type is DEC */
V    else do
V      type = Translate(type)              /* change to upper case    */
V      If Abbrev('DECIMAL',type,1) = 0 & ,
V         Abbrev('HEXADECIMAL',type,1) = 0 & ,
V         Abbrev('ZONE',type,1) = 0 & ,
V         Abbrev('PACK',type,1) = 0 & ,
V         Abbrev('BIN',type,1) = 0 & ,
V         type <> 'X' then do
V        zedsmsg = 'INVALID ADDITION TYPE'
V        zedlmsg = 'ADDITION TYPE MUST BE "DEC", "HEX",' ,
V                  '"ZONE", "PACK", or "BIN".'
V        Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"    /* msg - with alarm */
V        Exit 12
V      End
V    End /* else do */
V    If begcol < 1 | endcol < 1 then do
V      zedsmsg = 'INVALID COLUMN NUMBER'
V      zedlmsg = 'ALL COLUMN SPECIFICATIONS MUST BE' ,
V                'BETWEEN 1 AND' width
V      Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"      /* msg - with alarm */
V      Exit 12
V    End
V    If begcol > width | endcol > width then do
V      zedsmsg = 'INVALID COLUMN NUMBER'
V      zedlmsg = 'ALL COLUMN SPECIFICATIONS MUST BE' ,
V                'BETWEEN 1 AND' width
V      Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"      /* msg - with alarm */
V      Exit 12
V    End
V  End /* when */
VEnd /* select */
V/***********************************************/
V/*   FIND OUT IF LABELS ARE BEING USED         */
V/***********************************************/
VCall FIND_LABELS
V/***************************************************/
V/* INITIALIZE VARIABLES NEEDED IN PROCESSING LOOP  */
V/***************************************************/
VNumeric digits 15                    /* default of 9 not enough      */
Vcount        = 0                     /* count of added lines         */
Vnot_counted  = 0                     /* count of "not counted" lines */
Vtotal        = 0                     /* total of numbers added       */
Vtgtlen       = endcol-begcol+1       /* length of mumbers to add     */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/*   Begin column addition loop                                      */
V/*********************************************************************/
VDo until lastln = firstln-1
V  /* copy the data in the current line to variable 'data1' */
V  "(data1) = LINE "firstln
V  "ISREDIT (chkexcl) = XSTATUS" firstln
V  If chkexcl = "NX" then do       /* only process non-excluded lines */
V    add_data = Substr(data1,begcol,tgtlen) /* find data              */
V    If add_data = '' then do       /* no data within cols specified  */
V      warnmsg = "'*** WARNING - NEXT LINE WAS NOT COUNTED ***'"
V      "ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE" firstln "= NOTELINE " warnmsg
V      not_counted = not_counted + 1 /* bump up "not counted" counter */
V      firstln = firstln + 1        /* bump up line counter           */
V      iterate                      /* get next record                */
V    End /* if add_data = '' */
V    count = count + 1             /* add one to line count           */
V    Signal on SYNTAX /* trap errors */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    /*   Binary data                                                 */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    If Abbrev('BIN',type,1) <> 0 then ,          /* add bin numbers  */
V      add_data = C2d(add_data)                   /* convert to dec   */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    /*   Packed decimal data                                         */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    If Abbrev('PACK',type,1) <> 0 then do /* add packed dec numbers  */
V      add_data = Strip(add_data)                   /* remove blanks  */
V      add_data = C2x(add_data)                     /* convert to hex */
V      len_add_data = Length(add_data)              /* length of data */
V      sign     = Substr(add_data,len_add_data,1)   /* sign portion   */
V      If Verify(sign,'CFD') <> 0 then do           /* valid sign?    */
V        warnmsg = "'*** ERROR - NEXT LINE HAS BAD SIGN ***'"
V        "ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE" firstln "= NOTELINE " warnmsg
V        zedsmsg = 'CAN''T ADD LINE' firstln
V        zedlmsg = 'ERROR - THE DATA TO ADD ON LINE' firstln 'IS NOT',
V                  'VALID PACKED DECIMAL - BAD SIGN.'
V        Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"  /* msg - with alarm   */
V        Exit 12
V      End  /* If Verify(sign */
V      add_data = Left(add_data,len_add_data-1)     /* remove sign    */
V      If sign = 'D' then add_data = '-' || add_data /* negative num  */
V    End /* If Abbrev('PACK' */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    /*   Zoned decimal data                                          */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    If Abbrev('ZONE',type,1) <> 0 then do /* add zone dec. numbers   */
V      add_data = Strip(add_data)                   /* remove blanks  */
V      len_add_data = Length(add_data)              /* length of data */
V      zone     = Substr(add_data,len_add_data,1)   /* zone portion   */
V      add_data = Substr(add_data,1,len_add_data-1) /* non-zone part  */
V      If Datatype(add_data,N) <> 1 then ,          /* valid number?  */
V        call SYNTAX                        /* no, call error routine */
V      zonedtab = '0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR{}'
V      If Verify(zone,zonedtab) <> 0 then do      /* valid zone?      */
V        warnmsg = "'*** ERROR - NEXT LINE HAS BAD ZONE ***'"
V        "ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE" firstln "= NOTELINE " warnmsg
V        zedsmsg = 'CAN''T ADD LINE' firstln
V        zedlmsg = 'ERROR - THE DATA TO ADD ON LINE' firstln 'IS NOT',
V                  'VALID ZONED DECIMAL - BAD ZONE.'
V        Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"  /* msg - with alarm   */
V        Exit 12
V      End  /* If Verify(zone */
V      outxtab   = '012345678912345678912345678900'
V      add_xzone = Translate(zone,outxtab,zonedtab)
V      If Verify(zone,'JKLMNOPQR}') <> 0 then ,
V        add_data  = add_data ||  add_xzone       /* concat zone      */
V      Else
V        add_data  = '-' || add_data || add_xzone /* concat zone (neg)*/
V    End  /* If Abbrev('ZONE' */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    /*   Hexadecimal data                                            */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    If Abbrev('HEXADECIMAL',type,1) <> 0 | ,     /* add              */
V       type = 'X' then do                        /*     hex numbers  */
V      add_data = Translate(add_data,"","xX'") /* remove hex notation */
V      add_data = Strip(add_data)              /* remove blanks       */
V      add_data = X2d(add_data)                /* translate to dec.   */
V    End /* If Abbrev('HEXADECIMAL' */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    /*   Decimal data                                                */
V    /*****************************************************************/
V    total = total + add_data                /* add to prev. total    */
V  End /* of chkexcl */
V  firstln = firstln + 1                     /* bump up line counter  */
VEnd /* do until   */
V/*********************************************************************/
V/*   End column addition loop                                        */
V/*********************************************************************/
VIf not_counted = 0 then do /* all lines counted */
V  endmsg = 'ISRZ000'  /* message - no alarm     */
V  endrc  = 0          /* RC=0                   */
VEnd
VElse do               /* some lines not counted */
V  endmsg = 'ISRZ001'  /* message - with alarm   */
V  endrc  = 4          /* RC=4                   */
VEnd
VIf Abbrev('HEXADECIMAL',type,1) <> 0 | type = 'X' then do
V  zedsmsg = "Total = x'"D2x(total)"'"
V  zedlmsg = "Total = x'"D2x(total)"' ("total" decimal," ,
V               "Avg ="  Format(total / count,,5) / 1 || ")." ,
V            count "lines were counted (" || ,
V            not_counted "not counted)."
V  Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG("|| endmsg ||")"
V  Exit endrc
VEnd /* If abbrev */
VElse do
V  total   = total / 1   /* remove trailing zeros  */
V  zedsmsg = "Total =" total
V  If total >= 0 & total <  999999999999999 & ,
V     total=Trunc(total,0) then ,
V    zedlmsg = "Total =" total "(x'"D2x(total)"' hex)," ,
V               "Avg =" Format(total / count,,5) / 1 || "." ,
V               count "lines were counted (" || ,
V               not_counted "not counted)."
V  Else ,
V    zedlmsg = "Total =" total "(hex not available)," ,
V               "Avg =" Format(total / count,,5) / 1 || "." ,
V               count "lines were counted (" || ,
V               not_counted "not counted)."
V  Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG("|| endmsg ||")"
V  Exit endrc
VEnd /* else do */
V/*********************************/
V/*  Sub-routine to find labels   */
V/*********************************/
VFIND_LABELS:
VIf label1 = '' then do
V  firstln  = 1
V  "(lastln) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
VEnd
VElse do
V  If label2 = '' then label2 = label1
V  firstsv = 'NOTFOUND'
V  lastsv  = 'NOTFOUND'
V  label1 = Translate(label1)
V  label2 = Translate(label2)
V  "(saveln) = DISPLAY_LINES"
V  "UP MAX"
V  Do forever
V    "LOCATE LAB NEXT"
V    if rc <> 0 then leave
V    "(labline,junk) = DISPLAY_LINES"
V    "(lab,junk) = LABEL" labline
V    if lab = label1 then firstsv = labline
V    if lab = label2 then lastsv  = labline
V  End
V  /*                                             */
V  /* return display lines to original position   */
V  /*                                             */
V  "UP MAX"
V  If saveln <> 1 then "DOWN " saveln  /* don't scroll if at top */
V  /*                                             */
V  If firstsv = 'NOTFOUND'  then do
V    zedsmsg = 'RANGE LABEL ERROR'
V    zedlmsg = 'THE SPECIFIED RANGE LABEL "' || label1 '" WAS',
V              'NOT FOUND'
V    Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"  /* msg - with alarm */
V    Exit 12
V  End
V  If lastsv  = 'NOTFOUND'  then do
V    zedsmsg = 'RANGE LABEL ERROR'
V    zedlmsg = 'THE SPECIFIED RANGE LABEL "' || label2 '" WAS',
V              'NOT FOUND'
V    Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"  /* msg - with alarm */
V    Exit 12
V  End
V  If firstsv > lastsv then do
V    firstln = lastsv
V    lastln  = firstsv
V  End
V  Else do
V    firstln = firstsv
V    lastln  = lastsv
V  End
VEnd
VReturn
V/*********************************/
V/*  error sub-routine            */
V/*********************************/
VSYNTAX:
Vwarnmsg = "'*** ERROR - NEXT LINE HAS BAD DATA ***'"
V"ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE" firstln "= NOTELINE " warnmsg
Vzedsmsg = 'CAN''T ADD LINE' firstln
Vzedlmsg = 'ERROR - THE DATA TO ADD ON LINE' firstln 'IS NOT',
V          'VALID FOR THE ADDITION TYPE.'
VAddress ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"    /* msg - with alarm */
VExit 12
V
VMEMBER NAME  COLS
V/************************* REXX ***********************************
V *
V * THIS REXX WAS WRITTEN SO THAT YOU CAN TYPE COLS ON THE COMMAND
V * LINE IN AN EDIT SESSION JUST LIKE YOU DO IN A BROWSE SESSION,
V * INSTEAD OF HAVING TO PUT COLS ON A LINE NUMBER.
V * WRITTEN 02/1993 BY JEFFREY A. RICE...
V *
V ******************************************************************/
VTRACE O
VDEFINE = MSG("OFF")
VADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
VADDRESS ISREDIT
V"MACRO"
V"(MACLVL) = MACRO_LEVEL"
VIF MACLVL  =  001  THEN DO
V   COUNTER = 1
V   "(WIDTH) = DATA_WIDTH"
V/*
V * CHECK FOR NUMBER ON COB MODE  -  IF SO THEN NUMBERS ARE TO BE
V * REDUCED BY 6 BECAUSE THE EDITOR IGNORES COLUMNS 1-6
V */
V   "(NUM1,NUM2) = NUMBER"
V   IF NUM1  =  "ON"  &  POS(" COBOL ",NUM2)  >  0  THEN DO
V      COUNTER = COUNTER + 6
V      WIDTH = WIDTH + 6
V   END
V/*
V * BUILD A COLUMNS LINE FOR THE WIDTH OF THE CURRENT EDIT SESSION.
V */
V   COLUMNS = ""
V   DO WHILE COUNTER <= WIDTH
V      IF RIGHT(COUNTER,1) = "0" THEN DO
V         COLUMNS = COLUMNS""LEFT(RIGHT(COUNTER,2),1)
V      END
V      ELSE DO
V         IF RIGHT(COUNTER,1) = "5" THEN
V            COLUMNS = COLUMNS"+"
V         ELSE
V            COLUMNS = COLUMNS"-"
V      END
V      COUNTER = COUNTER + 1
V   END
V/*
V * DISPLAY COLUMNS LINE BUILT
V */
V   "LINE_BEFORE .ZCSR = INFOLINE '"COLUMNS"'"
V   "UP 1"
VEND
VELSE DO
V   ZEDLMSG = "%COLS CAN ONLY BE EXECUTED AS AN EDIT MACRO FROM",
V             "AN EDIT SESSION."
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEND
VEXIT
V
V
VMEMBER NAME  COM
V/* REXX COM                                                           */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* COM     : To comment JCL or COBOL                                  */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O' & OPT \= '?')  THEN
V     DO
V          ZEDSMSG = "SPECIFY 'COM ?' FOR HELP"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
VIF OPT = '?' THEN DO
V  zerrtp = 'CRITICAL'
V  zerrlm   = ,
V  left(        "  Comment Edit Macro Help                         ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Utility        : To comment JCL or COBOL        ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Syntax         : COM S/O/?                      ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Line Command   : J for JCL/C for COBOL          ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  S Shifts lines being commented                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  O Overlays the * inplace 3/7                    ",80)
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ003)"
V  EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE J C"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG) = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V     IF RANG = 'C' & OPT = 'S' THEN
V        LINEBUF=INSERT('*',LINEBUF,6)
V     IF RANG = 'C' & OPT = 'O' THEN
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('*',LINEBUF,7,1)
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'S' THEN
V        LINEBUF=INSERT('*',LINEBUF,2)
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'O' THEN
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('*',LINEBUF,3,1)
V
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) COMMENTED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  COMPACT
V/* Rexx                                                               */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* COMPACT : tso compact ﾝdsnlvlｨ ﾝ.ｨ                                 */
V/* Notice  : Migrated datasets are excluded                           */
V/*         : space or . will default your userid as dsn level         */
V/*         : Does not augment sysextents                              */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
Vtrace off
Varg hlq
Vif  hlq = '?' then signal assist
Vif  hlq = ''  then hlq = userid()
Vif  hlq = '.' then hlq = userid()
Va = ')|/_\|!0o..o0!|\_/|('
Vf = 1
Vcall tempdsn co tempdd tempdsn
Vif result = 'ERROR' then exit
Vaddress ispexec
VCONTROL ERRORS RETURN
VZWINTTL=' Defrag Diskfiles '
V"vput (ZWINTTL)"
V"CONTROL DISPLAY LOCK"
V"ADDPOP COLUMN(6) ROW(3)"
V"DISPLAY PANEL(FRAGPNL)"
Vindx = 1
Vcompact. = ''
Vqueue "*** Disk Files Compressed in the Session ***"
VX = OUTTRAP('OUT.','*','NOCONCAT')
Vaddress tso "LISTC LVL('"hlq"')"
VX = OUTTRAP(OFF)
VDo I=1 by 1 while I <= OUT.TRAPPED
V  if pos('GDG BASE',out.i) > 0  then nop
V  else do
V       parse value out.i with . . dsname .
V       x = listdsi("'"dsname"'" directory norecall)
V       if sysdsorg = 'PO' & (sysmembers > 0) then do
V          pdsout  = dsname
V          statout = 'Being compressed....'
V          fun = substr(a,f,1);ZEDSMSG = fun;"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";f=f+1;
V          if f = 18 then f =1
V          "CONTROL DISPLAY LOCK"
V          "DISPLAY PANEL(FRAGPNL)"
V          call defragmentor
V          queue dsname
V          statout = 'Compressed!' 'Return code =' RC
V          fun = substr(a,f,1);ZEDSMSG = fun;"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";f=f+1;
V          if f = 18 then f =1
V          "CONTROL DISPLAY LOCK"
V          "DISPLAY PANEL(FRAGPNL)"
V       end
V  end
VEnd
Vqui :
Vdrop compact.
V"REMPOP"
Vqueue "//eol"
Vqueue ""
Vaddress tso "EXECIO * DISKW" tempdd "(FINIS"
V"ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET("tempdsn")"
Vaddress tso
VIF LENGTH(tempdd) > 7 THEN "FREE DD("tempdd") DELETE"
VExit 0
V
Vdefragmentor : procedure expose dsname
V  FILEN ="'"||dsname||"'"
V  address tso
V  "ALLOC F(INPUT) DS("FILEN") REUSE OLD"
V  address ispexec
V  'LMINIT  DATAID('DATAID') DDNAME(INPUT) ENQ(EXCL)'
V  'LMCOMP  DATAID('DATAID')'
V  'LMFREE  DATAID('DATAID')'
V  return
V
Vassist :
Vaddress ispexec
VZEDLMSG = 'Format : "tso compact _highlevelqual_"' || ' . to default'
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VExit 0
V
VTEMPDSN : PROCEDURE EXPOSE CUECHAR TEMPDD TEMPDSN
VARG CUECHAR
VCUECHAR = SUBSTR(CUECHAR,1,2)
VD = DATE(J);P = SYSVAR(SYSPREF);
VR1 = RANDOM(100,999);R2 = RANDOM(100,999);
VT = TIME();PARSE VALUE T WITH HH ':' MM ':' SS;TT=HH||MM||SS
VTEMPDSN = CUECHAR||D||'.T'||R1||TRUNC(R1*R2/RANDOM()/10)||'.Z'||TT
VNT = TEMPDSN
VTEMPDD  = CUECHAR ||R2||R1
V"ALLOC DS("NT") DD("TEMPDD") DSORG(PS) LRECL(80) RECFM(F) NEW KEEP"
VIF RC \= 0 THEN DO
V       "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V       RESULT = 'ERROR'
V       EXIT
VEND
VRETURN
VMEMBER NAME  COMREX
V/* REXX COMREX                                                        */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* COMREX  : To comment REXX                                          */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O' & OPT \= '?')  THEN
V     DO
V          ZEDSMSG = "'COMREX ?' FOR HELP"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
VIF OPT = '?' THEN DO
V  zerrtp = 'CRITICAL'
V  zerrlm   = ,
V  left(        "  Comment Edit Macro Help                         ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Utility        : To comment REXX                ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Command Format : COMREX S/O/?                   ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Line Command   : P                              ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  S Shifts lines being commented                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  O Overlays the /* */inplace 1/72                ",80)
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ003)"
V  EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE P"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG) = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V
V     IF RANG = 'P' & OPT = 'S' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=INSERT('/*',LINEBUF,0,2)
V        LINEBUF=INSERT('*/',LINEBUF,70,2)
V     END
V     IF RANG = 'P' & OPT = 'O' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('/*',LINEBUF,1,2)
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('*/',LINEBUF,71,2)
V     END
V
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) COMMENTED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  COMSQL
V/* REXX COMSQL                                                        */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* COMREX  : To comment SQL                                           */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O' & OPT \= '?')  THEN
V     DO
V          ZEDSMSG = "'COMSQL ?' FOR HELP"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
VIF OPT = '?' THEN DO
V  zerrtp = 'CRITICAL'
V  zerrlm   = ,
V  left(        "  Comment Edit Macro Help                         ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Utility        : To comment SQL                 ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Syntax         : COMSQL S/O/?                   ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Line Command   : Q                              ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  S Shifts lines being commented                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  O Overlays the - inplace 1-3                    ",80)
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ003)"
V  EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE Q"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG) = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V
V     IF RANG = 'Q' & OPT = 'S' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=INSERT('---',LINEBUF,0,3)
V     END
V     IF RANG = 'Q' & OPT = 'O' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('---',LINEBUF,1,3)
V     END
V
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) COMMENTED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  COPYGET
V/* REXX TSO BATCH =================================================*/
V/*                                                                 */
V/*  COPYGET - Expands COBOL copies into an output file.            */
V/*  Copies can be nested. The following DDnames must be allocated: */
V/*    INFILE0 - Primary COBOL input file.                          */
V/*    OUTFILE - Output file with expanded copies.                  */
V/*    COPYLIBS- File containing a list of PDS where copies reside. */
V/*                                                                 */
V/*  The optional argument 'SUPPRESS=YES' means that copies         */
V/*  with the SUPPRESS keywork are not expanded to the output file. */
V/*  Return codes: 0 - All OK.  4 - One or more copies not found.   */
V/*=================================================================*/
V
Varg option .
Vif  option = "SUPPRESS=YES" then suppress = 1
V                            else suppress = 0
Vdo x = 1 to 100
V   execio 1 diskr copylibs
V   if rc <>0 then leave x
V   pull lib.x  .
Vend
Vlib.0 = x-1
V
Vk = 0
Vstep_retcod = 0
Vinf = infile0
Vdo alpha = 0
V   execio 1 diskr inf
V   if rc <> 0 then do
V      if k = 0 then leave alpha
V      call deallocate
V      iterate alpha
V   end
V   parse pull linha
V   linha7 = substr(linha,7)
V   if word(linha7,1)= "COPY" then do
V      if suppress=1 & left(word(linha7,3),8)="SUPPRESS" then do
V         say ">>>  Copy Suppressed: " word(linha7,2)
V      end
V      else do
V         call allocate
V         if result = 0 then linha = overlay("*",linha,7)
V      end
V   end
V   queue linha
V   execio 1 diskw outfile
Vend
Vexit step_retcod
V
V/*=================================================================*/
V
Vallocate:
V retcod = 0
V membro = strip(word(linha7,2),,".")
V k = k+1
V inf = infile||k
V do j = 1 to lib.0
V    nome = lib.j"("membro")"
V    if sysdsn(nome) = "OK" then do
V       "alloc da('"nome"') dd("inf") shr"
V       leave j
V    end
V end
V if j > lib.0 then do
V    say "==== COPY NOT FOUND:  " membro
V    k = k-1
V    inf = infile||k
V    retcod = 4
V    step_retcod = 4
V end
V else do
V    say ">>>  Copy expanded from " nome
V end
Vreturn retcod
V
Vdeallocate:
V "execio 0 diskr" inf "(finis"
V "free dd("inf")"
V k = k-1
V inf = infile||k
Vreturn
VMEMBER NAME  COPYPDS
V /* rexx    */
V /* THIS REXX COPIES MEMBERS FROM ONE PDS TO ANOTHER */
V /* THE MEMBER NAMES CAN BE WILDCARDED, E.G. 'A*'    */
V /* TRACE A */
V address ispexec
V
V /*indd    = <give the name of the input pds>
V   outdd   = <give the name of the output pds>
V   mem     = <give the member pattern like m*>
V */
V
V indd    = TRVIGIL.Z.PDS1
V outdd   = TRVIGIL.Z.PDS2
V mem     = 'A*'
V "LMINIT    DATAID("inddid")  DATASET('"indd"')  ENQ(SHR)"
V  IF RC = 0 THEN DO
V    "LMINIT DATAID("outddid") DATASET('"outdd"') ENQ(SHR)"
V     IF RC = 0 THEN DO
V       "LMCOPY FROMID("inddid") FROMMEM("mem") TODATAID("outddid") REPLACE"
V        IF RC = 0 THEN SAY 'COPIED...'
V        ELSE           SAY 'UNABLE TO LMCOPY. RC=' RC
V     END
V     ELSE
V        SAY 'UNABLE TO LMINIT PDS='outdd 'RC=' RC
V  END
V  ELSE
V     SAY 'UNABLE TO LMINIT PDS='indd 'RC=' RC
V
V exit 0
VMEMBER NAME  COPYPEND
V/* REXX */                                                              0000010
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* COPYPEND: tso copypend                                             */
V/* Notice  : Displays results in stdout                               */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VM = 'TSIN*'                                                             0000040
VG = 'X'                                                                 0000040
Vaddress ispexec                                                         0000030
VZWINTTL='* Select DB2 Subsystem *'                                      0000040
V"vput (ZWINTTL)"                                                        0000040
Vaddress ispexec "addpop"                                                0000040
Vaddress ispexec "display panel(DB2SPNL)"                                0000040
Vupper cname                                                             0000040
Vselect
V  when cname  = 'A' then subsys = TEST
V  when cname  = 'B' then subsys = PROD
V  otherwise nop
Vend
Vredo:
Vaddress ispexec                                                         0000030
VZWINTTL='* Select tablespace/database *'                                0000040
V"vput (ZWINTTL)"                                                        0000040
Vaddress ispexec "addpop"                                                0000040
Vaddress ispexec "display panel(DB2TPNL)"                                0000040
Vupper cname                                                             0000040
Vselect
V  when cname  = 'C' then dbase = INSTANC1
V  when cname  = 'D' then dbase = INSTANC2
V  when cname  = 'E' then dbase = INSTANC3
V  when cname  = 'F' then dbase = INSTANC4
V  otherwise nop
Vend
Vif M = '' then do
V   address ispexec "rempop all"
V   signal redo
Vend
Vupper G
Vif G = 'X' | G ='S' then
V   restrict = 'R'
Velse
V   restrict = 'X'
Vupper M
Vtspace = M
Vaddress tso "DB2PEND" subsys dbase tspace restrict                      0000040
Vaddress ispexec "rempop all"
Vexit                                                                    0000040
VMEMBER NAME  COUNT
V/* REXX COUNT
V   TSO and/or ISPF ONLY
V   REXX command to count records if sequential,
V       count members if a pds
V
V   to use:
V   COUNT the-dataset-to-be-counted
V
V   IF INPUT IS SEQUENTIAL, COUNTS RECORDS
V   IF INPUT IS A PDS, COUNTS MEMBERS
V   NO OTHER TYPES OF INPUT WILL WORK.
V
V   FOR TSO/ISPF ONLY
V
V  for REXX information, Sample Code, books see
V
V                 HTTP://WWW.REXXFILES.COM
V
V
V
V  provided this entire comment is included
V
V*/
V
VARG DSN  .
VIF DSN = "" THEN SIGNAL ADIOS
V
VSYSDSORG = ""
VCALL LISTDSI DSN "DIRECTORY" "RECALL"
V
VIF SYSDSORG = "PS" THEN DO
V  NAME_TO_COUNT = TRANSLATE(DSN," ","'")
V  NAME_TO_COUNT = SPACE(NAME_TO_COUNT,0)
V  "ALLOC DSN(*) DDN(SYSPRINT) REUSE"
V  "ALLOC DDN(INFILE) SHR REUSE DSN("DSN")"
V  "ALLOC DUMMY DDN(OUTFILE) REUSE  BLKSIZE(32000)"
V
V
V  CALL OUTTRAP "SYSPRINT." , "*"
V
V  "REPRO INFILE(INFILE) OUTFILE(OUTFILE) "
V  CALL OUTTRAP "OFF"
V
V  DO I = 1 TO SYSPRINT.0
V    /*SAY SYSPRINT.I*/
V    PARSE VAR SYSPRINT.I "WAS" RECORD_COUNT
V    IF DATATYPE(RECORD_COUNT) = "NUM" THEN LEAVE
V  END I
V
V  IF DATATYPE(SYSLRECL) = "NUM" THEN DO
V     SAY "RECORD COUNT  = " RECORD_COUNT
V     SAY "RECORD LENGTH = " SYSLRECL
V     SAY "BYTE COUNT    = " SYSLRECL * RECORD_COUNT
V     END
V
V  "ALLOC DDN(SYSIN) DSN(*) REUSE"
V  "ALLOC DDN(SYSPRINT) DSN(*) REUSE"
V  "FREE DDN(INFILE OUTFILE )"
V
V  EXIT
V  END /* FOR PS */
V
VIF SYSDSORG = "PO" THEN DO
VSAY SYSMEMBERS "MEMBERS IN PDS"
VEXIT
VEND
V
VIF SYSDSORG = "VS" THEN DO
VSAY "CANNOT COUNT RECORDS IN VSAM DATASET"
VEXIT
VEND
V
VADIOS:
VSAY "COUNT WILL COUNT RECORDS IN A SEQUENTIAL FILE"
VSAY "OR MEMBERS IN A PDS"
VSAY "ANYTHING ELSE, CAN'T DO"
VSAY "REEXECUTE. PUT COUNT TO LEFT OF DSNAME ON ISPF 3.4 DSLIST"
VEXIT
V
V/***
V   may be freely distributed
V    provided that this notice is attached.
V    See WWW.REXXFILES.COM and
V    http://www.touniteamerica.com/programming/index.html
V    I am an independant consultant and trainer.
V    For information write to gabe1@touniteamerica.com
V***/
VMEMBER NAME  COUNTX
V/***  REXX -- SHOW # RECORDS IN FILE (UNDER ISPF OPTION 3.4)  ***/
V   PARSE ARG ZINPDSN
V   IF SUBSTR(ZINPDSN,1,1) = '?' THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V   ISPEXEC VGET (ZDLRECFM) SHARED
V   ISPEXEC VGET (ZDLLRECL) SHARED
V   ISPEXEC VGET (ZDLBLKSZ) SHARED
V   ISPEXEC VGET (ZDLDSORG) SHARED
V   IF ZDLDSORG = "PS" | ZDLDSORG = "VS" | ZDLDSORG = "PS-E"
V      THEN DO
V         "ALLOC DD(INFILE)   DSN("ZINPDSN") SHR REUSE BUFNO(30)"
V         "ALLOC DD(OUTFILE)  DUMMY BLKSIZE(32000) REUSE"
V         "ALLOC DD(SYSPRINT) DSN(*) REUSE"
V         CALL OUTTRAP "SYSPRINT." , "*"
V         "REPRO INFILE(INFILE) OUTFILE(OUTFILE) "
V         CALL OUTTRAP "OFF"
V         DO II = 1 TO SYSPRINT.0
V            PARSE VAR SYSPRINT.II " WAS " #RECS
V            IF DATATYPE(#RECS) = "NUM" THEN LEAVE
V         END II
V         "FREE DD(INFILE OUTFILE)"
V         "ALLOC DD(SYSPRINT) DSN(*) REUSE"
V         $RECS = ""
V         DO JJ = 3 TO 21 BY 3 WHILE JJ < LENGTH(#RECS)
V            $RECS = "," || SUBSTR(#RECS,LENGTH(#RECS)-JJ+1,3) || $RECS
V         END
V         $RECS = SUBSTR(#RECS,1,LENGTH(#RECS)+3-JJ) || $RECS
V         FINPDSN = LEFT(SUBSTR(ZINPDSN,2,LENGTH(ZINPDSN)-2),44)
V         IF ZDLDSORG = "PS" THEN DO
V            SAY FINPDSN"("LEFT(ZDLRECFM,4,' ')"/"ZDLLRECL"/"ZDLBLKSZ")",
V               RIGHT($RECS,14)
V         END
V         ELSE DO
V            SAY FINPDSN RIGHT($RECS,14)
V         END
V      END
V      ELSE DO
V          SAY "DSORG" ZDLDSORG "IS NOT SUPPORTED..."
V       END
V    EXIT
V
V DISPDOC:
V    ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V    SAY "COUNTX - SHOW # OF RECORDS IN SEQ FILE UNDER DS LIST      "
V    SAY
V    SAY " FORMAT "
V    SAY
V    SAY "    COUNTX  ( ? )                                         "
V    SAY
V    SAY "       OVERTYPED ON A DS LIST SEQUENTIAL OR VSAM DATA SET,"
V    SAY "       COUNTX WILL DISPLAY THE DATA SET NAME (SINCE IT    "
V    SAY "       CAN BE INVOKED ON MULTIPLE LINES) AND THE NUMBER   "
V    SAY "       OF RECORDS IN THE FILE. IT WILL ALSO SUPPLY THE    "
V    SAY "       RECORD FORMAT, LOGICAL RECORD LENGTH AND BLOCK     "
V    SAY "       FOR SEQUENTIAL DATASETS.                           "
V    EXIT(1)
V
VMEMBER NAME  CRSD
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.CRS.BKP.DB2SRCO')
VMEMBER NAME  CRSS
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.CRS.BKP.SOURCE1O')
VMEMBER NAME  CRTGDG
VPROC 2 GDGNAME LMT
V /* CONTROL MSG      */
V /* CONTROL LIST */
V /* CONTROL CONLIST  */
V /* CONTROL SYMLIST  */
V    DEFINE GDG (NAME('&GDGNAME') LIMIT(&LMT) SCRATCH)
VEND
VMEMBER NAME  CUD
V/** REXX -- DYNAMICALLY CREATE CLEAN UP JCL AFTER CURSOR POSITION **/
V   SUBCOM ISPEXEC
V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY 'CUD EDIT MACRO CAN ONLY BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!'
V      EXIT(12)
V   END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   IF RC = 0 THEN DO
V      ADDRESS ISREDIT "ISREDIT MACRO (PARMS) NOPROCESS"
V      PARMS = TRANSLATE(PARMS)
V      IF PARMS = "?" THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      SAY 'CUD EDIT MACRO CAN ONLY BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!'
V      EXIT(12)
V   END
V
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "(LINE,COL) = CURSOR"
V   IF LINE = 1  THEN DO
V       ADDRESS ISPEXEC "VGET (ZSCREENC,ZSCREENI) SHARED"
V       II = INDEX(ZSCREENI,'* Top of Data *')
V       IF ( ZSCREENC % 80 )  <=  ( II % 80 )  THEN LINE = 0
V       ELSE LINE = 1
V   END
V   "PROCESS RANGE C"
V   IF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      "(TOP) = LINENUM .ZFIRST"
V      "(BOT) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      "(TOP) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE"
V      "(BOT) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE"
V   END
V
V   CARD4 = "//           DISP=(MOD,DELETE,DELETE),",
V      || "UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(TRK,0)"
V   CARD3 = "//DEL...     DD    DSN="
V   CARD2 = "//CLEANUP  EXEC  PGM=IEFBR14"
V   CARD1 = "//***"
V
V   ARRAY.0 = 0
V   DO II = TOP TO BOT
V      "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &II"
V      IF (POS('DISP=(,CAT',REC) <> 0 | POS('DISP=(NEW,CAT',REC) <> 0),
V            & SUBSTR(REC,1,3) <> '//*' THEN DO
V         JJ = POS('DSN=',REC)
V         IF JJ = 0 THEN DO
V            JJ = POS('DSNAME=',REC)
V            IF JJ <> 0 THEN JJ = JJ + 3
V         END
V         IF JJ = 0 THEN DO
V            XX = II - 1
V            "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V            DO WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,1,3) = '//*' | SUBSTR(REC,1,2) = '/*')
V               XX = XX - 1
V               "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V            END
V            DO KK = 71 TO 1 BY -1 WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ' ')
V            END KK
V            DO WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ',')
V               JJ = POS('DSN=',REC)
V               IF JJ = 0 THEN DO
V                  JJ = POS('DSNAME=',REC)
V                  IF JJ <> 0 THEN JJ = JJ + 3
V               END
V               IF JJ <> 0 THEN LEAVE
V               XX = XX - 1
V               "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V               DO WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,1,3) = '//*')
V                  XX = XX - 1
V                  "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V               END
V               DO KK = 71 TO 1 BY -1 WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ' ')
V               END KK
V            END
V            IF JJ = 0 THEN DO
V               XX = II
V               "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V               DO KK = 71 TO 1 BY -1 WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ' ')
V               END KK
V               DO WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ',')
V                  XX = XX + 1
V                  "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V                  DO WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,1,3) = '//*')
V                     XX = XX + 1
V                     "ISREDIT (REC) = LINE &XX"
V                  END
V                  JJ = POS('DSN=',REC)
V                  IF JJ = 0 THEN DO
V                     JJ = POS('DSNAME=',REC)
V                     IF JJ <> 0 THEN JJ = JJ + 3
V                  END
V                  IF JJ <> 0 THEN LEAVE
V                  DO KK = 71 TO 1 BY -1 WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) = ' ')
V                  END KK
V               END
V            END
V         END
V         IF JJ <> 0 THEN DO
V            JJ = JJ + 4
V            DO KK = (JJ+1) TO 71,
V               WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) <> ' ' & SUBSTR(REC,KK,1) <> ',')
V            END KK
V            IF SUBSTR(REC,kk-1,1) <> ')' THEN DO
V               ARRAY.0 = ARRAY.0 + 1
V               NN      = ARRAY.0
V               ARRAY.NN = SUBSTR(REC,JJ,KK-JJ)
V            END
V         END
V      END
V   END II
V
V   IF ARRAY.0 > 0 THEN "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (CARD1)"
V   DO II = ARRAY.0 TO 1 BY -1
V      "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (CARD4)"
V      CARD  = CARD3 || ARRAY.II || ','
V      PATCH = RIGHT(II,3,'0')
V      CARD  = OVERLAY(PATCH,CARD,6,3)
V      "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (CARD)"
V   END II
V
V   IF ARRAY.0 > 0 THEN DO
V      "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (CARD2)"
V      "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (CARD1)"
V   END
V   ELSE SAY "No 'NEW,CATLG' dispositions found; no JCL generated!"
V
V   IF LINE = 0 AND COL = 0 THEN EXIT(1)
V   ELSE DO
V      'ISREDIT CURSOR = ' LINE COL
V      EXIT(0)
V   END
V
VDISPDOC:
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V   SAY "CUD  -  DYNAMICALLY GENERATE CLEAN UP JCL AFTER CURSOR    "
V   SAY
V   SAY " FORMAT "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    CUD  ( ? )                                            "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       CREATE AN IEFBR14 WITH MOD/DELETE CARDS FOR EVERY  "
V   SAY "       NEW CATALOGED DATA SET IN THE FILE AND PLACE THEM  "
V   SAY "       IMMEDIATELY AFTER WHERE THE CURSOR IS POSITIONED.  "
V   SAY "       C/CC/C# MAY BE USED TO LIMIT THE SEARCH.           "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       A QUESTION MARK ALONE CAUSES THIS HELP TO DISPLAY. "
V   SAY
V   EXIT(1)
V
V
VMEMBER NAME  CURPOS
V/* REXX CURPOS                                                        */
VADDRESS "ISREDIT"
V"MACRO"
V"(DSPLINES) = DISPLAY_LINES"
V"(DSPCOLS)  = DISPLAY_COLS"
V"(L,C)      = CURSOR"
V
VSAY "DISPLAY_LINES =" DSPLINES + 0           /* REMOVE LEADING ZEROES */
VSAY "DISPLAY_COLS  =" DSPCOLS  + 0
VSAY "CURSOR LINE   =" L + 0
VSAY "CURSOR COLUMN =" C + 0
V
VIF   C    > 0                           /* CALCULATE RELATIVE CSR COL */
VTHEN CREL = C - DSPCOLS + 1
VELSE CREL = 0
V
VIF   L    > 0
VTHEN LREL = L - DSPLINES + 1           /* CALCULATE RELATIVE CSR LINE */
VELSE LREL = 0
V
VSAY "REL. CSR LINE =" LREL
VSAY "REL. CSR COL  =" CREL
V              DISPLAY_LINES = (DSPLINES)"
V              DISPLAY_COLS  = (DSPCOLS)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  CURRGEN
V/* REXX Get GDG absolute version from relative */
VArg gdgdsn
VIf Length(Arg) = 0 Then Exit 1
VAddress ISPEXEC
V"LMINIT DATAID(DATAID) DATASET('"gdgdsn"') ENQ(SHR)"
VIf RC > 0 Then Do
V   "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V   Exit RC
VEnd
V"LMQUERY DATAID("dataid") DDNAME(DDNAME)"
VW = Listdsi(ddname" DDNAME")
VSay Sysdsname
V"LMFREE DATAID("dataid")"
VExit 1
VMEMBER NAME  CX
V/* REXX exec to do cursor sensitive data extraction from an ISPF     */
V/*      Screen.                                                      */
V/*      Uses undocumented/Unsupported variables zscreeni & Zscreenc  */
V/*      available in ISPF for OS/390 R2.5 (ISPF4.5).                 */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------ */
V/* ---> NOTE: ZSCREENI and ZSCREENC may give odd results in some     */
V/* --->       situations such as command line at the bottom!!!!      */
V/* --->       If this is a problem, force a call to subroutine       */
V/* --->       GET_ZSCREEN_VALUES instead of using ISPF's variables.  */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------ */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*      Screen image may translate attr bytes to dsn chars causing   */
V/*      extra characters like '#' to be added to the dsname          */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*      Will not work in popups if invoked with the SUSPEND keyword. */
V/*      Note that the default command table entry for TSO does have  */
V/*      the SUSPEND keyword.                                         */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*      Usage:                                                       */
V/*        Name this VCURSOR, set a pfkey to VCURSOR and              */
V/*        create a command table entry:                              */
V/*            VCURSOR   0  SELECT CMD(%VCURSOR)                      */
V/*        (Or setting pfkey to TSO %VCURSOR will work in most cases) */
V/*        Then place cursor on dsname and press the pf key.          */
V/*        ZSCREENC may be wrong if initial command doesn't start     */
V/*        with a percent or have MODE(FSCR) on the SELECT statement. */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*      Author : Doug Nadel  April 24, 1999                          */
V/*      Updates: Apr 26, 1999 now views PDS members also.            */
V/*               Aug 18, Allow dsname in parentheses.                */
V/*                       Added additional information re MODE(FSCR). */
V/*                       Bypass ZSCREENI and ZSCREENC if needed.     */
V/*                       (ISPF version <4.5 but will work in 4.5+)   */
V/*               March 31, 2000 Added basic recognition of GDG names */
V/*                              and view/edit/browse customization   */
V/*               April 3, 2000  Added prompt panel.                  */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------ */
V/*       Customization to set service to view edit or browse         */
V/*       or to use prompt panel.                                     */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------ */
Vservice='EDIT'                       /* set to VIEW, EDIT, or BROWSE */
V                                     /* or PROMPT.                   */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------ */
VAddress ispexec
V'VGET (ZSCREENI,ZSCREENC,ZENVIR)'      /* Extract screen image,
V                                          cursor pos and ISPF level  */
VIf substr(zenvir,5,4) <4.5 Then
V  Call get_zscreen_values
Vtrtable='abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'   /* Setup valid dsname chars   */
Vtrtable=trtable||translate(trtable)||'$#@0123456789.''-{()'
Vtrtable=translate(xrange('00'x,'FF'x),,trtable,' ')
Vzscreeni=translate(zscreeni,,trtable,' ') /* Remove non-Dsn chars    */
VIf substr(zscreeni,zscreenc+1,1) <> ' ' Then /* Maybe csr on dsn     */
V  Do                                   /* Extract dsn from screen image
V                                          and view dataset           */
V    name=word(substr(zscreeni,1+lastpos(' ',zscreeni,zscreenc)),1)
V    name=translate(strip(substr(name,1,56))) /* Max of 56 char name  */
V    If substr(name,1,1)='(' Then
V      Parse Var name '('name')'.
V    Parse Var name dsn '('mem')'       /* Is there a member name?    */
V    omem=mem
V    If mem<>'' Then                    /* If so, reformat for view
V                                          cmd                        */
V      Do
V        gdg=0
V        name=dsn                       /* Get dsn                    */
V        If substr(name,1,1)='''' Then  /* if original name started with
V                                          quotes                     */
V          name=name''''                /* Fix quotes                 */
V        If datatype(mem,'N') = 1 Then  /* Gdg?                       */
V          Do
V            Drop otrap.
V            Call outtrap 'otrap.'
V            Address tso 'LISTCAT ENT('name')' /* Get real gdg names  */
V            Call outtrap 'OFF'
V            If otrap.0>(2-2*mem) Then  /* If enough lines returned   */
V              Do
V                a=otrap.0-1+2*mem      /* Parse listcat output       */
V                n="'"subword(otrap.a,3,1)"'" /* Get real dsname      */
V                If sysdsn(n)='OK' Then /* Verify that ds exists      */
V                  Do                   /* If real gdg name exists    */
V                    name=n             /* Use rea name as dsname     */
V                    mem=''             /* Forget the member name     */
V                    omem=''            /* Forget the member name     */
V                    gdg=1              /* Indicate we forgot member
V                                          name                       */
V                  End
V              End
V          End
V        If gdg=0 Then                  /* If gdg check failed        */
V          mem='MEMBER('mem')'          /* Add member keyword for view*/
V      End
V    'CONTROL ERRORS RETURN'            /* Return errors to program   */
V    'LMINIT DATAID(VCURSOR) DATASET('name')' /* Alloc w/ Tso naming  */
V    If rc>0 & substr(name,1,1) <> "'" Then /* Alloc w/O tso name     */
V      'LMINIT DATAID(VCURSOR) DATASET('''name''')'
V    If rc=0 Then
V      Do
V        service=translate(service)
V        If service='PROMPT' Then
V          Call getservice
V        If service<>"" Then
V        service 'DATAID('vcursor')' mem    /* View the dataset     */
V      End
V    Else                               /* Allocs failed: Set original
V                                          message                    */
V      'LMINIT DATAID(VCURSOR) DATASET('name')'
V    If rc>7 Then
V      'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)'            /* If error, show messages    */
V    'LMFREE DATAID(&VCURSOR)'          /* Free ds if allocated       */
V  End
VElse                                   /* Cursor was not on a dsname */
V  Do                                   /* Give user an error message */
V    zerrsm = 'Invalid cursor position'
V    Parse Value '* YES The cursor was not on a data set name.',
V      With zerrhm zerralrm zerrlm
V    'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)'
V  End
VExit 0
Vget_zscreen_values:                    /* obtain the screen image    */
VAddress ispexec 'VGET (ZSCREENW,ZSCREEND)'
Vp = ptr(96+ptr(ptr(24+ptr(112+ptr(132+ptr(540))))))
Vzscreeni=translate(storage(d2x(p),,
V  zscreenw*zscreend),,xrange('00'x,'3f'x))
Vzscreenc = c2d(storage(,
V  d2x(164+ptr(ptr(24+ptr(112+ptr(132+ptr(540)))))),4))
VReturn
Vptr:  Return c2d(bitand(storage(d2x(Arg(1)),4),'7FFFFFFF'x))
Vgetservice: Procedure Expose service name omem
V'VGET ZSCREEN'
Vservice='EDIT'
Vdsn=name
VParse Source  . . me .
VIf omem <> "" Then
V  Do
V   If substr(dsn,1,1)='''' Then
V     dsn=substr(dsn,1,length(dsn)-1)'('omem')'''
V   Else
V     dsn=dsn'('omem')'
V  End
VAddress tso
Vddname='$VCSR$'zscreen
V'alloc f('ddname') reuse new del dso(po) dir(1) sp(1)' ,
V  'track recfm(f b) lrecl(80)'
VAddress ispexec
V'LMINIT DATAID(DID) DDNAME('ddname') ENQ(EXCLU)'
V'LMOPEN DATAID(&DID) OPTION(OUTPUT)'
VCall write ")ATTR"
VCall write "+ TYPE(NT)"
VCall write "@ TYPE(PT)"
VCall write "? TYPE(CH)"
VCall write "# TYPE(output) just(asis) caps(off)"
VCall write ")BODY WINDOW(60,14)"
VCall write "                  @Cursor Sensitive Action+"
VCall write "+%"
VCall write "+Dataset:+&DSN"
VCall write "+"
VCall write "?  Select action:"
VCall write "      _Z% 1. Edit"
VCall write "     %#VCAXXY      +"
VCall write "     %#VCAXXZ      +"
VCall write " "
VCall write "? Press%END?to cancel this action."
VCall write " "
VCall write "? To avoid this panel, modify your "me" exec."
VCall write ")INIT"
VCall write " VGET (VCACTNX) PROFILE"
VCall write " .ZVARS = 'VCACTNX'"
VCall write " &VCAXXY = '   2. View'"
VCall write " &VCAXXZ = '   3. Browse'"
VCall write ")REINIT"
VCall write " REFRESH(*)"
VCall write ")PROC"
VCall write " IF (.CURSOR = VCAXXY) &VCACTNX = '2' /* allow csr selct*/"
VCall write " IF (.CURSOR = VCAXXZ) &VCACTNX = '3'"
VCall write " VER (&VCACTNX, NB ,LIST,1,2,3)"
VCall write " IF (.MSG NE &Z) &VCACTNX=1"
VCall write " VPUT (VCACTNX) PROFILE"
VCall write ")END"
V'LMMADD DATAID(&DID) MEMBER(FOO)'
V'LMFREE DATAID(&DID)'
V'LIBDEF ISPPLIB LIBRARY ID('ddname')'
V'ADDPOP'
V'DISPLAY PANEL(FOO)'
VIf rc>0 Then service=""
VElse If vcactnx=2 Then service='VIEW'
VElse If vcactnx=3 Then service='BROWSE'
V'REMPOP'
V'LIBDEF ISPPLIB'
VAddress tso
V'FREE F('ddname')'
VReturn
Vwrite:
VParse Arg p1
V"LMPUT DATAID(&DID) MODE(INVAR) DATALOC(P1) DATALEN(80)"
VReturn
V
VMEMBER NAME  C2J
V /* REXX */
VC2J:        /*  CALENDAR TO JULIAN REXX function  */
VARG caldate
V  VERSION=" VER:001 09/20/91 "
V  JULDATE=99999
V  RELATIVE=99999
V  IF CALDATE='' THEN
V         SIGNAL EXIT
V  LEN=LENGTH(CALDATE)
V  IF LEN = 6 THEN DO
V       MM = SUBSTR(CALDATE,1,2)
V       DD = SUBSTR(CALDATE,3,2)
V       YY = SUBSTR(CALDATE,5,2)
V       SIGNAL EDIT
V  END
V  IF LEN = 8 & ,
V       SUBSTR(CALDATE,3,1) = '/' & SUBSTR(CALDATE,6,1) = '/' THEN DO
V           MM = SUBSTR(CALDATE,1,2)
V           DD = SUBSTR(CALDATE,4,2)
V           YY = SUBSTR(CALDATE,7,2)
V           SIGNAL EDIT
V  END
V  SIGNAL EXIT
V
VEDIT:
V  IF DATATYPE(MM) = 'CHAR' | MM < 1 | MM > 12 THEN
V     SIGNAL EXIT
V  IF DD < 1 | DD > 31 THEN
V     SIGNAL EXIT
V  IF (MM = 9 | MM = 4 | MM = 6 | MM = 11) & DD > 30 THEN
V             SIGNAL EXIT
V  IF DATATYPE(YY) = 'CHAR' THEN
V    SIGNAL EXIT
V  IF MM <> 2 THEN
V       SIGNAL JUL
V  IF VALUE(YY//4) = 0 & DD > 29 THEN
V       SIGNAL EXIT
V  IF VALUE(YY//4) <> 0 & DD > 28 THEN
V       SIGNAL EXIT
V
VJUL:
V  DDD=SUBSTR('000031059090120151181212243273304334',MM*3-2,3)
V  DDD=DDD + DD
V  IF VALUE(YY//4) = 0 & MM > 2 THEN
V        DDD = DDD + 1
V  L = LENGTH(DDD)
V  JULDATE = X00||DDD
V  JULDATE =YY||SUBSTR(JULDATE,L+1,3)
V
VEXIT:
V  RETURN JULDATE
VMEMBER NAME  C2JCL
V/* REXX */
VADDRESS ISREDIT
V    MACRO
V    "ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL 1 2 '&&'"
V    "ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL 1 1 '.'"
V    "ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL 1 2 '  '"
V    "ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL 1 2 'JC'"
V    "ISREDIT DELETE  ALL X"
V    "ISREDIT CHANGE  ALL .ZF .ZL 1 2 P'==' '//'"
VMEMBER NAME  DATECON
V /* REXX */
V /*         EXEC DISPLAYS CURRENT DATE & TIME */
V /*                   */
V SAY ' '
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(U) '    JULIAN : 'DATE(J)
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(S)
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(W)
V SAY ' '
V SAY '                   TIME:  'TIME()
V SAY ' '
V TODAY = DATE('B')   /* TODAY'S DATE IN BASEDATE FORMAT */
V SAY ' TODAY IS ' TODAY
V SAY '120 DAYS FROM TODAY IS' DATECONV(TODAY, 'B', 'N')
V WEEKDAY1 = DATE('WEEKDAY', '10/01/03', 'USA')
V SAY ' OCT 01 2003 ' WEEKDAY1
V EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  DATECONV
V*       PDX    - DATECONV C0206984 06/07/04 12:56:11 TBCAKRA
V*       PDX    - DATECONV C0194475 08/29/03 10:49:34 TBTHSTA
V*          DATA SET DATECONV   AT LEVEL 002 AS OF 04/02/79
V*              *              DATECONV SUBROUTINE                       00001
V*              *                                                        00002
V*              *    THE PURPOSE OF THIS SUBROUTINE IS TO CONVERT        00003
V*              *    CALENDAR DATES MMDDYY TO JULIAN YYDDD OR            00004
V*              *    VISA-VERSA.                                         00005
V*              *                                                        00006
V*              * A. TO CONVERT CALENDAR TO JULIAN                       00007
V*              *       CALL 'DCALJUL' USING CALDATE-MMDDYY,             00008
V*              *                            JULDATE-YYDDD.              00009
V*              *                                                        00010
V*              *         UPON EXECUTION OF ROUTINE JULDATE WILL         00011
V*              *              CONTAIN HEX FF IF CALDATE WAS INVALID OR  00012
V*              *              THE JULIAN DATE.                          00013
V*              *                                                        00014
V*              *                                                        00015
V*              * B. TO CONVERT JULIAN TO CALENDER                       00016
V*              *       CALL 'DJULCAL' USING JULDATE-YYDDD,              00017
V*              *                            CALDATE-MMDDYY.             00018
V*              *                                                        00019
V*              *         UPON EXECUTION OF ROUTINE CALDATE WILL         00020
V*              *              CONTAIN HEX FF IF JULDATE WAS INVALID OR  00021
V*              *              THE CALENDAR DATE.                        00022
V*              *                                                        00023
V*              * NOTE: ALWAY MAKE AN INCLUDE CARD FOR DATECONV.         00024
V         EJECT                                                          00025
VDATECONV START 0                                                        00026
VDATECONV AMODE ANY                                                      00026
V         EQUREG                                                         00027
V         ENTRY DJULCAL,DCALJUL                                          00028
V         USING DATECONV,R11                                             00029
V         USING JULIAN,R2                                                00030
V         USING CALENDAR,R3                                              00031
V         BR    R14                                                      00032
V*                                                                       00033
V         USING *,R15                                                    00034
V* DCALJUL - CONVERT CALENDAR DATE MMDDYY TO JULIAN DATE YYDDD           00035
VDCALJUL  EQU   *                                                        00036
V         SAVE  (14,12)                  SAVE USERS REGS                 00037
V         BAL   R14,INITIAL                                              00038
V         DROP  R15                                                      00039
V         BAL   R12,SAVELOAD                                             00040
V           COPY MSGASMA                                                 00041
V         L     R3,0(R1)                                                 00042
V         L     R2,4(R1)                                                 00043
V         MVC   TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-L'CALDATE(L'CALDATE),CALDATE           00044
V         BAL   R12,NUMTEST                                              00045
V         CLC   CALDATE,TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-L'CALDATE                      00046
V         BNE   CALERR                                                   00047
V         PACK  PACKFLD,CALMONTH                                         00048
V         CP    PACKFLD,P1                                               00049
V         BL    CALERR                                                   00050
V         CP    PACKFLD,P12                                              00051
V         BH    CALERR                                                   00052
V         CVB   R5,PACKFLD                                               00053
V         MH    R5,H2                                                    00054
V         PACK  PACKFLD,CALYEAR                                          00055
V         BAL   R12,LEAPTEST                                             00056
V         A     R5,TBLADDR                                               00057
V         ZAP   PACKWORK,0(2,R5)                                         00058
V         SH    R5,H2               DECREMENT TO PRIOR ENTRY             00059
V         SP    PACKWORK,0(2,R5)                                         00060
V         PACK  PACKFLD,CALDAY                                           00061
V         CP    PACKFLD,P1                                               00062
V         BL    CALERR                                                   00063
V         CP    PACKFLD,PACKWORK                                         00064
V         BH    CALERR                                                   00065
V         AP    PACKFLD,0(2,R5)                                          00066
V         UNPK  JULDAY,PACKFLD                                           00067
V         OI    JULDAY+2,X'F0'                                           00068
V         MVC   JULYEAR,CALYEAR                                          00069
V         B     RETURN                                                   00070
VCALERR   MVI   JULDATE,X'FF'                                            00071
V         MVC   JULDATE+1(L'JULDATE-1),JULDATE                           00072
V         B     RETURN                                                   00073
V* DJULCAL - CONVERT JULIAN DATE YYDDD TO CALENDAR DATE MMDDYY           00074
VDJULCAL  EQU   *                                                        00075
V         USING *,R15                                                    00076
V         SAVE  (14,12)                                                  00077
V         BAL   R14,INITIAL                                              00078
V         DROP  R15                                                      00079
V         BAL   R12,SAVELOAD                                             00080
V         LM    R2,R3,0(R1)                                              00081
V         MVC   TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-L'JULDATE(L'JULDATE),JULDATE           00082
V         BAL   R12,NUMTEST                                              00083
V         CLC   JULDATE,TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-L'JULDATE                      00084
V         BNE   JULERR                                                   00085
V         PACK  PACKWORK,JULDAY                                          00086
V         CP    PACKWORK,P1                                              00087
V         BL    JULERR                                                   00088
V         PACK  PACKFLD,JULYEAR                                          00089
V         BAL   R12,LEAPTEST                                             00090
V         L     R4,TBLADDR                                               00091
V         LA    R5,13                                                    00092
VLOOKUP   CP    PACKWORK,0(2,R4)                                         00093
V         BH    INDEX                                                    00094
V         SR    R6,R6                                                    00095
V         LR    R7,R4                                                    00096
V         SH    R4,H2                                                    00097
V         SP    PACKWORK,0(2,R4)                                         00098
V         UNPK  CALDAY,PACKWORK                                          00099
V         OI    CALDAY+1,X'F0'                                           00100
V         S     R7,TBLADDR                                               00101
V         LA    R8,2                                                     00102
V         DR    R6,R8                                                    00103
V         CVD   R7,PACKFLD                                               00104
V         UNPK  CALMONTH,PACKFLD                                         00105
V         OI    CALMONTH+1,X'F0'                                         00106
V         MVC   CALYEAR,JULYEAR                                          00107
V         B     RETURN                                                   00108
VINDEX    LA    R4,2(R4)                                                 00109
V         BCT   R5,LOOKUP                                                00110
VJULERR   MVI   CALDATE,X'FF'                                            00111
V         MVC   CALDATE+1(L'CALDATE-1),CALDATE                           00112
V         B     RETURN                                                   00113
V*                                                                       00114
VSAVELOAD EQU   *                                                        00115
V         ST    R13,SAVE+4                                               00116
V         LA    R2,SAVE                                                  00117
V         ST    R2,8(R13)                                                00118
V         LR    R13,R2                                                   00119
V         LA    R2,NORMYR                                                00120
V         ST    R2,NORMADDR                                              00121
V         LA    R2,LEAPYR                                                00122
V         ST    R2,LEAPADDR                                              00123
V         BR    R12                                                      00124
V*                                                                       00125
VNUMTEST  EQU   *                                                        00126
V         NC    TESTFLD,HEX0F                                            00127
V         TR    TESTFLD,NUMTBL                                           00128
V         BR    R12                                                      00129
V*                                                                       00130
VLEAPTEST EQU   *                                                        00131
V         MVC   TBLADDR,NORMADDR                                         00132
V         CP    PACKFLD,P0                                               00133
V         BE    MVCLEAP                                                  00134
V         DP    PACKFLD,P4                                               00135
V         CP    PACKFLD+L'PACKFLD-L'P4(L'P4),P0                          00136
V         BCR   7,R12                                                    00137
VMVCLEAP  MVC   TBLADDR,LEAPADDR                                         00138
V         BR    R12                                                      00139
V*                                                                       00140
VINITIAL  EQU   *                                                        00141
V         BALR  R15,R0                                                   00142
V         USING *,R15                                                    00143
