V         L     R11,ADATECNV                                             00144
V         BR    R14                                                      00145
VADATECNV DC    A(DATECONV)                                              00146
V         DROP  R15                                                      00147
V*                                                                       00148
VRETURN   L     R13,SAVE+4                                               00149
V         RETURN (14,12),RC=0                                            00150**
V*                                                                       00151
VTESTFLD  DS    CL16                                                     00152
VHEX0F    DC    16X'0F'                                                  00153
VNUMTBL   DC    C'0123456789000000'                                      00154
VPACKFLD  DS    D                                                        00155
VP1       DC    P'1'                                                     00156
VP12      DC    P'12'                                                    00157
VP0       DC    P'0'                                                     00158
VH2       DC    H'2'                                                     00159
VH0       DC    H'0'                                                     00160
VLEAPDISP DS    H                                                        00161
VP4       DC    P'4'                                                     00162
VPACKWORK DS    PL8                                                      00163
VSAVE     DS    9D                                                       00164
VNORMADDR DS    F                                                        00165
VLEAPADDR DS    F                                                        00166
VTBLADDR  DS    F                                                        00167
V*                                                                       00168
VNORMYR   DC    X'000F'                                                  00169
V         DC    X'031F'                                                  00170
V         DC    X'059F'                                                  00171
V         DC    X'090F'                                                  00172
V         DC    X'120F'                                                  00173
V         DC    X'151F'                                                  00174
V         DC    X'181F'                                                  00175
V         DC    X'212F'                                                  00176
V         DC    X'243F'                                                  00177
V         DC    X'273F'                                                  00178
V         DC    X'304F'                                                  00179
V         DC    X'334F'                                                  00180
V         DC    X'365F'                                                  00181
V*                                                                       00182
VLEAPYR   DC    X'000F'                                                  00183
V         DC    X'031F'                                                  00184
V         DC    X'060F'                                                  00185
V         DC    X'091F'                                                  00186
V         DC    X'121F'                                                  00187
V         DC    X'152F'                                                  00188
V         DC    X'182F'                                                  00189
V         DC    X'213F'                                                  00190
V         DC    X'244F'                                                  00191
V         DC    X'274F'                                                  00192
V         DC    X'305F'                                                  00193
V         DC    X'335F'                                                  00194
V         DC    X'366F'                                                  00195
V*                                                                       00196
V         LTORG                                                          00197
V* DSECTS                                                                00198
VJULIAN   DSECT                                                          00199
VJULDATE  DS    0CL5                                                     00200
VJULYEAR  DS    CL2                                                      00201
VJULDAY   DS    CL3                                                      00202
V*                                                                       00203
VCALENDAR DSECT                                                          00204
VCALDATE  DS    0CL6                                                     00205
VCALMONTH DS    CL2                                                      00206
VCALDAY   DS    CL2                                                      00207
VCALYEAR  DS    CL2                                                      00208
V*                                                                       00209
V         END                                                            00210
VMEMBER NAME  DATENEW
V*       PDX    - DATENEW  C0194475 08/21/03 11:45:23 TBTHSTA
V*          DATA SET DATENEW    AT LEVEL 001 AS OF 01/11/91
V*********************************************************************** 00001
V*                                                                       00002
V*                   DATENEW - SUB-PROGRAM    A/O 1/91                   00003
V*                                                                       00004
V*                                                                       00005
V*        THE PURPOSE OF THIS SUBROUTINE IS TO TAKE A GIVEN              00006
V*        DATE-MMDDYYYY, AND A GIVEN NUMBER OF DAYS; PLUS OR             00007
V*        MINUS, AND CALCULATE THE NEW DATE RESULTING FROM               00008
V*        ADDITION OF THE NUMBER OF DAYS.                                00009
V*                                                                       00010
V*        THERE ARE 3 PARAMETERS PASSED                                  00011
V*                                                                       00012
V*                  A.   DATE - MMDDYYYY                                 00013
V*                                                                       00014
V*                  B.   NUM OF DAYS - 7 DIGITS *SIGNED*                 00015
V*                                                                       00016
V*                  C.   NEW-DATE  WHICH UPON COMPLETION OF THIS         00017
V*                          ROUTINE WILL CONTAIN EITHER                  00018
V*                             1. HEX FF'S IF DATE OR NUM OF DAYS        00019
V*                                 IS INVALID                            00020
V*                                            OR                         00021
V*                             2. THE NEW-DATE IN MMDDYYYY FORMAT        00022
V*********************************************************************** 00023
VDATENEW  CSECT                                                          00024
VDATENEW  AMODE ANY                                                      00024
V         EQUREG                                                         00025
V         USING *,R15                                                    00026
V         SAVE  (14,12),,*                                               00027
V         DROP  R15                                                      00028
V         BALR  R11,0                                                    00029
V         USING *,R11                                                    00030
V         LR    R2,R13                                                   00031
V         ST    R13,SAVE+4                                               00032
V         LA    R13,SAVE                                                 00033
V         ST    R13,8(R2)                                                00034
V         CNOP  0,4                                                      00035
V         B     BEGIN                                                    00036
VSAVE     DS    18F                                                      00037
VBEGIN    EQU   *                                                        00038
V         USING BASE,R2                                                  00039
V         USING DAYS,R3                                                  00040
V         USING NEW,R4                                                   00041
V         COPY  MSGASMA                                                  00042
V         LM    R2,R4,0(R1)                                              00043
V         COBLOAD1 G2AJUL
V         COBLOAD1 AJUL2G
VSETBASE  MVC   WORKCAL,BASEDATE                                         00044
V*        CALL  G2AJUL,(WORKCAL,WORKJUL),VL                              00045
V         CALLA G2AJUL,(WORKCAL,WORKJUL)
V         CLC   WORKJUL,HIVALS                                           00046
V         BE    ERROR                                                    00047
V         PACK  BASEJUL,WORKJUL                                          00048
VEDITDAYS EQU   *                                                        00049
V         MVC   TESTFLD,NUMDAYS                                          00050
V         NC    TESTFLD,HEX0F                                            00051
V         TR    TESTFLD,TRANSTBL                                         00052
V         MVZ   TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-1(1),NUMDAYS+L'NUMDAYS-1               00053
V         OI    TESTFLD+L'TESTFLD-1,X'C0'                                00054
V         CLC   TESTFLD,NUMDAYS                                          00055
V         BNE   ERROR                                                    00056
V         PACK  WORKDAYS,NUMDAYS                                         00057
VCALC     EQU   *                                                        00058
V         AP    BASEJUL,WORKDAYS                                         00059
V         UNPK  WORKJUL,BASEJUL                                          00060
V         OI    WORKJUL+L'WORKJUL-1,X'F0'                                00061
V*        CALL  AJUL2G,(WORKJUL,WORKCAL),VL                              00062
V         CALLA AJUL2G,(WORKJUL,WORKCAL)
V         CLC   WORKCAL,HIVALS                                           00063
V         BNE   SETNEW                                                   00064
V         ABEND 1800,DUMP                                                00065
VSETNEW   MVC   NEWDATE,WORKCAL                                          00066
V         B     RETURN                                                   00067
V*                                                                       00068
VERROR    MVC   NEWDATE,HIVALS                                           00069
V         B     RETURN                                                   00070
V*                                                                       00071
VRETURN   L     R13,SAVE+4                                               00072
V         RETURN (14,12),RC=0                                            00073
V*                                                                       00074
V         DC    C'PACKWORK='                                             00075
VPACK1    DS    PL8                                                      00076
VPACK2    DS    PL8                                                      00077
V         DC    C'WORKCAL='                                              00078
VWORKCAL  DS    CL8                                                      00079
V         DC    C'WORKJUL='                                              00080
VWORKJUL  DS    CL7                                                      00081
V         DC    C'BASEJUL='                                              00082
VBASEJUL  DS    PL4                                                      00083
V         DC    C'NEWJUL='                                               00084
VNEWJUL   DS    PL4                                                      00085
V         DC    C'WORKDAYSS='                                            00086
VWORKDAYS DS   PL4                                                       00087
VHIVALS   DC    20X'FF'                                                  00088
VP1       DC    P'1'                                                     00089
VP0       DC    P'0'                                                     00090
VTESTFLD  DS    CL7                                                      00091
VHEX0F    DC    7X'0F'                                                   00092
VTRANSTBL DC    C'0123456789000000'                                      00093
V*                                                                       00094
V         LTORG                                                          00095
V* DSECTS                                                                00096
V*                                                                       00097
VBASE     DSECT                                                          00098
VBASEDATE DS    CL8                                                      00099
V*                                                                       00100
VDAYS     DSECT                                                          00101
VNUMDAYS  DS    CL7                                                      00102
V*                                                                       00103
VNEW      DSECT                                                          00104
VNEWDATE  DS    CL8                                                      00105
V         END                                                            00106
VMEMBER NAME  DATE11
V /* REXX */
V /*         EXEC DISPLAYS CURRENT DATE & TIME */
V /*                   */
V SAY ' '
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE() '    JULIAN : 'DATE(J)
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(U) '    JULIAN : 'DATE(J)
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(S)
V SAY '      DATE : 'DATE(W)
V SAY ' '
V SAY '                   TIME:  'TIME()
V SAY ' '
V WEEKDAY1 = DATE('WEEKDAY', '10/01/03', 'USA')
V SAY ' OCT 01 2003 ' WEEKDAY1
V EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  DEFVSAM
V/* REXX ----------------------------------------------------------*/
V/* This exec creates IDCAMS DEFINE JCL for a VSAM dataset.        */
V/* Invoked as a prefix command from a 3.4 DSLIST panel or as a    */
V/* command with the cluster name as an argument, it puts the user */
V/* into en edit session with the created JCL and IDCAMS DEFINE    */
V/* statements.                                                    */
V/*----------------------------------------------------------------*/
VArg dsn .
VIf Left(dsn,1) = "'"    Then /* dsn arg from 3.4 comes with tickies */
V   Do
V      dsn = Strip(Translate(dsn," ","'"))
V   End
VElse               /* dsn entered as primary command without tickies */
V   Do
V      dsn = Userid()"."dsn
V   End
Vqdsn = "'"dsn"'"   /* qdsn gets quoted version of dsn with tickies */
VStat = SYSDSN(qdsn)  /* See if data set exists */
VIf Stat <> "OK" Then
V   Do
V     Say qdsn "not found."
V     Exit
V   End
V/* Make sure it's VSAM */
Vfc = LISTDSI(qdsn)
VIf fc > 4 Then
V   Do
V      Say "LISTDSI returned function code" fc
V      Say "Reason Code =" SYSREASON
V      Exit
V   End
Vdsorg = SYSDSORG
VIf dsorg <> "VS" Then
V   Do
V      Say "DV supports only VSAM data sets."
V      Exit
V   End
VCall OUTTRAP O.
V"LISTCAT ENTRY("qdsn") ALL"
VIf rc <> 0 then do
V   Say "Error from LISTCAT. RC =" rc
V   Exit
VEnd
Vsection = "CLUSTER"
Vdvolser = ""
Vivolser = ""
VDo l = 1 to o.0
V   o.l = translate(o.l," ","-")
V   word1 = Word(o.l,1)
V   word2 = Word(o.l,2)
V   If word1 = "IN" Then    /* Change sections on "IN CAT" lines */
V      Do
V        p = l - 1
V        section = Word(o.p,1)
V      End
V   Select     /* Select based on section of listcat output */
V      When section = "CLUSTER" Then
V         Select /* Select based on line within a given section */
V            When word1 = "CLUSTER"           Then
V               clname = Word(o.l,2)
V            When word1 = "DATA"              Then
V               dname = Word(o.l,2)
V            When word1 = "INDEX"             Then
V               iname = Word(o.l,2)
V            Otherwise Nop
V         End /* End of Select on line within CLUSTER section */
V      When section = "DATA" Then
V         Select /* Select based on line within a given section */
V            When word1 = "KEYLEN"            Then
V               Parse var o.l . keylen . avglrecl . bufspace . dcisize .
V            When word1 = "RKP"               Then
V               Parse var o.l . rkp . maxlrecl .
V            When Left(word1,8) = "SHROPTNS"  Then
V               Do
V                  Parse var o.l "(" shroptns ")" recovery unique ,
V                                erase type writechk imbed replicat .
V                  n = l + 1
V                  Parse var o.n ordered reuse spanned .
V                  writechk = Insert("EC",writechk,Index(writechk,"H"))
V               End
V            When word1 = "REC" & word2 = "INSERTED"  Then
V                  dfreeci = Word(o.l,6)
V            When word1 = "REC" & word2 = "UPDATED"  Then
V                  dfreeca = Word(o.l,6)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "TYPE"  Then
V                  dspacetype = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "PRI"  Then
V                  dspacepri = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "SEC"  Then
V                  dspacesec = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "VOLSER" Then
V                  dvolser = dvolser Word(o.l,2)
V            Otherwise Nop
V         End /* End of Select on line within DATA section */
V      When section = "INDEX" Then
V         Select /* Select based on line within a given section */
V            When word1 = "KEYLEN"            Then
V               icisize = Word(o.l,8)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "TYPE"  Then
V                  ispacetype = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "PRI"  Then
V                  ispacepri = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "SPACE" & word2 = "SEC"  Then
V                  ispacesec = Word(o.l,3)
V            When word1 = "VOLSER" Then
V                  ivolser = ivolser Word(o.l,2)
V            Otherwise Nop
V         End /* End of Select on line within INDEX section */
V      Otherwise Nop
V   End /* End of Select on section */
VEnd /* End of  Do l = 1 to o.0 */
VCall OUTTRAP "OFF"
VNewstack
V"ISPEXEC VGET (ZLLGJOB1 ZLLGJOB2 ZLLGJOB3 ZLLGJOB4) PROFILE"
VDo i = 1 To 4
V   If Value(zllgjob || i) <> "" Then Queue Value(zllgjob || i)
VEnd
VQueue "//IDCAMS   EXEC PGM=IDCAMS"
VQueue "//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*"
VQueue "//SYSIN    DD *"
VQueue " DEFINE CLUSTER -"
VQueue "           (NAME("clname") -"
VQueue "           "type" -"
VQueue "           SHAREOPTIONS("shroptns") -"
VQueue "           "erase" -"
VQueue "           "recovery" -"
VQueue "           "writechk" -"
VQueue "           "reuse") -"
VQueue "        DATA -"
VQueue "           (NAME("dname") -"
VIf type = "INDEXED" Then
V   Do
V      Queue "           KEYS("keylen rkp") -"
V   End
VQueue "           CONTROLINTERVALSIZE("dcisize") -"
VQueue "           "dspacetype"("dspacepri dspacesec") -"
VQueue "           FREESPACE("dfreeci dfreeca") -"
VQueue "           RECORDSIZE("avglrecl maxlrecl") -"
VQueue "           "spanned" -"
VQueue "           VOLUMES("dvolser") -"
VIf type = "INDEXED" Then
V   Do
V      Queue "           )-"
V      Queue "        INDEX -"
V      Queue "           (NAME("iname") -"
V      Queue "           CONTROLINTERVALSIZE("icisize") -"
V      Queue "           "ispacetype"("ispacepri ispacesec") -"
V      Queue "           "imbed" -"
V      Queue "           "ordered" -"
V      Queue "           "replicat"E -"
V      Queue "           VOLUMES("ivolser"))"
V   End
VElse  Queue "           )"
VQueue "/*"
VCall MSG 'OFF'
VAddress ispexec 'VGET (ZSCREEN) SHARED'
Vddname='$TRAP$'zscreen
V'ALLOC F('ddname') UNIT(VIO) DSO(PS) RECFM(F B) LRECL(80) NEW DEL REU'
V'EXECIO 'Queued()' DISKW 'ddname' (FINIS'
VAddress ispexec 'LMINIT DATAID(TRAP) DDNAME('ddname') ENQ(SHR)'
VAddress ispexec 'EDIT   DATAID('trap')'
VAddress ispexec 'LMFREE DATAID('trap')'
V'FREE F('ddname')'
VDelstack
VExit
VMEMBER NAME  DELDUPE
V/* Rexx DELDUPE */
VAddress isredit
V"ISREDIT MACRO (LCOL,RCOL)"  /* Indicate macro with 2 parms    */
V"ISREDIT (DW) = DATA_WIDTH"  /* Tet maximum data width         */
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLAST"    /* Get number of last line*/
V"ISREDIT RESET X"            /* Un-Exclude all lines           */
VIf datatype(lcol,'N')=0 Then lcol=1  /* Set left column        */
VIf datatype(rcol,'N')=0 | rcol>dw Then rcol = dw /* Right col  */
Vlen=abs(rcol-lcol)+1         /* Get length of compare area     */
Vlcol=min(lcol,rcol)          /* Tet left col                   */
VDo linenum = 1 to last       /* Loop through all lines         */
V  "ISREDIT (LINE) = LINE "linenum /* Place line data in 'line' */
V  test=substr(line,lcol,len) /* Take just columns to compare   */
V  If test = testold Then     /* Compare against previous line  */
V    "ISREDIT XSTATUS "linenum" = X"  /* If match, exclude line */
V  testold = test             /* Save current line compare area */
VEnd                          /*                                */
V"ISREDIT DEL ALL X"       /* Finally, delete all excluded lines*/
VExit 1                       /* Reset cursor to command line   */
VMEMBER NAME  DELL
VISREDIT MACRO
VISREDIT RESET                                  /* RESET ALL EDIT CMD*/
VISREDIT (LNUM) = LINENUM .ZFIRST
VISREDIT LABEL &LNUM  = .A  0
VSET &LNUM = &LNUM + 4
VISREDIT LABEL &LNUM  = .B  0
VISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL .A .B
VISREDIT DELETE ALL X
VMEMBER NAME  DELMEM
V/* Rexx                                                               */
V"ISREDIT Macro"
VAddress ISPEXEC
V'ISREDIT (Openpds) = Dataset'
V'ISREDIT (Openmbr) = Member'
V'ISREDIT End'
VDelstr = Strip(Openpds)'('Strip(Openmbr)')'
VAddress TSO "Delete '"Delstr"'"
VReturn
VMEMBER NAME  DELMEMS
VPROC 2 PDSDSN SERIAL NOPROMPT(PROMPT)                                   0001000
V/* DEL ALL MEMBERS IN A PDS                                   */        0002000
V/*                                                            */        0003000
VIF &NOPROMPT = NOPROMPT THEN GOTO LABEL1                                0004000
VWRITE THIS CLIST WILL DELETE ALL MEMBERS OF THE PDS SPECIFIED           0005000
VWRITE  HIT PA1 NOW IF IF YOU DO NOT WANT TO DO THIS ACTION              0006000
VWRITE  OR PRESS THE ENTER KEY TO PROCEED.                               0007000
VREAD A                                                                  0008000
V/* INITIALIZE DATASET */                                                0009000
VLABEL1: +                                                               0010000
VISPEXEC  LMINIT DATAID(PDSID) DATASET('&PDSDSN') +                      0011000
V                ENQ(SHRW)                        +                      0012000
V                ORG(PDSORG)                      +                      0013000
V                VOLUME(&SERIAL)                                         0014000
VSET LMRC = &LASTCC                                                      0015000
VIF &LMRC ｬ= 0 THEN +                                                    0016000
V   DO                                                                   0017000
V      WRITE LMINIT FAILED - RETURN CODE &LMRC                           0018000
V       WRITE DATA SET IS NOT ALLOCATED OR NOT PARTITIONED               0019000
V      EXIT CODE(8)                                                      0020000
V   END                                                                  0021000
V   /* OPEN DATA SET */                                                  0022000
V   ISPEXEC LMOPEN DATAID(&PDSID) OPTION(OUTPUT)                         0023000
V   SET LMRC = &LASTCC                                                   0024000
V   /* CALL EDIT WITH EACH MEMBER OF THE DATA SET AND SPECIFY THE */     0025000
V   /* INITIAL EDIT MACRO.                                        */     0026000
V   DO WHILE (&LMRC = 0)                                                 0027000
V     /* BUILD MEMBER LIST AND RETURN NEXT MEMBER */                     0028000
V     ISPEXEC LMMLIST DATAID(&PDSID) -                                   0029000
V           OPTION(LIST) MEMBER(MEMBER) -                                0030000
V           STATS(YES)                                                   0031000
V   SET &LMRC = &LASTCC                                                  0032000
V   SET &NUM = &NUM +1                                                   0033000
V     ISPEXEC  LMMDEL DATAID(&PDSID)   MEMBER(&MEMBER)                   0034000
V     IF &LMRC = 0 THEN /* NOT END OF MEMBER LIST */ +                   0035000
V             DO                                                         0036000
V     WRITE &MEMBER DELETED                                              0037000
V        END                                                             0038000
V    END                                                                 0039000
V    WRITE                                                               0040000
V   SET &NUM = &NUM -1                                                   0041000
V   WRITE  &NUM MEMBERS DELETED                                          0042000
V   /* CLOSE DATA SET */                                                 0043000
V   ISPEXEC LMCLOSE DATAID(&PDSID)                                       0044000
V   /* FREE DATA ID */                                                   0045000
V   ISPEXEC LMFREE  DATAID(&PDSID)                                       0046000
V   ISREDIT END                                                          0047000
V   EXIT CODE(0)                                                         0048000
VMEMBER NAME  DESC
V/* Rexx                                                               */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* Desc    : Give struture of the DB2 tables                          */
V/* Syntax  : TSO DESC DB2SSID CREATOR.TABLE                           */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VAddress ISPEXEC 'Control Errors Return'
VPARSE UPPER ARG DB2sub Creator .
VPARSE VALUE Creator with Creator '.' Table
V
VIf strip(DB2sub)='' | strip(Creator) = '' | strip(Table) = '' Then Do
V   Say 'Syntax : TSO DESC DB2SSID CREATOR.TABLE'
V   Exit 8
VEnd
V
Vx = OutTrap("DB2out.","*")
VCALL AllocateIn
VCALL AllocateOut
VCall ExecuteDSNTEP2
VCall CleanUp
Vx = OutTrap("OFF")
VExit 1
V
VAllocateIn :
VAddress TSO
V
VDo queued();Pull;End
VQueue "SELECT   NAME, COLTYPE, LENGTH, SCALE, NULLS"
VQueue "FROM     SYSIBM.SYSCOLUMNS"
VQueue "WHERE    TBNAME    = '"Table"'"
VQueue "AND      TBCREATOR = '"Creator"'"
VQueue "ORDER BY COLNO"
VQueue "WITH     UR;"
V
V'ALLOC F(SYSIN) REUSE NEW DEL UNIT(SYSDA) LRECL(80) RECFM(F B)
V SPACE(10,10) TRACK RELEASE DSO(PS) BLKSIZE(80)'
V'EXECIO 6 DISKW SYSIN (FINIS'
V
V"delete "USERID()".SYSPRINT"
VDo queued();Pull;End
VRETURN
V
VAllocateOut :
VAddress TSO
V            "ALLOC F(SYSPRINT) NEW UNIT(SYSDA) SPACE(8,2)",
V            "UNIT(sysda)",
V            "TRACKS REUSE DSNAME('"USERID()".SYSPRINT')"
VReturn
V
VExecuteDSNTEP2:
VAddress ISPEXEC
V"LIBDEF STEPLIB DATASET ID("'SYS0.DB2.PROD.DSNLOAD'")"
VAddress TSO "NEWSTACK"
VQUEUE "RUN PROGRAM(DSNTEP2) PLAN(DSNTEP2) ",
V      "LIBRARY('SYS0.DB2.#510.PROD.RUNLIB.LOAD') PARMS('ALIGN(LHS)')"
VQUEUE "END"
VQUEUE
Vaddress TSO "DSN SYSTEM("DB2sub")"
VAddress TSO "DELSTACK"
V
VADDRESS ISPEXEC "LMINIT DATAID(DSID) DDNAME(SYSPRINT)"
VADDRESS ISPEXEC "BROWSE DATAID("DSID")"
VADDRESS ISPEXEC "LMFREE DATAID("DSID")"
VRETURN
V
VCleanUp:
V  address TSO "delete '"USERID()".SYSPRINT'"
VRETURN
V
VMEMBER NAME  DIR
V/*Rexx Dir                                                            */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* Dir     : Do DSLIST                                                */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
Varg DSNLVL IVIEW
Vif DSNLVL = '' then Exit 0
Vif IVIEW  = '' then IVIEW = 'ATTRIB'
Vaddress ispexec
VZEDSMSG = ''
VZEDLMSG = ''
V"ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
VCONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V'LMDINIT LISTID(dsnlist)  LEVEL('DSNLVL')'
VCall CheckRC
V'LMDDISP LISTID('dsnlist') VIEW('IVIEW') CONFIRM(YES)'
VCall CheckRC
V'LMDFREE LISTID('dsnlist')'
VCall CheckRC
VExit 0
V
VCheckRC :
V  If rc ｬ= 0 Then
V    Do
V       "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V       Exit
V    End
V  Else
V       Nop
VReturn
VMEMBER NAME  DIRCOMP
V/* REXX - basic directory compare. Syntax: TSO DIRCOMP dsn1 dsn2 */     0001000
V/*        saves directories to files and runs edit compare       */     0002000
V/*        command to compare the listings.  With ISPF Defaults:  */     0003000
V/*        Green:Both files, Blue: ds1 only, White: ds2 only      */     0004000
VParse Upper Arg ds1 ds2 .                                               0005000
VAddress ispexec                                                         0006000
V'CONTROL ERRORS RETURN'   /* ignore errors                  */          0007000
VAddress isredit 'MACRO'   /* invoked as a macro?            */          0008000
VIf rc=0 Then Call compare /* being called as an edit macro  */          0009000
V'VPUT (DS1 DS2) SHARED'   /* save names for use by macro    */          0010000
VParse  Source . . me .    /* get name of this macro         */          0011000
Vmaxrc = 0                                                               0012000
VCall save ds1,'COMPARE'   /* save member list for ds1 */                0013000
VIf maxrc=0 Then Call save ds2,'B' /* save member list for ds2 */        0014000
VIf maxrc=0 Then 'VIEW DATASET(COMPARE.MEMBERS) MACRO('me')'             0015000
V'VERASE (DS1 DS2) SHARED' /* clean up shared pool           */          0016000
VAddress tso               /* delete temp data sets          */          0017000
V'ALLOC F(ADEL1) DEL MOD DA(COMPARE.MEMBERS) SP(1)'                      0018000
V'FREE  F(ADEL1)'                                                        0019000
V'ALLOC F(ADEL1) DEL MOD DA(B.MEMBERS) SP(1)'                            0020000
V'FREE  F(ADEL1)'                                                        0021000
VEXIT                                                                    0022000
Vsave:  /* Save directory lists to temp files */                         0023000
V  'LMINIT DATASET('Arg(1)') DATAID(DID) ENQ(SHR)'                       0024000
V  If rc=0 Then 'LMOPEN DATAID(&DID) OPTION(INPUT)'                      0025000
V  If rc=0 Then 'LMMLIST DATAID(&DID) OPTION(SAVE) GROUP('Arg(2)')'      0026000
V  maxrc=max(maxrc,rc)                                                   0027000
V  'LMFREE DATAID(&DID)'                                                 0028000
V  Return                                                                0029000
Vcompare:  /* edit macro: Compare cols 4:11 in saved member lists */     0030000
V  Address tso                                                           0031000
V  'ALLOC F(SYSIN) UNIT(VIO) DSORG(PS) REUSE                             0032000
V         LRECL(80) NEW DEL SP(1) TRA RECFM(F)'                          0033000
V  Push 'CMPCOLM 4:11'          /* compare only member names */          0034000
V  'EXECIO 1 DISKW SYSIN (FINIS'                                         0035000
V  Address isredit                                                       0036000
V  'HILITE RESET'                                                        0037000
V  'COMPARE B.MEMBERS SYSIN'                                             0038000
V  Address ispexec                                                       0039000
V  'VGET (DS1 DS2) SHARED'                                               0040000
V  Parse Value 'YES *' With zerralrm zerrhm zerrsm                       0041000
V  zerrlm=left('Green: Both',72)left('Blue:  'ds1,80)' White: 'ds2       0042000
V  Address ispexec 'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)'                                 0043000
V  Exit                                                                  0044000
VMEMBER NAME  DISPVAR
V/* REXX - GEN A DISPLAY STATEMENT FOR THE VARIABLE AT THE CURSOR */
V
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V"ISREDIT MACRO (PARMS) NOPROCESS"
VIF  RC > 0 THEN DO
V   "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(CBL000A)"
V   EXIT
VEND
VIF PARMS = '?' THEN CALL DISPDOC
V
VCOL7     = 7
VCOL8     = 8
VCOL11    = 11
VCOL20    = 20
VLEN72    = 72
VSPACES11 = '           '
V
V"ISREDIT (QLINE,QCOL) = CURSOR"
VIF  QLINE = 0 | QCOL = 0 THEN DO
V   "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(CBL000C)"
V   EXIT
VEND
V
V   /* GET THE DATA LINE WITH THE FIELD NAME TO BE PROCESSED */
V"ISREDIT (QLDATA) = LINE" QLINE
VQLDATA = SUBSTR(QLDATA,1,LEN72)
V"ISREDIT (XLDATA) = LINE" QLINE+1
VIF SUBSTR(XLDATA,7,1) <> '*',
V      & SUBSTR(XLDATA,7,1) <> '/',
V      & SUBSTR(XLDATA,7,1) <> 'D',
V   THEN XLDATA = SUBSTR(XLDATA,8,LEN72)
V   ELSE XLDATA = " "
V
V   /* IF 'IN' OR 'OF' ON NEXT LINE, APPEND IT TO CURSOR LINE */
VIF  (  POS(' IN ',TRANSLATE(QLDATA)) > 0,
V     | POS(' IN ',TRANSLATE(XLDATA)) > 0,
V     | POS(' OF ',TRANSLATE(QLDATA)) > 0,
V     | POS(' OF ',TRANSLATE(XLDATA)) > 0  ),
V   THEN QLDATA = QLDATA || XLDATA
V
V   /* FIGURE END OF VARIABLE */
VQLEN = LENGTH(QLDATA)
VSPC_CHARS = " ,.='"
VDO OK = (QCOL+1) TO QLEN BY 1,
V   WHILE ( VERIFY(SUBSTR(QLDATA,OK,1),SPC_CHARS) <> 0 )
VEND OK
VQEND = OK - 1
V
V   /* FIGURE IF 'OF' OR 'IN' AFTER VARIABLE AND INCLUDE AS VARIABLE */
VDO QQ = (QEND+1) TO QLEN BY 1 WHILE ( SUBSTR(QLDATA,QQ,1) = ' ' )
VEND QQ
VIF TRANSLATE(SUBSTR(QLDATA,QQ,3)) = 'IN ',
V      | TRANSLATE(SUBSTR(QLDATA,QQ,3)) = 'OF ' THEN DO
V   DO RR = QQ+2 TO QLEN BY 1 WHILE ( SUBSTR(QLDATA,RR,1) = ' ' )
V   END RR
V   DO SS = RR TO QLEN BY 1  WHILE ( SUBSTR(QLDATA,SS,1) <> ' ' )
V   END SS
V   QEND = SS - 1
VEND
V
V   /* FIGURE IF SUBSCRIPT OR REF MOD AND INCLUDE AS VARIABLE */
VDO 2
V   DO QQ = (QEND+1) TO QLEN BY 1 WHILE ( SUBSTR(QLDATA,QQ,1) = ' ' )
V   END QQ
V   IF (QQ < QLEN) & (SUBSTR(QLDATA,QQ,1) = '(')  THEN DO
V      DO RR = (QQ+1) TO QLEN WHILE ( SUBSTR(QLDATA,RR,1) <> ')')
V      END RR
V      QEND = RR
V   END
VEND
V
VIF QEND > 72 THEN QLINE = QLINE + 1
V
V   /* FIGURE START OF VARIABLE */
VDO OK = QCOL TO 1 BY -1,
V   WHILE ( VERIFY(SUBSTR(QLDATA,OK,1),SPC_CHARS) <> 0 )
VEND OK
VIF OK < 1 THEN QSTART = 1
VELSE QSTART = OK + 1
V
VQLEN = (QEND - QSTART) + 1
VQWORD = SUBSTR(QLDATA,QSTART,QLEN)
V
V   /* ELIMINATE DOUBLE BLANKS */
VQQ = POS('  ',QWORD)
VDO WHILE ( QQ <> 0 )
V   QWORD = SUBSTR(QWORD,1,QQ) || SUBSTR(QWORD,QQ+2)
V   QQ = POS('  ',QWORD)
VEND
V
VQWORD = STRIP(QWORD,'B','(')
VW_LEN = LENGTH(QWORD)
V
VIF  W_LEN > 16 THEN DO
V   IF  W_LEN > 39 THEN QWORD_X = SUBSTR(QWORD,1,34)||'*'
V   ELSE QWORD_X = QWORD
V   DLINE1 = SPACES11"DISPLAY '~DEBUG~ "QWORD_X" = >'"
V   DLINE2 = SPACES11"  "QWORD" '< ~DEBUG~'"
VEND
VELSE DLINE1 = SPACES11"DISPLAY '~DEBUG~ "QWORD" = >' ",
V   || QWORD" '<'"
V
VIF  W_LEN > 16 THEN "ISREDIT LINE_AFTER" QLINE" = (DLINE2)"
V"ISREDIT LINE_AFTER" QLINE" = (DLINE1)"
V'ISREDIT CURSOR = 'QLINE','QCOL
VEXIT
V
VDISPDOC:
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V   SAY "DISPVAR - ADD DISPLAY DEBUG FOR VARIABLE UNDER CURSOR     "
V   SAY
V   SAY " FORMAT "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    DISPVAR                                               "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       ADDS ONE OR TWO LINES THAT DISPLAY THE VARIABLE ON "
V   SAY "       WHICH THE CURSOR WAS POSITIONED. WILL HANDLE BOTH  "
V   SAY "       IN AND ON EVEN IF THEY ARE ON THE NEXT LINE, AND   "
V   SAY "       BOTH SUBSCRIPT AND REFERENCE MODIFICATION IF ON    "
V   SAY "       THE SAME LINE. THE CURSOR MUST BE POSITIONED ON    "
V   SAY "       THE VARIABLE NAME. FOR EXAMPLE, IF THE CURSOR IS   "
V   SAY "       ON NUMB-RECS-WRITTEN:                              "
V   SAY
V   SAY "           ADD 1 TO NUMB-RECS-WRITTEN                     "
V   SAY "               OF WS-MISC ( 12 )                          "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       THE FOLLOWING LINES WILL BE INSERTED:              "
V   SAY
V   SAY "DISPLAY '~DEBUG~ NUMB-RECS-WRITTEN OF WS-MISC ( 12 ) = >' "
V   SAY "          NUMB-RECS-WRITTEN OF WS-MISC ( 12 ) '< ~DEBUG~' "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       USE DELPARA TO REMOVE ALL THE INSERTED LINES.      "
V   SAY
V   EXIT(0)
V
V
VMEMBER NAME  DOALL
V /* ---------------------  rexx procedure  ---------------------- *     0001000
V  * Name:      DoAll                                              *     0002000
V  *                                                               *     0003000
V  * Function:  This rexx exec will process the specified          *     0004000
V  *            ispf edit macro against every member of the        *     0005000
V  *            specified partitioned dataset.                     *     0006000
V  *                                                               *     0007000
V  *            Only standard system services are used. The        *     0008000
V  *            LISTD TSO command with the MEMBERS keyword         *     0009000
V  *            is used to extract the member names.               *     0010000
V  *                                                               *     0011000
V  * Syntax:    %DoAll dsname edit-macro                           *     0012000
V  *                                                               *     0013000
V  * Sample Edit Macro to change SYS1 to SYS2                      *     0014000
V  *  * rexx exec chsys1t2 (change sys1 to sys2) *                 *     0015000
V  *  (the / was removed from the above line to avoid syntax       *     0016000
V  *   errors in this exec).                                       *     0017000
V  *  Address ISREDIT                                              *     0018000
V  *  "MACRO"                                                      *     0019000
V  *  "CHANGE 'DSN=SYS1.' 'DSN=SYS2.' ALL"                         *     0020000
V  *  "SAVE"                                                       *     0021000
V  *  "END"                                                        *     0022000
V  *                                                               *     0023000
V  * Sample Execution:  %Doall 'sys2.testjcl' chsys1t2             *     0024000
V  *                                                               *     0025000
V  * Author:    Lionel B. Dyck                                     *     0026000
V  *            Kaiser Permanente Information Technology           *     0027000
V  *            25 N. Via Monte Ave.                               *     0028000
V  *            Walnut Creek, CA 94598                             *     0029000
V  *            (925) 926-5332                                     *     0030000
V  *            Internet: lionel.b.dyck@kp.org                     *     0031000
V  *                                                               *     0032000
V  * History:   11/30/90 - created                                 *     0033000
V  *                                                               *     0034000
V  * ------------------------------------------------------------- */    0035000
V                                                                        0036000
V arg dsn exec                                                           0037000
V                                                                        0038000
V if left(dsn,1) <> "'" then do                                          0039000
V    dsn = sysvar(syspref)"."dsn                                         0040000
V    end                                                                 0041000
V    else do                                                             0042000
V         dsn = substr(dsn,2,length(dsn)-2)                              0043000
V         end                                                            0044000
V                                                                        0045000
V x = outtrap("lm.","*")                                                 0046000
V                                                                        0047000
V "LISTD" "'"dsn"'" "MEMBERS"                                            0048000
V                                                                        0049000
V x = outtrap("off")                                                     0050000
V                                                                        0051000
V do i = 1 to lm.0                                                       0052000
V    if lm.i = "--MEMBERS--" then signal domem                           0053000
V    end                                                                 0054000
V                                                                        0055000
V domem:  do j = i+1 to lm.0                                             0056000
V         parse value lm.j with mem extra                                0057000
V         Address ISPEXEC "EDIT DATASET('"dsn"("mem")')" ,               0058000
V                         "MACRO("exec")"                                0059000
V         end                                                            0060000
VMEMBER NAME  DROPDUP
V/* DELETE DUPLICATE LINES (ASSUMING THEY ARE SORTED AND SHOWDUP-ED)*/   0001000
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0002000
V    ISREDIT SHOWDUP                                                     0003000
V    ISREDIT DROP "<=DUPL"                                               0004000
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0005000
VMEMBER NAME  DROPSRCH
V/* DELETE IRRELEVANT ROWS FROM THE SUPER-SEARCH OUTPUT */               0001000
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0002000
V  ISREDIT DROP 'SUPERC - MVS/PDF'                                       0003000
V  ISREDIT DROP 'LINE-#'                                                 0004000
V  ISREDIT DROP '                                                      ' 0005000
V  ISREDIT FIND 'SEARCH-FOR SUMMARY'  /* FIND AND REMOVE TRAILER */      0006000
V  ISREDIT (ROW,COL) = CURSOR                                            0007000
V  ISREDIT DELETE &ROW .ZLAST                                            0008000
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0009000
VMEMBER NAME  DUPL1
V    ISREDIT MACRO
V    /**************************************************************
V    /*  MACRO NAME:  DUPL  VERSION 1.0
V    /*    FUNCTION:  COPY THE DATASET BEING EDITTED TO ANOTHER DATA
V    /*               WITH THE SAME ATTRIBUTES.
V    /*               IF THE CURRENT DATASET IS A SEQUENTIAL DATASET
V    /*                  THE DUPLICATE WILL HAVE THE SAME NAME + ".T
V    /*               IF THE CURRENT DATASET IS A PARTITIONED DATASE
V    /*                  THE DUPLICATE WILL HAVE THE SAME NAME +
V    /*                  "MEMBNAME.TWO"  WHERE IS THE NAME OF THE ME
V    /*                  BEING EDITTED.
V    /*
V    /*  WRITTEN BY:  KEVIN STEFFLER ON 09/16/86
V    /*
V    /* MODIFIED BY:  K.STEFFLER  ON  09/19/86
V    /*      CHANGE:  ADDED MSG SAYING DATASET HAS BEEN DUPLICATED
V    /*      REASON:
V    /**************************************************************
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* GET THE NAME OF THE CURRENT DATASET
V    /**************************************************************
V    ISREDIT (DSN) = DATASET
V    ISREDIT (MEMB) = MEMBER
V    /**************************************************************
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* GET THE DCB INFO FOR THE CURRENT DATASET
V    /**************************************************************
V    ISREDIT (LRECL) = LRECL
V    SET &LRECL = &EVAL(&LRECL)
V    ISREDIT (BLKSZ) = BLKSIZE
V    SET &BLKSZ = &EVAL(&BLKSZ)
V    ISREDIT (RECFM) = RECFM
V    SET &RECFM = &EVAL(&RECFM)
V    IF &RECFM = V THEN -
V       SET &LRECL = &LRECL + 4
V    IF &LRECL ｬ= &BLKSZ THEN -
V       SET &RECFM = &RECFM.&STR( B)
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* CREATE THE DUPLICATE DATASET NAME
V    /**************************************************************
V    IF &MEMB = &STR() THEN -
V       SET &NEWDSN = &DSN..TWO
V    ELSE -
V       SET &NEWDSN = &DSN..&MEMB..TWO
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* ATTEMPT TO DELETE THE NEW DATASET BEFORE CREATING IT AGAIN
V    /**************************************************************
V    CONTROL NOMSG
V    DEL '&NEWDSN'
V    CONTROL MSG
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* IF THE FOLLOWING ALLOCATE COMMAND WORKS, THEN THE ABOVE DELE
V    /**************************************************************
V    CONTROL NOMSG NOFLUSH
V    ALLOCATE DA('&NEWDSN') SHR
V    IF &LASTCC = 0 THEN -
V       DO
V       WRITE SOMEONE MUST HAVE POSSESSION OF THE &NEWDSN
V       WRITE BECAUSE IT CANNOT BE DELETED.
V       GOTO FINISH
V       END
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* ALLOCATE THE NEW DATASET
V    /**************************************************************
V    ATTRIB A LRECL(&LRECL) BLKSIZE(&BLKSZ) RECFM(&RECFM) DSORG(PS)
V    ALLOCATE DA('&NEWDSN') NEW SPACE(10 5) TR USING(A) RELEASE
V    FREE ATTRLIST(A)
V    FREE DA('&NEWDSN')
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* COPY THE CURRENT DATASET TO THE NEW ONE
V    /**************************************************************
V    IF &MEMB =   THEN -
V       COPY '&DSN' '&NEWDSN'
V    ELSE -
V       COPY '&DSN(&MEMB)' '&NEWDSN'
V
V    /**************************************************************
V    /* CREATE A MESSAGE
V    /**************************************************************
V    SET &ZEDSMSG = &STR(DATASET DUPLICATED)
V    SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(DATASET HAS BEEN COPIED TO &NEWDSN)
V    ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)
V
V    FINISH: EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  EDITALL
V/* Rexx */
Varg dsn exec opt3
Vif dsn = '' then do
V   say 'Need pds name to process'
V   say 'Syntax : EDITALL _dsn_ _imacro_ (VERBOSE)'
V   exit 1
Vend
Vif exec  = '' then do
V   say 'Need initial macro to apply'
V   say 'Syntax : EDITALL _dsn_ _imacro_ (VERBOSE)'
V   exit 1
Vend
Vif left(dsn,1) <> "'" then do
V   dsn = sysvar(syspref)"."dsn
Vend
Velse do
V   dsn = substr(dsn,2,length(dsn)-2)
Vend
Vx = outtrap("lm.","*")
V"listd" "'"dsn"'" "members"
Vx = outtrap("off")
Vdo i = 1 to lm.0
V   if lm.i = "--MEMBERS--" then signal domem
Vend
Vdomem:  do j = i+1 to lm.0
V        parse value lm.j with mem extra
V        address ispexec "edit dataset('"dsn"("mem")') macro("exec")"
V        if opt3 = 'VERBOSE' then
V           say j-6 '--' mem 'has been applied with macro' exec
V        end
VMEMBER NAME  EMAIL
V/* REXX */
V/* TRACE I */
VPARSE UPPER ARG USER ADDRS
VIF USER = '' THEN
V   USER = USERID()
VIF ADDRS = '' THEN
V   ADDRS = epage.arch.com
VJOBNAME  = MVSVAR('SYMDEF',JOBNAME)
VNODENAME = SYSVAR(SYSNODE)
VMSGSAVE = MSG()
VX = MSG('OFF')
VADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(SMTP)"
VADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(SMTP) SYSOUT(B) DEST(SMTP)"
VSMTP.1  = 'HELO' NODENAME
VSMTP.2  = 'MAIL FROM:<'USERID()'@'NODENAME'>'
VSMTP.3  = 'RCPT TO:<'USER'@'ADDRS'>'
VSMTP.4  = 'DATA'
VSMTP.5  = "DATE:  "DATE('N')" "TIME('N')
VSMTP.6  = 'FROM:  'USERID()'@'NODENAME
VSMTP.7  = 'TO:    'USER'@'ADDRS
VSMTP.8  = 'SUBJECT: job' JOBNAME
VSMTP.9  = ' '
V "EXECIO * DISKR SYSIN (FINIS STEM SYSIN.)"
VIF SYSIN.0 = 0 THEN
VDO
V  SYSIN.0 = 1
V  SYSIN.1 = '** NO DATA OR TEXT IN FILE. **'
V  SAY '** NO DATA OR TEXT IN FILE. **'
VEND
VDO I = 1 TO SYSIN.0
V   J = I + 9
V   SMTP.J = SYSIN.I
VEND
VJ = J + 1
VSMTP.J = '.'
VJ = J + 1
VSMTP.J = 'QUIT'
VSMTP.0 = SYSIN.0 + 13
V"EXECIO * DISKW SMTP (OPEN FINIS STEM SMTP.)"
VADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(SMTP)"
VX = MSG(MSGSAVE)
VMEMBER NAME  EOF
V/* Rexx Check Emptiness */
VArg NT
VAddress TSO
V"ALLOC DS("NT") DD("TEMPDD") SHR REUSE"
V"EXECIO 1 DISKR" TEMPDD
VIf RC = 2 Then Say 'File is empty'
VElse
V   If RC = 0 Then Say 'File is not empty'
V   Else Say 'Error encountered ' RC
V"EXECIO 0 DISKR" TEMPDD "(FINIS"
V"FREE DD("TEMPDD")"
V"Delstack"
VReturn
VMEMBER NAME  EOL
V/* REXX  EOL */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO "
V"ISREDIT NUMBER OFF"
V"ISREDIT CHANGE P'========' '        ' 73 ALL"
V ZEDSMSG = ".73-80 CLEARED."
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
V"ISREDIT RESET"
V"ISREDIT FIND P'=' 1"
VEXIT 1
V/* INCLUDE FOR RUNNING IN BATCH */
V"ISREDIT SAVE"
V"ISREDIT END"
VMEMBER NAME  EVAL1
VPROC 1 EXPRESSION
VWRITE &EVAL(&EXPRESSION)
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  FB2VB
V/* REXX */                                                              0001000
V EOF = 0                                                                0001100
V DO WHILE(EOF = 0)                                                      0001200
V   "EXECIO 1 DISKR INPUT"                                               0001300
V   IF RC<>0 THEN EOF = 1;                                               0001400
V   ELSE                                                                 0001500
V     DO                                                                 0001510
V        PARSE PULL FB_RECORD                                            0001520
V        llen = substr(FB_RECORD,1,2) /* real length     */              0001530
V        rlen = substr(FB_RECORD,3,2) /* must be X'0000' */              0001540
V        l    = x2d(rlen)                                                0001550
V        VB_RECORD = rlen || llen || substr(FB_RECORD,5,l)               0001560
V        QUEUE VB_RECORD                                                 0001570
V        "EXECIO 1 DISKW OUTPUT"                                         0001580
V     END                                                                0001590
V END                                                                    0001600
VEXIT                                                                    0001700
VMEMBER NAME  FF
VISREDIT MACRO (OP)
V/****************************************************
V/*  DISPLAY DS INFORMATION FOR A CATALOGUED DS      *
V/*  IF CURSOR POSITIONED ON THE DS LINE IN THE TEXT *
V/****************************************************
VIF &OP = T  THEN +
V   DO
V     CONTROL CONLIST
V     SET &OP =
V   END
VIF &OP = ON THEN +
V   DO
V     SET ZPF01 = %XDS
V     ISPEXEC VPUT ( ZPF01 )
V     WRITE XDS SET ON PF01
V     EXIT
V   END
V/****************************************************
VSTART: +
VISREDIT ( LAN COL ) = CURSOR
VSET &COL = &COL
VCONTROL NOFLUSH
VIF &COL = 0 THEN +
V   DO
V     ISREDIT (TOP BOT) = DISPLAY_LINES
V     SET LAN = &TOP
V   END
V/****************************************************
V/*  FIND THE TEXT IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING CURSOR      *
V/****************************************************
VISREDIT    (THISLINE) = LINE &LAN
VIF  &NRSTR(&THISLINE) = THEN GOTO EX
VSET FIRST     = &SYSINDEX(' ',&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VSET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((0),&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((+,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((-,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX(@,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V/**************************************************************
VIF  &FIRST     = 0      +
VAND &COL       = 0 THEN GOTO TUTOR
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET &COLEND = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V    SET &COLEND = &LAST - 1
V
VIF &FIRST      = 0 THEN +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&COL:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&FIRST+4:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V
V/**************************************************************
VSET &SYSDVAL  = &NRSTR(&THISLINE)
VREADDVAL &V1
VSET &VLEN     = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&V1))
VIF  &VLEN     = 0       THEN GOTO EX
V
V/* &LAST ｬ= 0 THEN +
V/* DO
V/*     ISPEXEC SELECT PGM(ISRDSLST) +
V/*           PARM(DSL '&V1') SUSPEND SCRNAME(DSLIST)
V/*     GOTO EX
V/* END
V/*
V/*T STAT      = &STR(&SYSDSN('&V1'))
V/*IF &STR(&STAT)  ｬ= OK THEN +
V/*   DO
V/*      WRITE  ============ FX  COMMAND ==============
V/*    WRITE    '&V1'
V/*    WRITE    '&V1'  &STR(&STAT)
V/*    WRITE  =======================================
V/*    GOTO EX
V/* END
V/**********************************************************************/
V/* EDIT MACRO COMMAND ARE EXECUTED BY TYPE THE MEMBER NAME ONLY.  IT  */
V/* DOES NOT REQUIRE TO TYPE TSO EDITMACRO-NAME TO EXECUTE             */
V/**********************************************************************/
V    ISREDIT FIND '&V1'        FIRST
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  FILTER
V/* REXX */                                                              0001000
V/* THIS REXX WILL READ AN INPUT DATASET AND WRITE OUT */                0002000
V/* ONLY THE RECORDS THAT CONTAIN A GIVEN STRING.      */                0003000
V/* THIS IS LIKE "ALL" FOR THE LARGE FILES             */                0004000
V/* TRACE A */                                                           0005002
V/* PARSE UPPER ARG DSNIN PAT */                                         0006001
VPARSE ARG DSNIN FOR                                                     0007002
VPAT = FOR                                                               0008002
VKEYS= 0                                                                 0009002
VEOP = 0                                                                 0010002
VDO I=1 BY 1 WHILE(EOP = 0)                                              0011001
V   KEYS = KEYS + 1                                                      0012002
V   K = POS(' AND ',PAT)                                                 0013001
V   IF K = 0 THEN DO                                                     0014002
V      P.I = PAT                                                         0015002
V      SAY 'P.'I' = 'P.I                                                 0016002
V      EOP = 1                                                           0017002
V   END                                                                  0018002
V   ELSE DO                                                              0019001
V      P.I = SUBSTR(PAT,1,K-1)                                           0020002
V      PAT = SUBSTR(PAT,K+5)                                             0021001
V      SAY 'P.'I' = 'P.I                                                 0022002
V   /* SAY 'PAT   = 'PAT */                                              0023002
V   END                                                                  0024001
VEND                                                                     0025001
VSAY 'SEARCHING IN 'DSNIN' FOR "'FOR'"'                                  0026002
V"ALLOC FI(IN)  DA('"DSNIN"') SHR REUSE"                                 0027000
V"ALLOC FI(OUT) DA(*)             REUSE"                                 0028000
VEOF = 0                                                                 0029000
VDO J=1 BY 1 WHILE(EOF = 0)                                              0030002
V   "EXECIO 1 DISKR IN (STEM INREC."                                     0031000
V    IF RC<>0 THEN EOF = 1;                                              0032000
V    ELSE DO                                                             0033000
V    /* IF FIND(INREC.1,PAT) > 0 */                                      0034001
V    /* IF WORDPOS(PAT,INREC.1) > 0 */                                   0035001
V    /* IF POS(PAT,INREC.1) > 0 */                                       0036001
V       FOUND = 1                                                        0037001
V       P1 = 0                                                           0037103
V       DO I=1 TO KEYS BY 1 WHILE(FOUND > 0)                             0038002
V          K = POS(P.I,INREC.1)                                          0039003
V          FOUND = FOUND * K                                             0040003
V          IF K > P1 THEN DO                                             0041003
V            P1 = K                                                      0042003
V          END                                                           0043003
V       /* SAY 'FOUND='FOUND */                                          0044002
V       END                                                              0045001
V       IF FOUND > 0 THEN DO                                             0046002
V       /* OUTREC.1 = FORMAT(J,9) || ' ' || INREC.1 */                   0047003
V          OUTREC.1 = FORMAT(J,9) || ' ' || SUBSTR(INREC.1,P1)           0047013
V            "EXECIO 1 DISKW OUT (STEM OUTREC.";                         0048002
V       END                                                              0049002
V    END                                                                 0050000
VEND                                                                     0051000
V"EXECIO 0 DISKR  IN(FINIS"                                              0052000
V"EXECIO 0 DISKW OUT(FINIS"                                              0053000
V"FREE F(IN OUT)"                                                        0054000
VRETURN                                                                  0055000
VMEMBER NAME  FINDDUPS
V /**  REXX -- SORT & SHOW ALL RECORDS THAT ARE DUPS WITHIN A FILE  **/
V
V    SUBCOM ISREDIT
V    IF  RC = 0  THEN DO
V       ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V       ADDRESS ISREDIT "ISREDIT MACRO (PARMS)"
V       IF  RC = 0  THEN DO
V          ADDRESS ISREDIT "ISREDIT ("DSN") = DATASET"
V       END
V    END
V    IF  DSN = 'DSN'  THEN DO
V       SAY 'FINDDUPS MACRO CAN ONLY BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!'
V       SIGNAL EOJ
V    END
V
V    PARMS   = TRANSLATE(PARMS)
V    PARMCNT = 0
V    COL.    = ""
V    LBL1 = ""
V    LBL2 = ""
V    DO II = 1 TO 12
V       TOKEN = WORD(PARMS,II)
V       IF TOKEN = "" THEN LEAVE
V       IF SUBSTR(TOKEN,1,1) = "." THEN DO
V          IF LBL1 = "" THEN LBL1 = TOKEN
V          ELSE IF LBL2 = "" THEN LBL2 = TOKEN
V             ELSE DO
V                ZEDSMSG = ".LABEL RC=8"
V                ZEDLMSG = "TOO MANY LABELS --" LBL1 LBL2 TOKEN
V                ADDRESS "ISPEXEC" "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
V                EXIT 8
V             END
V       END
V       ELSE DO
V          PARMCNT = PARMCNT + 1
V          COL.PARMCNT = TOKEN
V       END
V    END II
V    IF LBL1 <> ""  &  LBL2 = ""  THEN LBL2 = LBL1
V    IF (PARMCNT // 2) <> 0 THEN DO
V       SAVER = COL.PARMCNT
V       PARMCNT = PARMCNT + 1
V       COL.PARMCNT = SAVER
V    END
V
V    ERRORMSG = ''
V    MESG = ''
V    IF  PARMCNT = 0 THEN DO
V       MESG = 'PARAMETERS ARE MISSING!'
V       SIGNAL ERROR
V    END
V    "ISREDIT ("LRECL") = LRECL "
V    SORTPARMS = ""
V    DO II = 1 TO PARMCNT
V       IF  ｬDATATYPE(COL.II,'W') | COL.II = 0 THEN DO
V          MESG = "'"COL.II"' COLUMN VALUE IS INVALID!"
V          SIGNAL ERROR
V       END
V       IF  COL.II > LRECL  THEN DO
V          MESG = "'"COL.II"' IS GREATER THAN RECORD SIZE("LRECL")"
V          SIGNAL ERROR
V       END
V       SORTPARMS = SORTPARMS || " " || COL.II
V    END II
V    DO II = 1 TO PARMCNT BY 2
V       JJ = II + 1
V       IF  COL.II > COL.JJ THEN DO
V          MESG = "LEFT-COL "COL.II" IS GREATER THAN RIGHT-COL "COL.JJ
V          SIGNAL ERROR
V       END
V    END II
V
V    IF  LBL1 <> ''  THEN DO
V       "ISREDIT L &LBL1"
V        IF  RC <>  0 THEN DO
V           MESG = "LABEL" LBL1 "NOT FOUND"
V           SIGNAL ERROR
V        END
V    END
V
V    IF  LBL2 <> ''  THEN DO
V       "ISREDIT L &LBL2"
V        IF  RC <>  0 THEN DO
V           MESG = "LABEL" LBL2 "NOT FOUND"
V           SIGNAL ERROR
V        END
V    END
V
V    IF  LBL1 <> ''  THEN  "ISREDIT (START) = LINENUM &LBL1"
V                    ELSE  START = 1
V    IF  LBL2 <> ''  THEN  "ISREDIT (END) = LINENUM &LBL2"
V                    ELSE  "ISREDIT (END) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
V
V    "ISREDIT ("ANUM") = AUTONUM"
V    "ISREDIT NUMBER OFF "
V
V    "ISREDIT SORT " SORTPARMS LBL1 LBL2
V
V    "ISREDIT (RECORD)  = LINE " START
V    PREVKEY = SUBSTR(RECORD,COL.1,COL.2-COL.1+1)
V    DO II = 3 TO PARMCNT BY 2
V       JJ = II + 1
V       PREVKEY = PREVKEY || SUBSTR(RECORD,COL.II,COL.JJ-COL.II+1)
V    END II
V    "ISREDIT RESET"
V    "ISREDIT LABEL "START" = .TMP"
V    LASTEQ = "NO"
V    SET    = 0
V
V    DO  PNTR  =  (START+1) TO END  BY 1
V       "ISREDIT (RECORD) = LINE" PNTR
V       NEXTKEY = SUBSTR(RECORD,COL.1,COL.2-COL.1+1)
V       DO II = 3 TO PARMCNT BY 2
V          JJ      = II + 1
V          NEXTKEY = NEXTKEY || SUBSTR(RECORD,COL.II,COL.JJ-COL.II+1)
V       END II
V       IF PREVKEY == NEXTKEY THEN DO
V          IF LASTEQ = "NO" THEN DO
V             SET    = SET + 1
V             LASTEQ = "YES"
V          END
V       END
V       ELSE DO
V          IF LASTEQ = "NO" THEN "ISREDIT X ALL .TMP .TMP"
V          ELSE LASTEQ = "NO"
V          "ISREDIT LABEL "PNTR" = .TMP"
V          IF  PNTR = END  THEN "ISREDIT X ALL .TMP .TMP"
V          PREVKEY = NEXTKEY
V       END
V    END PNTR
V
V    CALL SETMSG '* NO ' SET 'DUP KEY SETS $SETS OF DUPLICATE KEYS FOUND'
V    IF START = 1 THEN "ISREDIT LOCATE" 0
V                 ELSE DO
V                    START = START - 1
V                    "ISREDIT LOCATE" START
V                 END
V    "ISREDIT AUTONUM = "ANUM
V     SIGNAL EOJ
V
V ERROR:
V    IF MESG <> '' THEN DO
V       ERRORMSG = '===>' MESG
V    END
V    SIGNAL DISPDOC
V
V SETMSG:
V    PARSE ARG ZERRHM ZERRALRM ZERRSM'$'ZERRLM
V    ADDRESS ISPEXEC 'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002) COND'
V    RETURN
V
V EOJ:
V    RETURN
V
V DISPDOC:
V    SAY "FINDDUPS - SORT AND SHOW ANY DUPS WITHIN A FILE"
V    SAY
V    SAY ERRORMSG
V    SAY
V    SAY " FORMAT "
V    SAY
V    SAY "    FINDDUPS  COL1 COL2  ...  .LABEL1 .LABEL2"
V    SAY
V    SAY "    ONE PAIR OF COLUMNS IS MANDATORY. UP TO 10 PAIRS "
V    SAY "    MAY BE SPECIFIED. "
V    SAY
V    SAY " EXAMPLE "
V    SAY
V    SAY "    FINDDUPS  17 19  4 11 "
V    SAY
V    SAY "       WILL SORT FILE BY COLUMNS 17 THRU 19 AND 4 "
V    SAY "       THRU 11 SHOWING (UNEXCLUDING) ONLY THOSE "
V    SAY "       RECORDS WITH DUPLICATE KEYS."
V    SAY
V    RETURN
V
VMEMBER NAME  FINDMOD
V/* REXX  */
V/*                           */
V/* AUTHOR: MARK ZELDEN       */
V/*                           */
V/***********************************************************/
V/*  Quickly find the location of a module (or modules).    */
V/*  The specified module name may be fully qualified or    */
V/*  any valid ISPF member pattern.                         */
V/*                                                         */
V/*  By default, the LPA and LNKLST concatenation are       */
V/*  searched. Alternatively, a "search list member" may    */
V/*  be specified. In order to use the search list, the     */
V/*  libraries to search must be manually added to a        */
V/*  PDS member (or members).                               */
V/*                                                         */
V/*  The library that the optional search member list must  */
V/*  reside in is defined by the MBRLIB variable below.     */
V/*  A suggested member list name is FINDxxxx where xxxx is */
V/*  the SMFID of the system, or a descriptive name such    */
V/*  as FINDPROC or FINDCICS. The search list should        */
V/*  specify only one library per line. An "*" in column    */
V/*  one indicates the line is a comment.                   */
V/*                                                         */
V/*  SAMPLE SEARCH LIST:                                    */
V/*  *---+----1----+----2----+----3----+----4----+----5     */
V/*  ******************************                         */
V/*  * PROC LIBS                                            */
V/*  ******************************                         */
V/*  SYS1.PROCLIB                                           */
V/*  SYS1.IBM.PROCLIB                                       */
V/*  USER.PROCLIB                                           */
V/*  ******************************                         */
V/*  * CLIST LIBS                                           */
V/*  ******************************                         */
V/*  SYS1.CLIST                                             */
V/*  USER.CLIST1                                            */
V/*  USER.CLIST2                                            */
V/*                                                         */
V/***********************************************************/
V/* EXECUTION SYNTAX:                                       */
V/*                                                         */
V/* TSO %FINDMOD <mbr pattern> (search list name) (BOTH)    */
V/*                                                         */
V/* If a search list name is specified, only the libraries  */
V/* in the search list will be searched, unless the "BOTH"  */
V/* option is used. The "BOTH" option will search the       */
V/* libraries in the search list first, then the LPA and    */
V/* LNKLST.                                                 */
V/*                                                         */
V/* EXAMPLES:                                               */
V/* TSO %FINDMOD         (will prompt for module name)      */
V/* TSO %FINDMOD IEFBR14 (search LPA & LNKLST for IEFBR14)  */
V/* TSO %FINDMOD LLA FINDPROC (find LLA using FINDPROC list)*/
V/* TSO %FINDMOD A%R*  (use mask to search LPA & LNKLST)    */
V/* TSO %FINDMOD MYPROG BOTH (use list, LPA, & LNKLST)      */
V/*                                                         */
V/* NOTE: This exec can be executed as an ISPF EDIT MACRO   */
V/*   from ISPF EDIT or VIEW from the command line without  */
V/*   using the "TSO" prefix.  Example: FINDMOD IEFBR14     */
V/***********************************************************/
Varg NAME MEMBER OPT DEBUG
V/***********************************************************/
VLASTUPD = '04/24/2001'     /* date of last update          */
V/***********************************************************/
Vparse upper arg
VIf Sysvar(SYSISPF) <> 'ACTIVE' then do
V  Say 'FINDMOD must be invoked from ISPF, terminating!'
V  Exit 12
VEnd
Vaddress ISREDIT "MACRO (NAME MEMBER OPT DEBUG)"
VNAME   = translate(NAME)    /* chg to upper case for edit macro */
VMEMBER = translate(MEMBER)  /* chg to upper case for edit macro */
VOPT    = translate(OPT)     /* chg to upper case for edit macro */
VDEBUG  = translate(DEBUG)   /* chg to upper case for edit macro */
VIf OPT <> '' & OPT <> 'BOTH' then do
V  Say '"BOTH" is the only valid option'
V  Exit 8
VEnd
VIf debug = 'DEBUG' then trace ?i
V/*********************************************************/
V/* MBRLIB  = 'SYS2.PARMLIB'  */
VMBRLIB  = 'MPSYS3.USZ1000.CNTL'
V/*********************************************************/
VNUMLIBS = 0  /* total number of libraries to be searched */
Vcall CHECK_MODNAME           /* check module name syntax */
VIf MEMBER = '' then call GET_LPALNK  /* use LPA/LNKLST   */
VElse do
V  Call GET_LIBNAMES          /* use optional search list */
V  If OPT = 'BOTH' then call GET_LPALNK /* use LPA/LNKLST */
VEnd
V/*********************************************************/
V/*   BEGIN MODULE SEARCH                                 */
V/*********************************************************/
VFOUND = 'NO' /* found flag */
VIf member = '' then do
V  Say   '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V  Say   '   (Using LPA & LNKLST' || setname || ')'
V  Queue '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V  Queue '   (Using LPA & LNKLST' || setname || ')'
VEnd
VElse do
V  If OPT = 'BOTH' then do
V    Say   '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V    Say   '   (Using list 'member || ', LPA,' ,
V          '& LNKLST' || setname || ')'
V    Queue '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V    Queue '   (Using list 'member || ', LPA,' ,
V          '& LNKLST' || setname || ')'
V  End
V  Else Do
V    Say   '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V    Say   '   (Using search list 'member || ')'
V    Queue '...Searching for 'name' in 'numlibs' libraries'
V    Queue '   (Using search list 'member || ')'
V  End
VEnd
VSay   '   '
VQueue '   '
VDo SEARCH = 1 to LIB.0
V  LIB.SEARCH = word(LIB.SEARCH,1)
V  /* Say   'Searching' lib.search  */
V  /* Queue 'Searching' lib.search  */
V  Address ISPEXEC "LMINIT DATAID(FINDMOD1) DATASET('"lib.search"')"
V  If RC <> 0 then do
V    Say   Strip(ZERRLM)
V    Queue Strip(ZERRLM)
V    Iterate  /* go get next library to search on error */
V  End /* if RC <> 0 */
V  Address ISPEXEC "LMOPEN DATAID("FINDMOD1") RECFM(RFVAR)"
V  If RC <> 0 then do
V    Say   Strip(ZERRLM)
V    Queue Strip(ZERRLM)
V    Address ISPEXEC "LMFREE DATAID("FINDMOD1")"
V    Iterate  /* go get next library to search on error */
V  End /* if RC <> 0 */
V  MEMVAR = ' '
V  ZLM4DATE = '' /* reset each new library because of stats yes/no */
V  Do forever
V    If RFVAR = 'FB' then ,
V      Address ISPEXEC "LMMLIST DATAID("FINDMOD1") OPTION(LIST) ",
V              "MEMBER(MEMVAR) PATTERN("NAME") STATS(YES)"
V    Else ,
V      Address ISPEXEC "LMMLIST DATAID("FINDMOD1") OPTION(LIST) ",
V              "MEMBER(MEMVAR) PATTERN("NAME") STATS(NO)"
V    If RC = 0 then do  /* match found */
V      FOUND = 'YES'
V      If ZLM4DATE = 'ZLM4DATE' | ZLM4DATE = '' then do /* no stats */
V        Say   memvar 'found in' lib.search
V        Queue memvar 'found in' lib.search
V      End
V      Else do /* stats */
V        Say   memvar 'found in' lib.search "(Lastupd "ZLM4DATE")"
V        Queue memvar 'found in' lib.search "(Lastupd "ZLM4DATE")"
V      End
V    End
V    Else do  /* no match found, or no more in list */
V      Address ISPEXEC "LMCLOSE DATAID("FINDMOD1")"
V      Address ISPEXEC "LMFREE DATAID("FINDMOD1")"
V      Leave /* leave loop, go search next library if any */
V    End /* else do */
V  End  /* do forever */
VEnd /* do SEARCH */
VIf FOUND = 'NO' then do
V  Say   NAME 'was not found in any library'
V  Queue NAME 'was not found in any library'
VEnd
V/*********************************************************************/
V/* Browse results                                                    */
V/*********************************************************************/
VQueue ''  /* null queue to end stack   */
VAddress ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
VAddress ISPEXEC "VGET ZENVIR"
VAddress TSO
Vprefix = sysvar('SYSPREF')        /* tso profile prefix            */
Vuid    = sysvar('SYSUID')         /* tso userid                    */
VIf prefix = '' then prefix = uid  /* use uid if null prefix        */
VIf prefix <> '' & prefix <> uid then /* different prefix than uid  */
V   prefix = prefix || '.' || uid /* use  prefix.uid                */
Vddnm1 = 'DD'||random(1,99999)   /* choose random ddname            */
Vddnm2 = 'DD'||random(1,99999)   /* choose random ddname            */
Vjunk = msg(off)
V"ALLOC FILE("||ddnm1||") UNIT(SYSALLDA) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,1) DELETE",
V      " REUSE LRECL(80) RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(3120)"
V"ALLOC FILE("||ddnm2||") UNIT(SYSALLDA) NEW TRACKS SPACE(1,1) DELETE",
V      " REUSE LRECL(80) RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(3120) DIR(1)",
V      " DA('"||prefix||".FINDMOD." ||ddnm2|| ".ISPPLIB')"
Vjunk = msg(on)
VNewstack

V  Queue ")PANEL KEYLIST(ISRSPBC,ISR)"

VQueue " 12 TYPE(DATAOUT) INTENS(LOW)  FORMAT(&MIXED)"

VQueue ")PROC"
VQueue "  &ZCURSOR = .CURSOR"
VQueue "  &ZCSROFF = .CSRPOS"
VQueue "  &ZLVLINE = LVLINE(ZDATA)"
VQueue "  VPUT (ZSCBR) PROFILE"
VQueue ")END"
VQueue ""

V      " DA('"||prefix||".FINDMOD." ||ddnm2|| ".ISPPLIB(FINDMODP)')"

V"FREE FI(FINDMODP)"
VDelstack
V"EXECIO * DISKW" ddnm1 "(FINIS"
VIf FOUND = 'NO' then zedsmsg = NAME 'NOT FOUND'
V                else zedsmsg = NAME 'WAS FOUND'

VElse ,

VAddress ISPEXEC "LMINIT DATAID(TEMP) DDNAME("ddnm1")"
