VCHECK_MODNAME:
VIf NAME = '' then do
V  Say 'Please enter module name or pattern to find:'
V  Parse upper pull name
V  Call CHECK_MODNAME
VEnd
VIf length(NAME) >8  then do
V  Say 'Module name' NAME 'invalid - must be less that 8 chars.'
V  Say 'Please re-enter module name or pattern to find:'
V  Parse upper pull name
V  Call CHECK_MODNAME
VEnd
VReturn
V
VGET_LIBNAMES:
VCHKMBR = sysdsn("'"mbrlib"("member")'")
VIf  CHKMBR <> 'OK' then do
V  Say ''
V  Say 'Search list member 'member' does not exist in 'mbrlib
V  Say ''
V  Exit 8
VEnd
Vjunk = msg(off)
V"ALLOC DA('"||mbrlib||"("||member||")') F(LIBLIST) SHR REUSE"
V"EXECIO * DISKR LIBLIST (STEM LIST. FINIS"
V"FREE F(LIBLIST)"
Vjunk = msg(on)
VDo COUNT = 1 to LIST.0
V  LIBNAME = word(LIST.COUNT,1)
V  If substr(LIBNAME,1,1) = '*' then iterate
V  NUMLIBS = NUMLIBS + 1
V  LIB.NUMLIBS = LIBNAME
VEnd /* do count */
VLIB.0 = NUMLIBS   /* tot libs to search*/
VReturn
V
VGET_LPALNK:
VCVT      = C2d(Storage(10,4))                /* point to CVT        */
VFMIDNUM  = Storage(D2x(CVT - 32),7)          /* point to fmid       */
V/*                                                                  */
V/* GET LPA LIST                                                     */
V/*                                                                  */
VCVTSMEXT = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVT + 1196),4))  /* point to stg map ext.*/
VCVTEPLPS = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTSMEXT+56),4)) /* point to stg map ext.*/
VNUMLPA   = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTEPLPS+4),4))  /* # LPA libs in table  */
VLPAOFF   = 8                                /* first ent in LPA tbl */
VDo I = 1 to NUMLPA
V  LEN = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTEPLPS+LPAOFF),1)) /* length of entry     */
V  DSN = Storage(D2x(CVTEPLPS+LPAOFF+1),LEN)  /* DSN of LPA library  */
V  LPAOFF = LPAOFF + 44 + 1                   /* next entry in table */
V  NUMLIBS = NUMLIBS + 1                      /* add 1 to tot libs   */
V  LIB.NUMLIBS = DSN                          /* add dsn to stem     */
VEnd
V/*                                                                  */
V/* GET LNKLST                                                       */
V/*                                                                  */
VIf Substr(FMIDNUM,4,4) < 6602 then do   /* pre os/390 1.2 system?   */
V  CVTLLTA  = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVT + 1244),4))  /* point to lnklst tbl*/
V  NUMLNK   = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+4),4))   /* # LNK libs in table*/
V  LNKOFF   = 8                                /*first ent in LBK tbl*/
V  SETNAME  = ''   /* no LNKLST set for pre OS/390 1.2 systems       */
V  Do I = 1 to NUMLNK
V     LEN = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+LNKOFF),1)) /* length of entry   */
V     DSN = Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+LNKOFF+1),LEN)  /* DSN of LNK lib    */
V     LNKOFF = LNKOFF + 44 + 1                  /* next entry in tbl */
V     NUMLIBS = NUMLIBS + 1                     /* add 1 to tot libs */
V     LIB.NUMLIBS = DSN                         /* add dsn to stem   */
V  End
VEnd
VElse do  /* OS/390 1.2 and above - PROGxx capable LNKLST            */
V  ASCB     = C2d(Storage(224,4))             /* point to ASCB       */
V  ASSB     = C2d(Storage(D2x(ASCB+336),4))   /* point to ASSB       */
V  DLCB     = C2d(Storage(D2x(ASSB+236),4))   /* point to CSVDLCB    */
V  SETNAME  = Storage(D2x(DLCB + 36),16)      /* LNKLST set name     */
V  SETNAME  = Strip(SETNAME,T)                /* del trailing blanks */
V  CVTLLTA  = C2d(Storage(D2x(DLCB + 16),4))  /* point to lnklst tbl */
V  LLTX     = C2d(Storage(D2x(DLCB + 20),4))  /* point to LLTX       */
V  NUMLNK   = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+4),4))  /* # LNK libs in table */
V  LNKOFF   = 8                               /*first ent in LLT tbl */
V  Do I = 1 to NUMLNK
V    LEN = C2d(Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+LNKOFF),1))  /* length of entry   */
V    LKDSN = Storage(D2x(CVTLLTA+LNKOFF+1),LEN) /* DSN of LNK lib    */
V    LNKOFF = LNKOFF + 44 + 1                   /* next entry in LLT */
V    NUMLIBS = NUMLIBS + 1                      /* add 1 to tot libs */
V    LIB.NUMLIBS = LKDSN                        /* add dsn to stem   */
V  End
V  SETNAME  = ' Set 'SETNAME
VEnd
VLIB.0 = NUMLIBS                                /* tot libs to search*/
VReturn
V
VMEMBER NAME  FIXPUF
V/* DELETE IRRELEVANT ROWS FROM THE SPUFI OUTPUT */                      0001000
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0002000
V  ISREDIT X ALL                                                         0002800
V  ISREDIT FIND '_|' ALL                                                 0002900
V  ISREDIT (FINDS) = FIND_COUNTS                                         0002910
V  ISREDIT DELETE X ALL                                                  0002920
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0009000
VMEMBER NAME  FLOATING
V/* This REXX exec computes a S/370 floating-point's value ...           0001000
V   e.g. X'C1280000' represents -2.5                                     0002000
V                                  (Michel Castelein, 5 November 1997) */0003000
V/* Added argument parsing         (Victor Gil,       16 August  2004) */0003100
Vparse arg float                                                         0003200
Vif float = "" then do                                                   0003300
V   say 'Enter the S/370 floating-point (4, 8, or 16 bytes):'            0003400
V   pull float                                                           0003410
Vend                                                                     0003500
V/**/                                                                    0003600
Vfloat = X2C(float)           /* convert float to a hexadecimal string */0006000
Vfloat_size = LENGTH(float)                           /* size in Bytes */0007000
VByte_0 = SUBSTR(float, 1, 1)                                            0008000
Vselect; when BITAND(Byte_0, '80'x) == '00'x then sign = '+'             0009000
V        when BITAND(Byte_0, '80'x) == '80'x then sign = '-'             0010000
V        end                                                             0011000
Vexponent = C2D(BITAND(Byte_0, '7F'x)) - 64                              0012000
Vfraction = 0                                                            0013000
Vpower    = -1                                                           0014000
Vdo i = 2 to float_size                                                  0015000
V   if i = 9 then iterate                           /* skip bits 64-71 */0016000
V   Next_Byte   = C2D(SUBSTR(float, i, 1))                               0017000
V   left_Digit  = Next_Byte %  16                                        0018000
V   fraction    = fraction + left_Digit * 16**power                      0019000
V   right_Digit = Next_Byte // 16                                        0020000
V   power       = power - 1                                              0021000
V   fraction    = fraction + right_Digit * 16**power                     0022000
V   power       = power - 1                                              0023000
Vend                                                                     0024000
Vinterpret 'value =' sign ( fraction * 16 ** exponent )                  0025000
Vsay "The floating-point's value is" value                               0026000
VMEMBER NAME  FNOT
V/* REXX                                                             */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)                 */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  THIS MACRO FINDS LINES WITH VARIABLE X AND NOT WITH VARIABLE Y  */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  E.G. FNOT PERFORM THRU                                          */
V/*       (WILL FIND  A LINE WITH THE WORD "PERFORM" AND             */
V/*        NOT WITH THE WORD "THRU")                                 */
V/*                                                                  */
V"ISREDIT MACRO (@X @Y) NOPROCESS       "
V
VIF (@X = '') & (@Y = '') THEN
V   DO
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@X) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@Y) SHARED"
V   END
V
VIF (@X = '') & (@Y = '') THEN
V   DO
V     SAY 'NO VARIABLES ENTERED'
V     SAY 'FNOT MACRO TERMINATED '
V     EXIT
V   END
V
V@X = TRANSLATE(@X)
V@Y = TRANSLATE(@Y)
V
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@X) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@Y) SHARED"
V
V @LX = LENGTH(@X)
V @LY = LENGTH(@Y)
V
V"ISREDIT (@LASTONE) = LINENUM" .ZLAST
V"ISREDIT (@CURLINE) = LINENUM" .ZCSR
V @FOUND = N
V @CURLINE = @CURLINE + 2
V
VDO WHILE @CURLINE ｼ> @LASTONE
V   "ISREDIT (@LV) = LINE" @CURLINE
V   @LV = TRANSLATE(@LV)
V   @S1 = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@X,1,@LX))
V   @S2 = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@Y,1,@LY))
V   IF (@S1 > 0) & (@S2 ｼ> 0) THEN
V     DO
V        @FOUND = Y
V        ZPF13 = FNOT
V        "ISPEXEC VPUT (ZPF13) PROFILE"
V         @MSG = 'FOUND LINE WITH' @X ' AND NOT WITH ' @Y
V         ZEDLMSG = @MSG
V        "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V        "ISREDIT LOCATE" @CURLINE
V        "ISREDIT UP 1"
V         LEAVE
V     END
V   @CURLINE = @CURLINE + 1
VEND
VIF @FOUND = N THEN
V   DO
V      ZEDLMSG = "LITERAL NOT FOUND"
V      "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V   END
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  FROMSDSF
V/* Rexx */                                                              0001000
V/* THIS REXX PRINTS THE CURRENT JOB LOG TO A DATASET */                 0001100
V/* OBTAIN CURRENT JOB NAME */                                           0001310
V cvt = storage(10,4)                                                    0001400
V tcbp = storage(d2x(c2d(cvt)),4)                                        0001500
V tcb = storage(d2x(c2d(tcbp)+4),4)                                      0001600
V tiot = storage(d2x(c2d(tcb)+12),4)                                     0001700
V jobn =storage(d2x(c2d(tiot)),8)                                        0001800
V/* BUILD THE SDSF CONTROL STATEMENTS */                                 0001910
V address 'TSO'                                                          0002000
V  "allocate file(ISFIN) new unit(VIO) space(1600,2) reuse"              0003000
V  push "print close                 "                                   0005000
V  push "print                       "                                   0006000
V  push "print file logfile          "                                   0007000
V  push "++s                         "                                   0008000
V  push "find "jobn                                                      0009000
V  push "da                          "                                   0010000
V  push "owner                       "                                   0011000
V  push "prefix "jobn                                                    0012000
V  "execio 8 diskw isfin (finis      "                                   0013000
V/* INVOKE SFSF */                                                       0013100
V  "tsoexec call 'isf.sisfload(sdsf)'"                                   0014000
VMEMBER NAME  FSQL
V/**********************************************************************/
V/* EDIT MACRO COMMAND ARE EXECUTED BY TYPE THE MEMBER NAME ONLY.  IT  */
V/* DOES NOT REQUIRE TO TYPE TSO EDITMACRO-NAME TO EXECUTE             */
V/**********************************************************************/
V
VISREDIT MACRO (DEBUG)
V    IF &DEBUG EQ DEBUG THEN CONTROL LIST CONLIST SYMLIST MSG END(ENDX)
V    ELSE CONTROL MSG END(ENDX)
V
V    DO WHILE &LASTCC = 0
V        ISREDIT FIND NX 'EXEC SQL'
V        IF &LASTCC = 0 THEN +
V            ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR  = .A  0
V        ELSE +
V            GOTO NODE_1
V
V        ISREDIT FIND NX 'END-EXEC'
V        IF &LASTCC = 0 THEN +
V            DO
V                ISREDIT (LNUM) = LINENUM .ZCSR
V                ISREDIT LINE_AFTER &LNUM = ' '
V                SET &LNUM = &LNUM + 1
V                ISREDIT LABEL &LNUM  = .B  0
V            ENDX
V        ELSE +
V            GOTO NODE_1
V
V        IF &LASTCC = 0      +
V        OR &LASTCC = 8 THEN +
V            ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL .A .B
V    ENDX
V
VNODE_1: +
V    ISREDIT FLIP
V    ISREDIT UP M
V    EXIT CODE(1)
VMEMBER NAME  FX
VISREDIT MACRO (OP)
V/****************************************************
V/*  DISPLAY DS INFORMATION FOR A CATALOGUED DS      *
V/*  IF CURSOR POSITIONED ON THE DS LINE IN THE TEXT *
V/****************************************************
VIF &OP = T  THEN +
V   DO
V     CONTROL CONLIST
V     SET &OP =
V   END
VIF &OP = ON THEN +
V   DO
V     SET ZPF01 = %XDS
V     ISPEXEC VPUT ( ZPF01 )
V     WRITE XDS SET ON PF01
V     EXIT
V   END
V/****************************************************
VSTART: +
VISREDIT ( LAN COL ) = CURSOR
VSET &COL = &COL
VCONTROL NOFLUSH
VIF &COL = 0 THEN +
V   DO
V     ISREDIT (TOP BOT) = DISPLAY_LINES
V     SET LAN = &TOP
V   END
V/****************************************************
V/*  FIND THE TEXT IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING CURSOR      *
V/****************************************************
VISREDIT    (THISLINE) = LINE &LAN
VIF  &NRSTR(&THISLINE) = THEN GOTO EX
VSET FIRST     = &SYSINDEX(' ',&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VSET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((0),&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((+,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((-,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX(@,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V/**************************************************************
VIF  &FIRST     = 0      +
VAND &COL       = 0 THEN GOTO TUTOR
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET &COLEND = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V    SET &COLEND = &LAST - 1
V
VIF &FIRST      = 0 THEN +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&COL:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&FIRST+4:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V
V/**************************************************************
VSET &SYSDVAL  = &NRSTR(&THISLINE)
VREADDVAL &V1
VSET &VLEN     = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&V1))
VIF  &VLEN     = 0       THEN GOTO EX
V/*
V/* &LAST ｬ= 0 THEN +
V/* DO
V/*     ISPEXEC SELECT PGM(ISRDSLST) +
V/*           PARM(DSL '&V1') SUSPEND SCRNAME(DSLIST)
V/*     GOTO EX
V/* END
V/*
V/*T STAT      = &STR(&SYSDSN('&V1'))
V/*IF &STR(&STAT)  ｬ= OK THEN +
V/*   DO
V/*      WRITE  ============ FX  COMMAND ==============
V/*    WRITE    '&V1'
V/*    WRITE    '&V1'  &STR(&STAT)
V/*    WRITE  =======================================
V/*    GOTO EX
V/* END
V/**********************************************************************/
V/* EDIT MACRO COMMAND ARE EXECUTED BY TYPE THE MEMBER NAME ONLY.  IT  */
V/* DOES NOT REQUIRE TO TYPE TSO EDITMACRO-NAME TO EXECUTE             */
V/**********************************************************************/
V    ISREDIT EXCLUDE             ALL
V    ISREDIT FIND '&V1'          ALL
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  F1
V/* REXX                                                        */
V/*                                                             */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)            */
V/*                                                             */
V/*                                                             */
V/*  THIS MACRO FINDS LINES WITH ANY OF THE 4 VARIABLES ENTERED */
V/*  YOU CAN ENTER 1, 2, 3 OR 4 VARIABLES                       */
V/*                                                             */
V/*  E.G. F1 MOVE PERFORM                                       */
V/*       (WILL FIND A LINE WITH THE WORD "MOVE" OR "PERFORM"   */
V/*       AFTER ENTERING THIS YOU CAN JUST PRESS PF13 TO REPEAT */
V/*       FIND THE SAME VARIABLES OR ENTER F1 WITH NO           */
V/*       VARIABLES TO CONTINUE SEARCHING FOR THE ORIGINAL      */
V/*       VARIABLES ENTERED.                                    */
V/*                                                             */
V/***************************************************************/
V"ISREDIT MACRO (@A @B @C @D) NOPROCESS        "
V/*                                                             */
VIF (@A = '') & (@B = '') &(@C = '') & (@D = '' ) THEN
V   DO
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@A) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@B) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@C) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@D) SHARED"
V   END
V
VIF (@A = '') & (@B = '') &(@C = '') & (@D = '' ) THEN
V   DO
V     SAY 'NO VARIABLES ENTERED'
V     SAY 'F1 MACRO TERMINATED '
V     EXIT
V   END
V
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@A) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@B) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@C) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@D) SHARED"
V
V@A = TRANSLATE(@A)
V@B = TRANSLATE(@B)
V@C = TRANSLATE(@C)
V@D = TRANSLATE(@D)
V
V/*                                                         */
V"ISREDIT (@LASTONE) = LINENUM" .ZLAST
V"ISREDIT (@CURLINE) = LINENUM" .ZCSR
V
V @LA = LENGTH(@A)
V @LB = LENGTH(@B)
V @LC = LENGTH(@C)
V @LD = LENGTH(@D)
V
V@FOUND = N
V@CURLINE = @CURLINE + 2
V
VDO WHILE @CURLINE ｼ> @LASTONE
V   "ISREDIT (@LV) = LINE" @CURLINE
V   @LV = TRANSLATE(@LV)
V   @SA = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@A,1,@LA))
V
V   IF @B = '' THEN
V      @SB = 0
V   ELSE;
V     DO
V        @SB = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@B,1,@LB))
V     END
V
V   IF @C = '' THEN
V      @SC = 0
V   ELSE;
V     DO
V        @SC = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@C,1,@LC))
V     END
V
V   IF @D = '' THEN
V      @SD = 0
V   ELSE;
V     DO
V        @SD = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@D,1,@LD))
V     END
V
V   IF (@SA > 0) | (@SB > 0) | (@SC > 0) | (@SD > 0) THEN
V     DO
V         @FOUND = Y
V         ZPF13 = F1
V        "ISPEXEC VPUT (ZPF13) PROFILE"
V         @MSG = 'FOUND'
V         IF @SA > 0 THEN
V            @MSG = @MSG @A
V         IF @SB > 0 THEN
V            @MSG = @MSG  @B
V         IF @SC > 0 THEN
V            @MSG = @MSG  @C
V         IF @SD > 0 THEN
V            @MSG = @MSG  @D
V         @MSG = @MSG '    ('@A  @B  @C  @D')'
V         ZEDLMSG = @MSG
V         "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V        "ISREDIT LOCATE" @CURLINE
V        "ISREDIT UP 1"
V         LEAVE
V     END
V   @CURLINE = @CURLINE + 1
VEND
V
VIF @FOUND = N THEN
V   DO
V      ZEDLMSG = "LITERALS NOT FOUND"
V      "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V   END
VMEMBER NAME  F3
V/*****************************************************************/
V/* REXX                                                          */
V/*                                                               */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)              */
V/*                                                               */
V/*                                                               */
V/*  THIS MACRO FINDS LINESWITH VARIABLE @X AND VARIABLE @Y       */
V/*                         AND VARIABLE @Z                       */
V/*                                                               */
V/*  THIS MACRO FINDS LINES WITH ALL OF THE 3 VARIABLES ENTERED   */
V/*  YOU CAN ENTER 1, 2, OR 3 VARIABLES                           */
V/*                                                               */
V/*  E.G. F3   THRU PERFORM                                       */
V/*       (WILL FIND  A LINE WITH THE WORDS "THRU" AND "PERFORM"  */
V/*                                     AND "EXIT"                */
V/*       AFTER ENTERING THIS YOU CAN JUST PRESS PF13 TO REPEAT   */
V/*       FIND THE SAME VARIABLES OR ENTER F3 WITH NO             */
V/*       VARIABLES TO CONTINUE SEARCHING FOR THE ORIGINAL        */
V/*       VARIABLES ENTERED.                                      */
V/*****************************************************************/
V
V"ISREDIT MACRO (@X @Y @Z) NOPROCESS    "
V
V
VIF (@X = "") & (@Y = "") & (@Z = "") THEN
V   DO
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@X) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@Y) SHARED"
V     "ISPEXEC VGET (@Z) SHARED"
V   END
V
VIF (@X = '') & (@Y = '') & (@Z = '') THEN
V   DO
V     SAY 'NO VARIABLES ENTERED'
V     SAY 'F3 MACRO TERMINATED '
V     EXIT
V   END
V
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@X) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@Y) SHARED"
V"ISPEXEC VPUT (@Z) SHARED"
V
V@X = TRANSLATE(@X)
V@Y = TRANSLATE(@Y)
V@Z = TRANSLATE(@Z)
V
V"ISREDIT (@LASTONE) = LINENUM" .ZLAST
V"ISREDIT (@CURLINE) = LINENUM" .ZCSR
V
V @LX = LENGTH(@X)
V @LY = LENGTH(@Y)
V @LZ = LENGTH(@Z)
V@FOUND = Y
V@CURLINE = @CURLINE + 2
V
VDO WHILE @FOUND = 'Y'
V   "ISREDIT FIND " @X
V   IF RC = 0 THEN
V      DO
V         "ISREDIT (@CURLINE) = LINENUM" .ZCSR
V         "ISREDIT (@LV) = LINE" @CURLINE
V          @LV = TRANSLATE(@LV)
V          IF @Y = '' THEN
V             @S2 = 0
V          ELSE;
V            DO
V               @S2 = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@Y,1,@LY))
V/*             SAY 'LV  ' @LV
V               SAY ' S2 ' @S2 */
V            END
V          IF @Z = '' THEN
V             @S3 = 0
V          ELSE;
V            DO
V               @S3 = INDEX(@LV,SUBSTR(@Z,1,@LZ))
V            END
V
V/*        SAY ' S2 ' @S2 'Y ' @Y ' S3 ' @S3 ' Z ' @Z */
V          IF (((@S2 > 0) | (@Y = ''))  & ,
V             ((@S3 > 0) | (@Z = ''))) THEN
V            DO
V               @FOUND = Y
V               ZPF13 = F3
V               "ISPEXEC VPUT (ZPF13) PROFILE"
V                @MSG = 'FOUND'
V                @MSG = @MSG  @X
V                IF @S2 > 0 THEN
V                   @MSG = @MSG  @Y
V                IF @S3 > 0 THEN
V                   @MSG = @MSG  @Z
V                ZEDLMSG = @MSG
V               "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V               "ISREDIT LOCATE" @CURLINE
V               "ISREDIT UP 1"
V                LEAVE
V            END
V      END
V   ELSE
V    @FOUND = N
VEND
VIF @FOUND = N THEN
V   DO
V      ZEDLMSG = "LITERALS NOT FOUND"
V      "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V   END
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  GDGL
V/* Rexx GDGL                                                          */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* GDGL    : LISTCAT GDG ALL                                          */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VArg str
VAddress TSO Clear
VAddress TSO "LISTC ENTRIES("str") GDG ALL"
V       If RC > 0 Then Do
V          ZEDSMSG = '*Obtain Failed*'
V          "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          Exit 0
V       End
VExit
VMEMBER NAME  GERRY
V/* REXX */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/*                                                                    */
V/*                 THIS REXX IS CREATED BY TONY GAW                   */
V/*                                                                    */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V
V/* SET A PFKEY TO  CONTAIN '%PTNSHOOT' NOT 'TSO %PTNSHOOT' */
VADDRESS ISREDIT
V    'MACRO ( OP )'
V    'ISREDIT (NUMMODE, OPTION) = NUMBER'
V
V    CHKNUM = INDEX(OPTION, 'NOCOBOL')
V
V    IF NUMMODE = 'ON' & CHKNUM = '0'  THEN
V        DO
V            STP     = 2
V            COL     = 2
V            COMMENT = 1
V            PADDER  = '     '
V        END
V    ELSE
V        DO
V            STP     = 1
V            COL     = 8
V            COMMENT = 7
V            PADDER  = '           '
V        END
V
V    IF OP /= '' THEN
V        PGM = '** '||OP||': '
V    ELSE
V        PGM = ''
V
V    'ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL'
V    'ISREDIT FIND PROCEDURE &COL'
V    'ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR =   .XX 0'
V    'ISREDIT FIND P"ｬ"      &COL'
V
V    DO FOREVER
V        IF RC /= 0 THEN
V            DO
V                CALL SHOW
V                EXIT
V            END
V        'ISREDIT (A1 B1)     = CURSOR'
V        'ISREDIT (THISLINE)  = LINE &A1'
V        'ISREDIT CURSOR = &A1'
V        IF SUBSTR(THISLINE, COMMENT, 1) /= '*' THEN
V            DO
V                CALL CAPTURE
V                STRING = PADDER||"DISPLAY '&PGM&THISLINE'"||'.'
V                'ISREDIT LINE_AFTER  &A1 = DATALINE "&STRING"'
V            END
V     /* 'ISREDIT FIND P"ｬ" &COL' */
V        'ISREDIT RFIND'
V    END
V
V
VCAPTURE:
V    'ISREDIT (A1 B1)     = CURSOR'
V    'ISREDIT (THISLINE)  = LINE &A1'
V
V    BB   = B1
V    LOOP = 0
V    DO WHILE LOOP = 0
V        IF BB > STP THEN
V            DO
V                IF SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= ' ',
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= ':',
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= '=',
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= '.',
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= "'",
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= '(',
V                &  SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, 1) /= ')'  THEN
V                    BB = BB - 1
V                ELSE
V                    DO
V                       BB = BB + 1
V                       LOOP = 1
V                    END
V             END
V        ELSE
V            LOOP = 1
V    END
V
V    LN   = 0
V    LOOP = 0
V    DO WHILE LOOP = 0
V        IF  SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= ' ',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= ':',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= ',',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= '=',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= '.',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= "'",
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= '(',
V        &   SUBSTR(THISLINE,BB+LN,1) /= ')'   THEN
V            LN = LN + 1
V        ELSE
V            LOOP = 1
V    END
V
V    /*LN = LN - 1*/
V
V    THISLINE = SUBSTR(THISLINE, BB, LN)
V
V    RETURN
V
VSHOW:
V    'ISREDIT FIND P"ｬ"   &COL     .XX .ZL ALL'
V    'ISREDIT EXCLUDE "*" &COMMENT .XX .ZL ALL'
V    RETURN
VMEMBER NAME  GMT
V/* REXX GMT OFFSET */
V/* GET THE LOCAL OFFSET FROM GMT */
VCVT   = STORAGE(10,4)                      /*GET THE CVT ADDRESS*/
VCVTTZ = STORAGE(D2X(C2D(CVT)+X2D(130)),4)  /*GET CVTTZ VALUE*/
VGMT_OFFSET = TRUNC(C2D(CVTTZ,4) * 1.048576 / 3600) /*CONVERT TO OFFSET*/
VIF SIGN(GMT_OFFSET) < 0 THEN GMT_SIGN = '-'
V                        ELSE GMT_SIGN = '+'
VGMT_OFFSET_HHMM = GMT_SIGN||RIGHT(ABS(GMT_OFFSET)*100,4,'0') /*FORMAT*/
VSAY GMT_OFFSET_HHMM
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  G2J
V/* REXX G2J */
V/* Parse the passed date */
V/* TSO G2J 31/12/2003 Y  */
VARG greg_date show
VPARSE VAR greg_date day "/" month "/" year
V/* Calculate the Julian date */
VFEB = 28 + (year // 4 = 0) - (year // 100 = 0) + (year // 400 = 0)
Vmonths = "31" FEB "31 30 31 30 31 31 30 31 30 31"
Vdays = day
VDO count = 1 while count < ABS(SUBSTR(greg_date,4,2))
V   days = days + word(months,count)
VEND
V/* Return or display the date */
VIF show = "" THEN
V  RETURN year""right(days,3,'0')
VELSE
V  DO
V    SAY "Gregorian date: '"greg_date"'"
V    SAY "   Julian date: '"year""right(days,3,'0')"'"
V  END
VMEMBER NAME  G2JDATE
V/* G2JDate date ********************************************** REXX */
V/* Convert Gregorian date To Julian date                            */
V/* Program By CT Tran Program Products    X4506          4/91       */
V/* This is a Rexx function executable as                            */
V/*  Jdate = g2jdate(12/12/91)   The julian YYDDD is   in Jdate      */
V/* Similar function: J2Gdate                                        */
V/********************************************************************/
V/*   Modified By: IAPPINI,R.                                        */
V/*   When: 09/23/92                                                 */
V/*   What: Added Return(0) if an invalid date is specified.         */
V/*                                                                  */
VG2JDate:
VParse Arg edate
Vdate = Translate(edate," ","/.-"," ")
VParse Var date mo da yr
V
VIf mo = '' | da = '' | yr = '' |,
V   mo = 0  | da = 0            Then Do
V   Say "date("edate") must be in form MM/DD/YY",
V       "and must contain non-zero values for mm and dd."
V   Return(0);
V   End
V
Vx = "0 31 59 90 120 151 181 212 243 273 304 334 365"
Vxyr = Right(yr,2)
Vdays_in_month = Word(x,mo+1) - Word(x,mo) + (xyr-xyr%4*4 = 0 & mo = 2)
VIf da > days_in_month Then Do
V   Say edate "Invalid; the day, "da", is greater than the month's,",
V       days_in_month'.'
V   Return (0);
V   End;
Vday = da  + Word(x,mo) + (xyr-xyr%4*4 = 0 & mo > 2)
V
VReturn (yr || Right(day,3,'0'))
VMEMBER NAME  HEXSORT
V/*====================================================================*/0751000
V/* THIS MACRO WILL INTERPRET CHARACTERS 'A' THROUGH 'F' AS HEX DIGITS,*/0752000
V/* SORT THE INTERPRETED SOURCE WITHIN <START-END> COLUMN RANGE, AND,  */0753000
V/* FINALLY, UNINTERPRET HEX A-F DIGITS BACK TO CHARACTERS.            */0754000
V/*====================================================================*/0755000
V                                                                        0756000
V/* CONTROL SYMLIST CONLIST LIST PROMPT NOFLUSH */                       0757000
VISREDIT MACRO (START,END)                                               0758000
V                                                                        0759000
VIF &STR(&START) = &STR() THEN    SET &START = 1                         0760000
VIF &STR(&END)   = &STR() THEN ISREDIT (END) = DATA_WIDTH                0761000
V                                                                        0762000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'A' X'FA' &START &END ALL                                0763000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'B' X'FB' &START &END ALL                                0764000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'C' X'FC' &START &END ALL                                0765000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'D' X'FD' &START &END ALL                                0766000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'E' X'FE' &START &END ALL                                0767000
VISREDIT CHANGE 'F' X'FF' &START &END ALL                                0768000
V                                                                        0769000
VISREDIT SORT &START &END A                                              0770000
V                                                                        0771000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FA' C'A' &START &END ALL                               0772000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FB' C'B' &START &END ALL                               0773000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FC' C'C' &START &END ALL                               0774000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FD' C'D' &START &END ALL                               0775000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FE' C'E' &START &END ALL                               0776000
VISREDIT CHANGE X'FF' C'F' &START &END ALL                               0777000
V                                                                        0778000
VISREDIT RESET CHANGE                                                    0779000
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0780000
VMEMBER NAME  HOWMUCH
VPROC 1 ARITHM                                                           0001000
VCONTROL NOCAPS                                                          0002000
VSET &LMSG=&STR(This would be &EVAL(&ARITHM))                            0003000
VWRITE &LMSG                                                             0004000
VMEMBER NAME  HOWMUCHD
V/* REXX */                                                              0001000
V/* QUICK DECIMAL-TO-HEX CONVERTOR */                                    0001100
VTRACE N                                                                 0002000
VNUMERIC DIGITS 30                                                       0003000
VPARSE UPPER ARG DEC                                                     0003100
V                                                                        0004000
VSAY "THIS WOULD BE " D2X(DEC)                                           0005000
V                                                                        0006000
VEXIT                                                                    0007000
VMEMBER NAME  HOWMUCHX
V/* REXX */                                                              0001000
V/* QUICK HEX-TO-DECIMAL CONVERTOR */                                    0001101
VTRACE N                                                                 0002000
VNUMERIC DIGITS 30                                                       0003001
VPARSE UPPER ARG HEX                                                     0003101
V                                                                        0004000
VSAY "THIS WOULD BE " X2D(HEX)                                           0005000
V                                                                        0006000
VEXIT                                                                    0007000
VMEMBER NAME  HREC
V/* REXX HREC */                                                         0001000
V/* HRECALLS ALL LISTED DSETS AND WRITES A FLAG TO AVOID THIS          */0002000
V/* ON A RELOGIN ON SAME DAY                                           */0003000
VADDRESS ISPEXEC                                                         0004000
VAVAIL = SYSDSN('HRECLOG')                                               0005000
VIF AVAIL = "OK" THEN SIGNAL QUI                                         0006000
VDAT = DATE( );                                                          0007000
VDATF = SUBSTR(DAT,1,2)                                                  0008000
VIF DATF // 7 = 0 THEN DO                                                0009000
V       ADDRESS TSO                                                      0010000
V       HRECALL 'HANNA.*' NOWAIT                                         0011000
V       SUBMIT 'HANNA.CNTL(HRECLOG)'                                     0012000
VEND                                                                     0013000
VADDRESS TSO                                                             0014000
VHRECALL 'HANNA.CUE'       NOWAIT                                        0015000
VHRECALL 'HANNA.HISTORY'   NOWAIT                                        0016000
VQUI :                                                                   0017000
VEXIT 0                                                                  0018000
VMEMBER NAME  ICOPY
V/** REXX - INSERT SORT STEP JCL **/

V   X = MSG("OFF")

V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "IE MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"

V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (PARM) NOPROCESS"
V

V   "(LINE,COL) = CURSOR"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSIN     DD DUMMY"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"

V   REC = "//SYSOUT    DD SYSOUT=*"

V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             UNIT=TEST,"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             SPACE=(CYL,(10,10),RLSE),"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             DISP=(NEW,CATLG,DELETE),"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"

V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//STEP01  EXEC PGM=IEBGENER"

V   REC = "//***"

VMEMBER NAME  IE
V/** REXX - INSERT EVALUATE STRUCTURE **/
V
V   SAVEMSG = MSG()
V   X = MSG("OFF")
V   X = ADDRESS()
V   SUBCOM ISPEXEC
V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "IE MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (INDENT) NOPROCESS"
V
V   IF INDENT = "" THEN INDENT = 4
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "(LINE,COL) = CURSOR"
V   "(REC) = LINE" LINE
V   DO II = 8 TO 72 WHILE(SUBSTR(REC,II,1) = ' ')
V   END II
V   IF SUBSTR(REC,II,5) = 'ELSE ',
V         | SUBSTR(REC,II,3) = 'IF ',
V         | SUBSTR(REC,II,8) = 'PERFORM ',
V         | SUBSTR(REC,II,5) = 'WHEN ',
V      THEN OFFSET = II + INDENT - 1
V      ELSE OFFSET = II - 1
V   IF OFFSET < 11 | OFFSET > 58 THEN OFFSET = 11
V   INDENT2 = OFFSET + INDENT + INDENT
V   INDENT  = OFFSET + INDENT
V   REC = COPIES(' ',OFFSET)  || "END-EVALUATE"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT2) || "..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT)  || "WHEN OTHER"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT2) || "..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT)  || "WHEN ..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT2) || "..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',INDENT)  || "WHEN ..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = COPIES(' ',OFFSET)  || "EVALUATE ..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   "LOCATE" LINE
V   LINE_X  = LINE + 1
V   COL_X   = INDENT2 + 2
V   "CURSOR =" LINE_X COL_X
V   RETURN(0)
V

VMEMBER NAME  IIDCAMS
V/** REXX - INSERT SORT STEP JCL **/
V
V   SAVEMSG = MSG()
V   X = MSG("OFF")
V   X = ADDRESS()
V   SUBCOM ISPEXEC
V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "IE MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (PARM) NOPROCESS"
V
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "(LINE,COL) = CURSOR"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "         OUTFILE(OFILE)"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "    REPRO INFILE(IFILE) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSIN     DD *"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//OFILE     DD DSN=TC.CCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH,DISP=SHR"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//IFILE     DD DSN=BCCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH(0),DISP=SHR"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSPRINT  DD SYSOUT=*"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//STEP1200 EXEC PGM=IDCAMS"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "         INDEX(NAME(TC.CCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH.I))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "         DATA(NAME(TC.CCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH.D)) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "             MODEL (SQ0.Q00.CCM55.ZCCMBH)) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "             CYL (200 100) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "             VOL (TBPS17 TBPS18 TBPS19) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "             SHAREOPTIONS (3 3) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "             REUSE -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "    DEFINE CLUSTER (NAME(TC.CCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH) -"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "        IF LASTCC = 8 THEN SET MAXCC = 0"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "    DELETE (TC.CCC.CCM55.ZCCMBH) CLUSTER PURGE"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSIN     DD *"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSPRINT  DD SYSOUT=*"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//STEP1100 EXEC PGM=IDCAMS"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   "LOCATE" LINE
V   LINE_X  = LINE + 3
V   COL_X   = 38
V   "CURSOR =" LINE_X COL_X
V   RETURN(0)
V
VMEMBER NAME  IMAGEJCL
V/* REXX ImageJCL                                                      */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* ImageJCL: Create JCL for IMAGECOPY for all COPYPENDs/RESTRICTs     */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
Vcall tempdsn cp tempdd tempdsn
VM = 'TSIN*'
VG = 'X'
Vaddress ispexec
Vzwinttl='* Select DB2 Subsystem *'
V"vput (zwinttl)"
V"addpop"
V"display panel(db2spnl)"
Vif rc = 8 then do
V   'rempop'
V   zedsmsg = 'Function canceled'
V   'setmsg msg(isrz001)'
V   exit
Vend
Vupper cname
Vselect
V  when cname  = 'A' then subsys = TEST
V  when cname  = 'B' then subsys = PROD
V  otherwise nop
Vend
Vredo:
Vaddress ispexec
Vzwinttl='* Select Tablespace/Database *'
V"vput (zwinttl)"
V"addpop column(27) row(3)"
V"display panel(db2tpnl)"
Vif rc = 8 then do
V   'rempop all'
V   zedsmsg = 'Function canceled'
V   'setmsg msg(isrz001)'
V   exit
Vend
Vupper cname
Vselect
V  when cname  = 'C' then dbase = INSTANC1
V  when cname  = 'D' then dbase = INSTANC2
V  when cname  = 'E' then dbase = INSTANC3
V  when cname  = 'F' then dbase = INSTANC4
V  otherwise nop
Vend
Vif M = '' then do
V   "rempop all"
V   signal redo
Vend
Vupper G
Vif G = 'X' | G ='S' then
V   restrict = 'R'
Velse
V   restrict = 'X'
Vupper M
Vtspace = M
Vx = outtrap('out.','*','noconcat')
Vaddress tso "db2pend" subsys dbase tspace restrict
Vx = outtrap(off)
V"rempop all"
VJ = 1
Vdo i=1 by 1 while i <= out.trapped
V   if pos('------',out.i) > 0  then leave
V   J = J + 1
VEnd
Vpend. = ''
Vk = 1
Vdo i=j+1 by 1 while i <= out.trapped-2
V   tbname = substr(out.i,1,8)
V   tbtype = substr(out.i,10,2)
V   tbpart = substr(out.i,15,4)
V   tbstat = substr(out.i,20,18)
V   if pos('COPY',tbstat) > 0  then do
V      pend.k = tbname
V      k=k+1;
V   end
VEnd
Vpoint   = 1
Vif k = 1 then do
V   zedsmsg = "Nothing to display"
V   "setmsg msg(isrz001)"
V   signal qui
Vend
Vdo i=1 by 1 while i < k
V   call writejobcard
V   call buildjcl
Vend
Vcall eof
V"edit dataset("tempdsn")"
V
Vqui :
Vaddress tso "free dd("tempdd") delete"
Vexit
V
V/* invocation : call tempdsn co tempdd tempdsn */
Vtempdsn : procedure expose cuechar tempdd tempdsn
Varg cuechar
Vcuechar = substr(cuechar,1,2)
Vd = date(j);p = sysvar(syspref);
Vr1 = random(100,999);r2 = random(100,999);
Vt = time();parse value t with hh ':' mm ':' ss;tt=hh||mm||ss
Vtempdsn = cuechar||d||'.t'||r1||trunc(r1*r2/random()/10)||'.z'||tt
Vnt = tempdsn
Vtempdd  = cuechar ||r2||r1
V"alloc ds("nt") dd("tempdd") dsorg(ps) lrecl(80) recfm(f) new keep"
Vif rc \= 0 then do
V       "ispexec setmsg msg(isrz002)"
V       result = 'ERROR'
V       exit
Vend
Vreturn
V
Vwritejobcard :
Vcall getjobchar
Vcall push("//"userid()jobchar" JOB (000000),'IMAGECOPY',             ")
Vcall push("//           MSGCLASS=X,NOTIFY=&SYSUID,CLASS=U            ")
Vcall push("//*                                                       ")
Vreturn
V
Vbuildjcl:
VEOJ = "/*"
Vcall push("//IC       EXEC  DSNUPROC,COND=(5,LT),                    ")
Vcall push("//             SYSTEM='"subsys"',                         ")
Vcall push("//             UID='IMAGE."pend.i"',UTPROC=''             ")
Vdatestamp = DATE(O)
Vparse value datestamp with yy '/' mm '/' dd
Vdatestamp = "D" || yy || mm || dd
Vsysco = userid()"." || dbase || "." || pend.i || ".SYSCO." || datestamp
Vcall push("//SYSCOPY  DD  DSN="sysco",                               ")
Vcall push("//             DISP=(,CATLG,DELETE),                      ")
Vcall push("//             SPACE=(CYL,(600,100),RLSE)                 ")
Vcall push("//SYSDBOUT DD SYSOUT=*                                    ")
Vcall push("//SYSABOUT DD SYSOUT=*                                    ")
Vcall push("//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*                                    ")
Vcall push("//SYSOUT   DD SYSOUT=*                                    ")
Vcall push("//SYSIN    DD  *                                          ")
Vcard1 = "  COPY TABLESPACE " ||dbase"."pend.i
Vcall push(card1)
Vcall push(EOJ)
Vcall push("//*-------------------------------------------------------")
Vreturn
V
Veof :
Vaddress tso
V"EXECIO 0 DISKR" TEMPDD "( FINIS"
Vreturn
V
Vpush :
Vparse arg stream
Vpush stream
Vaddress tso
V"EXECIO 1 DISKW" TEMPDD
Vif rc >= 2 then call qui
Vreturn
V
Vgetjobchar :
Valpha = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ1234567890'
V  jobchar  = substr(alpha,point,1);point=point+1
V  if point = 37 then point = 1
Vreturn
VMEMBER NAME  IMBED
V/* Rexx Imbed */
V/*REXX Edit macro showing how to create a panel, display it, and    */
V/*     use input from that panel.  This makes it possible to        */
V/*     ship an exec with panels imbedded in the exec file.          */
V/*     This example also includes imbedded messages.                */
V/*     This example runs on the latest ISPF releases for CMS and    */
V/*     TSO.                                                         */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*     Panels are imbedded at the end of the exec in comments.      */
V/*     The comments are of the form:                                */
V/*         /+PANEL panelname                                        */
V/*             panel or message definition                          */
V/*         +/                                                       */
V/*      where /+ and +/ are really REXX comment delimiters in col 1 */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*     Although this is shown as an edit macro, the method used     */
V/*     is not dependent on any edit macro facilities.               */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*     The method used is:                                          */
V/*      1) Create a temporary panel library (PDS on MVS, flat       */
V/*         files on CMS)                                            */
V/*      2) use LIBDEF to point to the new panel/message library.    */
V/*      3) Display the panel, which will set some variables.        */
V/*      4) Use LIBDEF again to clean up.                            */
V/********************************************************************/
V
V
VAddress 'ISPEXEC'
V'ISREDIT MACRO (DSN)'
VParse Source system . cmdname .
VCall createlib
V'ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE .ZFIRST = (LINE3)'
V'ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE .ZFIRST = (LINE2)'
V'ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE .ZFIRST = (LINE1)'
V'ISREDIT LOCATE .ZFIRST'
VExit 1
V
V/**** createlib: Create and display a temporary panel ***************/
V
Vcreatelib:
Vexec_line=1   /* Start looking for imbeds at line 1 of the exec */
Vif system = 'TSO' then
V  Address tso 'ALLOC NEW CAT F($TMPLIB$) DSO(PO) DIR(1) SP(3,3) TRACK
V              da($WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB) REUSE
V              RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(0) LRECL(80) UNIT(SYSALLDA)'
VCall make_member   /* call make_member once for each imbedded member*/
VCall make_member
VCall make_member
Vif system = 'TSO' then
V  Address tso 'ALLOC F($TMPLIB$) OLD DA($WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB) REUSE'
Vif system = 'TSO' then
V  do
V    'VGET ZENVIR'
V    If substr(zenvir,6,1)>='4' Then stack='STACK' /* Use STACK in V4 */
V    Else stack = ''
V    'LIBDEF ISPPLIB LIBRARY ID($TMPLIB$)' stack
V    'LIBDEF ISPMLIB LIBRARY ID($TMPLIB$)' stack
V  end
Velse /* do CMS style libdef */
V  Do
V    'LIBDEF ISPPLIB FILE ID(ISRNULL $TMPLIB$ A)'
V    'LIBDEF ISPMLIB FILE ID(ISRNULL $TMPLIB$ A)'
V  END
V'ADDPOP'
VDo Until rc>0
V  'DISPLAY PANEL(TEMPPAN)'
VEnd
V'REMPOP'
V'LIBDEF ISPPLIB '
V'LIBDEF ISPMLIB '
Vif system = 'TSO' then Address tso 'FREE F($TMPLIB$) DELETE'
VElse                   Address '' 'ERASE * $TMPLIB$ A '
V
VDo queued();Pull;End
VReturn
V
V/* make_member: scan this exec for imbeded parts and add to temporary */
V/*              library using EXECIO for I/O operations.              */
Vmake_member:
V
VDo queued();Pull;End
VDo Until substr(line,1,7)='/*PANEL'
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)
V  exec_line=exec_line+1
VEnd
VParse Var line . panelname .
VDo until substr(line,1,2)='*/'
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)
V  if substr(line,1,2)ｬ='*/' then
V    Queue line
V  exec_line=exec_line+1
VEnd
Vif system = 'TSO' then
V  do
V    pands='$WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB('panelname')'
V    Address tso 'ALLOC OLD F($TMPLIB$) DSO(PO) DIR(1) SP(3,3) TRACK
V                da('pands') RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(0) LRECL(80) REUSE
V                UNIT(SYSALLDA)'
V    Address 'TSO' 'EXECIO 'queued()' DISKW $TMPLIB$ ( FINIS'
V  end
Velse
V do
V  Address '' 'ERASE 'panelname' $TMPLIB$ A '
V Address '' 'EXECIO 'queued()' DISKW 'panelname' $TMPLIB$ A 1 F ( FINIS'
V end
VDo queued();Pull;End
VReturn
V
V
V/*PANEL TEMPPAN
V)BODY WINDOW(73,12) CMD(ZCMD)
V%Command ===>_ZCMD                                                   %
V
V+ This is a sample temporary panel defined in the &cmdname exec file.
V
V+ Enter data for line 1%===>_line1                                   +
V+ Enter data for line 2%===>_line2                                   +
V+ Enter data for line 3%===>_line3                                   +
V
V+Enter%HELP+on the command line to show a temporary help panel.
V+Enter or press%END+to leave this panel.
V)INIT
V  .HELP = TEMPPANT
V  .MSG  = TEMP001
V)END
V*/
V/*PANEL TEMPPANT
V)BODY WINDOW(35,5) CMD()
V%
V+ This is a%temporary+help panel.
V)END
V*/
V/*PANEL TEMP00
VTEMP001 'Here is a message'
V'This is a tempirary message from the exec'
V*/
VMEMBER NAME  IMBEDPNL
VDisplayPanel :                                                          0001000
VAddress 'ISPEXEC'                                                       0002000
Vexec_line=1                                                             0003000
Vif system = 'TSO' then                                                  0004000
V  Address tso 'ALLOC NEW CAT F($TMPLIB$) DSO(PO) DIR(1) SP(3,3) TRACK   0005000
V               DA($WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB) REUSE                          0006000
V               RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(0) LRECL(80) UNIT(SYSALLDA)'          0007000
VCall MakeMember                                                         0008000
Vif system = 'TSO' then                                                  0009000
V  Address tso 'ALLOC F($TMPLIB$) OLD DA($WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB) REUSE'   0010000
VIf system = 'TSO' Then                                                  0011000
V  Do                                                                    0012000
V    'VGET ZENVIR'                                                       0013000
V    If substr(zenvir,6,1)>='4' Then stack='STACK' /* Use STACK in V4 */ 0014000
V    Else stack = ''                                                     0015000
V    'LIBDEF ISPPLIB LIBRARY ID($TMPLIB$)' stack                         0016000
V    'LIBDEF ISPMLIB LIBRARY ID($TMPLIB$)' stack                         0017000
V  End                                                                   0018000
VElse                                                                    0019000
V  Do                                                                    0020000
V    'LIBDEF ISPPLIB FILE ID(ISRNULL $TMPLIB$ A)'                        0021000
V    'LIBDEF ISPMLIB FILE ID(ISRNULL $TMPLIB$ A)'                        0022000
V  End                                                                   0023000
V'ADDPOP'                                                                0024000
VDo Until rc > 0                                                         0025000
V  'DISPLAY PANEL(CLIPPNL)'                                              0026000
VEnd                                                                     0027000
V'REMPOP'                                                                0028000
V                                                                        0029000
V'LIBDEF ISPPLIB '                                                       0030000
V'LIBDEF ISPMLIB '                                                       0031000
VIf system = 'TSO' Then Address tso 'FREE F($TMPLIB$) DELETE'            0032000
VElse                   Address '' 'ERASE * $TMPLIB$ A '                 0033000
V                                                                        0034000
VDo queued();Pull;End                                                    0035000
VReturn                                                                  0036000
V                                                                        0037000
VMakeMember :                                                            0038000
VDo queued();Pull;End                                                    0039000
VDo Until substr(line,1,7)='/*PANEL'                                     0040000
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)                                          0041000
V  exec_line=exec_line+1                                                 0042000
VEnd                                                                     0043000
VParse Var line . panelname .                                            0044000
VDo until substr(line,1,2)='*/'                                          0045000
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)                                          0046000
V  if substr(line,1,2)ｬ='*/' then                                        0047000
V    Queue line                                                          0048000
V  exec_line=exec_line+1                                                 0049000
VEnd                                                                     0050000
Vif system = 'TSO' then                                                  0051000
V  do                                                                    0052000
V    pands='$WWWSAMP.TEMP.ISPFLIB('panelname')'                          0053000
V    Address tso 'ALLOC OLD F($TMPLIB$) DSO(PO) DIR(1) SP(3,3) TRACK     0054000
V                da('pands') RECFM(F B) BLKSIZE(0) LRECL(80) REUSE       0055000
V                UNIT(SYSALLDA)'                                         0056000
V    Address 'TSO' 'EXECIO 'queued()' DISKW $TMPLIB$ ( FINIS'            0057000
V  end                                                                   0058000
Velse                                                                    0059000
V do                                                                     0060000
V  Address '' 'ERASE 'panelname' $TMPLIB$ A '                            0061000
V Address '' 'EXECIO 'queued()' DISKW 'panelname' $TMPLIB$ A 1 F ( FINIS'0062000
V end                                                                    0063000
VDo queued();Pull;End                                                    0064000
VReturn                                                                  0065000
V                                                                        0066000
V/*PANEL CLIPPNL                                                         0067000
V)ATTR                                                                   0068000
V? TYPE(INPUT) INTENS(LOW) JUST(LEFT)                                    0069000
V_ TYPE(INPUT) INTENS(LOW) JUST(LEFT) PAD(' ') COLOR(YELLOW) CAPS(OFF)   0070000
V)BODY WINDOW(70,18)                                                     0071000
V Command ==>?ZCMD                                                       0072000
V_cue1                                                                   0073000
V_cue2                                                                   0074000
V_cue3                                                                   0075000
V_cue4                                                                   0076000
V_cue5                                                                   0077000
V_cue6                                                                   0078000
V_cue7                                                                   0079000
V_cue8                                                                   0080000
V_cue9                                                                   0081000
V_cue10                                                                  0082000
V_cue11                                                                  0083000
V_cue12                                                                  0084000
V_cue13                                                                  0085000
V_cue14                                                                  0086000
V_cue15                                                                  0087000
V_cue16                                                                  0088000
V_cue17                                                                  0089000
V)INIT                                                                   0090000
V&ZWINTTL = '* ClipBoard *'                                              0091000
V)END                                                                    0092000
V*/                                                                      0093000
VMEMBER NAME  INS
V/* REXX INS                                                           */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* AUTHOR: KANNAN                                                     */
V/* SYNTAX: CMD STR  COL OPT                                           */
V/* USAGE : INS THIS 23  S  >> WILL SHIFT;LINE IS FULL CHARS WILL BE   */
V/*                         >> LOST AT THE END OF LINE                 */
V/* USAGE : INS THAT 23  O  >> OVERLAY GIVEN STRING                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
VPARSE SOURCE . . ME .
V"ISREDIT MACRO (CHAR COL OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O')  THEN DO
V          ZEDSMSG = ME "NEEDS PARM S/O"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE J"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG)  = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST)  = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VCLEN = LENGTH(CHAR)
V
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'S' THEN
V        LINEBUF=INSERT(CHAR,LINEBUF,COL)
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'O' THEN
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY(CHAR,LINEBUF,COL,CLEN)
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
V
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) EDITED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  ISORT
V/** REXX - INSERT SORT STEP JCL **/
V
V   SAVEMSG = MSG()
V   X = MSG("OFF")
V   X = ADDRESS()
V   SUBCOM ISPEXEC
V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "IE MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (PARM) NOPROCESS"
V
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "(LINE,COL) = CURSOR"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK06     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK05     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK04     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK03     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK02     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTWK01     DD       UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(050,050))"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSOUT       DD       SYSOUT=*"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTLIST     DD       SYSOUT=*"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSPRINT     DD       SYSOUT=*"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "   SUM     FIELDS=NONE"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "                    ....,....,CH,EQ,C'...')"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "     INCLUDE  COND=(....,....,CH,EQ,C'...',OR,"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "   SORT    FIELDS=(0001,0001,CH,A)"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SYSIN        DD       *"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             DCB=(GDG,RECFM=FB,LRECL=1000,BLKSIZE=10000)"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             DSN=...,"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//             SPACE=(CYL,(0010,0010),RLSE),"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTOUT      DD       DISP=(,CATLG),UNIT=SYSDA,"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORTIN       DD       DISP=SHR,DSN=..."
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//SORT       EXEC     PGM=SORT,REGION=256M"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   REC = "//***"
V   "LINE_AFTER (LINE) = (REC)"
V   "LOCATE" LINE
V   LINE_X  = LINE + 3
V   COL_X   = 38
V   "CURSOR =" LINE_X COL_X
V   RETURN(0)
V
VMEMBER NAME  ISUB
V/* Rexx ISUB*/
V"ISREDIT MACRO"
Vaddress ispexec
V'ISREDIT (openmbr) = MEMBER'
V'ISREDIT (opendsn)  = DATASET'
VCALL OUTTRAP 'OUT.'
Vif openmbr = '' then
V   address tso "submit '"opendsn"'"
Velse
V   address tso "submit '"opendsn'('openmbr')'"'"
VCALL OUTTRAP 'OFF'
VDO I = 1 TO OUT.0
V   PARSE VAR OUT.I 'JOB' JOBNAME '(' JOBID ')' STATUS
VEND I
VSUBJOBNAME = STRIP(JOBNAME,B)
VSUBJOBID   = STRIP(JOBID,B)
VSUBJOB     = SUBJOBNAME || "(" || SUBJOBID || ")"
VSAY "SUBMITTED JOB =" SUBJOB
VJOBDONE = 'NO'
VDO UNTIL JOBDONE = 'YES'
V     CALL OUTTRAP 'OUT.'
V     ADDRESS TSO "ST" SUBJOB
V     CALL OUTTRAP 'OFF'
V     DO I = 1 TO OUT.0
V        PARSE VAR OUT.I 'JOB ' JOBNAME '(' JOBID ')' STATUS
V        STATUS = STRIP(STATUS)
V        IF POS('ON OUTPUT QUEUE',STATUS) > 0
V        THEN JOBDONE = 'YES'
V        ELSE NOP
V           /* ADDRESS TSO "TSOWAIT " WAITAMOUNT */
V     END I
VEND
VPRINTDSN = "'"||USERID()||".JOBTEMP."||JOBNAME||"."||JOBID||"'"
VADDRESS TSO "OUTPUT " SUBJOB " PRINT("PRINTDSN") KEEP HOLD"
V
VEDITDSNAME = PRINTDSN
VADDRESS ISPEXEC "BROWSE DATASET("EDITDSNAME")"
VRETURN
VMEMBER NAME  JC
V/* Rexx JC                                                            */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* JC      : Jobcard creator                                          */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VAddress ISREDIT
V'MACRO'
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V    ADDRESS ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
V    EXIT
VEND
VLineNo=0
V
VIf sysvar(Syspref) <> '' Then
V    Prefix = sysvar(Syspref)
VElse
V    Prefix = userid()
V
VAddress ISPEXEC 'VGET (ZACCTNUM)'
VAcct = ZACCTNUM
V
VCall Getname
VName="'"||Name||"'"
V
VCall Add '//'||Prefix||'A'||' JOB '||Acct||","||Name||","
VCall Add '//         CLASS=U,'
VCall Add '//         MSGLEVEL=(1,1),'
VCall Add '//         MSGCLASS=X,'
VCall add '//         NOTIFY=&SYSUID'
VCall Add '//*'
VReturn
V
VAdd:
VParse Arg line
V'LINE_AFTER' LineNo' = (LINE)'
VLineNo=LineNo+1
VReturn
V
VGetName:
Vascbasxb=d2x(c2d(storage(224,4))+108)
Vasxbsenv=d2x(c2d(storage(ascbasxb,4))+200)
Vaceeunam=d2x(c2d(storage(asxbsenv,4))+100)
Vadr=c2x(storage(aceeunam,4))
VName=storage(d2x(c2d(storage(aceeunam,4))+1),c2d(storage(adr,1))-1)
VName=space(strip(Name,"b"," "),0)
VReturn

V/** REXX - INSERT SORT STEP JCL **/

V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "IE MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (PARM) NOPROCESS"

V REC = "/*JOBPARM S=ANY"

V   "LINE_AFTER 0 = (REC)"
