VMEMBER NAME  JL
V/* JUSTIFY LEFT: SHIFT ROWS LEFT TO FOUND <STRING> */                   0001000
V ISREDIT MACRO (STRING)                                                 0002000
V      ISREDIT FIND &STRING                                              0003000
V      DO WHILE (&LASTCC = 0)                                            0004000
V        ISREDIT (ROW,COL) = CURSOR                                      0005000
V        IF &COL > 1 THEN DO                                             0006000
V          ISREDIT SHIFT ( &ROW &EVAL(&COL-1)                            0007000
V        END                                                             0008000
V        ISREDIT RFIND                                                   0009000
V      END                                                               0010000
V      ISREDIT RESET FIND                                                0011000
VEXIT CODE(1)                                                            0012000
VMEMBER NAME  JSTAR
V/**********************************************************************/
V/* EDIT MACRO COMMAND ARE EXECUTED BY TYPE THE MEMBER NAME ONLY.  IT  */
V/* DOES NOT REQUIRE TO TYPE TSO EDITMACRO-NAME TO EXECUTE             */
V/**********************************************************************/
V
VISREDIT MACRO
V    ISREDIT CHANGE  .A .B 1 2 '//' '//*//' ALL
V    ISREDIT CHANGE  .A .B 1 2 '  ' '//*  ' ALL
V    ISREDIT CHANGE  .A .B 1 2 '/*' '//*/*' ALL
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  JUL2CAL
V/* rexx */
VJUL2CAL: /* JULIAN TO CALENDAR CONVERT */
V  ARG JULDATE
V  "NEWSTACK"
V  REX="<JUL2CAL> "
V  VER="v1.5 12/15/93"
V  CALLED=SYSVAR(SYSNEST)
V  CALDATE='999999'
V  IF JULDATE='' THEN DO
V     IF CALLED='YES' THEN
V        SIGNAL EXIT
V     ELSE
V        DO WHILE JULDATE=''
V           SAY REX'Enter JULDATE-YYDDD or YY/DDD'
V           PULL JULDATE
V        END
V     END
V  LEN = LENGTH(JULDATE)
V  IF LEN = 5 THEN DO
V     YY=SUBSTR(JULDATE,1,2)
V     DDD=SUBSTR(JULDATE,3,3)
V     SIGNAL EDITDDD
V  END
V  IF LEN = 6 & SUBSTR(JULDATE,3,1) = "/" THEN DO
V     YY=SUBSTR(JULDATE,1,2)
V     DDD=SUBSTR(JULDATE,4,6)
V     SIGNAL EDITDDD
V  END
V
VINVALID:
V  IF CALLED="NO" THEN
V     SAY 'PASSED JULDATE ' JULDATE 'IS INVALID'
V  SIGNAL EXIT
V
VEDITDDD:
V  IF DATATYPE(YY||DDD) = 'CHAR' THEN
V     SIGNAL INVALID
V  IF YY//4 = 0 THEN
V     MAXDAYS=366
V  ELSE
V     MAXDAYS=365
V  IF DDD > MAXDAYS THEN
V     SIGNAL INVALID
V  PNTR=12
V  DO WHILE PNTR > 0
V     IF PNTR > 2  & YY//4 = 0 THEN
V        PLUS=1
V     ELSE
V        PLUS=0
V     START=PNTR*3-2
V     END=PNTR*3
V     WK=SUBSTR('000031059090120151181212243273304334',START,3)+PLUS
V     IF DDD > WK THEN DO
V        MM=PNTR
V        DD=DDD-WK
V        PNTR=0
V     END
V     ELSE
V        PNTR=PNTR - 1
V  END
V  IF LENGTH(MM)=1 THEN
V     MM=0||MM
V  IF LENGTH(DD)=1 THEN
V     DD=0||DD
V  CALDATE=MM||DD||YY
V  IF LEN = 6 THEN
V     SHOWCAL=MM||'/'||DD||'/'||YY
V  ELSE
V     SHOWCAL=CALDATE
V
V  RELATIVE=DDD
V  RELATIVE = (YY*365) + ((YY-1)%4) + RELATIVE - 1
V  IF CALLED="NO" THEN
V     SAY REX 'FOR JULDATE='JULDATE', CALDATE='SHOWCAL
V
VEXIT:
V  "DELSTACK"
V   RETURN CALDATE
VMEMBER NAME  JXDS
VISREDIT MACRO (OP)
V/****************************************************
V/*  DISPLAY DS INFORMATION FOR A CATALOGUED DS      *
V/*  IF CURSOR POSITIONED ON THE DS LINE IN THE TEXT *
V/****************************************************
VIF &OP = T  THEN +
V   DO
V     CONTROL CONLIST
V     SET &OP =
V   END
VIF &OP = ON THEN +
V   DO
V     SET ZPF01 = %XDS
V     ISPEXEC VPUT ( ZPF01 )
V     WRITE XDS SET ON PF01
V     EXIT
V   END
V/****************************************************
VSTART: +
VISREDIT ( LAN COL ) = CURSOR
VSET &COL = &COL
VCONTROL NOFLUSH
VIF &COL = 0 THEN +
V   DO
V     ISREDIT (TOP BOT) = DISPLAY_LINES
V     SET LAN = &TOP
V   END
V/****************************************************
V/*  FIND THE TEXT IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING CURSOR      *
V/****************************************************
VISREDIT    (THISLINE) = LINE &LAN
VIF  &NRSTR(&THISLINE) = THEN GOTO EX
VSET FIRST     = &SYSINDEX(DSN,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VSET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((0),&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((+,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX((-,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET LAST      = &SYSINDEX(@,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V/*****************************************************************************
VIF  &FIRST     = 0      +
VAND &COL       = 0 THEN GOTO TUTOR
VIF &LAST = 0 THEN +
V    SET &COLEND = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V    SET &COLEND = &LAST - 1
V
VIF &FIRST      = 0 THEN +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&COL:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
VELSE +
V   SET THISLINE = &SUBSTR(&FIRST+4:&COLEND,&NRSTR(&THISLINE))
V
V/*****************************************************************************
VSET &SYSDVAL  = &NRSTR(&THISLINE)
VREADDVAL &V1
VSET &VLEN     = &LENGTH(&NRSTR(&V1))
VIF  &VLEN     = 0       THEN GOTO EX
V
VIF &LAST ｬ= 0 THEN +
V   DO
V       ISPEXEC SELECT PGM(ISRDSLST) +
V             PARM(DSL '&V1') SUSPEND SCRNAME(DSLIST)
V       GOTO EX
V   END
V
VSET STAT      = &STR(&SYSDSN('&V1'))
VIF &STR(&STAT)  ｬ= OK THEN +
V   DO
V      WRITE  ============ XDS COMMAND ==============
V      WRITE    '&V1'  &STR(&STAT)
V      WRITE  =======================================
V   /* IF &STR(&STAT) ｬ= &STR(DATASET NOT FOUND) THEN +
V   /*    GOTO EX
V   /* WRITENR   UNCAT Y/N:
V   /* READ &OPT
V   /* IF   &STR(&OPT) = Y THEN GOTO OPTU
V      GOTO EX
V   END
VELSE +
V   DO
V      SET OPTIONS = BVEUDRILCK
V      LISTDSI '&V1'
V      IF &STR(&OP) ｬ= THEN +
V         DO
V           IF &SYSINDEX(&STR(&OP),&OPTIONS) = 0 THEN GOTO EX
V              GOTO OPT&OP
V         END
V
V      SET D_TYPE = &DATATYPE(&SYSCREATE)
V      IF &D_TYPE = NUM  THEN +
V         DO
V             SET JULIAN = &SUBSTR(1:4,&STR(&SYSCREATE)) +
V                          &SUBSTR(6:8,&STR(&SYSCREATE))
V             SYSCALL CALJ2G JULIAN
V         END
V      ELSE                   +
V         SET JULIAN = &SYSCREATE
V
V      IF &SUBSTR(1:2,&SYSDSORG   )  = PS +
V      OR &SUBSTR(1:2,&SYSDSORG   )  = PO THEN +
V         DO
V             SET O1     = &STR(B - BROWSE)
V             SET O2     = &STR(V - VIEW)
V         END
V      IF &SYSLRECL ｬ> 255 THEN +
V         SET O3     = &STR(E - EDIT )
V      SET O4        = &STR(U - UNCAT)
V      SET O5        = &STR(D - DELETE)
V      SET O6        = &STR(R - RENAME)
V      SET O7        = &STR(I - DS INFO)
V      SET O8        = &STR(L - DSLIST)
V      SET O9        = &STR(C - COPY TO NEW SEQUENTIAL FILE)
V      SET OA        = &STR(K - COPY TO NEW VSAM FILE)
V      IF  &SYSUSED  = 0 THEN +
V          SET &WORD = &STR(== EMPTY ==)
V      ELSE +
V          SET &WORD =
V      WRITE  ============== &SYSJDATE =================
V      WRITE  '&V1' &WORD CREATED: &JULIAN
V      WRITE  RECFM=&SYSRECFM RECL=&SYSLRECL BLK=&SYSBLKSIZE +
V             ORG:&SYSDSORG VOL=&SYSVOLUME
V      WRITE  =======================================
V      IF  &STR(&O1) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O1
V      IF  &STR(&O2) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O2
V      IF  &STR(&O3) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O3
V      IF  &STR(&O4) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O4
V      IF  &STR(&O5) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O5
V      IF  &STR(&O6) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O6
V      IF  &STR(&O7) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O7
V      IF  &STR(&O8) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O8
V      IF  &STR(&O9) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &O9
V      IF  &STR(&OA) ｬ= THEN +
V      WRITE          &OA
V      WRITE  =======================================
V      WRITENR  OPTION:
V      READ &OPT
V      IF   &SYSINDEX(&STR(&OPT),&OPTIONS) = 0 THEN GOTO EX
V            GOTO OPT&OPT
V      OPTB: ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V            ISPEXEC BROWSE DATASET('&V1')
V            IF &LASTCC > 0 THEN +
V               WRITE ERROR: &STR(&ZERRLM)
V            GOTO  EX
V      OPTV: ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V            ISPEXEC VIEW   DATASET('&V1')
V            IF &LASTCC > 0 THEN +
V               WRITE ERROR: &STR(&ZERRLM)
V            GOTO  EX
V      OPTE: ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V            ISPEXEC EDIT   DATASET('&V1')
V            IF &LASTCC > 0 && &LASTCC ｬ= 4 THEN +
V               WRITE ERROR: &STR(&ZERRLM)
V            GOTO  EX
V      OPTL: ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V            ISPEXEC SELECT PGM(ISRDSLST) +
V               PARM(DSL '&V1') SUSPEND SCRNAME(DSLIST)
V            GOTO EX
V      OPTC: %XSCOPY  &V1
V            GOTO EX
V      OPTK: %XVCOPY  &V1
V            GOTO EX
V      OPTD: WRITENR CONFIRM DELETE Y/N ==>
V            READ &RESP
V            IF   &RESP ｬ=Y THEN GOTO EX
V            DELETE '&V1' PU
V            GOTO  EX
V      OPTU: WRITENR CONFIRM UNCAT  Y/N ==>
V            READ &RESP
V            IF   &RESP ｬ=Y THEN GOTO EX
V            SET  FIRST  = &SYSINDEX((,&STR(&V1))
V            IF &FIRST  ｬ= 0 THEN +
V               WRITE TO DELETE A MEMBER USE DELETE OPTION
V            ELSE +
V               DELETE '&V1' NSCR
V            GOTO  EX
V      OPTR: WRITENR CONFIRM RENAME Y/N ==>
V            READ &RESP
V            IF   &RESP ｬ=Y THEN GOTO EX
V            WRITE OVERTYPE NEW NAME
V            WRITENR '&V1'  .
V            READ &RESP
V            IF   &STR(&RESP)  =  THEN GOTO EX
V            IF   &STR(&RESP)  =  &STR('&V1) THEN GOTO EX
V                 RENAME  '&V1' '&RESP'
V            GOTO  EX
V/*           ISPEXEC CONTROL DISPLAY SAVE
V/*           ISPEXEC CONTROL DISPLAY LINE
V/*           WRITE  NAME..........: &SYSDSNAME
V      OPTI: +
V            LDSI &V1
V/*                                                             */
V/*          WRITE  =======================================     */
V/*          WRITE  VOLUME...........: &SYSVOLUME               */
V/*          WRITE  UNIT.............: &SYSUNIT                 */
V/*          WRITE  ORGANIZATION.....: &SYSDSORG                */
V/*          WRITE  REC FORMAT.......: &SYSRECFM                */
V/*          WRITE  REC LENGTH.......: &SYSLRECL                */
V/*          WRITE  BLK SIZE.........: &SYSBLKSIZE              */
V/*          IF     &SYSKEYLEN > 0 THEN +                       */
V/*          WRITE  KEY LENGTH.......: &SYSKEYLEN               */
V/*          WRITE  ALLOC UNITS......: &SYSALLOC &SYSUNITS      */
V/*          WRITE        PRIM.......: &SYSPRIMARY &SYSUNITS    */
V/*          WRITE        SEC........: &SYSSECONDS &SYSUNITS    */
V/*          WRITE        USED.......: &SYSUSED &SYSUNITS       */
V/*          WRITE        USED EXT...: &SYSEXTENTS OF 16        */
V/*          WRITE  CREATED..........: &SYSCREATE               */
V/*          WRITE  EXPIRES..........: &SYSEXDATE               */
V/*           WRITE  UPDATED..........: &SYSUPDATED
V/*           ISPEXEC CONTROL DISPLAY RESTORE
V   END
V/****************************************************
VEX: +
VISREDIT CURSOR = ( LAN COL )
VEXIT CODE(0)
V/****************************************************
VTUTOR: +
V      WRITE  ============ XDS COMMAND ==============
V      WRITE    USE THIS COMMAND IN EDIT MODE ONLY
V      WRITE
V      WRITE    FORMAT 1 - ( XDS INSTALLED ON PF1 )
V      WRITE       MOVE CURSOR TO THE STARTING POINT
V      WRITE       OF A DATASET NAME AND PRESS THE PF1
V      WRITE       SELECT ONE OF THE XDS OPTIONS.
V      WRITE
V      WRITE    FORMAT 2 - ( XDS TYPED ON THE COMMAND LINE )
V      WRITE       TYPE 'XDS' ON THE EDIT COMMAND LINE
V      WRITE       DO NOT PRESS THE 'ENTER' KEY
V      WRITE       MOVE CURSOR TO THE STARTING POINT
V      WRITE       OF A DATASET NAME AND PRESS 'ENTER'
V      WRITE       SELECT ONE OF THE XDS OPTIONS.
V      WRITE
V      WRITE    INSTALL XDS ON PF1
V      WRITE       IN EDIT COMMAND LINE: ==> XDS ON
V      WRITE  =======================================
V      EXIT
V
VCALJ2G: PROC 1 JULIAN
V    SYSREF &JULIAN
V
V    CONTROL END(ENDX)
V
V    SET &YY     = &SUBSTR(1:4,&STR(&JULIAN))
V    SET &JULIAN = &SUBSTR(6:8,&STR(&JULIAN))
V
V    SET &LEAPYR = &YY // 4
V    IF &LEAPYR = 0 THEN +
V        SET &LEAPYR = 1
V    ELSE +
V        SET &LEAPYR = 0
V
V    SELECT
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 366 + &LEAPYR) +
V            WRITE INVALID JULIAN DATE
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 334 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = DECEMBER
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (334 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 304 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = NOVEMBER
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (304 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 273 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = OCTOBER
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (273 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 243 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = SEPTEMBER
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (243 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 212 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = AUGUST
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (212 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 181 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = JULY
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (181 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 151 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = JUNE
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (151 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 120 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = MAY
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (120 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 90 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = APRIL
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (90 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 59 + &LEAPYR) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = MARCH
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - (59 + &LEAPYR)
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&JULIAN > 31) +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = FEBRUARY
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN - 31
V            ENDX
V        OTHERWISE +
V            DO
V            SET &MONTH = JANUARY
V            SET &DAY   = &JULIAN
V            ENDX
V    ENDX
V
V    SET G_DATE = &MONTH &DAY, &YY
V    SET JULIAN = &G_DATE
VENDX
VMEMBER NAME  J2C
V/* rexx */
VJUL2CAL: /* JULIAN TO CALENDAR CONVERT */
V  ARG JULDATE
V  "NEWSTACK"
V  REX="<JUL2CAL> "
V  VER="v1.5 12/15/93"
V  CALLED=SYSVAR(SYSNEST)
V  CALDATE='999999'
V  IF JULDATE='' THEN DO
V     IF CALLED='YES' THEN
V        SIGNAL EXIT
V     ELSE
V        DO WHILE JULDATE=''
V           SAY REX'Enter JULDATE-YYDDD or YY/DDD'
V           PULL JULDATE
V        END
V     END
V  LEN = LENGTH(JULDATE)
V  IF LEN = 5 THEN DO
V     YY=SUBSTR(JULDATE,1,2)
V     DDD=SUBSTR(JULDATE,3,3)
V     SIGNAL EDITDDD
V  END
V  IF LEN = 6 & SUBSTR(JULDATE,3,1) = "/" THEN DO
V     YY=SUBSTR(JULDATE,1,2)
V     DDD=SUBSTR(JULDATE,4,6)
V     SIGNAL EDITDDD
V  END
V
VINVALID:
V  IF CALLED="NO" THEN
V     SAY 'PASSED JULDATE ' JULDATE 'IS INVALID'
V  SIGNAL EXIT
V
VEDITDDD:
V  IF DATATYPE(YY||DDD) = 'CHAR' THEN
V     SIGNAL INVALID
V  IF YY//4 = 0 THEN
V     MAXDAYS=366
V  ELSE
V     MAXDAYS=365
V  IF DDD > MAXDAYS THEN
V     SIGNAL INVALID
V  PNTR=12
V  DO WHILE PNTR > 0
V     IF PNTR > 2  & YY//4 = 0 THEN
V        PLUS=1
V     ELSE
V        PLUS=0
V     START=PNTR*3-2
V     END=PNTR*3
V     WK=SUBSTR('000031059090120151181212243273304334',START,3)+PLUS
V     IF DDD > WK THEN DO
V        MM=PNTR
V        DD=DDD-WK
V        PNTR=0
V     END
V     ELSE
V        PNTR=PNTR - 1
V  END
V  IF LENGTH(MM)=1 THEN
V     MM=0||MM
V  IF LENGTH(DD)=1 THEN
V     DD=0||DD
V  CALDATE=MM||DD||YY
V  IF LEN = 6 THEN
V     SHOWCAL=MM||'/'||DD||'/'||YY
V  ELSE
V     SHOWCAL=CALDATE
V
V  RELATIVE=DDD
V  RELATIVE = (YY*365) + ((YY-1)%4) + RELATIVE - 1
V  IF CALLED="NO" THEN
V     SAY REX 'FOR JULDATE='JULDATE', CALDATE='SHOWCAL
V
VEXIT:
V  "DELSTACK"
V   RETURN CALDATE
VMEMBER NAME  J2G
V/* REXX J2G */
V/* Parse the passed date */
V/* TSO J2G 2000001 Y     */
VPARSE ARG julian_date show
Vyear = LEFT(julian_date,4)
Vdays = RIGHT(julian_date,3)
V/* Calculate the Gregorian date */
VFEB = 28 + (year // 4 = 0) - (year // 100 = 0) + (year // 400 = 0)
Vmonths = "31" FEB "31 30 31 30 31 31 30 31 30 31"
VDO count = 1 WHILE days > word(months,count)
V   days = days - word(months,count)
VEND
V/* Return or display the date */
VIF show = "" THEN
V  RETURN RIGHT(days,2,0)"/"RIGHT(count,2,0)"/"year
VELSE
V  DO
V    SAY "   Julian date: '"julian_date"'"
V    SAY "Gregorian date: '"RIGHT(days,2,0)"/"RIGHT(count,2,0)"/"year"'"
V  END
VMEMBER NAME  J2GDATE
V/* J2GDate date ********************************************** REXX */  0001000
V/* Convert Julian date  To Gregorian?date yy.ddd -> yy/mm/dd        */  0002000
V/* Program By CT Tran PPD group         X4506          4/91         */  0003000
V/* This is a Rexx function executable as                            */  0004000
V/*  Jdate = J2Gdate 91.118  result in JDATE 04/28/91                */  0005000
V/* Companion function: G2Jdate                                      */  0006000
V/********************************************************************/  0007000
V/*   Modified By: IAPPINI,R.                                        */  0008000
V/*   When: 09/23/92                                                 */  0009000
V/*   What: Added parameter MMDDYY to return the date in mm/dd/yy    */  0010000
V/*         format.                                                  */  0011000
V/********************************************************************/  0012000
VJ2GDate:                                                                0013000
VIf Arg() > 1 Then p1 = Arg(1) Arg(2)                                    0014000
VElse Parse Arg p1                                                       0015000
Vproc_stmt = 'PROC 1 DATE MMDDYY'                                        0016000
VCall Proctso p1,proc_stmt                                               0017000
VInterpret result                                                        0018000
Vxdate = Translate(date," ","./-")                                       0019000
VIf Words(xdate) > 1 Then Parse Var xdate year dday                      0020000
VElse Do                                                                 0021000
V  year = Left(date,Length(date)-3)                                      0022000
V  dday = Right(date,3)                                                  0023000
V  End                                                                   0024000
VIF dday = '' Then Do                                                    0025000
V   Say Argument must be in Julian form YY.DDD                           0026000
V   Exit                                                                 0027000
V  End                                                                   0028000
Vmo = 1 + (dday%30.416 )  /* ????? */                                    0029000
VIf Length(year) = 4 Then year = Right(year,2)                           0030000
Vx = "0 31 59 90 120 151 181 212 243 273 304 334 365"                    0031000
Vday = dday - (Word(x,mo) + (year-year%4*4 = 0 & mo > 2) )               0032000
VIf day = 0 Then Do                                                      0033000
V   mo = mo -1                                                           0034000
V   day = dday - (Word(x,mo) + (year-year%4*4 = 0 & mo > 2) )            0035000
V   End                                                                  0036000
VIf mmddyy ｬ= "" Then,                                                   0037000
V   Return (Right(mo,2,'0')'/'Right(day,2,'0')'/'year)                   0038000
VElse Return (year'/'Right(mo,2,'0')'/'Right(day,2,'0'))                 0039000
VMEMBER NAME  J2S
V/* REXX J2S                                                           */
V/* JULIAN DATE TO STARDARD  YYYY.DDD ==> YYYY/MM/DD                   */
V/* JULIAN DATE TO STARDARD  YYYY/DDD ==> YYYY/MM/DD                   */
V/* CALL J2S STRIP('1999/166');SAY RESULT                              */
VARG JD
VIF POS('.',JD)>0 THEN PARSE VALUE JD WITH YYYY '.' DDD
VIF POS('/',JD)>0 THEN PARSE VALUE JD WITH YYYY '/' DDD
VDI = "'" || SUBSTR(YYYY,3,2) || DDD || "'"
VDI =        SUBSTR(YYYY,3,2) || DDD
VDD = DATE('S',DI,'J')
VRESULT =  INSERT('/', INSERT('/',DD,4), 7)
VRETURN RESULT
VMEMBER NAME  KILL
VPROC 1 UID
VCONTROL NOMSG
VSET &KILL = &STR(/*)
VSET &USER = &STR($VS,'C U=&UID')
VSUB * END(@@)
V&KILL&USER
V@@
VMEMBER NAME  KOPI
VISREDIT MACRO NOPROCESS (NEWNAME)
V/*********************************************************************/
V/*                                                                   */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)                  */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*   THIS MACRO COPIES THE MEMBER YOU ARE CURRENTLY EDITING          */
V/*   TO A ANOTHER MEMBER (NAME SPECIFIED BY YOU) AND PUTS YOU INTO   */
V/*   EDIT IN THE NEW MEMBER.                                         */
V/*   WHILE IN EDIT, TYPE "KOPY MEMNAME"                              */
V/*********************************************************************/
VIF &NEWNAME = &STR() THEN +
V   DO
V      SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(NEWNAME IS REQUIRED)
V      ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V      EXIT
V   END
VISREDIT CREATE &NEWNAME .ZFIRST  .ZLAST
VIF &LASTCC ｼ= 0 THEN +
V   DO
V      SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(NEWNAME ALREADY EXISTS)
V      ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V      EXIT
V   END
VISREDIT EDIT &NEWNAME
VISREDIT CANCEL
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  LASTMM
V/* REXX  Return Last Month*/
Vcall getlastmonth
Vsay date(s) YYMM
Vfini :
Vexit 0
V
Vgetlastmonth : procedure expose YYMM
Vd = date(s)
VYYMM = substr(d,3,4)
VYY   = substr(d,3,2)
VMM   = substr(d,5,2)
Vif MM = '01' then do
V   MM = '12'
V   YY = YY - 1
Vend
Velse
V   MM   = MM - 1
Vif length(MM) = 1 then MM = '0' || MM
Vif length(YY) = 1 then YY = '0' || YY
VYYMM = YY || MM
Vreturn
VMEMBER NAME  LEN
V/* REXX LEN*/
VISREDIT "MACRO"
VA = "'" ; Q = '"' ; LN = 0 ; C = "EQ"
VCOLUMNS = "----+----1----+----2"| |,
V"----+----3----+----4----+----5"| |,
V"----+----6----+----7----+----8";
VISREDIT "(NUM1,NUM2) = "NUMBER
VPARSE VAR NUM2 NBR COB XTRA;
VISREDIT "(CURSROW,CURSCOL) = "CURSOR
VISREDIT "(LRECL) = "LRECL
VISREDIT "(EDITLINE) = LINE "CURSROW
VIF NBR = "STD" THEN LRECL = LRECL - 8;
VIF COB = "COBOL" THEN LRECL = LRECL - 6;
VIF CURSCOL > 0 THEN DO
V   BEGPOS = CURSCOL - 1
V   STRING1 = SUBSTR(EDITLINE,CURSCOL,(LRECL - BEGPOS))
V   IF SUBSTR(STRING1,1,1) = A THEN DO
V      X = A ; BEGPOS = BEGPOS + 1
V      CALL BYTESCAN ; END
V   ELSE
V   IF SUBSTR(STRING1,1,1) = Q THEN DO
V      X = Q ; BEGPOS = BEGPOS + 1
V      CALL BYTESCAN ; END
V   ELSE
V   IF SUBSTR(STRING1,1,1) = " " THEN DO
V      LN = LENGTH(STRING1) ; C = "NE"
V      CALL BYTESCAN ; END
V   ELSE DO
V   PARSE VAR STRING1 FIRST XTRA
V   LN = LENGTH(FIRST)
V   END
VEND
VIF LN > 0 THEN DO
V   ZMSG000S = LN" CHARACTERS LONG"
V   WRK1 = SUBSTR(" ",1,BEGPOS)| |SUBSTR(COLUMNS,1,LN)
V   ISREDIT "LINE_AFTER "CURSROW" = INFOLINE '&WRK1'"
V   ISREDIT "CURSOR = (CURSROW,CURSCOL)"
V   END
VELSE DO
VZMSG000S = "CANNOT DETERMINE LENGTH"
VZMSG000L = "CURSOR NOT IN DATA, STRIN"| |,
V"G CONTAINS MIS-MATCHED QUOTES OR OTH"| |,
V"ER ERROR OCCURED."
VEND
VISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISPZ000)"
VEXIT
V/* -------- SCANNING SUBROUTINES---------------*/
VBYTESCAN: DO I=2 TO LENGTH(STRING1) BY 1
VIF C = "EQ" THEN CALL EQSCN
VELSE CALL NESCN
VEND ; RETURN
VEQSCN:  IF SUBSTR(STRING1,I,1) = X THEN DO
VLN = I - 2 ; I = LENGTH(STRING1)
VEND ; RETURN
VNESCN:  IF SUBSTR(STRING1,I,1) \= " " THEN DO
VLN = I - 1 ; I = LENGTH(STRING1)
VEND ; RETURN
VMEMBER NAME  LIT
V       ISREDIT MACRO
V/********************************************************************/
V/*                                                                  */
V/*  WRITTEN BY TOM BARTHOLD (TBARTHOLD@COMCAST.NET)                 */
V/*                                                                  */
V/*     THIS MACRO COMPUTES THE SIZE OF A LITERAL ON THE LINE WHERE   */
V/*     THE CURSOR IS                                                 */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*    'THIS IS EASIER IF YOU SET IT UP AS A PFKEY FUNCTION'          */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*    TYPE THE COMMAND 'LIT' IN THE COMMAND LINE AND PLACE THE       */
V/*    CURSOR ON A LINE THAT CONTAINS A LITERAL (ENCLOSED WITH        */
V/*    SINGLE QUOTES).  PRESS ENTER.                                  */
V/*                                                                   */
V/*    THIS MACRO WILL DISPLAY THE LENGTH OF THE LITERAL.             */
V/*                                                                   */
V/********************************************************************/
V       ISREDIT (OLD) = LINE .ZCSR
V       ISREDIT (NUM) = LINENUM .ZCSR
V       IF &NUM ｼ> 3 THEN EXIT
V
V       SET &CUR=1
V       SET &CHR=X
V       DO WHILE &STR(&CHR) ｼ= &STR(')
V          SET &CHR = &SUBSTR(&CUR:&CUR,&STR(&OLD))
V          SET &CUR = &CUR + 1
V          IF &CUR > 72 THEN +
V             DO
V               SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(LITERAL NOT FOUND)
V               GO TO ENDIT
V             END
V       END
V       SET &BEG = &CUR
V       SET &CUR = &CUR + 1
V       DO UNTIL &STR(&CHR) = &STR(')
V          SET &CHR = &SUBSTR(&CUR:&CUR,&STR(&OLD))
V          SET &CUR = &CUR + 1
V          IF &CUR > 72 THEN +
V             DO
V               SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(LITERAL NOT FOUND)
V               GO TO ENDIT
V             END
V       END
V       SET &END = &CUR - 1
V       SET &LEN = &END - &BEG
V       WRITE 'LITERAL LENGTH = &LEN.'
V       SET &ZEDLMSG = &STR(LITERAL LENGTH = &LEN.)
V/*     ISREDIT FIND PREV 'PIC' */
V       ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V       EXIT CODE(0)
VENDIT: ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)
V       EXIT CODE(0)
VMEMBER NAME  LJUST
V/**  REXX -- LEFT JUSTIFIES DATA USING CC/C## RANGE OR DEFAULTS  **/
V/*           TO ENTIRE FILE; ACCEPTS COLUMNS OR USES ISPF BOUNDS */
V
V   SAVEMSG = MSG()
V   X = MSG("OFF")
V   X = ADDRESS()
V   SUBCOM ISPEXEC
V   IF RC <> 0 THEN DO
V      SAY "LJUST MUST BE RUN UNDER ISPF EDIT!"
V      SIGNAL QUIT
V      END
V   SUBCOM ISREDIT
V   UMODE = "ISREDIT"
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT
V   "MACRO (LEFT,RIGHT) NOPROCESS"
V   IF LEFT = '?' THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V
V   IF LEFT <> "" AND RIGHT = "" THEN DO
V      "ISREDIT (L2,RIGHT) = BOUNDS"
V      END
V
V   "PROCESS RANGE C"
V   IF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      "(TOP) = LINENUM .ZFIRST"
V      "(BOT) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      "(TOP) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE"
V      "(BOT) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE"
V   END
V
V   "ISREDIT("LB","RB") = BOUNDS"
V   IF LEFT  <> "" THEN LB = LEFT
V   IF RIGHT <> "" THEN RB = RIGHT
V
V DO II = TOP TO BOT BY 1
V      "ISREDIT (RECORD) = LINE &II"
V      DO JJ = LB TO RB BY 1 WHILE(SUBSTR(RECORD,JJ,1) = ' ')
V         END
V      IF LB < JJ THEN DO
V         RECORD = SUBSTR(RECORD,1,LB-1) || SUBSTR(RECORD,JJ,RB-JJ+1),
V            || SUBSTR(RECORD,LB,JJ-LB)  || SUBSTR(RECORD,RB+1)
V         "ISREDIT LINE &II = &STR(RECORD)"
V         END
V      END
V
VQUIT:
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC
V   X = MSG(SAVEMSG)
V   ADDRESS ISREDIT "LOCATE" TOP
V   EXIT(1)
V
VDISPDOC:
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V   SAY "LJUST - LEFT JUSTIFY TEXT W/IN BOUNDS                    "
V   SAY
V   SAY " FORMAT "
V   SAY
V   SAY "    LJUST   ( LEFT-COLUMN  RIGHT-COLUMN )                "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       WILL CAUSE THE MARKED (VIA C/CC/C##) RANGE OF     "
V   SAY "       LINES TO BE LEFT JUSTIFIED WITHIN THE BOUNDS THEN "
V   SAY "       IN FORCE.  IF NO RANGE IS SPECIFIED, THE ENTIRE   "
V   SAY "       FILE IS PROCESSED.  THE FIRST AND THE LAST        "
V   SAY "       NON-BLANK CHARACTERS WITHIN THE BOUNDS DETERMINE  "
V   SAY "       THE SIZE OF THE DATA TO BE LEFT JUSTIFIED.        "
V   SAY "       SPECIFYING A LEFT COLUMN AND LEFT COLUMN WILL     "
V   SAY "       CAUSE ONLY THE DATA IN THOSE COLUMNS TO BE        "
V   SAY "       JUSTIFIED.                                        "
V   SAY
V   SAY " EXAMPLE "
V   SAY
V   SAY
V   SAY "    LJUST  1 50                                          "
V   SAY "       WILL CAUSE THE TEST IN COLUMNS 1 THRU 50 TO BE    "
V   SAY "       SHIFTED LEFT SO THAT THE FIRST NON BLANK IN THOSE "
V   SAY "       COLUMNS WILL BE IN POSITION 1.                    "
V   SAY
V   EXIT(1)
V
VMEMBER NAME  LRECL
V/* REXX LRECL                                                         */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* LRECL   : To get logical record length                             */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VADDRESS ISREDIT "(LREC) = LRECL"
VADDRESS ISREDIT "(BLKS) = BLKSIZE"
VLREC=LREC+0;BLKS=BLKS+0
VZEDSMSG = "LRECL/BLKSZ:"LREC"/"BLKS
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT 1

VMEMBER NAME  MALL
V/* -------------------------- Rexx ------------------------*/           0001000
V/* Multiple string search that supports complex filtering. */           0002000
V/*   MALL {SearchString} {X|NX}                            */           0003000
V/* For X, the search will be in hidden lines and results   */           0003100
V/* are appended to the displayed list                      */           0003200
V/* For NX,the search will be in displayed list and will be */           0003300
V/* removed from the list                                   */           0003400
V/* -------------------------- Rexx ------------------------*/           0004000
V/* Rexx Exec To Display Lines With complex Search String.  */           0005000
V/* | = Or   & = and   \ = Not     ｬ = Not                  */           0006000
V/* Search String Can have | & or \ (Negative)              */           0008000
V/* Example:                                                */           0009000
V/* MALL (Cheese & ｬCheddar) | Yoghurt | (Milk & ｬFatfree)  */           0010000
V/* will display all lines that                             */           0011000
V/* - contain Cheese but do not contain Cheddar OR          */           0012000
V/* - contain Yoghurt OR                                    */           0013000
V/* - contain Milk but do not contain Fatfree.              */           0014000
V/* ------------------------------------------------------- */           0019000
V/* Author: Moyeen Ahmed Khan (from Xephon)                 */           0020000
V/* ------------------------------------------------------- */           0021000
VTrace O                                                                 0022000
V                                                                        0023000
VAddress ISREDIT                                                         0024000
V'MACRO (xMySrch) PROCESS'                                               0025000
V'ISREDIT (xUsrStat) = USER_STATE'                                       0026000
V                                                                        0027000
VIf xMySrch='?' Then Signal How2Use                                      0028000
VCall BuiltEditCmds                                                      0029000
VCall Initialize                                                         0030000
VIf xMySrch=''  Then Signal ResetDisplay                                 0031000
VCall TranslateSrch                                                      0032000
VCall BuildLogic                                                         0033000
VCall HideAndSeek                                                        0034000
VIf xType='' Then Call BuildLastShow                                     0035000
VCall DispEojMsgs                                                        0036000
VExit nRc                                                                0037000
V                                                                        0038000
V/*                        Start Of Subroutines                    */    0039000
V/*                        --------------------                    */    0040000
V                                                                        0041000
VInitialize:                                                             0042000
V/*********/                                                             0043000
VI=0                                                                     0044000
VJ=0                                                                     0045000
VnColumn=1                                                               0046000
VnCount=0                                                                0047000
VnRc=0                                                                   0048000
VnRow=1                                                                  0049000
VsFirst='Y'                                                              0050000
VsHiddenLines='N'                                                        0051000
VsPlaceLbl='N'                                                           0052000
VxBuildCmd=''                                                            0053000
VxHide='X'                                                               0054000
VxShow='NX'                                                              0055000
VxStatus=''                                                              0056000
VxType=''                                                                0057000
V                                                                        0058000
VcmdGetCrsrPos                                                           0059000
VcmdResetLbls                                                            0060000
VcmdWhereAmI                                                             0061000
VcmdLastLine                                                             0062000
VcmdPlaceCrsr                                                            0063000
VcmdSeekHidden                                                           0064000
VIf Rc=0 Then sHiddenLines='Y'                                           0065000
VReturn                                                                  0066000
V                                                                        0067000
VResetDisplay:                                                           0068000
V/***********/                                                           0069000
VnRc=0                                                                   0070000
VIf sHiddenLines='Y' Then Do                                             0071000
V  cmdReset                                                              0072000
V  If nColumn>0 Then cmdPlaceCrsr                                        0073000
V   Else nRc=1                                                           0074000
V  End                                                                   0075000
V Else Do                                                                0076000
V  zedsmsg='Required String Missing'                                     0077000
V  zedlmsg='The Command Requires a Specific Search String'               0078000
V  Address ISPEXEC 'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)'                                 0079000
V  nRc=16                                                                0080000
V  End                                                                   0081000
VExit nRc                                                                0082000
V                                                                        0083000
VTranslateSrch:                                                          0084000
V/************/                                                          0085000
VxMyNegSearch='ｬ'                                                        0086000
VxMySrch=Translate(xMySrch,'\',xMyNegSearch)                             0087000
VxMySrch=Strip(xMySrch,'B',' ')                                          0088000
VIf Words(xMySrch)=1 & Pos("'",xMySrch)=0 & Pos('"',xMySrch)=0 Then Do   0089000
V  If Left(xMySrch,1)='\' Then Do                                        0090000
V    xRest=Substr(xMySrch,2)                                             0091000
V    If \DataType(xRest,'A') Then xMySrch="\'"xRest"'"                   0092000
V    End                                                                 0093000
V   Else Do                                                              0094000
V    If \DataType(xMySrch,'A') Then xMySrch="'"xMySrch"'"                0095000
V    End                                                                 0096000
V End                                                                    0097000
VxMySrch0=xMySrch                                                        0098000
VIf Pos("'",xMySrch0)>0 Then Do                                          0099000
V  nPos1=Pos("'",xMySrch0)                                               0100000
V  Do While nPos1>0                                                      0101000
V   nPos2=Pos("'",xMySrch0,nPos1+1)                                      0102000
V   xMySrch0=Overlay('`',xMySrch0,nPos1,nPos2-nPos1+1,'`')               0103000
V   nPos1=Pos("'",xMySrch0)                                              0104000
V   End                                                                  0105000
V  End                                                                   0106000
VIf Pos('"',xMySrch0)>0 Then Do                                          0107000
V  nPos1=Pos('"',xMySrch0)                                               0108000
V  Do While nPos1>0                                                      0109000
V   nPos2=Pos('"',xMySrch0,nPos1+1)                                      0110000
V   xMySrch0=Overlay('`',xMySrch0,nPos1,nPos2-nPos1+1,'`')               0111000
V   nPos1=Pos('"',xMySrch0)                                              0112000
V   End                                                                  0113000
V  End                                                                   0114000
VxMySrch1=Translate(xMySrch0,' ','|&()')                                 0115000
VIf xMySrch1='' Then Do                                                  0116000
V  Call DispEojMsgs                                                      0117000
V  Exit nRc                                                              0118000
V  End                                                                   0119000
VxMySrch2=Translate(xMySrch0,'~~~~','|&()')                              0120000
VxMySrch3=Translate(xMySrch0,'~~','|&')                                  0121000
VIf Words(xMySrch2)>1 Then Do                                            0122000
V  nWords=Words(xMySrch2)                                                0123000
V  xCrntWord=Word(xMySrch2,nWords)                                       0124000
V  xCrntWord=Translate(xCrntWord)                                        0125000
V  Select                                                                0126000
V   When xCrntWord='X' Then xType='Append'                               0127000
V   When xCrntWord='NX' Then xType='SubSelect'                           0128000
V   Otherwise Do                                                         0129000
V    xType=''                                                            0130000
V    cmdReset                                                            0131000
V    End                                                                 0132000
V   End                                                                  0133000
V  If xType<>'' Then Do                                                  0134000
V    xMySrch=Subword(xMySrch,1,Words(xMySrch)-1)                         0135000
V    xMySrch1=Substr(xMySrch1,1,Length(xMySrch))                         0136000
V    End                                                                 0137000
V  End                                                                   0138000
VReturn                                                                  0139000
V                                                                        0140000
VBuildLogic:                                                             0141000
V/*********/                                                             0142000
VDo I=1 By 1 Until I=Words(xMySrch1)                                     0143000
V xCrntWord=Word(xMySrch1,I)                                             0144000
V nCnt=0                                                                 0145000
V Select                                                                 0146000
V  When Length(xCrntWord)=1 Then xSymbol=">"                             0147000
V  When Left(xCrntWord,1)='\' Then Do                                    0148000
V   nCnt=1                                                               0149000
V   xSymbol="="                                                          0150000
V   End                                                                  0151000
V  Otherwise xSymbol=">"                                                 0152000
V  End                                                                   0153000
V Select                                                                 0154000
V  When Translate(Left(xCrntWord,2))="C'" Then Do                        0155000
V   sExact='Y'                                                           0156000
V   nCnt=1                                                               0157000
V   End                                                                  0158000
V  When Translate(Left(xCrntWord,3))="\C'" Then Do                       0159000
V   sExact='Y'                                                           0160000
V   nCnt=2                                                               0161000
V   End                                                                  0162000
V  Otherwise Do                                                          0163000
V   sExact='N'                                                           0164000
V   End                                                                  0165000
V  End                                                                   0166000
V If nCnt>0 Then xCrntWord=Substr(xCrntWord,nCnt+1)                      0167000
V If Verify(xCrntWord,"'")=0 Then Do                                     0168000
V   nWordPos=WordIndex(xMySrch1,I)+nCnt                                  0169000
V   nLen=Length(xCrntWord)                                               0170000
V   xCrntWord=Substr(xMySrch,nWordPos,nLen)                              0171000
V   End                                                                  0172000
V Select                                                                 0173000
V  When Left(xCrntWord,1)="'" Then xDat=xCrntWord                        0174000
V  When Left(xCrntWord,1)='"' Then xDat="'"||xCrntWord||"'"              0175000
V  Otherwise xDat="'"||xCrntWord||"'"                                    0176000
V  End                                                                   0177000
V If sExact='N' Then Do                                                  0178000
V   xDat.I="Pos(Translate("xDat"),Translate(xData))"||xSymbol||"0"       0179000
V   End                                                                  0180000
V  Else Do                                                               0181000
V   xDat.I="Pos("xDat",xData)"||xSymbol||"0"                             0182000
V   End                                                                  0183000
V End                                                                    0184000
VIf I=1 Then Do                                                          0185000
V  xBuildCmd=xDat.I                                                      0186000
V  Return                                                                0187000
V  End                                                                   0188000
VDo I=1 By 1 Until I=Length(xMySrch2)                                    0189000
V xFirstCh=Substr(xMySrch2,I,1)                                          0190000
V Select                                                                 0191000
V  When xFirstCh='~' | xFirstCh=' ' Then Do                              0192000
V   sFirst='Y'                                                           0193000
V   xBuildCmd=xBuildCmd||Substr(xMySrch,I,1)                             0194000
V   End                                                                  0195000
V  When sFirst='Y' Then Do                                               0196000
V   sFirst='N'                                                           0197000
V   J=J+1                                                                0198000
V   xBuildCmd=xBuildCmd||xDat.J                                          0199000
V   End                                                                  0200000
V  Otherwise Nop                                                         0201000
V  End                                                                   0202000
V End                                                                    0203000
VReturn                                                                  0204000
V                                                                        0205000
VHideAndSeek:                                                            0206000
V/**********/                                                            0207000
VDo nLine=1 By 1 Until nLine=nLast                                       0208000
V cmdLineRead                                                            0209000
V If sHiddenLines='Y' Then cmdLineStatus                                 0210000
V If xType<>'' Then Do                                                   0211000
V   Select                                                               0212000
V    When xType='Append' & xStatus='NX' Then Iterate nLine               0213000
V    When xType='Append' & xStatus='X' Then Nop                          0214000
V    When xType='SubSelect' & xStatus='X' Then Iterate nLine             0215000
V    When xType='SubSelect' & xStatus='NX' Then Nop                      0216000
V    Otherwise Nop                                                       0217000
V    End                                                                 0218000
V   End                                                                  0219000
V xData=Space(xData)                                                     0220000
V sRet='N'                                                               0221000
V If xData<>'' Then Interpret "Rc="xBuildCmd                             0222000
V If Rc>0 Then Do                                                        0223000
V   Select                                                               0224000
V    When xStatus='X' & xType='Append' Then Do                           0225000
V     cmdLineShow                                                        0226000
V     nCount=nCount+1                                                    0227000
V     End                                                                0228000
V    When xStatus='NX' & xType='SubSelect' Then Do                       0229000
V     nStart=nLine                                                       0230000
V     cmdLineHide                                                        0231000
V     nCount=nCount+1                                                    0232000
V     End                                                                0233000
V    Otherwise Do                                                        0234000
V     If xStatus='X' Then cmdLineShow                                    0235000
V     sRet='Y'                                                           0236000
V     End                                                                0237000
V   End                                                                  0238000
V  End                                                                   0239000
V If xType<>'' Then Iterate nLine                                        0240000
V If sRet='N' Then Do                                                    0241000
V   If sPlaceLbl='N' Then Do                                             0242000
V     nStart=nLine                                                       0243000
V     sPlaceLbl='Y'                                                      0244000
V     End                                                                0245000
V   End                                                                  0246000
V  Else Do                                                               0247000
V   If sPlaceLbl='Y' Then Do                                             0248000
V     If nStart+1=nLine Then cmdLineHide                                 0249000
V      Else Do                                                           0250000
V       cmdPlaceLbl1                                                     0251000
V       nEnd=nLine-1                                                     0252000
V       cmdPlaceLbl2                                                     0253000
V       cmdHideLines                                                     0254000
V       End                                                              0255000
V     sPlaceLbl='N'                                                      0256000
V     End                                                                0257000
V   nCount=nCount+1                                                      0258000
V   End                                                                  0259000
V End                                                                    0260000
VReturn                                                                  0261000
V                                                                        0262000
VBuildLastShow:                                                          0263000
V/************/                                                          0264000
VIf sPlaceLbl='Y' Then Do                                                0265000
V  If nStart=nLine Then cmdLineHide                                      0266000
V   Else Do                                                              0267000
V    cmdPlaceLbl1                                                        0268000
V    nEnd=nLine                                                          0269000
V    cmdPlaceLbl2                                                        0270000
V    cmdHideLines                                                        0271000
V    End                                                                 0272000
V  End                                                                   0273000
VReturn                                                                  0274000
V                                                                        0275000
VDispEojMsgs:                                                            0276000
V/**********/                                                            0277000
VSelect                                                                  0278000
V When xMySrch1='' Then Do                                               0279000
V  nRow=nDispRow                                                         0280000
V  nColumn=1                                                             0281000
V  cmdReset                                                              0282000
V  cmdPlaceCrsr                                                          0283000
V  zedsmsg='*Put String In Quotes*'                                      0284000
V  zedlmsg='Put String In Quotes Appropriately'                          0285000
V  nRc=16                                                                0286000
V  End                                                                   0287000
V When nCount=0 & xType='' Then Do                                       0288000
V  nRow=nDispRow                                                         0289000
V  nColumn=1                                                             0290000
V  cmdReset                                                              0291000
V  cmdUpMax                  /* VG - ADDED TO CLEAR CMD */               0291100
V  cmdPlaceCrsr                                                          0291200
V  zedsmsg='*No Hits*'                                                   0293000
V  zedlmsg='Program Found No Lines That Satisfy:-' xBuildCmd             0294000
V  nRc=16                                                                0295000
V  End                                                                   0296000
V When nCount=0 Then Do                                                  0297000
V  nRow=nDispRow                                                         0298000
V  nColumn=1                                                             0299000
V  cmdUpMax                  /* VG - ADDED TO CLEAR CMD */               0299100
V  cmdPlaceCrsr                                                          0300000
V  zedsmsg='*No Hits*'                                                   0301000
V  zedlmsg='Program Found No Lines That Satisfy:-' xBuildCmd             0302000
V  nRc=16                                                                0303000
V  End                                                                   0304000
V When xType='SubSelect' Then Do                                         0305000
V  cmdUpMax                                                              0306000
V  zedsmsg=nCount 'Lines Excluded'                                       0307000
V  zedlmsg=nCount 'Lines Excluded Due To:-' xBuildCmd                    0308000
V  nRc=0                                                                 0309000
V  End                                                                   0310000
V When xType='Append' Then Do                                            0311000
V  cmdUpMax                                                              0312000
V  zedsmsg=nCount 'Lines Added'                                          0313000
V  zedlmsg=nCount 'Lines Have Been Added Due To:-' xBuildCmd             0314000
V  nRc=0                                                                 0315000
V  End                                                                   0316000
V When xType='' Then Do                                                  0317000
V  cmdUpMax                                                              0318000
V  zedsmsg=nCount 'Lines Found'                                          0319000
V  zedlmsg='Program Found' nCount 'Lines Due To:-' xBuildCmd             0320000
V  nRc=0                                                                 0321000
V  End                                                                   0322000
V Otherwise Nop                                                          0323000
V End                                                                    0324000
V'USER_STATE = (xUsrStat)'                                               0325000
VAddress ISPEXEC 'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)'                                   0326000
VReturn                                                                  0327000
V                                                                        0328000
VBuiltEditCmds:                                                          0329000
V/************/                                                          0330000
VcmdWhereAmI='(nDispRow,nDispCol) = DISPLAY_LINES'                       0331000
VcmdGetCrsrPos='(nRow,nColumn) = CURSOR'                                 0332000
VcmdHideLines="EXCLUDE p'=' .AAAFMAK .SSAHSF ALL"                        0333000
VcmdLastLine='(nLast) = LINENUM .ZLAST'                                  0334000
VcmdLineHide="XSTATUS (nStart) = (xHide)"                                0335000
VcmdLineRead='(xData) = LINE (nLine)'                                    0336000
VcmdLineShow='XSTATUS (nLine) = (xShow)'                                 0337000
VcmdLineStatus='(xStatus) = XSTATUS (nLine)'                             0338000
VcmdPlaceCrsr='CURSOR=(nRow,nColumn)'                                    0339000
VcmdPlaceLbl1='LABEL (nStart) = .AAAFMAK'                                0340000
VcmdPlaceLbl2='LABEL (nEnd) = .SSAHSF'                                   0341000
VcmdReset='RESET'                                                        0342000
VcmdResetLbls='RESET LABEL'                                              0343000
VcmdSeekHidden="SEEK P'=' X FIRST .ZFIRST .ZLAST"                        0344000
VcmdUpMax='UP MAX'                                                       0345000
VReturn                                                                  0346000
V                                                                        0347000
VHow2Use:                                                                0348000
VParse Source . . xExecName .                                            0349000
VSay 'Use' xExecName 'for complex searches while in ISPF/EDIT'           0350000
VSay 'Format is'                                                         0351000
VSay '    ' xExecName 'SearchString {<X>|<NX>}'                          0352000
VSay 'Your Search String Can have Or(|) and (&) Or Not(ｬ) operand'       0353000
VSay 'Search strings can be in quotes to search for multi words.'        0354000
VSay "To search for exact matches, presfix the string with C'"           0355000
VSay 'Example:-'                                                         0356000
VSay xExecName '(Cheese & \Cheddar) | Yoghurt | ( Milk & ｬFatfree)'      0357000
VSay 'will display all lines that'                                       0358000
VSay '- contain Cheese but do not contain Cheddar OR'                    0359000
VSay '- contain Yoghurt OR'                                              0360000
VSay '- contain Milk but do not contain Fatfree.'                        0361000
VSay 'Once in this subset, you can further issue' xExecName 'commands'   0362000
VSay 'to either filter out from what is shown Or'                        0363000
VSay 'to add more lines that are hidden'                                 0364000
VSay xExecName 'Asiago NX'                                               0365000
VSay 'will hide all the lines that contain Asiago from the above'        0366000
VSay 'display'                                                           0367000
VSay xExecName 'Cream X'                                                 0368000
VSay 'will append all the lines that have Cream from the excluded lines' 0369000
VSay 'to the displayed list'                                             0370000
VSay 'Of course, you can issue any EDIT command any time'                0371000
VSay xExecName 'without any parameters will reset to full display'       0372000
VExit                                                                    0373000
VMEMBER NAME  MASSCOPY
V/* Rexx Masscopy                                                     */
V/* Syntax : tso YYMM                                                 */
Varg YYMM
Vif YYMM = '' | datatype(YYMM) <> 'NUM' then do
V   ZEDSMSG = '*Need numeric YYMM*'
V   "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
V   exit 1
Vend
Vlocaluser = Userid()
Vwjcount = 0
Vcn      = 0
Vaddress ISPEXEC
V
Vaddress ISPEXEC "Control Errors Return"
Vcall parse_listcat
Vcall build_jobcard
Vcall feed_job_details
Vcall edit_jcl
V
Vqui :
Vaddress ISPEXEC 'LMFREE DATAID('trap')'
Vaddress TSO 'FREE F('ddname')'
Vexit
V
Vbuild_jobcard:
Vaddress TSO
Vcall wj("//"userid()"$ JOB (000000),'BT:KANNAN AK" yymm"',            ")
Vcall wj("//         CLASS=U,MSGCLASS=X,NOTIFY=&SYSUID,COND=(5,LT)     ")
Vreturn
V
Vbuild_jcl :
Vcn = cn + 1
Vtx = translate(format(cn,3,0),'0',' ')
Vcall wj("//*---------------------------------------------------------*")
Vcall wj("//QCOPY"tx" EXEC PGM=IDCAMS                                  ")
Vcall wj("//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*                                       ")
Vcall wj("//SYSUT1   DD DISP=SHR,DSN="fstr"                            ")
Vcall wj("//SYSUT2   DD DSN="udsname",                                 ")
Vcall wj("//            DISP=(NEW,CATLG,DELETE),                       ")
Vcall wj("//            SPACE=(CYL,(100,100),RLSE),                    ")
Vcall wj("//            RECFM=FB,LRECL=135,BLKSIZE=0                   ")
Vcall wj("//*           DCB=(userid.model.VB)                          ")
Vcall wj("//SYSIN    DD *                                              ")
Vcall wj("  REPRO INFILE(SYSUT1) OUTFILE(SYSUT2)                       ")
Vcall wj("/*                                                           ")
Vreturn
V
Vwj :
Vparse arg stream
Vqueue stream
Vwjcount = wjcount + 1
Vreturn
V
Vedit_jcl :
VZEDSMSG = '*Verify & submit*'
V"ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
Vif queued() > 0 then
Vdo
V address ISPEXEC 'VGET (ZSCREEN) SHARED'
V ddname='$MASS$'zscreen
V address TSO
V 'ALLOC F('ddname') UNIT(VIO) DSO(PS) RECFM(F B) LRECL(080) NEW DEL REU'
V 'EXECIO 'queued()' DISKW 'ddname' (FINIS'
V address ISPEXEC 'LMINIT DATAID(TRAP) DDNAME('ddname') ENQ(SHR)'
V address ISPEXEC 'EDIT   DATAID('trap')'
Vend
Vreturn
V
Vparse_listcat :
Vtapedsn. = ''
Vk = 1
Vf = outtrap('out.','*','noconcat')
Vaddress TSO "LISTCAT LEVEL ('SYSAK.FILES"YYMM"') NAME NVSAM"
Vlistrc = RC
Vf = outtrap(off)
Vif listrc \= 0 then do
V   do j = 1 to out.0
V      say out.j
V   end
V   exit listrc
Vend
Vhlq = 'SYSAK.FILES'
Vdo i = 1 to out.0
V  if pos(hlq,out.i) <> 0 then
V    if pos(hlq,out.i) > 0 then do
V       parse value out.i with . . dsname
V       if pos('REJECT1',out.i) = 0 & ,
V          pos('REJECT2',out.i) = 0 then do
V             tapedsn.k = dsname
V             k = k + 1
V       end
V    end
Vend
Vtapedsn.0 = k-1
Vreturn
V
V
Vfeed_job_details :
Vdo i = 1 to tapedsn.0
V   fstr = tapedsn.i
V   udsname = localuser || substr(tapedsn.i,8)
V   call change udsname 'TAPES' 'DISK'
V   udsname = target
V   call build_jcl
Vend
Vreturn
V
Vchange : procedure expose target oldstr newstr
Varg target oldstr newstr
Vif pos(oldstr,target) = 0 then return 'ERROR'
V
Vif length(oldstr) >= length(newstr) then
Vtarget = space(overlay(newstr,target,pos(oldstr,target),length(oldstr)),0)
V
Vif length(oldstr) < length(newstr) then
Vtarget = substr(target,1,pos(oldstr,target)-1) || newstr || ,
V         substr(target,pos(oldstr,target)+length(oldstr))
Vreturn target
V

Vif listrc \= 0 then do
V   do j = 1 to out.0
V      say out.j
V   end
V   exit listrc
Vend
Vhlq = dsnlevel
Vdo i = 1 to out.0

V    if pos(hlq,out.i) > 0 then do
V       parse value out.i with . . dsname

VMEMBER NAME  MASSSTAT
V/* Rexx */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* MASSSTAT: Mass ISPF statistic generator                            */
V/* Notice  : Include your datasets at the bottom of the exec          */
V/*           Output will be under <userid>.<cue>.MEMBERS              */
V/*           Exceptions will not generate output                      */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
Vdlm = '/'
VCall GetInstreamCommands
V Do Queued()
V   Pull  c
V   Upper c
V   If word(c,1) = "/*" Then Iterate
V   If c = ""           Then Iterate
V   dlm=substr(c,1,1)
V   Parse Var c (dlm) dsn (dlm) mid .
V   Call GetStat dsn mid
V End
VDo queued();Pull;End
VExit 0
V
V
VGetStat:
VArg LMDsn Cue
VIf LMDsn = '' Then Do
V   Say 'Missing input file name.'
V   Return
VEnd
VIf Cue = ''   Then Do
V   Say 'Missing Cue name. USERID.CUE.MEMBERS will be the output file.'
V   Return
VEnd
V
VAddress ISPEXEC
V RC = 0
V "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V "LMINIT DATAID(STATID)  DATASET('"LMDsn"')"
V LastRC = RC
V If RC = 0 Then Do
V   "LMOPEN  DATAID("STATID")"
V   "LMMLIST DATAID("STATID") OPTION(SAVE) STATS(YES) GROUP("Cue")"
V End
V Else Do
V   "ISPEXEC GETMSG MSG(ISRZ002) SHORTMSG(SMSG)"
V   Say 'LMINIT Service has returned 'LastRC
V   Say LMDsn ':' SMSG
V   Return
V End
V "LMFREE DATAID("STATID")"
VSay userid()||'.'Cue'.'||MEMBERS has been created
VReturn
V
VGetInstreamCommands:
Vexec_line = 40
VDo queued();Pull;End
VDo Until substr(line,1,9)='/*COMMAND'
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)
V  exec_line = exec_line + 1
VEnd
VDo until substr(line,1,2)='*/'
V  line = sourceline(exec_line)
V  If substr(line,1,2) \= '*/' Then
V    Queue line
V    exec_line = exec_line + 1
VEnd
VReturn
V
V/*COMMAND
V/USERID.HANNA.LOADLIB/STAT1
V/USERID.HANNA.CNTL/STAT2
V/USERID.HANNA.CNTL.BACKUP/STAT3
V*/
VMEMBER NAME  MCLIST
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.CLIST')
VMEMBER NAME  MCOB
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.COB')
VMEMBER NAME  MCOPY
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.COPY')
VMEMBER NAME  MEMBER
V/* Rexx  find which data sets in a dslist contain a member           */
V/*       Syntax: Tso findmem pattern                                 */
V/*       where pattern is a name or pattern with % And * Characters  */
V/*       requires ISPF 4.5+              Doug nadel 6/2001           */
V/*       ** Uses some undocumented or unsupported methods ***        */
V/*       ** Renamed to Member to reflect z/os command                */
VParse Upper Arg pattern .
VIf pattern="" Then                     /* Insure parm was passed     */
V  Do
V    Say "No member pattern specified"
V    Exit
V  End
Vdta = ptr(76+ptr(ptr(24+ptr(112+ptr(132+ptr(540))))))
Vtname=storage(d2x(dta+196),8)          /* Get dslist table name      */
VIf substr(tname,1,3)="DSL" & "NUM"=datatype(delstr(tname,1,3)) Then
V  Do
V    say tname
V    Address ispexec
V    "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"            /* Trap errors                */
V    "TBTOP  "tname                     /* Move to top of table       */
V    "TBSKIP "tname                     /* Go to 1st row              */
V    Do While rc=0                      /* Loop through rows          */
V      zudxstat="Y"                     /* Exclude the line           */
V      If zudvol \= "MIGRAT" & substr(zudvol,1,1)\= "*" Then
V        Do                             /* If online real dataset     */
V          "LMINIT DATAID(MS) DATASET('&ZUDSNS') ENQ(SHR) ORG(DSO)"
V          If rc=0 Then                 /* Allocated?                 */
V            Do
V              If dso="PO" Then         /* Known pds or pdse          */
V                Do
V                  check=""             /* Init for LMMLIST           */
V                  "LMOPEN DATAID(&MS) OPTION(INPUT)" /* Open the ds  */
V                  If rc=0 Then         /* Open OK?                   */
V                    If pos("*",pattern)>0 | pos("%",pattern)>0 Then
V                      "LMMLIST DATAID(&MS) MEMBER(CHECK) ",
V                        "PATTERN(&PATTERN) OPTION(LIST)"
V                    Else
V                      "LMMFIND DATAID(&MS) MEMBER(&PATTERN) "
V                  If rc=0 Then         /* If found                   */
V                    Do
V                      zudxstat="N"     /* Unexclude list             */
V                      zulmsg="07"x||"FOUND: "pattern /* Set message  */
V                    End
V                End
V              "LMFREE DATAID(&MS)"     /* Free the allocation        */
V            End
V        End
V      "TBPUT  "tname                   /* Update the table           */
V      "TBSKIP "tname                   /* Move to next row           */
V    End
V    "CONTROL NONDISPL ENTER"           /* Force refresh              */
V  End
VElse
V  Say " The data set list table could not be found " tname
VReturn
V
Vptr:Return c2d(storage(d2x(Arg(1)),4))
V

V*       PDX    - NUMDAYS  C0194475 08/21/03 11:59:05 TBTHSTA
V*          DATA SET NUMDAYS    AT LEVEL 001 AS OF 11/02/90
V*             *          NUMDAYS - SUB-PROGRAM                          00002
V*             *                                                         00003
V*             * THE PURPOSE OF THIS SUB-PROGRAM IS TO CALCULATE THE     00004
V*             * NUMBER OF DAYS BETWEEN ANY 2 CALENDAR DATES             00005
V*             *                                                         00006

V*             *                                                         00008

V*             *                                                         00012

V*             *                                OR                       00016

V*             *                     THE NUMBER OF DAYS BETWEEN THE TWO  00018
V*             *                     CALENDAR DATES.                     00019
V*             *                                                         00020
V*             *               NOTE IF FROM DATE IS GREATER THAN TO DATE 00021

V         EQUREG                                                         00024

V         BE    CALERR                                                   00046

V         BE    CALERR                                                   00051

V         B     RETURN                                                   00056

V         B     RETURN                                                   00059
V*                                                                       00060
VRETURN   L     R13,SAVE+4                                               00061
V         RETURN (14,12),RC=0                                            00062
V*                                                                       00063

V*                                                                       00078

VMEMBER NAME  PARADISP
VISREDIT MACRO
VISREDIT RESET                                  /* RESET ALL EDIT CMD*/
VISREDIT EXCLUDE    ALL                         /* X OUT ALL LINES   */
V         SET        &ENVTYP  = 'PDS'
VISREDIT SEEK       7 ' PROCEDURE '     FIRST   /* F PROCDURE DIVSN */
V         IF         &LASTCC  = 0 THEN    +
V         GOTO CONTNU:
VISREDIT SEEK      1 ' PROCEDURE '      FIRST
V         IF         &LASTCC  > 0 THEN    +
V         DO
VWRITE NEITHER PDS OR LIBR DATASET
VISREDIT RESET                                  /* RESET ALL EDIT CMD*/
V         EXIT       CODE(0)
V         END
V         ELSE     +
V         SET        &ENVTYP  = 'LIBR'
VCONTNU:  DO
V         IF         &ENVTYP  = 'PDS'  THEN +
V         DO
V         SET        &PARAOSET = 7
V         SET        &DISPOSET = 12
V         END
V         ELSE       +
V         DO
V         SET        &PARAOSET = 1
V         SET        &DISPOSET = 6
V         END
V         SET        &MASKD = &STR(DISPLAY 'DEBUG~ )
VISREDIT (CURLIN)   = LINENUM .ZCSR             /* ID 1ST LINE       */
V         SET        &CURLIN = &CURLIN + 1       /*        OF        */
VISREDIT LABEL      (CURLIN) = .A               /*          CODE     */
VISREDIT FIND       ALL P' #' &PARAOSET .A .ZL  /* FIND ALL PARA NMS */
VISREDIT (CURLIN)   = LINENUM .ZCSR             /* SAVE LN# OF 1ST   */
V         SET        &LASTCC = 0                 /* PARA AND SET CC */
V         SET        &MAXCC  = 0
V         END
V/*                                                                   */
V/*  THIS DO RTN FINDS EACH PGRAPH HEAD, COPIES IT AND USES      */
V/*         IT AS A LITERAL FOR THE DISPLAY STMT CREATED FROM THE   */
V/*         COPIED LINE. WHEN THERE ARE NO MORE PARAS, THE FIND X  */
V/*         FAILS, THE MAXCC IS SET TO NON ZERO AND THE LOOP IS      */
V/*         BROKEN.                                                  */
V/*                                                                  */
V           DO         WHILE (&MAXCC = 0)       /*                   */
VISREDIT   (PARLIN) = LINE (CURLIN)             /* DUPLICATE THE PAR-*/
VISREDIT   LINE_AFTER (CURLIN) = (PARLIN)  /* AGRAPH HEADING.   */
V           SET      &CURLIN = &CURLIN + 1      /* MAKE ROOM FOR     */
VISREDIT   SHIFT )  &CURLIN  20                 /* MASK DATA.        */
V/*                   MAKE A DISPLAY STMT OF THE REPEATED LINE    */
VISREDIT   LINE     (CURLIN) = LINE + <&DISPOSET (MASKD) 60 "'.">
VISREDIT   EXCLUDE  P'=' 1 FIRST                /* SET UP FOR NEXT   */
VISREDIT   EXCLUDE  P'=' 1 NEXT                 /* PARAGRAPH HEAD.   */
VISREDIT   FIND     P'=' 1 NX                   /*                   */
VISREDIT   (CURLIN) = LINENUM .ZCSR             /*                   */
V         END                                   /*                   */
VISREDIT RESET                                  /* RESET ALL EDIT CMD*/
VISREDIT SEEK       &PARAOSET ' PROC' FIRST     /* F PROCEDURE DIVSN */
VISREDIT MEND                                   /*                   */
VEXIT     CODE (&LASTCC)                    /*                   */
VMEMBER NAME  PATTERN
V/*---------Language: REXX-------------------------------------$$PROLOG*/
V/*     Program Name: PATMATCH.CMD                                     */
V/*      Description: REXX exec to perform QA tests for patmatch.      */
V/*    Customization: None                                             */
V/* Input Parameters: None                                             */
V/*    Statvars Used: None                                             */
V/*          Invokes: None                                             */
V/*     Return Codes: 0  - Successful Completion                       */
V/* Related Routines: None                                             */
V/*     Restrictions: None                                             */
V/*     Dependencies: None                                             */
V/*       Change log: Add new entries to the top                       */
V/*-----------------Changed 12-MAY-2001 by: Bob Stark -----------------*/

V
VCALL   ON ERROR   NAME RXERROR
VSIGNAL ON SYNTAX  NAME RXERROR
VSIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME RXERROR
