Vsay patmatch('ABCDWxyz','ABCDwxyz')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABCDWXYZ','ABCDWXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCDWXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCDXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('*','ABCXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('*XYZ','ABCDWXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('%XYZ','WXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('%X*','WXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('%%%%','WXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('WXYZ*','WXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('*XY%','WXYZ')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('%B%D%F%H','ABCDEFGH')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('*B*D*F*H','ABCDEFGH')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('A*C*E*G*','ABCDEFGH')' = 1'
VSAY PATMATCH('*EFG*','ABCDEFGH')' = 1'
VTRACE N
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCXYZA')' = 0'
VTRACE N
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCXY')' = 0'
VSAY PATMATCH('*WXY','ABCDWXYZ')' = 0'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABDDWXYZ')' = 0'
VSAY PATMATCH('*DWW*','ABDDWXYZ')' = 0'
VSAY PATMATCH('ABC*XYZ','ABCDWYYZ')' = 0'
VSAY 'All tests completed'
VEXIT
V
V/*RXCOPY PATMATCH **** 67 LINES COPIED ON 05-12-01 AT 08:01************/
V/*-Start of PATMATCH function---------------------------Version-01.01-*/
V/*:PATMATCH function - Performs ISPF-type pattern matching on a pair  */
V/* of strings: 1st string is the pattern, 2nd is the data.            */
V/* Example: rc=PATMATCH('*EFG*','ABCDEFGH')                           */
V/* Returns: 0:    Pattern does not match the data.                    */
V/*          1:    Pattern does match the data.                        */
V/*          text: Error occured, text gives the details.              */
V/* Copyright (C) 1996, 1998 Washington Systems. All rights reserved.  */
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VPATMATCH: PROCEDURE EXPOSE gbl.
VTRACE N
VIF ARG() <> 2 THEN RETURN 'PATMATCH ERROR: 2 parms required, caller',
V                          'passed 'ARG()' parms'
Vhaystack = ARG(2)                  /* Data to be searched w/ pattern  */
Vpattern = ARG(1)                   /* Search pattern                  */
Vwild = 0                           /* No '*' seen (yet)               */
V  DO WHILE pattern <> ''           /* Process pattern from L to R     */
V
V  a = POS('*',pattern)             /* Look for '*' in pattern         */
V  IF a > 0 THEN                    /* If found, extract any           */
V    DO                             /*  preceeding search string       */
V    PARSE VAR pattern needle '*' +0 newpattern
V    IF needle = '' THEN
V      DO                           /* If no preceeding search string, */
V      wild = 1                     /*  mark next search as 'wild card'*/
V      PARSE VAR newpattern 2 pattern /* remove '*' from pattern       */
V      ITERATE                      /*    and continue testing         */
V      END
V    END
V
V  p = POS('%',pattern)             /* Look for '%' in pattern         */
V  IF p > 0 & (a = 0 | p < a) THEN  /* If found before any '*', extract*/
V    DO                             /*  any preceeding search string   */
V    PARSE VAR pattern needle '%' +0 newpattern
V    IF needle = '' THEN
V      DO                           /* If no preceeding search string, */
V      needle = LEFT(haystack,1)    /* take next text as search string */
V      PARSE VAR newpattern 2 newpattern
V      wild = 0                     /* Mark next search 'not wild card'*/
V      END
V    END
V
V  IF p = 0 & a = 0                 /* No special chars, use remainder */
V  THEN PARSE VAR pattern needle newpattern
V
V  pattern = newpattern             /* Update pattern for next pass    */
V  pos = POS(needle,haystack)       /* Look for this pattern           */
V  IF pos = 0 THEN RETURN 0         /* Not found, outta here           */
V  IF pos > 1 THEN                  /* Found, but not at start-of-text */
V    IF wild <> 1                   /* Wild card char in effect?       */
V    THEN RETURN 0                  /* No wild card, outta here        */
V  wild = 0                         /* Reset wild card character       */
V  len = LENGTH(haystack)-LENGTH(needle)-pos+1
V  haystack = RIGHT(haystack,len)   /* Remove data that we just scanned*/
V  IF haystack = '' THEN
V    DO                             /* No more data to scan...         */
V    IF pattern = ''                /* Out of pattern as well?         */
V    THEN RETURN 1                  /* Yes, that's a match.            */
V    IF pattern = '*'               /* Did pattern end with wild card? */
V    THEN RETURN 1                  /* Yes, that's a match too.        */
V    RETURN 0                       /* Else, sorry, not a match.       */
V    END
V  END                              /* Ran out of pattern to scan      */
VIF wild = 1                        /* Did pattern end with wild card? */
VTHEN RETURN 1                      /* Yes, that's a match.            */
VELSE RETURN 0                      /* Else, sorry, not a match.       */
V/*-End of PATMATCH function-------------------------------------------*/
V
V/*RXCOPY RXERROR **** 129 LINES COPIED ON 05-12-01 AT 08:01************/
V/*START OF RXERROR--------------------------------------Version-01.07-*/
V/*:RXERROR SUBROUTINE: Generic REXX error condition handler. This     */
V/* routine gets control when a condition is raised, and:              */
V/* a. Validates that the condition is ok, and returns quietly, or     */
V/* b. Issues diagnostic messages about the error & where it occured.  */
V/*                                                                    */
V/* To use this routine, code the following near the top of your exec: */
V/* CALL   ON ERROR   NAME RXERROR                                     */
V/* SIGNAL ON SYNTAX  NAME RXERROR                                     */
V/* SIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME RXERROR                                     */
V/*                                                                    */
V/* In addition, set the variable 'ok' to any return code values       */
V/* that are acceptable for host commands.  For example:               */
V/*                                                                    */
V/* ok=4; ADDRESS TSO 'GETVARL GLOBAL_*'; DROP ok                      */
V/* ok='4 8';"host cmd"; DROP ok <-- return codes 4 or 8 are ok        */
V/* ok='all';"host cmd"; DROP ok <-- all return codes are acceptable   */
V/*                                                                    */
V/* The first example permits GETVARL to get rc 4 and not fail or      */
V/* issue any error messages.  Note that "ok=0" is always implied      */
V/* because the REXX ERROR condition is not raised if rc=0.            */
V/*------------------------------------------------------------------- */
V/*NOTES: This subroutine does not use the PROCEDURE instruction, so   */
V/*       variable names used within it must be _hidden.               */
V/*                                                                    */
V/*       If an error occurs that's not one of the 'OK' values,        */
V/*       execution will fall thru this subroutine and any statements  */
V/*       following it will be executed.  This is a good place to put  */
V/*       cleanup logic, or a signal to your "cleanup-and-exit" label. */
V/*                                                                    */
V/*       Variables _RXERRORMSG1 and _RXERRORMSG2 are created when     */
V/*       RXERROR falls thru, and may be used to send error msgs to    */
V/*       other destinations, such as a GUI MSGBOX or ADDRESS AXC WTXC.*/
V/*                                                                    */
V/*       As a side effect, RXERROR sets ISPF "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN". */
V/*       If your routine doesn't run this way, you'll need to restore */
V/*       your ISPF CONTROL ERRORS setting.                            */
V/* Copyright (C) 1996,1999 Washington Systems. All rights reserved.   */
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
V
VRXERROR: TRACE N                  /* Turn off tracing for this func.  */
V_sigl = sigl
VRXERROR1: TRACE N                 /* Turn off tracing for this func.  */
VCALL   OFF ERROR
VSIGNAL OFF SYNTAX
VIF SYMBOL('rc') = 'VAR' THEN _rc = rc
VELSE _rc = 'n/a'
VPARSE SOURCE _EX_ENV . _EX_NAME . . . . _EX_ADDRSPC .
VIF POS(CONDITION('C'),'ERROR FAILURE') > 0 THEN  /* Error or Failure? */
V                                       /* Yes. Were we CALLed?        */
V  IF CONDITION('I') = 'CALL' | _EX_ENV = 'OPS/REXX' THEN
V    IF SYMBOL('OK') = 'VAR' THEN       /* Yes.  Is OK a variable?     */
V      IF WORDPOS(_rc,ok)>0 | TRANSLATE(ok)='ALL' THEN /* Is error ok? */
V        DO                                            /* Yes, return  */
V        CALL   ON ERROR   NAME RXERROR /*  Restore the                */
V        SIGNAL ON SYNTAX  NAME RXERROR /*   Error handler             */
V        DROP ZERRLM                    /* Toss any ISPF error msg     */
V        rc = _rc                       /* Restore orig RC for caller  */
V        RETURN                         /* Return to point of error    */
V        END
VIF SYMBOL('_errtext') = 'LIT'
VTHEN _errtext = '';                /* Initialize error text           */
VIF CONDITION('C') = 'SYNTAX' THEN  /* If a REXX syntax error,         */
V  IF _rc >= 0 & _rc < 100          /*  and rc is within valid range,  */
V  THEN _errtext = ' ('ERRORTEXT(_rc)')';/* then get REXX error text.  */
V  ELSE NOP;
VELSE
V  IF CONDITION('C') = 'NOVALUE' THEN /* See if undefined variable     */
V    DO;
V    _errtext = ' (No value for variable 'CONDITION('D')')';
V    _rc = 'n/a';                   /* RC not set for NOVALUE          */
V    END
V  ELSE
V    IF POS(CONDITION('C'),'ERROR FAILURE') > 0 THEN /*Hostcmd problem?*/
V      DO   /* Extract host cmd name... */
V      _cmd = STRIP(STRIP(WORD(CONDITION('D'),1),'B','"'),'B',"'")
V      _errtext = ' (Host command '_cmd')'
V      _addr = ADDRESS()            /* Find environment of failing cmd */
V      IF _sigl <= SOURCELINE() THEN/* Is source code avail?           */
V        IF TRANSLATE(WORD(SOURCELINE(_sigl),1)) = 'ADDRESS'
V        THEN _addr = TRANSLATE(WORD(SOURCELINE(_sigl),2))
V      _addr = STRIP(TRANSLATE(_addr,,'!@#$%&*()_-+=;:,./?"'"'",' '))
V      IF _addr = 'PPQ' & SYMBOL('PPQ.ERROR') = 'VAR'
V      THEN _errtext = ' (Host command PPQ, 'ppq.error')'
V      IF _addr = 'VOX' & SYMBOL('VOX.ERROR') = 'VAR'
V      THEN _errtext = ' (Host command VOX, 'vox.error')'
V      IF _addr = 'ASODDE' | SYMBOL('ASODDE.ERROR') = 'VAR'
V      THEN _errtext = ' (Host command ASODDE, 'asodde.error')'
V      IF SYMBOL('SQLCODE') = 'VAR'
V      THEN _errtext = ' ( SQLCODE=' sqlcode')'
V      END
V    ELSE IF CONDITION('C') <> '' THEN
V      _errtext = ' (Condition='CONDITION('C')', Description=',
V        CONDITION('D')')'
V
V_rxerrormsg1 = "RXERROR Error RC "_rc""_errtext" at line "_sigl,
V               "in EXEC" _ex_name
VIF _sigl <= SOURCELINE()           /* Is source code avail?           */
VTHEN _rxerrormsg2 = "RXERROR Line "_sigl": "STRIP(SOURCELINE(_sigl))
VELSE _rxerrormsg2 = ""
V
VIF _ex_addrspc = 'ISPF' THEN       /* Running under ISPF?             */
V  DO                               /* Yes, issue short & long msgs... */
V  ADDRESS ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN" /* Capture all ISPF RCs     */
V  zedsmsg = ''                     /* Format ISPF short message       */
V  zedlmsg = "Error RC "_rc""_errtext" at line "_sigl" in EXEC" _ex_name
V  IF _sigl <= SOURCELINE()         /* Is source code avail?           */
V  THEN zedlmsg = LEFT(zedlmsg': ',78)STRIP(SOURCELINE(_sigl))
V  IF SYMBOL('ZERRLM') = 'VAR'
V  THEN zedlmsg = LEFT(zedlmsg,156) 'ISPF Error: 'STRIP(ZERRLM)
V  ADDRESS ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V  IF rc = 12 THEN                  /* ISPMLIB MESSAGE found?          */
V    DO                             /* No, use SAY instead.            */
V    SAY 'RXERROR ISPMLIB Message ISRZ001 Not Found'
V    SIGNAL _SAY_ERRMSG;
V    END
V  SIGNAL _SAY_SQLMSG;
V  END
V
V_SAY_ERRMSG:
VSAY _rxerrormsg1; IF _rxerrormsg2 <> '' THEN SAY _rxerrormsg2; SAY ''
V_SAY_SQLMSG:
VIF SYMBOL('SQLCODE') = 'VAR' & QUEUED() > 0 THEN
V  IF WORDPOS(sqlcode,'0 100') = 0 THEN
V    DO _i = 1 BY 1 WHILE QUEUED() > 0
V    PULL _stack
V    SAY 'SQL STACK:'RIGHT(_i,2)':'_stack
V    END
V/*END OF RXERROR------------------------------------------------------*/
V
VMEMBER NAME  PDS1
V /* REXX */
V /*                                       */
V /* AUTHOR: RAMA MOHAN                    */
V /* LAST UPDATED 02/10/2002               */
V /*                                       */
V /***************************************************************/
V /*                                                             */
V /* THIS REXX EXEC CAN BE USED TO PROCESS AN ISPF EDIT MACRO    */
V /* AGAINST EVERY MEMBER OF A PDS.                              */
V /*                                                             */
V /***************************************************************/
V /* COMMAND SYNTAX:                                             */
V /*                                                             */
V /*   TSO %EDMACALL  DATA_SET_NAME  MACRO_NAME                  */
V /*                                                             */
V /* IF DATA_SET_NAME IS NOT ENCLOSED IN QUOTES, THEN THE        */
V /* TSO PREFIX (NORMALLY THE USERID) WILL BE ADDED TO THE       */
V /* BEGINNING OF THE DATA SET NAME.                             */
V /*                                                             */
V /***************************************************************/
V /* SAMPLE EDIT MACRO AND EDMACALL EXECUTION:                   */
V /*                                                             */
V /*  CHGSYS EDIT MACRO                                          */
V /*                                                             */
V /*  /* REXX   EDIT MACRO TO CHANGE "SYSA." TO "SYSB." */       */
V /*  ADDRESS ISREDIT                                            */
V /*  "MACRO"                                                    */
V /*  "CHANGE 'SYSA.' 'SYSB.' ALL"                               */
V /*  "SAVE"                                                     */
V /*  "END"                                                      */
V /*                                                             */
V /*  EDMACALL EXECUTION                                         */
V /*                                                             */
V /*  TSO  PDS1 'TEST.PROCLIB' CHGSYS                            */
V /*                                                             */
V /***************************************************************/
V ARG DSN MACNAME .
V IF MACNAME = '' THEN DO               /* NO MACRO NAME PARM GIVEN    */
V   SAY  'ERROR - EDIT MACRO NAME NOT SPECIFIED' /* ISSUE ERROR MSG    */
V   EXIT 12                             /* EXIT RC=12                  */
V END
V IF POS("'",DSN) = 0 &  SYSVAR(SYSPREF) <> '' THEN , /* IF NO QUOTES  */
V   DSN = SYSVAR(SYSPREF) || '.' || DSN /* AND PREF NOT NULL, ADD IT   */
V ELSE DSN = STRIP(TRANSLATE(DSN,"","'")) /* REMOVE QUOTES IF USED     */
V CHKLIB = SYSDSN("'"DSN"'")            /* SEE IF DATA SET EXISTS      */
V IF  CHKLIB <> 'OK' THEN DO            /* DATA SET NOT FOUND          */
V   SAY  'ERROR -' DSN 'NOT FOUND. CHECK NAME AND QUOTES.' /* ISSUE MSG*/
V   EXIT 12                             /* EXIT RC=12                  */
V END
V JUNK = OUTTRAP('MBR.')                /* CAPTURE OUTPUT TO MBR. STEM */
V "LISTD '" || DSN || "' MEMBERS"       /* ISSUE LISTD CMD AGAINST PDS */
V JUNK = OUTTRAP('OFF')                 /* STOP CAPTURING OUTPUT       */
V DO I = 1 TO MBR.0                     /* LOOP TO GET PAST VOL INFO   */
V   IF MBR.I = "--MEMBERS--" THEN LEAVE /* IF MEMBER SECTION, EXIT LOOP*/
V END
V IF I = MBR.0 THEN DO                  /* NO MEMBERS IN PDS           */
V   SAY 'ERROR - NO MEMBERS FOUND IN' DSN'.' /* ISSUE ERROR MSG        */
V   EXIT 12                             /* EXIT RC=12                  */
V END
V SAY 'PROCESSING' MBR.0 - I 'MEMBERS ...'
V DO J = I+1 TO MBR.0                   /* LOOP TO EXECUTE EDIT MACRO  */
V   PARSE VAR MBR.J MACMEM .            /* GET RID OF ALIAS INFO       */
V   ADDRESS ISPEXEC "EDIT DATASET('" || DSN || "(" || MACMEM || ")')" ,
V                   "MACRO("MACNAME")"
V END
V SAY 'PROCESSING COMPLETE!'
V EXIT 0
VMEMBER NAME  PDS3
V ISREDIT MACRO
V ISREDIT CHANGE ALL 'CCM54' 'CCM55'
V EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  PDX
VPROC 1 SEGMENT
VCONTROL END(ENDX)
VNODE1: +
V    CLRSCRN
V    WRITE SELECT ACTION ON PDX SEGMENT 'PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT'
V    WRITE      S  - VIEW SOURCE BATCH
V    WRITE      O  - VIEW SOURCE ONLINE
V    WRITE      L  - VIEW COMPILE LISTING
V    WRITE      LO - VIEW COMPILE LISTING ONLINE PROGRAM
V    WRITE      J  - VIEW JCL EXEC1
V    WRITE      JQ - VIEW JCL EXEC1Q
V    WRITE      JV - VIEW JCL EXECV
V    WRITE      P  - VIEW PROCS
V    WRITE      DS - VIEW DELTA SOURCE
V    WRITE      DI - VIEW DELTA COPYBOOK
V    WRITE      DJ - VIEW DELTA JCL
V    WRITE      DP - VIEW DELTA PROC
V    WRITE      I  - VIEW COPYBOOKS
V    WRITE      C  - VIEW CONTROL CARDS
V    WRITE      CQ - VIEW CONTROL CARDS CARD1Q
V    WRITE      LD - BROWSE LOADLIB
V    WRITE
V    WRITE      PRESS <ENTER> TO EXIT
V    WRITE
V    WRITENR ENTER OPTION:
V    READ &ACTION
V
V    SELECT
V        WHEN (&ACTION = S) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..SOURCE1
V        WHEN (&ACTION = O) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..SOURCE1O
V        WHEN (&ACTION = LO) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..SOURCELO
V        WHEN (&ACTION = L) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..SOURCEL
V        WHEN (&ACTION = J) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..EXEC1
V        WHEN (&ACTION = JQ) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..EXEC1Q
V        WHEN (&ACTION = JV) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..EXECV
V        WHEN (&ACTION = P) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..PROC1
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DS) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..SOURCE1D
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DI) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..COPY1D
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DJ) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..EXEC1D
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DP) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..PROC1D
V        WHEN (&ACTION = I) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..COPY1
V        WHEN (&ACTION = C) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..CARD1
V        WHEN (&ACTION = CQ) +
V             SET &DATASET = PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..CARD1Q
V        WHEN (&ACTION = LD) +
V             DO
V                ISPEXEC BROWSE DATASET('PDX01.CDACDA.C0&SEGMENT..LOAD1')
V                EXIT
V             ENDX
V        OTHERWISE          +
V             EXIT
V    ENDX
V
V    SYSCALL PEXIST DATASET
V    ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('&DATASET')
V    GOTO NODE1
VEND
V
VPEXIST: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V    SET &SYSDVAL  = &NRSTR(&DATASET)
V    READDVAL &V1
V
V    SET STAT       =  &STR(&SYSDSN('&V1'))
V    IF &STR(&STAT) ｬ= OK THEN +
V       DO
V           CLRSCRN
V           WRITE
V           WRITE  =========== !!! ERROR !!! =============
V           WRITE    '&V1'  &STR(&STAT)
V           WRITE  =======================================
V           EXIT CODE(0)
V       ENDX
VENDX
VMEMBER NAME  PGFS
V/* REXX  PGFS      show all COBOL paragraph names
V
V         Syntax: PGFS <noexit> <noslash>
V                      <noexit> "exclude any paragraph exits"
V                      <noslash> "don't show associated page-ejects"
V
V*/
Vaddress ISREDIT
V"macro (opts)"                         /* I'm a macro                */
V"(nested) = MACRO_LEVEL"
Vnested = nested > 1
Vparse upper var opts opts              /* translate to upper case    */
Vtv=""
Vparse var opts . "TRACE" tv .
Vif tv<>"" then interpret "TRACE" tv
Vnoexit=0; slash=1                      /* ensure values              */
Vdo i = 1 to Words(opts)                /* check for options          */
V   if Abbrev("NOEXIT" ,Word(opts,i),3) then noexit = 1
V   if Abbrev("NOSLASH",Word(opts,i),3) then slash  = 0
Vend
V"(dw) = DATA_WIDTH"                    /* numbered ?                 */
Vif dw = 74 then bump = 0               /*  --yes                     */
V           else bump = 6               /*  --no                      */
Vone = 1 + bump
Vtwo = 2 + bump
Vfour = 4 + bump
V
V"RESET"
V"LABEL 1  = .A 0"                      /* top line                   */
V"F 'PROCEDURE DIVISION'"
V"F '.'"                                /* end of statement           */
V"LABEL .ZCSR = .B 0"
V"X ALL .A .B"                          /* exclude the top section    */
V"X ALL '     '" one
V"X ALL '*'" one                        /* comments                   */
V"X ALL '++' PREFIX"                    /* PanValet statements        */
V
Vif noexit then do
V   "X ALL '-end.'"                     /* drop "end"s                */
V   "X ALL '-exit.'"                    /* drop "exit"s               */
V   end
V
Vif ｬslash then,
V   "X all '/'" one                     /* drop any slashes           */
V
Vif nested then do                      /* called by another routine  */
V   pgfslist = ""                       /* init                       */
V   "F ' ' FIRST NX" one                /* first non-slash            */
V   do while rc = 0
V      "(text) = LINE .zcsr"            /* seize the tex              */
V      parse var text  pgfnm"."         /* all before the period      */
V      parse var pgfnm pgfnm .          /* first word only            */
V      pgfslist = pgfslist pgfnm        /* add to list                */
V      "F ' ' NEXT  NX" one             /* get next                   */
V   end                                 /* rc = 0                     */
V   if pgfslist = "" then,              /* no paragraph names ?       */
V      pgfslist = "<empty>"             /* force a value              */
V   address ISPEXEC "VPUT PGFSLIST"     /* put in the variable pool   */
V   end
Velse "CURSOR = "1 0                    /* cursor to the top          */
Vexit
V/* END of PGFS     ---------------- */
VMEMBER NAME  PROGRAMS
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/*                                                                    */
V/*                 THIS CLIST IS CREATED BY TONY GAW                  */
V/*                                                                    */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V
VPROC 1 MEMBER
V    CONTROL END(ENDX)
V
V    SET LEN = &LENGTH(&STR(&MEMBER))
V
V    IF &LEN < 8 THEN +
V        SET MEMBER = &STR(&MEMBER*)
V
VNODE1: +
V    CLRSCRN
V    WRITE SELECT VIEW '&MEMBER' ON
V    WRITE      S  - SOURCE BATCH LIBRARY
V    WRITE      O  - SOURCE ONLINE LIBRARY
V    WRITE      J  - JCL     LIBRARY
V    WRITE      P  - PROCS   LIBRARY
V    WRITE      L  - LOAD    LIBRARY
V    WRITE      QJ - QA JCL  LIBRARY
V    WRITE      QP - QA PROC LIBRARY
V    WRITE      QL - QA LOAD LIBRARY
V    WRITE      QC - QA CARD LIBRARY
V    WRITE      I  - COPYBOOKS LIBRARY
V    WRITE      C  - CARDLIBS LIBRARY
V    WRITE      DS - DELTA SOURCE
V    WRITE      DI - DELTA COPYBOOK
V    WRITE      DJ - DELTA JCL
V    WRITE      DS - DELTA PROC
V    WRITE      PS - PREVIOUS DELTA SOURCE
V    WRITE      PI - PREVIOUS DELTA COPYBOOK
V    WRITE      PJ - PREVIOUS DELTA JCL
V    WRITE      PS - PREVIOUS DELTA PROC
V    WRITE
V    WRITENR ENTER OPTION:
V    READ ACTION
V
V    ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V    SELECT
V        WHEN (&ACTION = S)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.SRCLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = O)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.ONLINE.SRCLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = J)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.JCLLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = P)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.PROCLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = QJ)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.BATCH.QA.JCLLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = QP)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.BATCH.QA.PROCLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = QL)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.BATCH.QA.PRODLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = QC)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.BATCH.QA.CARDLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = L)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.PRODLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = I)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.COPYLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = C)  +
V            SET LIB = BISG.CARDLIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DS) +
V            SET LIB = BISG.SRCLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DI) +
V            SET LIB = BISG.COPYLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DJ) +
V            SET LIB = BISG.JCLLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DP) +
V            SET LIB = BISG.PROCLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = PS) +
V            SET LIB = HSK.BISG.PREV.SRCLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = PI) +
V            SET LIB = HSK.BISG.PREV.COPYLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = PJ) +
V            SET LIB = HSK.BISG.PREV.JCLLIB.DELTA
V        WHEN (&ACTION = PP) +
V            SET LIB = HSK.BISG.PREV.PROCLIB.DELTA
V        OTHERWISE +
V            GOTO NODE2
V    ENDX
V
V    ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('&LIB(&MEMBER)')
V
V    SET RETCODE = &LASTCC
V    IF &RETCODE ｬ= 0 THEN +
V        DO
V        WRITE
V        WRITE ==============================================
V        WRITE ERROR: VIEW FAILED FOR DATASET '&LIB(&MEMBER)'
V        WRITE ==============================================
V        GOTO NODE2
V        ENDX
V
V    GOTO NODE1
V
VNODE2: +
V    ISPEXEC ERRORS CANCEL
V    EXIT
VEND
VMEMBER NAME  QCARD
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.CARDLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  QCARD1
V/* REXX */
VARG MEM
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
VDSN = 'TIRAJON.COB'
VIF MEM = '' THEN MEM = '*'
V IF MEM = '*' THEN
V      "ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('"DSN"')"
V ELSE
V      "ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('"DSN"("MEM")')"
V
VMEMBER NAME  QFILE
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/*                                                                    */
V/*                 THIS CLIST IS CREATED BY TONY GAW                  */
V/*                                                                    */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V
VPROC 1 DATASET
V    GLOBAL VARIABLE1
V /* CONTROL MSG      */
V /* CONTROL LIST     */
V /* CONTROL CONLIST  */
V /* CONTROL SYMLIST  */
V    CONTROL END(ENDX)
V    SET VARIABLE1 = &STR(&DATASET)
V
V    CLRSCRN
V    WRITE SELECT ACTION ON DATASET '&DATASET'
V    WRITE      'E'  TO EDIT
V    WRITE      'B'  TO BROWSE
V    WRITE      'V'  TO VIEW
V    WRITE      'D'  TO DELETE
V    WRITE      'R'  TO RENAME
V    WRITE      'P'  TO PRINT
V    WRITE      'K'  TO COPY FILE ONLY - NO ALLOCATION PERFORMED
V    WRITE      'A'  TO ALLOCATE LIKE ANOTHER DATASET
V    WRITE      'DA' TO ALLOCATE ACCORDING TO ATTRIBUTES SPECIFIED
V    WRITE      'VS' TO CREATE VSAM LIKE ANOTHER VSAM
V    WRITE      'F'  TO FREE
V    WRITE      'Y'  TO VERIFY
V    WRITE      'I'  TO LIST DATASET INFORMATION
V    WRITE      'GI' TO LIST   GDG  INFORMATION
V    WRITE      'GC  TO CREATE GDG
V    WRITE      'GD' TO DELETE GDG
V    WRITE      'GA' TO ALTER  GDG LIMIT
V    WRITE      'X'  TO SUB A JOB
V    WRITE      'S'  TO DO A SUMMARY  LISTC
V    WRITE      'L'  TO DO A DETAILED LISTC
V    WRITE      'Z'  TO DO A ISPF DSLIST
V    WRITE
V    WRITENR ENTER OPTION:
V    READ ACTION
V
V    IF &ACTION = E  +
V    OR &ACTION = D  +
V    OR &ACTION = R  +
V    OR &ACTION = DG +
V    OR &ACTION = F  +
V    OR &ACTION = Y  THEN +
V        SYSCALL PEXIST DATASET
V
V    /* LISTDSI '&DATASET' RECALL */
V    SET &RETURNCC = &LASTCC
V    SELECT
V        WHEN (&ACTION = A) +
V            SYSCALL PALLOC DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = B) +
V            IF &RETURNCC = 0 THEN +
V                ISPEXEC BROWSE DATASET('&DATASET')
V            ELSE +
V                DO
V                    WRITE '&DATASET' IS MIGRATED OR DOES NOT EXIST
V                    WRITE
V                    LISTC ENT('&DATASET') VOLUME
V                ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = D) +
V            IF &RETURNCC = 0  THEN +
V                DO
V                    WRITENR DELETE DATASET '&DATASET' (Y/N)?
V                    READ &YESNO
V                    IF &YESNO = Y THEN +
V                        DELETE '&DATASET'
V                    ELSE +
V                        WRITE DELETE COMMAND CANCELLED - &DATASET IS NOT DELETE
V                ENDX
V            ELSE +
V                DO
V                    WRITE '&DATASET' IS MIGRATED OR DOES NOT EXIST
V                    WRITE
V                    LISTC ENT('&DATASET') VOLUME
V                ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = DA) +
V            SYSCALL DALLOC DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = E) +
V            IF &RETURNCC = 0 THEN +
V                ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('&DATASET')
V            ELSE +
V                DO
V                    WRITE '&DATASET' IS MIGRATED OR DOES NOT EXIST
V                    WRITE
V                    LISTC ENT('&DATASET') VOLUME
V                ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = F) +
V            %FREEFILE
V        WHEN (&ACTION = GI) +
V            DO
V               /* LISTC LVL('&DATASET') */
V                %GDATE '&DATASET'
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = GC) +
V            DO
V                WRITENR ENTER NUMBER OF GENERATIONS:
V                READ LMT
V                DEFINE GDG (NAME('&DATASET') LIMIT(&LMT) SCRATCH)
V                /* LISTC ENT('&DATASET') ALL */
V                %GDATE '&DATASET'
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = GD) +
V            DO
V                WRITENR DELETE '&DATASET' GDGS (Y/N)?
V                READ &YESNO
V                IF &YESNO = Y THEN +
V                    DELETE '&DATASET' GDG FORCE
V                ELSE +
V                    WRITE DELETE COMMAND CANCELLED - &DATASET IS NOT DELETED
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = GA) +
V            DO
V                WRITENR ENTER NUMBER OF GENERATIONS:
V                READ LMT
V                ALTER '&DATASET' LIMIT(&LMT)
V                %GDATE '&DATASET'
V            ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = K) +
V            SYSCALL PCOPY DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = X) +
V            SYSCALL PSUB DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = I) +
V            DO
V                CLRSCRN
V                %DSNINFO1
V            ENDX
V         /* LISTDS ('&DATASET') */
V        WHEN (&ACTION = L) +
V            LISTC ENT('&DATASET') ALL
V        WHEN (&ACTION = P) +
V            %GENER &DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = R) +
V            IF &RETURNCC = 0 THEN +
V                %RNAME
V            ELSE +
V                DO
V                    WRITE '&DATASET' IS MIGRATED OR DOES NOT EXIST
V                    WRITE
V                    LISTC ENT('&DATASET') VOLUME
V                ENDX
V        WHEN (&ACTION = S) +
V            LISTC ENT('&DATASET') VOLUME
V        WHEN (&ACTION = V) +
V            ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('&DATASET')
V        WHEN (&ACTION = VS) +
V            %VSAMCRT &DATASET
V        WHEN (&ACTION = Y) +
V            VERIFY DATASET ('&DATASET')
V        WHEN (&ACTION = Z) +
V            ISPEXEC SELECT PGM(ISRDSLST)  +
V                     PARM(DSL '&DATASET') SUSPEND SCRNAME(DSLIST)
V    ENDX
VEND
V
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VDALLOC: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V
V    CLRSCRN
V    READ &ACTION
V
V    WRITENR TRACKS/CYLINDERS (CY, TR / DEFAULT = CYL)?
V    READ &CYL
V    WRITENR SPACES (FORMAT PRIMARY SECONDARY)?
V    READ &SPC1 &SPC2
V    WRITENR FORMAT (F, FA, V, VA / DEFAULT = F)?
V    READ &FMT
V    WRITENR LRECL (DEFAULT = 80)?
V    READ &LEN
V
V    IF &CYL =  THEN SET &CYL = CY
V /* IF &FMT =  THEN SET &FMT = F */
V    SELECT
V      WHEN (&FMT =  )   +
V           SET &FMT = F
V      WHEN (&FMT = FA ) +
V           DO
V               SET FMT = F
V               SET A   = &STR(,A)
V           ENDX
V      WHEN (&FMT = VA ) +
V           DO
V               SET FMT = V
V               SET A   = &STR(,A)
V           ENDX
V    ENDX
V
V    IF &LEN =  THEN SET &LEN = 80
V
V    ALLOC DA('&DATASET')                 +
V        NEW CATALOG RELEASE              +
V        UNIT(TEST) &CYL SP(&SPC1,&SPC2)  +
V        RECFM(&FMT,B&A) LRECL(&LEN) BLK(0)
V
V    IF &LASTCC = 0  THEN +
V        DO
V            WRITE
V            WRITE &DATASET ALLOCATION SUCCESSFUL
V            FREE DATASET('&DATASET')
V        ENDX
VENDX
V
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VPALLOC: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V
V    CLRSCRN
V    READ &ACTION
V
V    WRITE ALLOCATE DATASET '&DATASET'
V    WRITENR             LIKE
V    READ &INPUT
V
V    ALLOCATE DSNAME ('&DATASET') LIKE ('&INPUT') UNIT(TEST)
V    FREE DATASET('&DATASET')
V    WRITE '&DATASET' ALLOCATED LIKE '&INPUT'
V    WRITE
V
V    WRITENR COPY '&INPUT' TO '&DATASET' (Y/N DEFAULT = N)?
V    READ &RESP
V
V    IF &RESP = Y THEN +
V        SYSCALL JSUB DATASET INPUT
VENDX
V
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VPCOPY: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V
V    CLRSCRN
V    READ &ACTION
V
V    WRITE COPY DATASET '&DATASET'
V    WRITENR         FROM
V    READ &INPUT
V
V    SYSCALL JSUB DATASET INPUT
V
VENDX
V
V/*--------------------------------------------------------------------*/
VJSUB: PROC 2 DATASET INPUT
V    SYSREF &DATASET &INPUT
V
V    WRITENR SKIP RECORDS (DEFAULT = 0)?
V    READ &SKIPNUM
V
V    WRITENR COUNT RECORDS (DEFAULT = ALL)?
V    READ &COUNTNUM
V
V    WRITENR VSAM OPTION ONLY REUSE / REPLACE (DEFAULT = NONE)?
V    READ &OPT
V
V    WRITE
V
V    IF &SKIPNUM   =  THEN SET &SKIPNUM = 0
V    IF &COUNTNUM ｬ=  THEN SET COUNTNUM = COUNT(&COUNTNUM)
V
V    SET &USERID = &SYSUID
V
V    SET JOBID = R
V
V    ISPEXEC FTOPEN TEMP
V    IF &LASTCC ｬ= 0 THEN +
V       DO
V           WRITE
V           WRITENR FTOPEN FAILED
V           EXIT
V       ENDX
V
V    ISPEXEC FTINCL JDCAM
V    IF &LASTCC ｬ= 0 THEN +
V       DO
V           WRITE
V           WRITENR FTINCL FAILED
V           EXIT
V       ENDX
V
V    ISPEXEC FTCLOSE
V    IF &LASTCC ｬ= 0 THEN +
V       DO
V           WRITE
V           WRITENR FTCLOSE FAILED
V           EXIT
V       ENDX
V
V    ISPEXEC VGET (ZTEMPF)
V
V    CONTROL MSG
V
V    WRITENR EDIT JCL BEFORE SUBMITTING JOB (DEFAULT=Y)?
V    READ &RESP
V
V    IF &RESP = Y      +
V    OR &RESP =   THEN +
V        ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('&ZTEMPF')
V    ELSE         +
V        DO
V            SUBMIT '&ZTEMPF'
V            WRITE
V            WRITENR JOB IS SUBMITTED TO PROCESS YOUR REQUEST...
V        ENDX
V    CONTROL NOMSG
VENDX
V
VPSUB: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V    WRITENR SUBMIT '&DATASET' (Y/N)?
V    READ ACTION
V
V    IF &ACTION = Y THEN +
V        SUB '&DATASET'
VENDX
V
VPEXIST: PROC 1 DATASET
V    SYSREF &DATASET
V    SET &SYSDVAL  = &NRSTR(&DATASET)
V    READDVAL &V1
V
V    SET STAT      = &STR(&SYSDSN('&V1'))
V    IF &STR(&STAT)  ｬ= OK THEN +
V       DO
V           CLRSCRN
V           WRITE
V           WRITE  =========== !!! ERROR !!! =============
V           WRITE    '&V1'  &STR(&STAT)
V           WRITE  =======================================
V           EXIT CODE(0)
V       ENDX
VENDX
VMEMBER NAME  QJCL
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.JCLLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  QJLIB
V/* REXX */
VNODE1:
V    ARG MEMBER .
V    ADDRESS ISPEXEC
V
V    LEN = LENGTH(MEMBER)
V
V    USER = USERID()
V
V    IF MEMBER = . ,
V    |  LEN    = 0 THEN
V        "ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.JCLLIB')"
V    ELSE
V        IF LEN < 8 THEN
V            "ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.JCLLIB(&MEMBER*)')"
V        ELSE
V            "ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.JCLLIB(&MEMBER)')"
VMEMBER NAME  QPROC
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.BATCH.QA.PROCLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  QS
V/* Rexx QS                                                            */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* QS      : Quick SDSF and return back to edit/view                  */
V/* Notice  : Use END;END to get back                                  */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
V   Parse Source . . Me .
V   'ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS'
V   If RC = 20 Then Do
V      ZEDSMSG = 'Not a TSO command'
V      ZEDLMSG = Me 'should be invoked as an Edit/View macro'
V      Address ISPEXEC 'SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)'
V      Exit 1
V   End
V   Upper OPT
V   ZPARM = 'ST'
V   If Length(OPT) > 0 Then ZPARM = OPT
V   Service = ''
V   Address ISPEXEC
V   'VGET (ZSCREENI)'
V   TitleScr = strip(substr(ZSCREENI,162,6))
V   If TitleScr = 'VIEW' | TitleScr = 'EDIT' Then Do
V      If TitleScr = 'EDIT' Then Service = ''
V      If TitleScr = 'VIEW' Then Service = 'VIEW'
V   End
V
V   'ISREDIT (openmbr) = MEMBER'
V   'ISREDIT (opendsn) = DATASET'
V   'ISREDIT End'
V
V   'SELECT PGM(ISFISP) NOCHECK NEWAPPL(ISF) PARM(&ZPARM)'
V
V   openmbr = strip(openmbr)
V   opendsn = strip(opendsn)
V   If openmbr = '' Then
V      viewdsn = "'"||opendsn||"'"
V   Else
V      viewdsn = "'"||opendsn||'('||openmbr||")'"
V
V   ZCMD = 'END;TSO ISREPDF' viewdsn  Service
V   'CONTROL NONDISPL ENTER'
V   'DISPLAY PANEL (ISR@PRIM)'
VExit 0
VMEMBER NAME  QSRC
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('BISG.SRCLIB')
VMEMBER NAME  QSUB
V/* REXX */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/*                                                                    */
V/*                 THIS REXX IS CREATED BY TONY GAW                   */
V/*                                                                    */
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V/**** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!! **** TADAH!!!*/
V
VADDRESS ISREDIT
V    'MACRO ( OP )'
V
V    IF OP = '' THEN
V        DO
V            SAY 'ENTER MEMBER TO SUBMIT'
V            EXIT
V        END
V
V
V    SAY "SUBMIT 'TITOGAW.TG.TJCL("OP")'"
V    SAY "   AND 'TITOGAW.TG.PJCL("OP")' (Y/N)?"
V    PULL ACTION
V
V    IF ACTION = Y THEN
V        DO
V            ADDRESS TSO "SUB 'TITOGAW.TG.TJCL("OP")'"
V            ADDRESS TSO "SUB 'TITOGAW.TG.PJCL("OP")'"
V        END
V
VMEMBER NAME  RAMLIB
VPROC 1 MEMBER
V    CONTROL END(ENDX)
V
V    SET LEN = &LENGTH(&STR(&MEMBER))
V
V    IF &LEN < 8 THEN +
V        SET MEMBER = &STR(&MEMBER*)
V
VNODE1: +
V    CLRSCRN
V    WRITE SELECT VIEW '&MEMBER' ON
V    WRITE      BG - BOOKEEPING OFFLINE LIB
V    WRITE      B  - B1TEST LIBRARY
V    WRITE      B2 - B1TEST2 LIBRARY
V    WRITE      C  - CRP10   LIBRARY
V    WRITE      CL - CLIST   LIBRARY
V    WRITE      CU - CURRENCY TEST LIB
V    WRITE      F  - FIELD EXPANSION LIB
V    WRITE      Q  - QI LIBRARY
V    WRITE      J  - JCL LIBRARY
V    WRITE      T  - TEST    LIBRARY
V    WRITE      Y  - Y BOX   LIBRARY
V    WRITENR ENTER OPTION:
V    READ ACTION
V
V    ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V    SELECT
V        WHEN (&ACTION = BG)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.BKPGOFFL.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = B)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.B1VTEST.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = B2)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.B1VTEST2.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = C)   +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.CRP10.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = Q)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.QI.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = J)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.JCL.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = T)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.TEST.LIB
V        WHEN (&ACTION = Y)  +
V            SET LIB = TIRAJON.Y2K.LIB
V        OTHERWISE +
V            GOTO NODE2
V    ENDX
V
V    ISPEXEC VIEW DATASET('&LIB(&MEMBER)')
V
V    SET RETCODE = &LASTCC
V    IF &RETCODE ｬ= 0 THEN +
V        DO
V        WRITE
V        WRITE ==============================================
V        WRITE ERROR: VIEW FAILED FOR DATASET '&LIB(&MEMBER)'
V        WRITE ==============================================
V        GOTO NODE2
V        ENDX
V
V    GOTO NODE1
V
VNODE2: +
V    ISPEXEC ERRORS CANCEL
V    EXIT
VEND
VMEMBER NAME  REALLOC
V        /**************************************************************/
V        /* THIS CLIST (REALLOC) CONCATENATES A DATA SET TO THE DDNAME */
V        /* PROVIDED, EITHER AT THE BEGINNING OR AT THE END.  IF YOU   */
V        /* SPECIFY A DSN THAT IS ALREADY IN THE CONCATENATION, IT     */
V        /* WILL BE MOVED TO THE POSITION THAT YOU SPECIFY (OR IMPLY). */
V        /*                                                            */
V        /*                                                            */
V        /* SYNTAX FOR INVOKING THIS CLIST IS:                         */
V        /*                                                            */
V        /*    REALLOC DDNAME DATA.SET.NAME   (TO PUT IT AT THE TOP)   */
V        /*                                                            */
V        /*    REALLOC DDNAME DATA.SET.NAME B (TO PUT IT AT THE BOTTOM)*/
V        /*                                                            */
V        /* NOTES:                                                     */
V        /* 1. THE DATA.SET.NAME SHOULD NOT BE PUT IN QUOTES.          */
V        /* 2. REALLOC SYSPROC DATA.SET.NAME CAN BE INVOKED WHILE      */
V        /*    IN ISPF.                                                */
V        /* 3. REALLOC MUST BE INVOKED OUTSIDE OF ISPF IF DDNAME IS    */
V        /*    ISPMLIB, ISPLLIB, ISPSLIB, OR ISPTLIB SINCE THEY ARE    */
V        /*    'IN-USE' WHILE IN ISPF.                                 */
V        /*                                                            */
V        /**************************************************************/
V        PROC 2 DDNAME DSNAME B D
V        IF &D=D THEN CONTROL NOFLUSH MSG LIST CONLIST
V        ELSE CONTROL NOFLUSH
V        IF &SYSDSN('&DSNAME')ｬ=OK THEN DO
V          WRITE &SYSICMD ERROR - &DSNAME DOES NOT EXIST OR NOT CATALOGED
V          GOTO ENDIT
V        END
V        SET SYSOUTTRAP=600             /* TRAP COMMAND OUTPUT         */
V        LISTALC STATUS                 /* ISSUE THE LISTA ST COMMAND  */
V        SET SYSOUTTRAP=0               /* RESET SO WE DON'T TRAP MORE */
V        /**************************************************************/
V        /* LOOP THROUGH THE OUTPUT OF THE LISTALC COMMAND TO FIND THE */
V        /* REQUESTED DDNAME AND PUT THE FIRST DATA SET NAME INTO A    */
V        /* VARIABLE FOR RE-CONCATENATION (IF IT IS NOT THE SAME DSN   */
V        /* AS WAS REQUESTED)                                          */
V        /**************************************************************/
V        DO WHILE &I<=&SYSOUTLINE && &FOUNDｬ=YES
V           SET DSN=&STR(&&SYSOUTLINE&I)  /* SET VAR TO CUR. TRAP LINE */
V           IF &SUBSTR(1:2,&DSN)= THEN +
V              IF &SUBSTR(3:10,&DSN)=&DDNAME THEN DO
V                 SET FOUND=YES           /* WE HAVE FOUND THE REQ DDN */
V                 SET I=&I-1              /* DSN LINE FOR THIS DDNAME  */
V                 SET DSN=&&SYSOUTLINE&I  /* SET VAR TO 1ST DSN IN DDN */
V                 IF &DSNｬ=&DSNAME THEN SET CONCAT='&DSN'
V              END
V              ELSE SET I=&I+1
V           ELSE SET I=&I+1
V        END
V        /**************************************************************/
V        /* IF THE REQUESTED DDNAME WAS FOUND, LOOP THROUGH DATA SETS  */
V        /* UNTIL ALL FILENAMES FOR THIS DDNAME ARE FOUND.             */
V        /**************************************************************/
V        IF &FOUND=YES THEN DO
V           DO WHILE &I+3<=&SYSOUTLINE
V              SET I=&I+3                 /* POINT TO NEXT DDNAME LINE */
V              SET DSN=&&SYSOUTLINE&I        /* SET VARIABLE TO DDNAME */
V              IF &SUBSTR(1:3,&DSN)= THEN DO /* IF SAME DDNAME, THEN   */
V                 SET I=&I-1                 /* LOOK ABOVE THIS FOR DSN*/
V                 SET DSN=&&SYSOUTLINE&I     /* SET VAR TO NEXT DSN    */
V
V                 IF &DSNｬ=&DSNAME THEN SET CONCAT=&CONCAT&STR( ')&DSN'
V              END
V              ELSE SET I=&SYSOUTLINE
V           END
V        END
V        ELSE DO
V           WRITE DDNAME &DDNAME NOT FOUND IN CURRENT ALLOCATION +
V                                                          ENVIRONMENT
V           GOTO ENDIT
V        END
V        /**************************************************************/
V        /* NOW ALLOCATE THE DDNAME WITH DATA SETS IN A MODIFIED       */
V        /* SEQUENCE FOR THE CALLER.                                   */
V        /**************************************************************/
V        IF &B=B THEN SET DSNBOT=&STR('&DSNAME')
V           ELSE SET DSNTOP=&STR('&DSNAME')
V
V        ERROR DO
V           ERROR OFF
V           WRITE ERROR OCCURRED TRYING TO CONCATENATE TO FILE &DDNAME
V           GOTO ENDIT
V        END
V
V        ALLOC F(&DDNAME) DA(&DSNTOP &CONCAT &DSNBOT) SHR REU
V
V        ENDIT: EXIT
V
VMEMBER NAME  RECONCAT
V/* REXX */
V/**   RECONCAT: CONCATENATE A LIBRARY TO A DD  **/
VPARSE UPPER ARG PDDN PDSN PWHERE .
VIF PDDN = ' ' | PDDN = '' THEN DO
V   SAY "DDNAME NOT SPECIFIED"
V   EXIT 8
VEND
VIF PDSN = ' ' | PDSN = '' THEN DO
V   SAY "DSNAME NOT SPECIFIED"
V   EXIT 8
VEND
VIF PWHERE = ' ' | PWHERE = '' THEN PWHERE = 'FIRST'
VIF PWHERE ｬ= 'FIRST' & PWHERE ｬ= 'LAST' THEN PWHERE = 'FIRST'
VOT1 = OUTTRAP(OUT1.,800,CONCAT)    /* TRAP OUTPUT     */
VADSN.='';  ADSN.0=0;
VODSN.='';  ODSN.0=0;
VXX = MSG('OFF')
VADDRESS TSO "LISTA STATUS"
VXX = MSG('ON')
VOT1 = OUTTRAP('OFF')        /* TRAP OFF  */
VI=0;  J=0;
VDO I=1 TO OUT1.0
V   IF SUBSTR(OUT1.I,1,2)='--' | SUBSTR(OUT1.I,1,4)='TERM',
V    | SUBSTR(OUT1.I,3,5)='SYS00' | SUBSTR(OUT1.I,3,4)='ISP1',
V    | SUBSTR(OUT1.I,1,4)='NULL',
V   THEN DO
V      NOP
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      IF SUBSTR(OUT1.I,1,2)ｬ='  ' THEN DO
V         PARSE UPPER VAR OUT1.I DSNAME .
V      END
V      ELSE,
V      IF SUBSTR(OUT1.I,1,2)='  '  THEN DO
V         IF SUBSTR(OUT1.I,3,2)ｬ='  '  THEN DO
V            PARSE UPPER VAR OUT1.I DDNAME DISP .
V         END
V         ODSN.0=ODSN.0 + 1
V         J=ODSN.0
V         ODSN.J=DDNAME||" "||"'"STRIP(DSNAME)||"'"||" "
V      END
V   END
VEND
VPREVDDN=' '
VPREVDSN=' '
VDO I=1 TO ODSN.0
V   PARSE UPPER VAR ODSN.I DDN1 DSN1 .
V   IF DDN1ｬ=PREVDDN THEN DO
V      ADSN.0=ADSN.0+1
V      J=ADSN.0
V      ADSN.J=DDN1||" "||DSN1
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      IF DSN1 ｬ= PREVDSN THEN DO
V         J=ADSN.0
V         ADSN.J=ADSN.J||" "||DSN1
V      END
V   END
V   PREVDSN=DSN1
V   PREVDDN=DDN1
VEND
VPREVDDN=' '
VPREVDSN=' '
VFOUND=0
VDFOUND=0
VCDSN=' '
VDO I=1 TO ADSN.0 WHILE(FOUND=0)
V   PARSE UPPER VAR ADSN.I DDN1 DSN
V   IF DDN1 = PDDN THEN DO
V      FOUND=1
V      DFOUND=0
V      PREVODSN=' '
V      DO J=1 TO WORDS(DSN)
V         IF WORD(DSN,J) = PDSN | WORD(DSN,J) = PREVODSN THEN DO
V            DFOUND=1
V         END
V         PREVODSN = WORD(DSN,J)
V      END
V      IF PWHERE = 'FIRST' THEN DO
V         IF DFOUND = 1 THEN DO
V            CDSN=DDN1||" "||DSN
V         END
V         ELSE DO
V            CDSN=DDN1||" "||PDSN||" "||DSN
V         END
V      END
V      ELSE DO
V         IF DFOUND = 1 THEN DO
V            CDSN=DDN1||" "||DSN
V         END
V         ELSE DO
V            CDSN=DDN1||" "||DSN||" "||PDSN
V         END
V      END
V   END
VEND
VPARSE UPPER VAR CDSN DDN DSNL
VCMD="ALLOC FI("||DDN||")",
V    ||" DA("||DSNL||") SHR REUSE"
V      ADDRESS TSO CMD
V     CMD
VEXIT 0
VMEMBER NAME  RECOVON
V/* USE IT TO SET "IMACRO" AND ENJOY THE "UNDO" */                       0001000
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0002000
V/* ================================================================== */0003000
V/* "...  With ISPF V3.5 and ISPF V4 (if customized) the SETUNDO STG   */0004000
V/* option can be set. If RECOVERY is off, it still allows you to undo */0005000
V/* changes but will not allow you to recover your changes if the      */0006000
V/* session is blown away.                                             */0007000
V/*       Since it is very rare that my sessions get blown away        */0008000
V/* (especially going through a VTAM session manager), I almost always */0009000
V/* run with RECOVERY OFF and SETUNDO STG in my profiles..."           */0010000
V/* ================================================================== */0011000
V/*             WELL, HERE IS WHAT I GET ON "SETUNDO STG":             */0012000
V/* The SETUNDO command has not been enabled by your system programmer.*/0013000
V/* ================================================================== */0014000
V/*->  ISREDIT RECOVERY OFF <-*/                                         0015000
V/*->  ISREDIT SETUNDO  STG <-*/                                         0016000
V      ISREDIT RECOVERY ON                                               0017000
V      ISREDIT CAPS     OFF                                              0017100
VEXIT CODE(0)                                                            0018000
VMEMBER NAME  REDISP
V /* REXX ----------------------------------------------------------
V    SYNOPSIS : REWORK JCL DISPS TO BE BETTER
V    LIBRARY  : NWH.GENERAL.EXEC(REDISP)
V    VERSION  : 1.0
V    CREATED  : 23 JUL 1998 10:09AM NWH
V    NOTES    :
V ------------------------------------------------------------------ */
V ADDRESS ISREDIT
V "MACRO"
V "EXCLUDE ALL"
V "FIND ',DISP=SHR' ALL"
V "CHANGE ',DISP=SHR' '' ALL NX"
V "CHANGE 'DSN=' 'DISP=SHR,DSN=' ALL NX"
