VMEMBER NAME  REN
VPROC 0 DSN1() DSN2()
VRENAME &DSN1 TEMPSAVE
VRENAME &DSN2 &DSN1
VRENAME TEMPSAVE &DSN2
VMEMBER NAME  RESTORE
V/* MACRO NAME: RESTORE                                                */
V/*                                                                    */
V/* FUNCTION: RELOAD LAST SAVED COPY OF A MEMBER.                      */
V/*                                                                    */
VISREDIT MACRO (APARM)
V
V/*                                                                   */
V/* ----------------->   ITEM DOCUMENTATION    <--------------------- */
V/* |                                                               | */
V/* | SYNTAX HELP                                                   | */
V/* |                                                               | */
V/* ----------------->   ITEM DOCUMENTATION    <--------------------- */
V/*                                                                   */
V  IF &STR(&APARM.) = &STR(HELP) THEN +
V    DO
V       ISPEXEC DISPLAY PANEL(#RESTORE)
V     EXIT CODE(0)
V    END
V
V  CONTROL ASIS
V  ISREDIT (MEMBER) = MEMBER
V  IF &MEMBER = THEN DO
V    SET ZEDSMSG = ONLY AVAILABLE IN PDS
V    SET ZEDLMSG = YOU MUST PERFORM THIOS FUNCTION YOURSELF ON PS FILES.
V    EXIT
V  END
V  ISREDIT (CHANGED) = DATA_CHANGED
V  IF &CHANGED = YES THEN DO
V    ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL
V    ISREDIT COPY &MEMBER BEFORE .ZFIRST
V    ISREDIT DELETE ALL EX
V    SET ZEDSMSG = MEMBER RESTORED
V    SET ZEDLMSG = THIS COPY WAS REPLACED WITH THE LAST DISK ONE.
V    EXIT
V  END
V  ELSE DO
V    SET ZEDSMSG = RESTORE NOT REQUIRED.
V    SET ZEDLMSG = THIS COPY WAS NOT CHANGED FROM THE LAST DISK ONE.
V  END
V  ISPEXEC SETMSG (MSG(ISRZ000)
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  RSPB
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.RSP.BKUP')
VMEMBER NAME  RSPN
VPROC 0
VISREDIT MACRO
VISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN
V   ISPEXEC EDIT DATASET('TIRAJON.RSP.NEW')
VMEMBER NAME  SHOWDUP
V/* The macro stamps rows with "<=DUPL" if the row = previous row */     0001000
V/* CONTROL SYMLIST CONLIST LIST PROMPT NOFLUSH */                       0002000
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0003000
V   SET &DUP    = &STR(<=DUPL)                                           0004000
V   SET &PRVROW = &STR()                                                 0005000
V   ISREDIT LOCATE 0                                                     0006000
V   ISREDIT  (LASTROW) = LINENUM .ZLAST                                  0007000
V   SET &ROW = 1                                                         0008000
V   DO WHILE (&ROW <= &LASTROW)                                          0009000
V      ISREDIT (CURROW) = LINE &ROW                                      0010000
V                                                                        0011000
V      IF (&STR(&CURROW) = &STR(&PRVROW))+                               0012000
V      THEN ISREDIT LINE &ROW = &STR("&SUBSTR(1:65,&CURROW)&DUP")        0013000
V      ELSE SET &PRVROW = &STR(&CURROW)                                  0014000
V                                                                        0015000
V      SET &ROW = &ROW+1                                                 0016000
V      ISREDIT DOWN 1                                                    0017000
V   END                                                                  0018000
VEXIT (1)                                                                0019000
VMEMBER NAME  SHOWFLOW
V/* SHOWFLOW*************************************************** Rexx */  0001000
V/*   Created By: IAPPINI,R.                                         */  0002000
V/*   When: 07/08/93                                                 */  0003000
V/*   What: SHOWFLOW, an Edit macro, that excludes all lines and     */  0004000
V/*         then displays flow control words. (SHARE I184)           */  0005000
V/*                                                                  */  0006000
V/********************************************************************/  0007000
VAddress "ISREDIT"                                                       0008000
V"MACRO (HELP)"                           /*                           */0009000
VTrace "OFF"                                                             0010000
V"(ustate) = USER_STATE"                  /* Save the user stat so     */0011000
V                                         /* that the last find string */0012000
V                                         /* will not be affected      */0013000
V"EXCLUDE ALL"                            /* exclude all lines         */0014000
V                                         /*                           */0015000
V                                         /* Find control flow words   */0016000
V"FIND ALL char ':'"                      /*                           */0017000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'PROCEDURE'"              /*                           */0018000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'PERFORM'"                /*                           */0019000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'EXIT'"                   /*                           */0020000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'RETURN'"                 /*                           */0021000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'PROC'"                   /*                           */0022000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'CALL'"                   /*                           */0023000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'DO'"                     /*                           */0024000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'END'"                    /*                           */0025000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'IF'"                     /*                           */0026000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'THEN'"                   /*                           */0027000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'ELSE'"                   /*                           */0028000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'SELECT'"                 /*                           */0029000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'WHEN'"                   /*                           */0030000
V"FIND ALL WORD 'OTHERWISE'"              /*                           */0031000
V                                         /* Reset the user's state    */0032000
V"USER_STATE = (ustate)"                  /*                           */0033000
VMEMBER NAME  SHOWMEMS
V/*REXX*/                                                                0001000
V/*===================================================================*/ 0002000
V PARSE UPPER ARG DSNAME                                                 0003000
V/* TRACE R */                                                           0004000
V MEMBER =                                                               0004100
V DATAID =                                                               0005000
V I      = 0                                                             0006000
V ADDRESS ISPEXEC                                                        0007000
V "LMINIT DATAID(DATAID) DATASET("DSNAME") ENQ(SHR)"                     0008000
V IF RC = 0 THEN DO                                                      0009000
V   "LMOPEN DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(INPUT)"                              0010000
V   "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(LIST) MEMBER(MEMBER) STATS(NO)"     0011000
V   LISTRC = RC                                                          0012000
V   DO WHILE LISTRC = 0                                                  0013000
V     SAY " MEMBER NAME IS" MEMBER                                       0014000
V     I    = I + 1                                                       0015000
V     "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(LIST) MEMBER(MEMBER) STATS(NO)"   0016000
V     LISTRC = RC                                                        0017000
V   END                                                                  0018000
V   "LMMLIST DATAID("DATAID") OPTION(FREE)"                              0019000
V   "LMCLOSE DATAID("DATAID")"                                           0020000
V   SAY " TOTAL NUMBER OF MEMBERS" I                                     0020100
V END                                                                    0021000
VMEMBER NAME  SIGNON
VPROC 0
VCONTROL NOFLUSH
VREALLOC SYSPROC TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.CLIST
VREALLOC ISPLLIB TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.ISPLLIB
VREALLOC ISPPLIB TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.ISPPLIB
VREALLOC ISPMLIB TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.ISPMLIB
VREALLOC ISPSLIB TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.ISPSLIB
VREALLOC ISPTLIB TDEVGP20.TBCLRIV.ISPTLIB
VRECONCAT SYSPROC 'TITOGAW.TG.CLIST'
VRECONCAT ISPSLIB 'TITOGAW.LIB.ISPSLIB'
VEXEC 'TBPS.SIS.ALLOCS'
VWRITE &STR(+++ BPS OVERRIDES IN EFFECT)
VWRITE &STR(+  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +)
VWRITE &STR(+                                                        +)
VWRITE &STR(++            H A V E   A   N I C E   D A Y             ++)
VWRITE &STR(++                                                      ++)
VWRITE &STR(++     R A M A   M O H A N   J O N N A L A G A D D A    ++)
VWRITE &STR(+                                                        +)
VWRITE &STR(+  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +  +)
V%BPSNEWS
VPDF
VMEMBER NAME  SL
V/* REXX */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
VMRC=0
V"ISREDIT MACRO "
V"ISREDIT FIND 'ENVIRONMENT DIVISION' FIRST";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .ED 0"
V"ISREDIT FIND 'DATA DIVISION' NEXT";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .DD 0"
V"ISREDIT FIND 'PROCEDURE DIVISION' NEXT";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .PD 0"
V"ISREDIT FIND 'FILE SECTION'  FIRST";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .FS 0"
V"ISREDIT FIND 'WORKING-STORAGE SECTION' FIRST";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .WS 0"
V"ISREDIT FIND 'LINKAGE SECTION' FIRST";MRC=MRC+RC
VIF RC = 0 THEN
V"ISREDIT LABEL .ZCSR = .LS 0"
VIF MRC = 24 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NO LABEL SET"
V    "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
VEND
VELSE DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "LABEL(S) SET"
V    "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEND
V"ISREDIT LOCATE .ZFIRST"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  SPLTJOIN
V/* ================================================================= */ 0001000
V/* SPLIT A LINE OR JOIN TWO LINES. IF RIGHT OF CURSOR IS BLANK AND   */ 0002000
V/* THE CURSOR IS NOT POSITIONED ON THE LAST LINE - THEN JOIN THE NEXT*/ 0003000
V/* LINE, OTHERWISE SPLIT THE LINE INTO TWO LINES.                    */ 0004000
V/*!NOTE: DOUBLEQUOTES REQUIRE SPECIAL ATTENTION AS THEY DELIMIT THE  */ 0005000
V/*!      ISREDIT LINES. THEY ARE REPLACED WITH X'EE' *BEFORE* AND    */ 0006000
V/*!      BACK FROM X'EE' *AFTER* EVERY ISREDIT LINE COMMAND.         */ 0007000
V/*!NOTE2: AMPERSANDS HAVE ALMOST THE SAME PROBLEM AND ARE REPLACED   */ 0008000
V/*!      WITH X'EF' *BEFORE* AND BACK FROM X'EF' *AFTER*             */ 0009000
V/* ================================================================= */ 0010000
V/* CONTROL SYMLIST CONLIST LIST PROMPT NOFLUSH */                       0011000
V CONTROL NOCAPS                                                         0012000
V ISREDIT MACRO                                                          0013000
V   ISREDIT (ROW,COL) = CURSOR                                           0014000
V   ISREDIT LABEL &ROW = .CURR                                           0015000
V   ISREDIT (LASTCOL) = DATA_WIDTH                                       0016000
V   ISREDIT (LASTROW) = LINENUM .ZLAST                                   0017000
V   SET &PCOL         = &COL - 1                                         0018000
V   SET &NCOL         = &COL + 1                                         0019000
V   IF  &NCOL > &LASTCOL THEN SET &NCOL = &LASTCOL                       0020000
V   SET &NROW         = &ROW + 1                                         0021000
V   ISREDIT LABEL &ROW  = .CURR                                          0022000
V   IF &COL = 0 THEN DO                                                  0023000
V   /**SET ZEDLMSG=&STR(Cursor is NOT on data line)**/                   0024000
V   /**ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)                 **/                   0025000
V      SET ZEDSMSG = &STR(Cursor NOT on data)                            0026000
V      SET ZEDLMSG = &STR(Place cursor on an EDITable data line)         0027000
V      ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)                                       0028000
V   END                                                                  0029000
V   ELSE DO                                                              0030000
V   /* GET RID OF ANY PREVIOUS "!Row Truncated!" WARNINGS  */            0031000
V      ISREDIT RESET SPECIAL                                             0032000
V      ISREDIT CHANGE '"'   X'EE' .CURR .CURR ALL                        0033000
V      ISREDIT CHANGE X'50' X'EF' .CURR .CURR ALL                        0034000
V      ISREDIT (DATA) = LINE &ROW                                        0035000
V      IF &SUBSTR(&COL:&LASTCOL,&DATA) = &STR() AND +                    0036000
V         &ROW < &LASTROW THEN DO                                        0037000
V/* JOIN_LINE: */                                                        0038000
V         ISREDIT LABEL &NROW = .NXTR                                    0039000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE '"'   X'EE' .NXTR .NXTR ALL                     0040000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE X'50' X'EF' .NXTR .NXTR ALL                     0041000
V         ISREDIT (NLIN) = LINE &NROW                                    0042000
V         SET &LCOL      = &LASTCOL - &PCOL + 1                          0043000
V         IF &LCOL <= &LASTCOL THEN DO                                   0044000
V            IF &SUBSTR(&LCOL:&LASTCOL,&NLIN) ｬ= &STR() THEN DO          0045000
V               SET &PROW   = &ROW - 1                                   0046000
V               ISREDIT LINE_AFTER &PROW = MSGLINE "!Row Truncated!"     0047000
V            END                                                         0048000
V            ISREDIT LINE &ROW  = &STR("&SUBSTR(1:&PCOL,&DATA)&NLIN")    0049000
V         END                                                            0050000
V         ELSE DO                                                        0051000
V            ISREDIT LINE &ROW  = &STR("&NLIN")                          0052000
V         END                                                            0053000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE X'EE' '"'   .CURR .CURR ALL                     0054000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE X'EF' X'50' .CURR .CURR ALL                     0055000
V         ISREDIT DELETE &NROW                                           0056000
V      END                                                               0057000
V      ELSE DO                                                           0058000
V/* SPLIT_LINE: */                                                       0059000
V         IF &PCOL < 1 THEN +                                            0060000
V               ISREDIT LINE &ROW = &STR(" ")                            0061000
V         ELSE  ISREDIT LINE &ROW = &STR("&SUBSTR(1:&PCOL,&DATA)")       0062000
V         ISREDIT LINE_AFTER &ROW = &STR("&SUBSTR(&COL:&LASTCOL,&DATA)") 0063000
V         ISREDIT LABEL &NROW     = .NXTR                                0064000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE X'EE' '"'   .CURR .NXTR ALL                     0065000
V         ISREDIT CHANGE X'EF' X'50' .CURR .NXTR ALL                     0066000
V      END                                                               0067000
V   END                                                                  0068000
VISREDIT CURSOR = &ROW &COL                                              0069000
VEXIT CODE(0)                                                            0070000
VMEMBER NAME  SQLCOD
V/* REXX                     Show a description of an SQLCODE         */ 0001000
V/* E.G.:    TSO SQLCOD -904                                          */ 0001100
V/* The message returned will not be complete as I have just set the  */ 0002000
V/* SQLCA to initial values (apart from the sqlcode).                */  0003000
V/*             Paul Fletcher @ Paul_L_Fletcher@BISCUITS.COM          */ 0004000
VARG SQLCODE                                                             0005000
VSQLC = D2X(SQLCODE,8)                                                   0006000
VSQLC = X2C(SQLC)                                                        0007000
VSQLCA = 'SQLCA   'X2C(00000088)SQLC||X2C(0000)||COPIES(' ',78)          0008000
VSQLCA = SQLCA||COPIES(X2C(00),24)COPIES(' ',16)                         0009000
VTIAR_MSG = X2C(0190)COPIES(' ',400)                                     0010000
VTEXT_LEN = X2C(00000050)                                                0011000
VADDRESS ATTCHPGM 'DSNTIAR SQLCA TIAR_MSG TEXT_LEN'                      0012000
V/* SAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,4,400) */                                        0012100
VSAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,004,80)                                             0013000
VSAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,084,80)                                             0014000
VSAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,164,80)                                             0015000
VSAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,244,80)                                             0016000
VSAY SUBSTR(TIAR_MSG,324,75)                                             0017000
VMEMBER NAME  SRCHLIST
V/* REXX  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/*                                                                 */
V/* SRCHLIST - Create Option 3.14 Search Results Member List        */
V/*                                                                 */
V/* Author   - Jim Narramore                                        */
V/*            jim.narramore@bankofamerica.com                      */
V/*            narramor@swbell.net                                  */
V/*                                                                 */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V  Arg parm
V  sysicmd = sysvar('SYSICMD')
V  x = outtrap('DUMMY',1)
V  "ISPEXEC CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V  "ISREDIT MACRO"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Signal notmacro
V  "ISPEXEC VGET   SRCHPARM SHARED"
V  "ISPEXEC VERASE SRCHPARM SHARED"
V  If word(srchparm,1) =  "INIT"   Then Signal initprof
V  If srchparm         <> ""       Then Signal showfound
V/* SRCHRPT * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* "Report-scrape" Search-For Report to obtain date and time       */
V/* search was run, statistics generated by search and members in   */
V/* which search string(s) were found.                              */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vsrchrpt:
V  "ISREDIT (LINE1) = LINE .ZF"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Signal badparm
V  Parse Var line1 . . . . . . . . . . rptdate rpttime .
V  rpttime = translate(rpttime,':','.')
V  If length(rptdate) <> 10 Then Signal badparm
V  "ISREDIT SEEK 'SRCH DSN:' 45 FIRST"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Exit
V  "ISREDIT SEEK '   CONCAT#(' 9 FIRST"
V  If rc = 0 Then Exit
V  "ISREDIT (CURLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V  libname = word(curline,6)
V  "ISREDIT SEEK 'LINES-FOUND  LINES-PROC' 2 FIRST"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Exit
V  "ISREDIT (HDGLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V  hdgline = "Lines!found Lines!processed Members!with!lines",
V            "Members!without!lines"
V  "ISREDIT SEEK p'=' 1 NEXT"
V  "ISREDIT (CNTLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V  cntlm = ""
V  Do w = 1 to 4
V      curhdg = left(word(hdgline,w)":",22)
V      curcnt = right(word(cntline,w),8)
V      cntlm = cntlm""left(curhdg curcnt,80)
V  End
V  If rc <> 0 Then Exit
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Build member selection list from member names found in report   */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V  "ISREDIT SEEK '- STRING(S) FOUND -' 39 FIRST"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Exit
V  "ISREDIT (CURLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V  curmem  = word(curline,1)
V  "ISPEXEC LMINIT DATAID(LIBID) DATASET('"libname"')",
V          "ENQ(SHRW)  ORG(LIBORG)"
V  "ISPEXEC LMOPEN DATAID("libid") OPTION(INPUT) LRECL(LIBRECL)",
V          "RECFM(LIBRECFM) ORG(LIBORG)"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Exit
V  zlmpd = "_"
V  "ISPEXEC VPUT ZLMPD PROFILE"
V  "ISPEXEC CONTROL NONDISPL END"
V  "ISPEXEC LMMDISP DATAID("libid")  OPTION(DISPLAY)  MEMBER("curmem")",
V            "STATS(YES) COMMANDS(ANY) FIELD(1)"
V  "ISREDIT SEEK '- STRING(S) FOUND -' 39 NEXT"
V  Do While rc = 0
V      "ISREDIT (CURLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V      curmem  = word(curline,1)
V      "ISPEXEC LMMDISP DATAID("libid")  OPTION(ADD) MEMBER("curmem")"
V      "ISREDIT SEEK '- STRING(S) FOUND -' 39 NEXT"
V  End
V  zerrlm   = left(libname "Search Results",80),
V             left('04'x '   as of' rptdate rpttime,80),
V             translate(cntlm,' ','!')
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V  lastlcmd = "E"
V/* DISPLAY * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Display member selection list until 'END' or 'RETURN' requested */
V/* Primary commands:                                               */
V/*  '?' - View original Search-For report.                         */
V/* Member line commands:                                           */
V/*  'S' - Edit, excluding all lines but those with found strings   */
V/*  'E' - Edit                                                     */
V/*  'V' - View                                                     */
V/*  'E' - Browse                                                   */
V/*  '=' - Execute last line command specified                      */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vdisplay:
V  "ISPEXEC LMMDISP DATAID("libid")  OPTION(DISPLAY)"
V  If rc > 0 Then Signal endit
V  Do While rc = 0
V      zlmember = strip(zlmember)
V      If zcmd = "?" Then
V          Call showrpt
V      zcmd = ""
V      If pos(zllcmd,"SBEV=") = 0 Then Signal display
V      "ISPEXEC VERASE SRCHPARM SHARED"
V      edmacro = ""
V      If zllcmd = "=" Then zllcmd  = lastlcmd
V      If zllcmd = "B" Then service = "BROWSE"
V      If zllcmd = "E" Then service = "EDIT"
V      If zllcmd = "V" Then service = "VIEW"
V      If zllcmd = "S" Then
V          Do
V              service  = "EDIT"
V              edmacro  = "MACRO("sysicmd")"
V              srchparm = getlist(zlmember)
V              fndcnt   = words(lnumlist)
V              zerrsm   = fndcnt "Lines Found"
V              zerrlm   = fndcnt "lines were found in",
V                         libname"("zlmember") that meet the",
V                         "search criteria specified for the",
V                         "Search-For Utility on "rptdate" at "rpttime"."
V              zerrhm   = "*"
V              zerralrm = "NO"
V              "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V              "ISPEXEC VPUT SRCHPARM SHARED"
V          End
V      lastlcmd = zllcmd
V      "ISPEXEC LMINIT DATAID(EDITID) DATASET('"libname"')",
V              "ENQ(SHRW)  ORG(LIBORG)"
V      "ISPEXEC "service" DATAID("editid") MEMBER("zlmember")" edmacro
V      "ISPEXEC LMFREE DATAID("editid")"
V      "ISPEXEC LMMDISP DATAID("libid")  OPTION(GET)"
V  End
V  Signal display
V/* SHOWRPT * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Display original Search-For report under VIEW                   */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vshowrpt:
V  "ISREDIT (DATASET) = DATASET"
V  "ISPEXEC LMINIT DATAID(RPTID) DATASET('"dataset"') ENQ(SHR)"
V  "ISPEXEC VIEW DATAID("rptid") MACRO(RESET)"
V  "ISPEXEC LMFREE DATAID("rptid")"
V  Return
V/* GETLIST * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Return list of line numbers containing string(s) searched for   */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vgetlist:
V  Arg curmem
V  lnumlist = ""
V  "ISREDIT SEEK ' "curmem" ' 2 FIRST"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Return lnumlist
V  Address isredit
V  "SEEK P'=' 1 NEXT"
V  "LABEL .ZCSR = .LISTF"
V  "LABEL .ZL   = .LISTL"
V  "SEEK '- STRING(S) FOUND -' 39 NEXT"
V  If rc = 0 Then
V      Do
V          "SEEK P'=' 1 PREV"
V          "SEEK P'=' 1 PREV"
V          "LABEL .ZCSR = .LISTL"
V      End
V  "SEEK p'# ' 8 FIRST .LISTF .LISTL"
V  Do While rc = 0
V      "(CURLINE) = LINE .ZCSR"
V      curlnum = word(curline,1)
V      lnumlist = lnumlist curlnum
V      "SEEK p'#  ' 8 NEXT .LISTF .LISTL"
V  End
V  Address tso
V  Return lnumlist
V/* SHOWFOUND * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Exclude from display all lines in Edit session except those     */
V/* line numbers returned by the GETLIST function                   */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vshowfound:
V  "ISREDIT RESET"
V  "ISREDIT EXCLUDE ALL .ZF .ZL"
V  Do f = 1 to words(srchparm)
V      curnum = word(srchparm,f)
V      If datatype(curnum) <> 'NUM' Then Signal badparm
V      "ISREDIT RESET EXCLUDED" curnum curnum
V  End
V  "ISREDIT SEEK p'=' NX FIRST"
V  "ISREDIT CURSOR = .ZCSR 0"
V  Exit 1
V/* NOTMACRO  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Allow user to turn SRCHLIST feature ON or OFF plus specify      */
V/* a target LLQ other than '@', if desired                         */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vnotmacro:
V  If parm = "" Then parm = "ON"
V  If words(parm) > 2 Then Signal badparm
V  llq = "@"
V  switch = "ON"
V  Do p = 1 to words(parm)
V      curparm = word(parm,p)
V      If length(curparm) > 8 Then Signal badparm
V      If curparm = "ON"  Then switch = "ON"
V      Else If curparm = "OFF" Then switch = "OFF"
V           Else llq = curparm
V  End
V  tmpdd    = "@@@"time('S')
V  syspref  = sysvar("SYSPREF")
V  If syspref = '' Then syspref = userid()
V  tmpdsn   = syspref"."tmpdd"."llq
V  "DELETE '"tmpdsn"'"
V  "ALLOC F("tmpdd") DA('"tmpdsn"') NEW DELETE REUSE",
V  "SPACE(1) TRACKS RECFM(F B) LRECL(133) BLKSIZE(1330) DSORG(PS)"
V  If rc <> 0 Then Signal badparm
V  "ISPEXEC LMINIT DATAID(TEMPID) DDNAME("tmpdd") ENQ(SHRW)"
V  srchparm = "INIT" switch
V  "ISPEXEC VPUT   SRCHPARM SHARED"
V  "ISPEXEC EDIT   DATAID("tempid") MACRO("sysicmd")"
V  "ISPEXEC VERASE SRCHPARM SHARED"
V  "ISPEXEC LMFREE DATAID("tempid")"
V  "FREE  F("tmpdd")"
V  swdisp = "now"
V  If switch = "OFF" Then swdisp = "no longer"
V  zerrlm = "The Search-For Utility (ISPF 3.14) will "swdisp,
V          "display a member selection list of search results whenever",
V          "the Low Level Qualifier (LLQ) of the Listing Data Set",
V          "name specified is '"llq"'"
V  zerralrm = "YES"
V  zerrhm = "*"
V  zerrsm = ""
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V  Exit
V/* INITPROF  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Force initial edit macro for target LLQ to 'SRCHLIST' if 'ON'   */
V/* is requested, otherwise set initial edit macro to 'NONE'        */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vinitprof:
V  imacro = sysicmd
V  If word(srchparm,2) = "OFF" Then imacro = "NONE"
V  "ISREDIT PROFILE UNLOCK"
V  "ISREDIT IMACRO = "imacro
V  "ISREDIT PROFILE LOCK"
V  "ISREDIT CANCEL"
V  Exit
V/* BADPARM * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Format variables for ISRZ002 message and display to user        */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vbadparm:
V  zerrlm = "'"parm"' is an invalid parm for "sysicmd,
V          copies(' ',80),
V          "Valid "sysicmd" parms are:",
V          copies(' ',80),
V          "ON or OFF - turn the facility ON or OFF",
V          copies(' ',80),
V          "llq       - valid dataset name low level qualifier for",
V          "Listing Data Set"
V  zerralrm = "YES"
V  zerrhm = "*"
V  zerrsm = ""
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ002)"
V  Exit
V/* ENDIT * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
V/* Terminate Search-For report data id and Cancel Edit session     */
V/* of Search-For report                                            */
V/* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * */
Vendit:
V  "ISPEXEC LMCLOSE DATAID("libid")"
V  "ISPEXEC LMFREE DATAID("libid")"
V  "ISREDIT CANCEL"
V  Exit
V
VMEMBER NAME  STRCHRT
V/* REXX     STRCHART     builds an indented structure
V                         chart for COBOL source
V <vg> sample invokation as an EDIT macro:
V <vg>       strchrt to(output_filename)
V
V       Requires:  EXEC(STRUCT)
V                  Requires:  EXEC(PGFS)
V*/
V/* TRACE A */
Vtotal = 0
Vaddress ISREDIT
V"macro (opts)"                         /* I'm a macro                */
Vif opts = ?  then call HELP
Vif opts = "" then call HELP
Vopts = " "Translate(opts)
V
Vparse upper var opts . " TRACE " tv .  /* trace requested ?          */
Vif tv <> "" then do
V   rc = Trace(tv)
V   where = WordPos("TRACE",opts)
V   opts = DelWord(opts,where,2)
V   end
Vparse value tv "O" with tv .
Vparse upper var opts . " INDENT " incr .  /* indention               */
Vif incr = "" then incr = 8
Velse do
V   where = WordPos("INDENT",opts)
V   opts = DelWord(opts,where,2)
V   end
Vparse upper var opts . " TO " outdsn . /* output destination         */
V   where = WordPos("TO",opts)
V   opts = DelWord(opts,where,2)
V
Vdiagnose = WordPos("DIAGNOSE",opts)>0
Vif diagnose then do
V   where = WordPos("DIAGNOSE",opts)
V   opts = DelWord(opts,where,1)
V   end
Vif opts <> "" then,
V   say "Unrecognized parameters:" opts
V
V"RESET"
V"F 'PROGRAM-ID.' FIRST"
V"(text) = LINE .zcsr"
Vparse var text "PROGRAM-ID." pgmid .
Vparse var pgmid pgmid "."
V"(n1,n2) = NUMBER"                     /* query number mode          */
Vif n1 = "ON" &,
V   Word(n2,2) = "COBOL" then bump = 0
V                        else bump = 6
Vone   = 1 + bump
Vtwo   = 2 + bump
V
Vref. = 0                               /* clear array                */
Vsection = 1                            /* mainline                   */
Vref.section. = 0
Vtgt = 0
V
V"STRUCT"                               /* front-end work             */
Vaddress ISPEXEC "VGET CALLLIST"
Vaddress ISPEXEC "VERASE CALLLIST BOTH"
V
Vif calllist  = "<EMPTY>" then,
V   calllist = ""
V
V"F ' ' FIRST NX"                       /* first line                 */
V"(line) = LINE .zcsr"
Vline = Substr(line,one)
Vparse var line word1 word2 .
Vif word1 = "PERFORM" |,
V   word1 = "CALL" then do
V   ref.1 = "< unnamed >"               /* mainline has no pgf-name   */
V   end
Velse do
V   ref.1 = Word(line,1)                /* the mainline routine       */
V   parse var ref.1 ref.1 "."
V   "F ' ' NEXT NX" one
V   end
Vif diagnose then say "1" ref.1
V
Vdo while rc = 0
V
V   "(line) = LINE .zcsr"               /* seize the text             */
V   line = Substr(line,one)
V   parse var line word1 word2 .        /* parse                      */
V   if word1 = "PERFORM" then do
V      tgt = tgt + 1                    /* next target                */
V      parse var word2 word2 "."        /* clip off period            */
V      ref.section.tgt = word2          /* load to array              */
V      if diagnose then say section"."tgt ref.section.tgt
V      end
V   else                                /* it"s a label               */
V   if word1 = "CALL" then do
V      tgt = tgt + 1                    /* next target                */
V      parse var word2 word2 "."        /* clip off period            */
V      ref.section.tgt = word2          /* load to array              */
V      if diagnose then say section"."tgt ref.section.tgt
V      if WordPos(word2,calllist) = 0 then,
V         calllist = calllist word2     /* add it to the calllist     */
V      end
V   else do                             /* it's a label               */
V      ref.section.0 = tgt              /* how many in last section ? */
V      section = section + 1            /* next section               */
V      ref.section. = 0                 /* clear                      */
V      parse var word1 word1 "."
V      ref.section  = word1             /* section name               */
V/*    say word1                                                      */
V      tgt = 0
V      end
V   "F ' '   NEXT NX" one
Vend /* while */
V
V/* add each call-list entry as its own section                       */
Vdo i = 1 to Words(calllist)
V   ref.section.0 = tgt                 /* how many in last section ? */
V   section = section + 1               /* next section               */
V   ref.section. = 0                    /* clear                      */
V   ref.section  = Word(calllist,i)     /* section name               */
V/* say Word(calllist,i)                                              */
V   tgt = 0
Vend
V
Vref.section.0 = tgt                    /* how many in last section ? */
Vref.0         = section                /* how many pgf-names ?       */
V
V/*----------------------- the list is ready ------------------*/
Vif diagnose then,
Vdo i = 1 to ref.0
V/* say ref.i                                                         */
V   do j = 1 to ref.i.0
V/*    say "****" ref.i.j                                             */
V   end /* j */
Vend /* i */
V
Vrc = Trace("O"); rc = Trace(tv)
Vaddress TSO
V"ALLOC FI(LIST) DA("outdsn") SHR REU"
Vif rc ｬ= 0 then do
V   "ALLOC FI(LIST) DA("outdsn") NEW REU CATALOG UNIT(SYSDA) ",
V       "SPACE(1 1) TRACKS RECFM(V B) LRECL(255) BLKSIZE(0)"
V   if rc ｬ= 0 then do
V      "CLEAR"
V      say "File LIST would not allocate"
V      exit
V      end
V   end
V
Vqueue "       "
Vqueue "Structure Chart for" pgmid
Vqueue "       "
Vslug = Copies(".",incr)                /* standard leader            */
Vqueue ref.1                            /* mainline pgf-name          */
Vdo j = 1 to ref.0                      /* each section               */
Vdo i = 1 to ref.j.0                    /* for each ref in mainline   */
V   leader = slug                       /* set leader                 */
V   tgt = ref.j.i
V   queue leader tgt                    /* output                     */
V   call NEXT                           /* get sub-refs               */
Vend
Vend
V
Vrc = Trace("O"); rc = Trace(tv)
V
V"EXECIO" queued() "DISKW LIST (FINIS"  /* write the queue            */
V"DROPBUF"
Vaddress ISREDIT
V"L 000000"
Vexit
V/*------------------- Subroutines ------------------------*/
VHELP:
Vaddress TSO "CLEAR"
Vsay "                                                                  "
Vsay "STRCHART         Builds a structure chart for a COBOL program.    "
Vsay "                                                                  "
Vsay "Syntax:          STRCHART   <options>                             "
Vsay "                                                                  "
Vsay "                 <options> may be any combination of:             "
Vsay "                    TO <output-specification>                     "
Vsay "                        (no default -- required)                  "
Vsay "                    INDENT <indentation-amount>                   "
Vsay "                        (default is 8)                            "
Vsay "                                                                  "
Vpull                                   /* get a response before exit */
Vexit                                   /* HELP                       */
V
VNEXT: Procedure expose ref. tgt slug leader total
V   sav_ldr = leader                    /* so we can restore it later */
V   leader  = leader||slug              /* make longer                */
V
V   do j = 1 to ref.0   while tgt <> ref.j
V   end                                 /* find a match               */
V   if j > ref.0 then do
V      say tgt "not found"
V      ref.0 = j
V      ref.j = tgt
V      ref.j. = 0
V      say tgt "Added as entry" j
V      end
V                /* j points to the current label */
V                /* <leader> indicates how deep is the nest */
V   old_tgt = ""
V   do k = 1 to ref.j.0                 /* for each sub-ref           */
V      tgt = ref.j.k                    /* data for next NEXT         */
V      if old_tgt ｬ= tgt then do
V         queue leader tgt              /* output                     */
V         call NEXT                     /* go deeper                  */
V         old_tgt = tgt
V         end
V   end
V   if queued() > 499 then do
V      currstk = queued()
V      "EXECIO" queued() "DISKW LIST"   /* write the queue            */
V      total = total + currstk
V      say "Total lines written =" total
V      end
V
V   leader  = sav_ldr                   /* restore Leader             */
Vreturn                                 /* NEXT                       */
V/* END of STRCHART ---------------- */
VMEMBER NAME  STRUCT
V/* REXX    STRUCT       show the innate structure of a COBOL program
V
V           Requires:  EXEC(PGFS)
V*/
Vaddress ISREDIT
V"macro (opts)"                         /* I"m a macro                */
V"(nested) = MACRO_LEVEL"
Vnested = nested > 1
V"RESET"                                /* show all lines             */
V"PGFS  NOSLASH"                        /* perf PGFS macro            */
Vaddress ISPEXEC "VGET   PGFSLIST"
Vaddress ISPEXEC "VERASE PGFSLIST"
V"F all ' perform '  .b .zl "
V"F all ' call '     .b .zl "
V"x all '*' 1 "
Vlastpgf = "" ; current_pgf = ""
Vcalllist = ""
V
Vtv=""
Vparse upper var opts "TRACE" tv .
Vif tv<>"" then interpret "TRACE" tv
V
V"F ' ' nx first"                       /* first shown line           */
Vdo while rc = 0
V   "(TEXT) = LINE  .zcsr"              /* seize the line             */
V   if Word(text,1) = "PERFORM" then do
V      label = Word(text,2)             /* PERFORM what ?             */
V      parse var label label "."
V      if label ｬ= "" then,
V      if WordPos(label,pgfslist) > 0 then do
V         parse var label target "-" .  /* get sequence #             */
V         if target < current_pgf then
V            "LINE_BEFORE .zcsr = NOTELINE 'Sequence Error'"
V         end
V      else "EXCLUDE ' ' .zcsr .zcsr"   /* not interested...          */
V      end
V   else,
V   if Word(text,1) = "CALL"    then do
V      label = Word(text,2)             /*    CALL what ?             */
V      parse var label label "."
V      if label ｬ= "" then,
V      if WordPos(label,calllist) = 0 then,
V         calllist = calllist label     /* add it to the calllist     */
V      else "EXCLUDE ' ' .zcsr .zcsr"   /* not interested...          */
V      end
V   else,
V      if Substr(text,2,1) = " " then,
V           "EXCLUDE ' ' .zcsr .zcsr"   /* not interested...          */
V   else do                             /* it's a label               */
V      label = Word(text,1)             /* the label is first         */
V      parse var label current_pgf "-" ./* label sequence #           */
V      if lastpgf > current_pgf then
V         "LINE_BEFORE .zcsr = NOTELINE 'Sequence Error'"
V      lastpgf = current_pgf
V      end
V   "FIND ' ' 1 nx next"                /* next shown line            */
Vend /* while rc = 0 */
V
V"L 000000"                             /* TOP                        */
V"L special"                            /* first 'special' line       */
V
Vtrace o
Vif tv<>"" then interpret "TRACE" tv
Vif calllist = "" then,
V   calllist = "<empty>"
V
Vif nested then,
V   address ISPEXEC "VPUT CALLLIST"
Vexit
V/* END of STRUCT   ---------------- */
VMEMBER NAME  SUMCOL
V /**  REXX -- SUMS SPECIFIED COLUMNS  **/
V  NUMERIC DIGITS 31
V  ADDRESS "ISREDIT";
V  "MACRO (PRM1 PRM2 PRM3 PRM4 PRM5 PRM6 PRM7 PRM8 PRM9 PRM10",
V         "PRM11 PRM12 PRM13 PRM14 PRM15 PRM16 PRM17 PRM18 PRM19",
V         "PRM20) NOPROCESS"
V /*********************************************************************/
V /*   SUMCOLS    COL-1  COL-2  (COL-N  COL-N  ...)                    */
V /*              (LABEL-1 LABEL-2)                                    */
V /*********************************************************************/
V /*   COL-PAIRS (REQUIRED) INDICATE COLUMN OF NUMBERS TO BE TOTALLED  */
V /*   LABEL RANGE OR CC RANGE MAY BE USED TO RESTRICT CALCULATIONS    */
V /*********************************************************************/
V  TOK. = ""
V  IF PRM1 = '' THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V  LABELS = 0
V  PAIRS = 0
V  DO I = 1 TO 19;
V     X = VALUE("PRM"I)
V     IF SUBSTR(X,1,1) = '.' THEN DO
V        IF DATATYPE(SUBSTR(X,2),"A")  THEN DO
V          IF LABFROM = "LABFROM" THEN LABFROM = X
V          ELSE LABTO = X
V          LABELS = LABELS + 1
V        END
V        ELSE DO
V           ZEDSMSG = "INVALID LABEL(S)"
V           ZEDLMSG = "LABELS MUST BE ALPHABETIC AFTER PERIOD"
V           ADDRESS "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V           EXIT 4
V        END
V     END
V     ELSE DO
V       PAIRS = PAIRS + 1
V       TOK.I  = VALUE("PRM"I)
V     END
V  END
V  IF LABELS = 2 THEN DO
V     "(LNEBGN) = LINENUM " LABFROM
V     "(LNEEND) = LINENUM " LABTO
V  END
V  ELSE DO
V     "PROCESS RANGE C"
V     RCH = RC
V     IF RCH = 0 THEN DO
V      "(ZFRANGE) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE"
V      "(ZLRANGE) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE"
V      LABELS = 2
V     END
V     ELSE DO
V       IF RCH =  4  THEN DO
V         "(ZFRANGE) = LINENUM .ZFIRST"
V         "(ZLRANGE) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
V         /*ZFRANGE = 13; ZLRANGE  = 15 */
V         LABELS = 2
V       END
V       ELSE DO
V          "LINE_BEFORE .ZFIRST = NOTELINE ",
V           "'ISREDIT PROCESS C OR RANGE CC RETURN CODE IS" RCH"'"
V           RETURN 4
V       END
V     END
V     IF LABELS \= 2 THEN DO
V        IF LABELS \= 0 THEN DO
V         ZEDSMSG = 'LABEL PAIR'
V         ZEDLMSG = "EXACTLY TWO LABELS SHOULD COMPRISE A" ,
V            "LABEL RANGE, NOT" PAIRS
V         ADDRESS "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V         EXIT 4
V        END
V     END
V     LNEBGN = ZFRANGE
V     LNEEND = ZLRANGE
V  END
V  IF LNEEND < LNEBGN THEN DO
V     X = LNEBGN
V     LNEBGN = LNEEND
V     LNEEND = X
V  END
V  IF LNEBGN = 0 THEN LNEBGN = 1
V  DO J=1 TO 20; SUM.J=0;END; MAXJ=0;
V  DO I = LNEBGN TO LNEEND BY 1 /* WHILE TO5 \= "TO5" */
V     "(XLINE) = LINE " I
V     "(XSTATUS) = XSTATUS " I
V     IF XSTATUS = "NX" THEN DO
V        ROWTOT = 0
V        DO J = 1 TO 19 BY 2; JP1 = J+1
V           IF  DATATYPE(TOK.J,"N")         THEN
V            IF  DATATYPE(TOK.JP1,"N")         THEN DO
V              BB = TOK.JP1 - TOK.J + 1
V              ADDEND = SUBSTR(XLINE,TOK.J,BB)
V              IF  DATATYPE(ADDEND,"N")         THEN DO
V                SUM.J = SUM.J + ADDEND
V                ROWTOT = ROWTOT + ADDEND
V              END
V           END
V        END
V    END
V  END
V  SUMTOT = 0;
V "(LASTLN) = LINENUM .ZLAST"
V IF LASTLN \= LNEEND THEN LNEEND = LNEEND + 1
V  TALLIES = 1
V  DO J=1 TO 19 BY  2; JP1 = J + 1;
V     IF TOK.J /= '' THEN DO
V        TALLIES = TALLIES + 1
V        SUMTOT = SUMTOT + SUM.J
V        "LINE_BEFORE" LNEBGN "= NOTELINE """||TIME('N') ,
V        "SUM OF COLS " TOK.J||"-"||TOK.JP1||", TOTAL IS" SUM.J""""
V     END
V END
V "LINE_BEFORE" LNEBGN "= NOTELINE '"||TIME('N'),
V        "--------------- TOTAL OF SUMS IS " SUMTOT "'"
V "LOC " LNEBGN
V "UP " TALLIES
V RETURN(0)
V
V DISPDOC:
V    SAY "SUMCOLS - ADD COLUMNS OF NUMBERS UNDER EDIT "
V    SAY
V    SAY " FORMAT "
V    SAY "    SUMCOLS  1ST-COL 2ND-COL  ...  .A .B "
V    SAY "       AT LEAST ONE SET OF COLUMNS IS MANDATORY. UP TO  "
V    SAY "       10 SETS MAY BE SUPPLIED.  EITHER A CC/CC RANGE   "
V    SAY "       MAY BE DELIMITED, LABELS MAY BE SUPPLIED, OR THE "
V    SAY "       WHOLE FILE WILL BE PROCESSED.  THE DATA MAY BE   "
V    SAY "       STAGGERED, HAVE DECIMAL PLACES, AND/OR BE SIGNED."
V    SAY
V    SAY " EXAMPLE "
V    SAY "            1---5---10----5---20---                 "
V    SAY "              1        -1.1                         "
V    SAY "              3            1.1                      "
V    SAY "              5          2.3                        "
V    SAY "    GIVEN THE ABOVE DATA, SUMCOLS  1 5  11 20       "
V    SAY "    WILL PRODUCE                                    "
V    SAY "       SUM OF NX COLS  1-5, TOTAL IS 9              "
V    SAY "       SUM OF NX COLS  11-20, TOTAL IS 2.3          "
V    SAY "       --------------- TOTAL OF SUMS IS  11.3       "
V    SAY
V    EXIT(1)
VMEMBER NAME  THISDSN
V ISREDIT MACRO (LINE)
V /**************************************************************
V /**************************************************************
V /* ESTABLISH WHAT LINE TO INSERT THE TEXT AFTER
V /**************************************************************
V IF &LINE =   THEN -
V    DO
V    ISREDIT (CURLN) = CURSOR
V    SET &CURLN = &EVAL(&CURLN)
V    END
V ELSE -
V    SET &CURLN = &LINE
V /**************************************************************
V /* GET THE DATASET AND MEMBER NAMES
V /**************************************************************
V ISREDIT (DSNAME) = DATASET
V ISREDIT (MEMBER) = MEMBER
V /**************************************************************
V /* INSERT THE TEXT LINE
V /**************************************************************
V IF &MEMBER =   THEN -
V    SET &LINE1  = &STR("1FROM &DSNAME &SYSDATE &SYSTIME")
V ELSE -
V    SET &LINE1  = &STR("1FROM &DSNAME(&MEMBER) &SYSDATE &SYSTIME")
V ISREDIT LINE_BEFORE &CURLN = &LINE1
V EXIT
VMEMBER NAME  TIDYUP
V/* REXX */
VADDRESS ISREDIT
V"MACRO"
V
V"X ISRSUPC ALL"
V"X LINE-#  ALL"
V"X '  ' 3  ALL"
V"X SEARCH-FOR 7 ALL"
V"X LINES-FOUND 2 ALL"
V"X 'PROCESS OPTIONS' 2 ALL"
V"X 'THE FOLLOWING'  2  ALL "
V"X SRCHFOR 5 ALL"
V"DEL X ALL"
V"RESET EXCLUDED"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  TODAY1
V/**  REXX -- Show Today's Date  **/
V   ARG PARMS
V   IF SUBSTR(PARMS,1,1) = '?' THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V
V   IF PARMS = '' THEN DO
V      DD = SUBSTR(DATE(U),4,2)
V      IF SUBSTR(DD,2,1) = '1'         THEN XX = 'st'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(DD,2,1) = '2' THEN XX = 'nd'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(DD,2,1) = '3' THEN XX = 'rd'
V         ELSE XX = 'th'
V      IF SUBSTR(DD,1,1) = '0'         THEN DD = SUBSTR(DD,2)
V      LILIAN = DATE('B') - 577734
V      $LILIAN = ""
V      DO JJ = 3 TO 21 BY 3 WHILE JJ < LENGTH(LILIAN)
V         $LILIAN = "," || SUBSTR(LILIAN,LENGTH(LILIAN)-JJ+1,3),
V            || $LILIAN
V      END
V      $LILIAN = SUBSTR(LILIAN,1,LENGTH(LILIAN)+3-JJ) || $LILIAN
V      SAY DATE(W) DATE(M) DD||XX',' SUBSTR(DATE(S),1,4),
V         '(day' SUBSTR(DATE(J),3,3)') Lillian('$LILIAN')'
V      Exit(0)
V   END
V   IF LENGTH(PARMS) < 7 | LENGTH(PARMS) > 8 THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V   IF ｬDATATYPE(PARMS,'W') THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC
V   IF LENGTH(PARMS) = 7 THEN DO
V      SPARMS = DATE(S,SUBSTR(PARMS,3),J)
V      IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '1'         THEN XX = 'st'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '2' THEN XX = 'nd'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '3' THEN XX = 'rd'
V         ELSE XX = 'th'
V      DD = SUBSTR(SPARMS,7,2)
V      IF SUBSTR(DD,1,1) = '0'             THEN DD = SUBSTR(DD,2)
V      LL = DD' 'SUBSTR(DATE(M,SPARMS,S),1,3)' 'SUBSTR(PARMS,1,4)
V      LILIAN = DATE('B',LL) - 577734
V      $LILIAN = ""
V      DO JJ = 3 TO 21 BY 3 WHILE JJ < LENGTH(LILIAN)
V         $LILIAN = "," || SUBSTR(LILIAN,LENGTH(LILIAN)-JJ+1,3),
V            || $LILIAN
V      END
V      $LILIAN = SUBSTR(LILIAN,1,LENGTH(LILIAN)+3-JJ) || $LILIAN
V      SAY DATE(W,SPARMS,S) DATE(M,SPARMS,S) DD||XX',',
V         SUBSTR(PARMS,1,4) '(day' SUBSTR(PARMS,5,3)')',
V         ' Lillian('$LILIAN')'
V   END
V   ELSE DO
V      IF SUBSTR(PARMS,8,1) = '1'         THEN XX = 'st'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(PARMS,8,1) = '2' THEN XX = 'nd'
V         ELSE IF SUBSTR(PARMS,8,1) = '3' THEN XX = 'rd'
V         ELSE XX = 'th'
V      DD = SUBSTR(PARMS,7,2)
V      IF SUBSTR(DD,1,1) = '0'            THEN DD = SUBSTR(DD,2)
V      LL = DD' 'SUBSTR(DATE(M,PARMS,S),1,3)' 'SUBSTR(PARMS,1,4)
V      LILIAN = DATE('B',LL) - 577734
V      $LILIAN = ""
V      DO JJ = 3 TO 21 BY 3 WHILE JJ < LENGTH(LILIAN)
V         $LILIAN = "," || SUBSTR(LILIAN,LENGTH(LILIAN)-JJ+1,3),
V            || $LILIAN
V      END
V      $LILIAN = SUBSTR(LILIAN,1,LENGTH(LILIAN)+3-JJ) || $LILIAN
V      SAY DATE(W,PARMS,S) DATE(M,PARMS,S) DD||XX',',
V         SUBSTR(PARMS,1,4) '(day' RIGHT(DATE(D,PARMS,S),3,'0')')',
V         ' Lillian('$LILIAN')'
V   END
V   Exit(0)
V
VDISPDOC:
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"
V   SAY "TODAY -- Display variations of a date                "
V   SAY
V   SAY " FORMAT "
V   SAY
V   SAY "   TODAY  ( CCYYMMDD | CCYYDDD )                     "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       WILL DISPLAY THE FOLLOWING FOR A DATE         "
V   SAY
V   SAY "            Wednesday March 28th, 2001 (day 087)     "
V   SAY "                                 Lillian(152837)     "
V   SAY
V   SAY "       IF A DATE IN THE FORMAT OF CCYYMMDD (LIKE     "
V   SAY "       20011231) OR OF CCYYDDD (LIKE 1999365) IS     "
V   SAY "       NOT SPECIFIED, TODAY'S DATE WILL BE USED.     "
V   SAY
V   Exit(1)
V
VMEMBER NAME  TOLOWC
VISREDIT MACRO                                                           0001000
V      ISREDIT CHANGE P'=' P'<' ALL                                      0002000
V      ISREDIT END                                                       0002100
VEXIT CODE(0)                                                            0003000
VMEMBER NAME  UCOM
V/* REXX UCOM                                                          */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* UCOM    : To uncomment JCL or COBOL                                */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O' & OPT \= '?')  THEN
V     DO
V          ZEDSMSG = "TYPE 'UCOM ?' FOR HELP"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
VIF OPT = '?' THEN DO
V  zerrtp = 'CRITICAL'
V  zerrlm   = ,
V  left(        "  Uncomment Edit Macro Help                       ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Utility        : To uncomment JCL or COBOL      ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Syntax         : UCOM S/O/?                     ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Line Command   : J for JCL/C for COBOL          ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  S Shifts lines being commented                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  O Overlays the * inplace 3/7                    ",80)
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ003)"
V  EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE C J"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG) = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V     IF RANG = 'C' & OPT = 'S' THEN
V        LINEBUF=DELSTR(LINEBUF,7,1)
V     IF RANG = 'C' & OPT = 'O' THEN
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY(' ',LINEBUF,7,1)
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'S' THEN
V        LINEBUF=DELSTR(LINEBUF,3,1)
V     IF RANG = 'J' & OPT = 'O' THEN
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY(' ',LINEBUF,3,1)
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) UNCOMMENTED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  UCOMSQL
V/* REXX UCOMSQL                                                       */
V/* .................................................................. */
V/* Author  : Kannan AK                                                */
V/* UCOMSQL : To uncomment SQL                                         */
V/* Notice  : None                                                     */
V/* Version : Alpha                                                    */
V/* .................................................................. */
VADDRESS ISPEXEC
V"ISREDIT MACRO (OPT) NOPROCESS"
VIF RC = 20 THEN DO
V    ZEDSMSG = "NOT A TSO COMMAND"
V   "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)";EXIT
VEND
VOPT=STRIP(OPT,B);OPT = TRANSLATE(OPT)
VIF  (OPT \= 'S' & OPT \= 'O' & OPT \= '?')  THEN
V     DO
V          ZEDSMSG = "'UCOMSQL ?' FOR HELP"
V          "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V          EXIT
V     END
VIF OPT = '?' THEN DO
V  zerrtp = 'CRITICAL'
V  zerrlm   = ,
V  left(        "  Uncomment Edit Macro Help                       ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Utility        : To uncomment SQL               ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Syntax         : UCOMSQL S/O/?                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  Line Command   : Q                              ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  S Shifts lines being commented                  ",80),
V  left('22'x   "  O Overlays the - inplace 1-3                    ",80)
V  zerrsm   = ""
V  zerrhm   = "*"
V  zerralrm = "NO"
V  "ISPEXEC SETMSG MSG(ISRZ003)"
V  EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT PROCESS RANGE Q"
VIF RC > 0 THEN DO
V      ZEDSMSG = "IMPROPER LINE COMMAND"
V      "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"
V       EXIT
VEND
V"ISREDIT (RANG) = RANGE_CMD"
V"ISREDIT (FIRST) = LINENUM .ZFRANGE";
V"ISREDIT (LAST) = LINENUM .ZLRANGE" ;
VDO I = FIRST TO LAST BY 1
V     "ISREDIT (LINEBUF) = LINE" I
V
V     IF RANG = 'Q' & OPT = 'S' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=DELSTR(LINEBUF,1,3)
V     END
V     IF RANG = 'Q' & OPT = 'O' THEN DO
V        LINEBUF=OVERLAY('   ',LINEBUF,1,3)
V     END
V
V     "ISREDIT LINE" I " = " '(LINEBUF)'
VEND
VZEDSMSG = (LAST-FIRST+1) "LINE(S) UNCOMMENTED"
V"SETMSG MSG(ISRZ000)"
VEXIT
VMEMBER NAME  VB2FB
V/* REXX */                                                              0001000
V EOF = 0                                                                0001100
V DO WHILE(EOF = 0)                                                      0001200
V   "EXECIO 1 DISKR INPUT"                                               0001300
V   IF RC<>0 THEN EOF = 1;                                               0001400
V   ELSE                                                                 0001500
V     DO                                                                 0001510
V        PARSE PULL FB_RECORD                                            0001600
V        llen = substr(FB_RECORD,1,2) /* real length     */              0001610
V        rlen = substr(FB_RECORD,3,2) /* must be X'0000' */              0001620
V        l    = x2d(rlen)                                                0001630
V        VB_RECORD = rlen || llen || substr(FB_RECORD,5,l)               0001640
V        QUEUE VB_RECORD                                                 0001650
V        "EXECIO 1 DISKW OUTPUT"                                         0001700
V     END                                                                0001800
V END                                                                    0001900
VEXIT                                                                    0008000
VMEMBER NAME  WHENLKED
V/**  REXX -- DISPLAY LINK EDIT DATE OF SPECIFIC LOAD MODULE  **/        0001000
V/**  E.G. -- WHENLKED 'SYS1.LINKLIB(IEHPROGM)'               **/        0001100
V/**      WORKS FROM TSO OR MEMBER LIST                       **/        0002000
V/* Trace A */                                                           0002100
V   PARSE ARG PARMS                                                      0003000
V   MSG = MSG(OFF)                                                       0004000
V   PARMS = TRANSLATE(PARMS)                                             0005000
V   IF WORD(PARMS,1) = "" | WORD(PARMS,1) = "?"                          0006000
V      THEN SIGNAL DISPDOC                                               0007000
V   TOKEN    = WORD(PARMS,1)                                             0008000
V   XX       = INDEX(TOKEN,"(")                                          0009000
V   YY       = INDEX(TOKEN,")")                                          0010000
V   SEL_LMOD = SUBSTR(TOKEN,XX+1,YY-XX-1)                                0011000
V   IF SUBSTR(TOKEN,1,1) = "'" | SUBSTR(TOKEN,1,1) = '"',                0012000
V      THEN FULL_DSN = SUBSTR(TOKEN,1,XX-1) || "'"                       0013000
V      ELSE FULL_DSN = "'" || USERID() || ".",                           0014000
V         || SUBSTR(TOKEN,1,XX-1) || "'"                                 0015000
V   ADDRESS TSO                                                          0016000
V   "FREE  DD(SYSLML SYSPRINT SYSIN)"                                    0017000
V   "ALLOC DD(SYSLML) DSN("FULL_DSN") SHR"                               0018000
V   "ALLOC DD(SYSPRINT) NEW TRACKS SPACE(1) UNIT(TEST)",                 0019000
V        " LRECL(121) BLKSIZE(27951) RECFM(F B M)"                       0020000
V   "ALLOC DD(SYSIN) NEW TRACKS SPACE(1) UNIT(TEST)",                    0021000
V        " LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(800) RECFM(F B)"                            0022000
V   QUEUE " LISTIDR  DDN=SYSLML,MEMBER=" || SEL_LMOD                     0023000
V   "EXECIO" QUEUED() "DISKW SYSIN (FINIS"                               0024000
V   CALL AMBLIST                                                         0025000
V   "EXECIO 0 DISKR" SYSPRINT "(OPEN"                                    0026000
V   "EXECIO 1 DISKR" SYSPRINT                                            0027000
V   RETCODE = RC                                                         0028000
V   DO WHILE RETCODE = 0                                                 0029000
V      PULL PRTLINE                                                      0030000
V      IF INDEX(PRTLINE,"WAS PRODUCED BY") <> 0 THEN DO                  0031000
V         XX   = INDEX(PRTLINE,"ON DAY ")                                0032000
V         DDD  = SUBSTR(PRTLINE,XX+7,3)                                  0033000
V         XX   = INDEX(PRTLINE,"OF YEAR ")                               0034000
V         YYYY = SUBSTR(PRTLINE,XX+8,4)                                  0035000
V         TIMP = SUBSTR(PRTLINE,XX+16,8)                                 0036000
V         RETCODE = 666                                                  0037000
V      END                                                               0038000
V      ELSE "EXECIO 1 DISKR" SYSPRINT                                    0039000
V   END                                                                  0040000
V   "EXECIO 0 DISKR" SYSPRINT "(FINIS"                                   0041000
V   "FREE  DD(SYSLML SYSPRINT SYSIN)"                                    0042000
V   YYYYDDD = YYYY || DDD                                                0043000
V   SPARMS = DATE(S,SUBSTR(YYYYDDD,3),J)                                 0044000
V   IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '1'         THEN XX = 'st'                   0045000
V      ELSE IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '2' THEN XX = 'nd'                   0046000
V      ELSE IF SUBSTR(SPARMS,8,1) = '3' THEN XX = 'rd'                   0047000
V      ELSE XX = 'th'                                                    0048000
V   DD = SUBSTR(SPARMS,7,2)                                              0049000
V   IF SUBSTR(DD,1,1) = '0'             THEN DD = SUBSTR(DD,2)           0050000
V   SAY SEL_LMOD "in" FULL_DSN "was linked"                              0051000
V   IF TIMP <> " ",                                                      0052000
V      THEN SAY "   " DATE(W,SPARMS,S) DATE(M,SPARMS,S) DD||XX',',       0053000
V         YYYY "(day" DDD") at" TIMP                                     0054000
V      ELSE SAY "   " DATE(W,SPARMS,S) DATE(M,SPARMS,S) DD||XX',',       0055000
V         YYYY "(day" DDD")"                                             0056000
V   EXIT(0)                                                              0057000
VDISPDOC:                                                                0058000
V   ADDRESS TSO "CLEAR"                                                  0059000
V   SAY "                                                             "  0060000
V   SAY "  WHENLKED      DISPLAYS THE DATE THE SPECIFIED LOAD MODULE  "  0061000
V   SAY "                WAS LINK EDITED.                             "  0062000
V   SAY "                                                             "  0063000
V   SAY "  SYNTAX:   WHENLKED  LOAD-LIBRARY-NAME(MEMBER)              "  0064000
V   SAY                                                                  0065000
V   SAY "             LOAD-LIBRARY-NAME IS THE LOAD MODULE LIBRARY    "  0066000
V   SAY "             WHICH CONTAINS THE MODULE TO BE DATED.          "  0067000
V   SAY                                                                  0068000
V   SAY "             MEMBER IS THE SPECIFIC LOAD MODULE TO BE DATED. "  0069000
V   SAY "             IT MAY ALSO BE ENTERED ON ANY MEMBER LIST OF A  "  0070000
V   SAY "             LOAD MODULE LIBRARY (BROWSE, EDIT OR VIEW).     "  0071000
V   SAY                                                                  0072000
V   SAY "  EXAMPLE:   WHENLKED  'SYS1.LINKLIB(IEHPROGM)'              "  0073000
V   SAY                                                                  0074000
V   SAY "             WHENLKED   MY.LOADLIB(TESTMOD)                  "  0075000
V   SAY                                                                  0076000
V   EXIT(1)                                                              0077000
VMEMBER NAME  ZB
V/* REXX */
V/*                                             */
V/*                                             */
V/* AUTHOR: Rama Mohan                          */
V/*                                             */
V/* This edit macro allows the user to BROWSE   */
V/* the data set located on the line that the   */
V/* cursor is on.                               */
V/*                                             */
VAddress ISREDIT
V"MACRO"
VAddress ISPEXEC "CONTROL ERRORS RETURN"
V  /***********************************************/
V  /*   BEGIN PROCESSING                          */
V  /***********************************************/
V  "(row,col) = CURSOR"
V  "(data1) = LINE " row              /* data1 = cursor line          */
V  /**********************************/
V  /* Find start of data set name    */
V  /**********************************/
V  dsnstart = Pos('DSN=',data1)       /* look for DSN=                */
V  If dsnstart = 0 then do            /* no DSN =                     */
V    dsnstart = Pos('DSNAME=',data1)  /* look for DSNAME=             */
V    If dsnstart = 0 then do          /* no DSN= or DSNAME=           */
V      "CURSOR = " row col            /* cursor pos                   */
V      If col < 1 then dsnstart = 1   /* needed for ZB line cmd       */
V      Else dsnstart = col            /* assume cursor on DSN         */
V    End
V    Else dsnstart = dsnstart + 7     /* DSNAME= specified in JCL     */
V  End /* if dsnstart = 0 */
V  Else dsnstart = dsnstart + 4       /* DSN = specified in JCL       */
V  /**********************************/
V  /* Find end of data set name      */
V  /**********************************/
V  dsnend = Pos(',',data1,dsnstart)   /* look for comma at end of dsn */
V  If dsnend = 0 then do              /* no comma found               */
V    dsnend = Pos(' ',data1,dsnstart) /* look for blank to end DSN    */
V    If dsnend = 0 then do            /* no blank or comma at end     */
V      zedsmsg = 'No end of DSN'
V      zedlmsg = 'The data set name is not terminated with a' ,
V                'space or comma.'
V      Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG(ISRZ001)"      /* msg - with alarm */
V      "CURSOR = " row col /* put cursor back to last position        */
V      Exit 8
V    End  /* if dsnend = 0 */
V    Else dsnend = dsnend - 1         /* DSN ends with blank          */
V  End /* if dsnend = 0 */
V  Else dsnend = dsnend - 1           /* DSN ends with comma          */
V  /**********************************/
V  /* BROWSE the data set            */
V  /**********************************/
V  dsn = Substr(data1,dsnstart,dsnend-dsnstart+1) /* extract dsn     */
V  Address ISPEXEC "BROWSE DATASET('"dsn"')"
V  If RC <> 0 then Address ISPEXEC "SETMSG MSG("ZERRMSG")"
V  "CURSOR = " row col /* put cursor back to last position        */
V  Exit 0
