V       PROCEDURE DIVISION  USING  CRPCKPT-REC.                          CRPCKPT
V      *                    ===================                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           COPY MSGCOBO.                                                CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE SPACES                 TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE.           CRPCKPT
V           IF CRPCKPT-CLT NOT NUMERIC OR                                CRPCKPT
V              CRPCKPT-BR-ACCT NOT NUMERIC                               CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'X'                 TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE          CRPCKPT
V                IF X-CNT < 100                                          CRPCKPT
V                     ADD  1              TO   X-CNT                     CRPCKPT
V                     DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: NON-NUMERIC CLT &/OR ACCT, '    CRPCKPT
V                             'REC = ' CRPCKPT-REC                       CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                     IF X-CNT = 100                                     CRPCKPT
V                          ADD  1         TO   X-CNT                     CRPCKPT
V                          DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: MAX OF 100 "NON-NUMERIC" ' CRPCKPT
V                                  'MESSAGES LISTED, ANY FURTHER NON-'   CRPCKPT
V                                  'NUMERIC VALUE WILL NOT BE DISPLAYED' CRPCKPT
V                     ELSE                                               CRPCKPT
V                          CONTINUE                                      CRPCKPT
V                     END-IF                                             CRPCKPT
V                END-IF                                                  CRPCKPT
V           ELSE                                                         CRPCKPT
V                IF CRPCKPT-CLT NOT = PRE-CLT                            CRPCKPT
V                     PERFORM 200-GET-CLT-INFO THRU 200-X                CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                     CONTINUE                                           CRPCKPT
V                END-IF                                                  CRPCKPT
V           END-IF.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF CRPCKPT-RESPONSE NOT = SPACES                             CRPCKPT
V                CONTINUE                                                CRPCKPT
V           ELSE                                                         CRPCKPT
V                IF BH-REQ-CDA-RSP-SUBSTM NOT = '1'  OR                  CRPCKPT
V                   CRPCKPT-BR-ACCT-X < TBL-ACCT-LO  OR                  CRPCKPT
V                   CRPCKPT-BR-ACCT-X > TBL-ACCT-HI                      CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'N'          TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE            CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                     PERFORM 100-TBL-LOOKUP THRU 100-X                  CRPCKPT
V                END-IF                                                  CRPCKPT
V           END-IF.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           GOBACK.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           EJECT                                                        CRPCKPT
V       100-TBL-LOOKUP.                                                  CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE ZERO                   TO   TBL-SUB.                    CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V       100-LOOP.                                                        CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           ADD  1                      TO   TBL-SUB.                    CRPCKPT
V           IF TBL-SUB > TBL-ENTRIES                                     CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'N'               TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE            CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 100-X.                                            CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF CRPCKPT-BR-ACCT-X >= ACCT-LO (TBL-SUB) AND                CRPCKPT
V              CRPCKPT-BR-ACCT-X <= ACCT-HI (TBL-SUB)                    CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ACCT-TYPE1 (TBL-SUB)       TO CRPCKPT-RESPONSE     CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)       TO CRPCKPT-PLAN-TYPE    CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ACCT-NAME (TBL-SUB)        TO CRPCKPT-PLAN-NAME    CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ACCT-TRUSTEE     (TBL-SUB) TO CRPCKPT-TRUSTEE      CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ACCT-SUB-TRUSTEE (TBL-SUB) TO CRPCKPT-SUB-TRUSTEE  CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 100-X                                             CRPCKPT
V           END-IF.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           GO TO 100-LOOP.                                              CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V       100-X.                                                           CRPCKPT
V           EXIT.                                                        CRPCKPT
V           EJECT                                                        CRPCKPT
V       200-GET-CLT-INFO.                                                CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE '9999999999'           TO   TBL-ACCT-LO.                CRPCKPT
V           MOVE '0000000000'           TO   TBL-ACCT-HI.                CRPCKPT
V           MOVE SPACES                 TO   ACCT-TBL.                   CRPCKPT
V           MOVE ZEROES                 TO   TBL-SUB.                    CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           OPEN INPUT ZRSPTAB.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF NOT ZRSPTAB-OKAY                                          CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: PROBLEM ENCOUNTERED OPENING THE '    CRPCKPT
V                        'ZRSPTAB FILE - FILE STATUS = ' ZRSPTAB-STATUS  CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'O'               TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE            CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V             IF ZRSPTAB-STATUS = '35'                                   CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY '#########################################'     CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY '#CRPCKPTV: VIRSPTAB DD STATEMENT MISSING#'     CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY '#########################################'     CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 3010             TO   ABEND-CD                     CRPCKPT
V                CALL ABEND         USING ABEND-CD                       CRPCKPT
V             END-IF                                                     CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 200-END                                           CRPCKPT
V           END-IF.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE CRPCKPT-CLT            TO   BH-BROKER-NUMBER-N          CRPCKPT
V                                            PRE-CLT.                    CRPCKPT
V           MOVE '114'                  TO   BH-LOGICAL-RECORD-CODE.     CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           CALL GETB1V               USING BH-BROKER-HEADER-INFO        CRPCKPT
V                                            BH-REQ-INFO.                CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF BH-BROKER-ACTIVE  AND  BH-REQ-CDA-RSP-SUBSTM = '1'        CRPCKPT
V                NEXT SENTENCE                                           CRPCKPT
V           ELSE                                                         CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ZERO              TO   BH-REQ-CDA-RSP-SUBSTM       CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 200-END.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE SPACES                 TO   ZRSPTAB-KEY.                CRPCKPT
V           MOVE CRPCKPT-CLT            TO   ZRSPTAB-CLT.                CRPCKPT
V           MOVE 'PT'                   TO   ZRSPTAB-REC-ID.             CRPCKPT
V           MOVE ZEROES                 TO   ZRSPTAB-HI-ACCT.            CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           START ZRSPTAB KEY IS NOT <       ZRSPTAB-KEY                 CRPCKPT
V             INVALID KEY                                                CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: PROBLEM ENCOUNTERED STARTING THE '   CRPCKPT
V                        'ZRSPTAB FILE - FILE STATUS = ' ZRSPTAB-STATUS  CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'R'               TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE            CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 200-END.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V       200-LOAD-TBL.                                                    CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           READ ZRSPTAB NEXT RECORD                                     CRPCKPT
V             AT END  GO TO 200-END.                                     CRPCKPT
V           IF NOT ZRSPTAB-OKAY                                          CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: PROBLEM ENCOUNTERED READING THE '    CRPCKPT
V                        'ZRSPTAB FILE - FILE STATUS = ' ZRSPTAB-STATUS  CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'R'               TO   CRPCKPT-RESPONSE            CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 200-END.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF ZRSPTAB-CLT NOT NUMERIC     OR                            CRPCKPT
V              ZRSPTAB-CLT NOT = CRPCKPT-CLT OR                          CRPCKPT
V              NOT ZRSPTAB-PT              OR                            CRPCKPT
V              ZRSPTAB-HI-ACCT NOT NUMERIC                               CRPCKPT
V                GO TO 200-END.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           ADD  1                      TO   TBL-SUB.                    CRPCKPT
V           IF TBL-SUB > TBL-MAX                                         CRPCKPT
V                DISPLAY 'CRPCKPTV: TOO MANY RSP ACCT RANGES - MAX OF '  CRPCKPT
V                        TBL-MAX ' ENTRIES, OTHERS IGNORED'              CRPCKPT
V                SUBTRACT 1             FROM TBL-SUB                     CRPCKPT
V                GO    TO 200-END.                                       CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE ZRSPTAB-HI-ACCT        TO   ACCT-HI (TBL-SUB).          CRPCKPT
V           MOVE ZRSPTAB-LO-ACCT        TO   ACCT-LO (TBL-SUB).          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE 'RRSP'                 TO   ACCT-NAME (TBL-SUB).        CRPCKPT
V           IF   PLAN-TYPE1-VALID                                        CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE1 TO  ACCT-NAME (TBL-SUB).        CRPCKPT
V           IF   PLAN-TYPE2-VALID                                        CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 TO  ACCT-NAME (TBL-SUB).        CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE1 = 'RRIF'                               CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'I'               TO   ACCT-TYPE1 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                                            ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V           ELSE                                                         CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE1 = 'RESP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'E'          TO   ACCT-TYPE1 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                                            ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'S'          TO   ACCT-TYPE1 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                                            ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB).       CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'RRIF'                               CRPCKPT
V                MOVE 'I'               TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V           ELSE                                                         CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'RESP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'E'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'LIRA'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'L'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'RLIF'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'F'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'GRSP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'G'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'LRIF'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'A'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'DPSP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'D'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'RIPP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'P'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB)        CRPCKPT
V                ELSE                                                    CRPCKPT
V                IF ZRSPTAB-PLAN-TYPE2 = 'RRSP'                          CRPCKPT
V                     MOVE 'S'          TO   ACCT-TYPE2 (TBL-SUB).       CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF  ZRSPTAB-TRUSTEE-X = 'T' AND                              CRPCKPT
V               TRUSTEE-VALID                                            CRPCKPT
V               MOVE ZRSPTAB-TRUSTEE   TO   ACCT-TRUSTEE (TBL-SUB)       CRPCKPT
V               IF  ZRSPTAB-SUB-TRUSTEE-X = 'S' AND                      CRPCKPT
V                   SUB-TRUSTEE-VALID                                    CRPCKPT
V                   MOVE ZRSPTAB-SUB-TRUSTEE TO                          CRPCKPT
V                                         ACCT-SUB-TRUSTEE (TBL-SUB)     CRPCKPT
V               END-IF                                                   CRPCKPT
V           END-IF.                                                      CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF ZRSPTAB-HI-ACCT > TBL-ACCT-HI                             CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ZRSPTAB-HI-ACCT TO     TBL-ACCT-HI.                CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           IF ZRSPTAB-LO-ACCT < TBL-ACCT-LO                             CRPCKPT
V                MOVE ZRSPTAB-LO-ACCT   TO   TBL-ACCT-LO.                CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           GO TO 200-LOAD-TBL.                                          CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V       200-END.                                                         CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V           MOVE TBL-SUB                TO   TBL-ENTRIES.                CRPCKPT
V           CLOSE ZRSPTAB.                                               CRPCKPT
V                                                                        CRPCKPT
V       200-X.                                                           CRPCKPT
V           EXIT.                                                        CRPCKPT

VMEMBER NAME  FILEINPC
V000001* PDX    - FILEINPC C0129805 09/17/99 13:32:19 TRKEWAN            0000100
V000100 IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
V000200 PROGRAM-ID. FILEINPC.
V000300 AUTHOR. NEW ERA OF NETWORKS.
V000310*   OPENS, READS FROM, AND CLOSES A FILE.
V000330*   READS FROM A VARIABLE LENGTH SEQUENTIAL FILE.
V000340*   MAXIMUM RECORD LENGTH IS 32752 BYTES.
V000400
V000500 DATE-WRITTEN.
V000600 DATE-COMPILED. TODAY.
V000700 ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
V000800
V000900 CONFIGURATION SECTION.
V001000*SOURCE-COMPUTER.  IBM-370 WITH DEBUGGING MODE.
V001100
V001200 INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
V001300 FILE-CONTROL.
V001400
V001500     SELECT IN-FILE
V001600         ASSIGN TO INFILE
V001601         FILE STATUS IS IN-FILE-STATUS.
V001700
V001800 DATA DIVISION.
V001900
V002000 FILE SECTION.
V002100
V002200 FD  IN-FILE
V002300     BLOCK CONTAINS 0 RECORDS
V002400     RECORD IS VARYING IN SIZE FROM 1 TO 32752
V002500               CHARACTERS DEPENDING ON IN-REC-LEN
V002510*   THUS CAUSING THE PHYSICAL LRECL TO BE 32756, AFTER ADDING
V002520*   IN THE 4 BYTE LENGTH FIELD AT THE BEGINNING.
V002600     LABEL RECORDS ARE STANDARD
V002700     RECORDING MODE IS V
V002800     DATA RECORD IS IN-REC.
V002900
V003000 01  IN-REC.
V003100     05  IN-BYTE                PIC X(01)
V003200                                 OCCURS 1 TO 32752 TIMES
V003300                                 DEPENDING ON IN-REC-LEN
V003400                                 INDEXED BY OBI.
V003500
V003600 WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
V004100
V012100 01 FLAGS.
V012110     05  IN-FILE-STATUS          PIC X(2).
V012120     05  FILLER REDEFINES IN-FILE-STATUS.
V012130       10  IN-FILE-STATUS-1      PIC X.
V012140       10  IN-FILE-STATUS-2      PIC X.
V012150     05  IN-REC-LEN              PIC  9(4) COMP VALUE ZERO.
V012160     05  END-OF-FILE-FLAG        PIC S9(4) COMP VALUE ZERO.
V012170         88  END-OF-FILE                        VALUE +1.
V012200
V012300 LINKAGE SECTION.
V012400 01  LINK-ACTION         PIC X.
V012500 01  LINK-RETURN-CODE    PIC S9(8) COMP.
V012501 01  LINK-REASON-CODE    PIC X(2).
V012510 01  LINK-RECORD-LENGTH  PIC S9(8) COMP.
V012520 01  LINK-RECORD         PIC X(32752).
V012600
V013100 PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINK-ACTION
V013110                          LINK-RETURN-CODE
V013111*   RETURN CODE VALUES:
V013112*    0 =  SUCCESS
V013113*    4 =  END OF FILE, NOT REALLY AN ERROR
V013114*    12 = READ ERROR
V013120*    16 = OPEN ERROR
V013130                          LINK-REASON-CODE
V013140                          LINK-RECORD-LENGTH
V013150                          LINK-RECORD.
V013200
V013300 DECLARATIVES.
V013400 DEBUG-DECLARATIVES SECTION.
V013500     USE FOR DEBUGGING ON ALL PROCEDURES.
V013600 DEBUG-DECLARATIVES-PARAGRAPH.
V013700     DISPLAY 'FILEINPC--->', DEBUG-NAME.
V013800 END DECLARATIVES.
V013900
V014010     IF LINK-ACTION IS EQUAL TO 'O'
V014100       PERFORM A100-OPEN-FILE
V014110     ELSE
V014120       IF LINK-ACTION IS EQUAL TO 'R'
V014130         PERFORM B100-READ-FILE
V014140       ELSE
V014150         IF LINK-ACTION IS EQUAL TO 'C'
V014160           PERFORM C100-CLOSE-FILE
V014170         END-IF
V014180       END-IF
V014330     END-IF
V014400     GOBACK.
V014500
V019900 A100-OPEN-FILE.
V019910     MOVE SPACES TO LINK-REASON-CODE
V020000     OPEN INPUT IN-FILE
V020001     IF IN-FILE-STATUS-1 IS NOT EQUAL TO ZERO
V020002       DISPLAY 'OPEN ERROR ON INPUT FILE -- '
V020003       DISPLAY '  INPUT FILE HAS DD NAME = INFILE'
V020004       DISPLAY '  IT IS A SEQUENTIAL FILE WITH VARIABLE '
V020005         'LENGTH RECORDS OF LRECL = 32752'
V020006       MOVE 16 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE
V020007       MOVE IN-FILE-STATUS TO LINK-REASON-CODE
V020008       GOBACK
V020009     ELSE
V020010       MOVE ZERO TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE
V020080     END-IF.
V020100
V020933
V021400 B100-READ-FILE.
V021410     READ IN-FILE
V021420       AT END SET END-OF-FILE TO TRUE
V021430     END-READ
V021431     IF END-OF-FILE THEN
V021432       DISPLAY 'REACHED END OF FILE ON INPUT...'
V021433       MOVE 4 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE
V021434       MOVE 0 TO LINK-RECORD-LENGTH
V021435     ELSE
V021440       IF IN-FILE-STATUS-1 IS NOT EQUAL ZERO
V021450         DISPLAY 'READ ERROR ON INFILE: STATUS CODE = '
V021460            IN-FILE-STATUS
V021480         MOVE 12 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE
V021481         MOVE 0 TO LINK-RECORD-LENGTH
V021482         MOVE IN-FILE-STATUS TO LINK-REASON-CODE
V021490       ELSE
V022500*   HERE WHEN READ WORKED
V022600         PERFORM B200-PASS-BACK-RECORD
V022700       END-IF
V023200     END-IF.
V023400
V023500 B200-PASS-BACK-RECORD.
V023600     MOVE IN-REC-LEN TO LINK-RECORD-LENGTH
V024000     MOVE IN-REC TO LINK-RECORD
V024008     MOVE 0 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE.
V024200
V024300 C100-CLOSE-FILE.
V024400     CLOSE IN-FILE
V024500     MOVE ZERO TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE.
V024520

V021410     WRITE OUT-REC
V021440     IF OUT-FILE-STATUS-1 IS NOT EQUAL ZERO
V021450       DISPLAY 'WRITE ERROR ON OUTFILE: STATUS CODE = '
V021460          OUT-FILE-STATUS
V021480       MOVE 12 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE
V021481       MOVE 0 TO LINK-RECORD-LENGTH
V021482       MOVE OUT-FILE-STATUS TO LINK-REASON-CODE
V021490     ELSE
V022500* HERE WHEN WRITE WORKED
V022600       MOVE 0 TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE
V022700     END-IF.
V023400
V023500 B200-ACCEPT-RECORD.
V023600     MOVE LINK-RECORD-LENGTH TO OUT-REC-LEN
V024000     MOVE LINK-RECORD TO OUT-REC.
V024200
V024300 C100-CLOSE-FILE.
V024400     CLOSE OUT-FILE
V024500     MOVE ZERO TO LINK-RETURN-CODE RETURN-CODE.
V024520
VMEMBER NAME  FINDSTR
V       IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
V       PROGRAM-ID. FINDSTR.
V      *
V      *  Subroutine FINDSTR
V      *
V      *  Comm Area = FINDSTCA
V      *
V      *  This subroutine sets FSCA-FOUND to true if string B is
V      *  contained within string A.  Returns FSCA-NOT-FOUND otherwise.
V      *
V      *  If the length of string A or string B is zero, this subroutine
V      *  finds the position of the rightmost non-blank character in the
V      *  string, and confines the search to that limit.  The actual
V      *  lengths used are returned in the comm area.
V      *
V      *  If a case-insensitive search is requested, all letters in
V      *  string A and string B are converted to uppercase before the
V      *  search begins.  The converted strings are returned in the comm
V      *  area.
V      *
V      ***************************************
V      *  M O D I F I C A T I O N S   L O G  *
V      ***************************************
V      *  VER    DATE    PGR  DESCRIPTION
V      *  ===  ========  ===  ==========================================
V      *       12/28/99  RBS  New.
V      *----------------------------------------------------------------
V
V       DATA DIVISION.
V       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
V
V       01  WS-NMRC-GRP.
V           05  WS-FURTHEST-RIGHT-POSN         PIC S9(4) COMP.
V           05  WS-TEMP-POSN                   PIC 9(4) COMP.
V
V       LINKAGE SECTION.
V
V       01  LS-FIND-STR-COMM-AREA.
V       COPY FINDSTCA.
V
V       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LS-FIND-STR-COMM-AREA.
V           PERFORM 1000-CHECK-STR-LENS
V           IF FSCA-CASE-INSENSITIVE
V               PERFORM 2000-CONVERT-STRINGS-TO-UPPER
V           END-IF
V           PERFORM 3000-SEARCH-AND-SET-IND
V           GOBACK
V           .
V
V       1000-CHECK-STR-LENS.
V      *
V      *  If either of the strings has a length of zero, set the length
V      *  to be the position of the right-most non-blank character.
V      *
V           IF FSCA-STR-A-LEN = 0
V               PERFORM 1100-FIND-STR-A-LEN
V           END-IF
V           IF FSCA-STR-B-LEN = 0
V               PERFORM 1200-FIND-STR-B-LEN
V           END-IF
V           .
V
V       1100-FIND-STR-A-LEN.
V      *
V      *  Find the rightmost non-blank character in string A.
V      *
V           PERFORM WITH TEST BEFORE
V                   VARYING WS-TEMP-POSN FROM LENGTH OF FSCA-STR-A BY -1
V                   UNTIL ( FSCA-STR-A(WS-TEMP-POSN:1) NOT = SPACE ) OR
V                   ( WS-TEMP-POSN = 1 )
V               CONTINUE
V           END-PERFORM
V
V           COMPUTE FSCA-STR-A-LEN = WS-TEMP-POSN
V           .
V
V       1200-FIND-STR-B-LEN.
V      *
V      *  Find the rightmost non-blank character in string B.
V      *
V           PERFORM WITH TEST BEFORE
V                   VARYING WS-TEMP-POSN FROM LENGTH OF FSCA-STR-B BY -1
V                   UNTIL ( FSCA-STR-B(WS-TEMP-POSN:1) NOT = SPACE ) OR
V                   ( WS-TEMP-POSN = 1 )
V               CONTINUE
V           END-PERFORM
V
V           COMPUTE FSCA-STR-B-LEN = WS-TEMP-POSN
V           .
V
V       2000-CONVERT-STRINGS-TO-UPPER.
V      *
V      *  This paragraph converts all letters in string A and String B
V      *  to uppercase.  Called only if case-insensitive is requested.
V      *
V             INSPECT FSCA-STR-A CONVERTING "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
V                                        TO "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
V
V             INSPECT FSCA-STR-B CONVERTING "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
V                                        TO "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
V             .
V
V       3000-SEARCH-AND-SET-IND.
V      *
V      *  Try to find string B within string A, taking the lengths of
V      *  the strings into account.  If, for example, string A has a
V      *  length of 100 and string B has a length of 30, then we don't
V      *  need to check for string B beyond byte 71 in string A.  This
V      *  is the purpose of WS-FURTHEST-RIGHT-POSN.
V      *
V           COMPUTE WS-FURTHEST-RIGHT-POSN = ( FSCA-STR-A-LEN -
V                                             FSCA-STR-B-LEN ) + 1
V           SET FSCA-NOT-FOUND TO TRUE
V
V           PERFORM WITH TEST BEFORE
V                   VARYING WS-TEMP-POSN FROM 1 BY 1
V                   UNTIL WS-TEMP-POSN > WS-FURTHEST-RIGHT-POSN
V               IF FSCA-STR-A(WS-TEMP-POSN:FSCA-STR-B-LEN) =
V                  FSCA-STR-B(1:FSCA-STR-B-LEN)
V
V                   SET FSCA-FOUND TO TRUE
V
V               END-IF
V           END-PERFORM
V           .

